english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Te Maata sɛɛ e nyiaa, “Ayi me Gbeŋgyoo, mɛɛ lɛɛ di nyi nyaŋ yɛna nyeelɛɛre, Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon dɛɛ daa nyi waa kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ.” Yesu kewii

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Maata kekolosi nombia kɛŋa taŋ nɛ, ɔ besewɔ gyu dekpaŋalaŋ man ke baake ɔ naabu Mɛɛre lee yenaŋ te ɔ yako e nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo ŋon te kɔŋ te ɔ kpa nya kɔŋ.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Mɛɛre kenyii mena nɛ, ɔ korowɔ bileŋ gyu ke gyaŋee na e.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ na Yesu ta gyoo ta donɔɔ keŋ man ya. Na ɔ sɛɛ ɔ kyaa botɔɔ keŋ Maata be gyu ke tuŋ e nɛ.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ mɔ na, Gyudatena te kɔŋ dekpaŋalaŋ keŋ man bee kolosi do Mɛɛre. Ba kena ŋgba Mɛɛre ba koro karatetee dokoloŋ lee ɔ ne gyu nɛ, na baŋ gyeŋ nyi ɔ ne gyu baa ɔ ŋmɛɛtee Lasarose yebɔɔ keŋ tɛɛ ɔ kaa wii. Mena dɔɔ baŋ mɔ korowɔ sila e.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Mɛɛre ke gyu kelii botɔɔ keŋ Yesu kyaa nɛ te ɔ tisiwɔ buŋ Yesu nawɔɔ tɛɛ te ɔ yako e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, nyeŋ kyaa kɛbo na nafɔ me ŋmɛɛtee deŋ ta yem ya.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Yesu kena mena keŋ Mɛɛre na Gyudatena baŋ be silana e ne wii nɛ, takaa e te dekɔkɔrɔkɔɔ kyaŋa e.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ bɔɔse wɔ nyiaa, “Aleŋ te ɛ wuu e?” Te be yako e nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo, kɔŋ na n kaa kɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus started crying,
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu wiiwɔ.

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Keŋte Gyudatena baŋ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Ɛ kɛɛ mena keŋ ɔ ne gyae Lasarose nombia.”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Mɔna balaŋ baale yakowɔ nyiaa, “Na Yesu kei gyuusuna siayɛlɛɛsate ŋon sia yee? Nafɔ ŋgba ŋon talewɔ lɛɛ Lasarose na ɔ ba yem ya?”

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Dekɔkɔrɔkɔɔ kyaŋa Yesu bela te ɔ gyuu botɔɔ keŋ bɔɔ wuu Lasarose nɛ. Na be wuu e bo boe bɔɔ daale maŋ, te be biliŋi boe dinaa daale tɔ ke nɔɔ.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu yako wɔ nyiaa, “Ɛ biliŋi boe keŋ lee yebɔɔ keŋ nɔɔman.” Te yere ŋon ɔ deesi Maata yako Yesu nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo, debaŋ kei dɔɔ ɔ ne wɔlɛɛ. Nawolo nyi gyɛŋ yɛna weeya anaara yaa ŋgba bɔɔ wuu e nɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Te Yesu yako e nyiaa, “Ma te yako neŋ nyi akpaa n lɛɛ maŋ di na nyaŋ kena Wurubuarɛ gyoorobiiri keŋ yee?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ be biliŋi boe keŋ lee yebɔɔ keŋ nɔɔman. Botɔɔ te Yesu gyinaa ɔ nyee kɛɛ adido te ɔ fanewɔ fa Wurubuarɛ nyiaa, “Taata, mɛɛ fa neŋ karaŋ ŋgba n ne nyii maŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: Maŋ dɔɔ ma gyeŋ nyi n ne nyii maŋ debaŋ kamasɛ, mɔna balaŋ baŋ ba seŋɛɛ kɛbo dɔɔ te mɛɛ yako mena na baa nyiŋ gyeŋ nyi nyaŋ kpila na maŋ.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Yesu ke yako mena taŋ nɛ, te ɔ fae yeesa keŋkeŋ baake Lasarose nyiaa, “Lasarose, lee kɔŋ!”

english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Keŋte Lasarose ŋon ɔ ba yem nɛ leewɔ kɔŋ, na kewuu abɔɔ ŋan bɔɔ mo bake ɔ nyiŋmaase na ɔ nawɔɔ, na kanyaŋ keŋ bɔɔ mo bake ɔ sia gbɛɛ nɛ doo mena. Te Yesu yako wɔ nyiaa “Ɛ booli e, na waa ta.” Ba kebake Yesu nyeeman Mateo

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Gyudatena burum baŋ bɔɔ kɔŋ Mɛɛre gyaŋ te bɔɔ naa kpene keŋ Yesu be yɛɛ nɛ lɛɛ e di.

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: Mɔna be man baale besewɔ gyu Farasiitena baŋ gyaŋ gyu ke yako wɔ kpene keŋ Yesu be yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Keŋte Wurubuarɛ saese kegyiise na Farasiitena baake donɔɔ kegyiise gyaŋee. Te be bɔɔse dɔŋa nyiaa “Sena yaa dɛɛ yɛɛ? Nawolo nyi balee kei ne yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia burum.

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Akpaa de tina e yela te ɔ gyakaa ɔ ne yɛɛ mena tom kei na, balaŋ baŋ pou baa lɛɛ e di na ke yela Romantena kaa yɛlɛɛ de Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ na baa lɛo de tɛɛle pou.”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Te balaŋ baŋ man ŋolo ŋon bɛɛ baake e nyi Kaifase ŋon ɔ be yɛɛ saese kegyia kulutoo kenaŋ man nɛ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ ba gyeŋ daale ya.

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: Ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi dei nyi walaŋ dokoloŋ waa yeŋ fa balaŋ baŋ pou kela keŋ nyi tɛɛle pou balaŋ kewɔlɛɛ yee?”

english_verse: Caiaphas did not say this on his own. As high priest that year, he was prophesying that Jesus would die for the nation.
translation_verse: Te yɛɛ Kaifase gbagba agyueŋ yaa ɔ moowɔ yako nombia kɛŋa ya, mɔna keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia kulutoo kenaŋ man dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ yela ɔ yako mena nombia ŋenaŋ see nyi, kaboena nyi Yesu waa yeŋ fa Gyudatena pou.

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: Te yɛɛ nyi Gyudatena baageŋ te Yesu waa yeŋ fa ya, mɔna waa yeŋ bo fa Wurubuarɛ bia baŋ pou bɔɔ yaasee nɛ na waa nyiŋ mo wɔ kaa yilaa.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: Leenaŋ wee kenaŋ keŋ kegyiise baŋ be gyaŋee nɛ, te be fiasɛɛ bɛɛ gyae gbɛɛ keŋ baa mo ko Yesu.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ na Yesu bɛɛ tekaa lese ɔ wose debɔɔ Gyudia tɛɛle man bela ya. Mɔna ɔ leewɔ botɔɔ gyu donɔɔ keŋ bɛɛ baake ke nyi Eferam te ka benaa na depampaa dinaa daale nɛ. Botɔɔ te ŋon na ɔ kaseela baŋ gyuuwɔ ke kyaa.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: Na Gyudatena nyeekelɛɛwee kedi keŋ ta benaa, mena dɔɔ balaŋ burum lee donɔɔse ŋan man gyu Gyerusalɛm be kaa gyoraa ba wose pɛna nyeekelɛɛwee kedi keŋ kelii.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ man pou na bɛɛ kɛo Yesu. Be ka seŋ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man nɛ be bɔɔse dɔŋa nyiaa, “Sena yɛna ya gyueŋ? Doona ɔ be gyae waa kɔŋ nyeekelɛɛwee kedi kei man ya?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Na Wurubuarɛ saese kegyiise na Farasiitena baŋ te yako wɔ nyiaa, walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ Yesu dekyae na ɔ kaa yako wɔ na be kaa kyaŋ e.

english_verse: Judas did not really care about the poor. He asked this because he carried the moneybag and sometimes would steal from it.
translation_verse: Gyudase keyako nombia kɛŋa nɛ, na ayematena wose man yaa ɔ na gyueŋ ya, mɔna ɔ yɛɛ ŋmɛɛlate e. Ŋon na see na be kɔba, te ɔ ne kyaa mo ŋaale desina ɔ wose.

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ be gyae bakɛɛna faareŋse gyu be kaa gyaŋee na e na bɛɛ fae yeesa nyiaa, “Lɛɛ daa. De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ waa hiraa walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne kɔŋ ɔ yele man nɛ, na waa hiraa Iseraetena gyoo ŋon mɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yesu gyae afurum te ɔ kyaawɔ ɔ dɔɔ, ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see be yako nɛ. Nombia ŋenaŋ yɛna nyiaa,

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Keŋte Mɛɛre moo nuŋ ofoŋofoŋte keŋ ke dana koyadoŋ nɛ porontia tɔɔ, te ɔ kaa toosi ke woli Yesu nawɔɔ te ɔ moo ɔ nyeenyɔɔse feefo ɔ nawɔɔ ŋan. Te nuŋ keŋ ofoŋ lɛɛ dekpaŋalaŋ keŋ pou. Daŋ keŋ bɛɛ baake ke nyi Naade nɛ te ba moowɔ yɛɛ nuŋ kenaŋ

english_verse: A lot of people came when they heard that Jesus was there. They also wanted to see Lazarus, because Jesus had raised him from death.
translation_verse: Gyudatena burum kenyii nyi Yesu kyaa Bɛtani donɔɔ man nɛ, be gyuuwɔ botɔɔ. Na Yesu waageŋ dɔɔ te be gyuuwɔ botɔɔ ya, mɔna bɛɛ gyae baa naa Lasarose ŋon Yesu be gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ mɔ.

english_verse: A meal had been prepared for Jesus. Martha was doing the serving, and Lazarus himself was there.
translation_verse: Be lɔɔ yele saa weenɛɛ fa Yesu. Maata mɔ kpuɛ baŋ bɛɛ kpɛlɛɛ weenɛɛ ŋan nɛ man. Na Lasarose mɔ kpuɛ na baŋ be kyaa bee dii nɛ.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Te Yesu kaseela baŋ man ŋolo ŋon bɛɛ baake e nyi Gyudase Isekarɔte, ŋon waa kaa lese Yesu fa na baa ko nɛ yakowɔ nyiaa,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu yako e nyiaa, “Ɛ tina alo ŋon yela! Ɔ yɛɛ kei baa mo daa me kewuu.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: Ayematena dɔɔ be kyaa ɛ gyaŋ debaŋ kamasɛ, mɔna maŋ dɔɔ mɔɔ gyae maa kyaa ɛ gyaŋ kekpaa ya.” Gyudatena kegyiise kegyae gbɛɛ baa ko Lasarose

english_verse: So the chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ saese kegyiise baŋ mɔ gyae gbɛɛ baa ko Lasarose mɔ,

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Be gyuuwɔ Filipo ŋon ɔ ba lee Bɛtesaida keŋ ke kyaa Galelia tɛɛle man nɛ gyaŋ ke yako e nyiaa, “Kegyia, dɛɛ gyae dɛɛ naa Yesu.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Farasiitena baŋ yako dɔŋa nyiaa, “Ŋgba ɛ ne naa nyi da te tale yɛɛ kolo ya na? Ɛ kɛɛ! Balaŋ pou silana e.” Girikitena kekɛo Yesu

english_verse: So Father, bring glory to yourself. A voice from heaven then said, “I have already brought glory to myself, and I will do it again!”
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu fanewɔ nyiaa, “Me kya, lese n gyoorobiiri wola.” Te be nyii woya ŋaale kolosiwɔ lee adido nyiaa, “Me te wulaa lese me gyoorobiiri wola, te maa bese lese ke wola.”

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: Ɔ besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Wurubuarɛ te yɛlɛɛ be sia na bɔɔ nyiŋ naa ya, te ɔ tɔɔ ba agyueŋse na bɔɔ tale nyii kolo man ya. Na mena ya na nafɔ baa kyɛɛkee lee be gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ man na baa kɔŋ me gyaŋ na maa kyɔ wɔ.”

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Tɛɛ kena nɛ, balaŋ burum baŋ bɔɔ kɔŋ nyeekelɛɛwee kedi keŋ man nyiiwɔ nyi Yesu dɔŋ gbɛɛ ɔ ne kɔŋ Gyerusalɛm donɔɔ man.

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “Ɛmɛɛ Gyerusalɛmtena, ɛ na yela ɛ wɔe ke lɔ ŋon ya. Ɛ kɛɛ, ɛ gyoo ne kɔŋ, ɔ kyaa afurum bu dɔɔ ɔ ne kɔŋ.”

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: Kewalaŋ keŋ nɛ, ɔ kaseela baŋ te nyii nombia kɛŋa man ya. Mɔna kenaŋ wɔle Wurubuarɛ ka lese Yesu gyoorobiiri wola nɛ te be tɔɔsewɔ nyiaa, nombia ŋan Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see be yako lee ɔ wose man nɛ kɔŋala mena nɛ.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Keŋ dɔɔ te balaŋ burum leewɔ donɔɔ man kɔŋ kaa gyaŋee na e nɛ, nawolo nyi be nyiiwɔ nyi ɔ yɛɛ mena gyakoloŋ nombii kei.

english_verse: Philip told Andrew. Then the two of them went to Jesus and told him. The Son of Man Must Be Lifted Up
translation_verse: Keŋte Filipo mɔ gyuuwɔ ke yako Anderiase. Te be balaŋ bala gyuuwɔ keyako Yesu.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Yesu tira nombia kɛŋa nɔɔ fa wɔ nyiaa, “Debaŋ keŋ te lii nyi baa lese maŋ Deniwalaŋ Bu ŋon gyoorobiiri keŋ wola.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon ɛ ke nyii nyiaa, nyi akpaa be ta mo wambelebii do bɔɔ man na ke ka yeŋ ya nɛ, na ke sɛɛ ke yɛɛ bii dokoloŋ. Mɔna nyi akpaa ba mo ke do bɔɔ man te ke da yem te ke de tuu na te kɛɛ see bia burum.

english_verse: If you love your life, you will lose it. If you give it up in this world, you will be given eternal life.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne gyae ŋon gbagba nyeedoŋ kela Wurubuarɛ nɛ, waa yeŋ leki. Mɔna walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon lee Wurubuarɛ nombia dɔɔ ɔ be famenɛ na ŋon gbagba nyeedoŋ ya nɛ, Wurubuarɛ waa fa e nyeedoŋ kekpaa.”

english_verse: Now I am deeply troubled, and I don't know what to say. But I must not ask my Father to keep me from this time of suffering. In fact, I came into the world to suffer.
translation_verse: Te Yesu besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Nɛnɛɛ dekɔkɔrɔkɔɔ te kyaŋ maŋ nideli, te sena yaa maa yako? ‘Maa yako nyi me kya, lese maŋ lee mena kaale dinaa kei man?’ Mɔna mena kaale kei dɔɔ te me kɔŋawɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.”

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Balaŋ burum baŋ ba seŋɛɛ botɔɔ te bɔɔ nyii woya ŋan nɛ, be man baale yakowɔ nyiaa, “Ɔga faela” te baale mɔ yakowɔ nyi, “Wurubuarɛ kpilale ŋolo kolosi la na e lee adido.”

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu yako wɔ nyiaa, “Ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ te mena nɔɔwoya kɛŋa kɔŋawɔ, na maŋ dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ yɛna debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa di balaŋ nombia tɛɛle kei dɔɔ. Nɛnɛɛ te Wurubuarɛ waa gegi ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ ne di gyoori tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ lee ɔ gbeli keŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Mɔna maŋ dɔɔ nyi akpaa be gyina maŋ adido lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, maa wɔŋ walaŋ kamasɛ benaa ma wose.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Ɔ kekolosi kei na wola yeŋ keŋ waa kaa yeŋ nɛ baa.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te balaŋ burum baŋ tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “De kalawɔ lee da mmaraa tɔne man nyiaa, Nyeelɛɛre ŋon waa kyaa keŋ ɔ be gyae waa yeŋ ya. Te sena yaa n ne yako nyi kaboena nyi baa gyina Deniwalaŋ Bu ŋon adido? Amɔte yɛna Deniwalaŋ Bu kei?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Te Yesu tiranɔɔ fa wɔ nyiaa, “Keŋmaŋee keŋ nyiŋa ke kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ ɛ ta ke man na ditiŋtɛɛ be nyiŋ futaa ŋon ya. Nawolo nyi walaŋ ŋon ɔ dɔŋɛɛ ditiŋtɛɛ man nɛ, ɔ ba gyeŋ botɔɔ keŋ ɔ ne gyu ya.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne fa keŋmaŋee nyiŋa ɔ kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, ɛ lɛɛ e di na ɛ kenyiŋ bese balaŋ baŋ be doo keŋmaŋee man.” Yesu kekolosi nombia kɛŋa taŋ nɛ, ɔ wɔŋa ɔ wose kekyaa yenaŋ daale keŋ bɔɔ ne naa e ya. Gyudatena burum te lɛɛ Yesu di ya

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Yesu yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia burum be siaman, mɔna kɛŋa pou wɔle na be bɛe ba te lɛɛ e di ya.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Kei yela nombia ŋan Wurubuarɛ dekpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔre Yesaya be yako nɛ kɔŋawɔ ampaŋ. Yesaya yakowɔ nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo, amɔte lɛɛ na nombia ŋan dɔɔ yako nɛ di? Amɔte te de Gbeŋgyoo lese ɔ wɔɔle wola?”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ bɔɔ ne tale baa lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia di ya ŋgba mena keŋ Yesaya be yako nɛ.

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Yesaya te kolosi nombia kɛŋa yakaa ya, mɔna ɔ wulaa naa Yesu gyoorobiiri keŋ dinɔɔ keŋ dɔɔ te ɔ kolosiwɔ lee ɔ wose man.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Nombia kɛŋa wɔle nɛ Gyudatena kegyiise burum lɛɛ Yesu di, mɔna Farasiitena baŋ dɔɔ ba te tale lese ba kelɛɛdi keŋ debɔɔ ya, nawolo nyi be yeewɔ nyi Farasiitena baŋ baa tɔɔ wɔ gbɛɛ nyi be na kɔŋ bɔ ɔsom deni man bela ya.

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: Be ta lese ba kelɛɛdi keŋ debɔɔ ya nawolo nyi bɛɛ gyae bo nyi balaŋ ka lese ba yele kela Wurubuarɛ ka lese ba yele.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu gyinaa ɔ nɔɔ kolosi nyiaa, “Nyaŋ ŋon n lɛɛ maŋ di nɛ, na maageŋ te n lɛɛwɔ di ya mɔna ŋon ɔ be kpila maŋ nɛ mɔ yaa n lɛɛwɔ di.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ walaŋ ŋon n naa maŋ na, n te naa walaŋ ŋon ɔ be kpila maŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Me kɔŋae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ŋgba keŋmaŋee nɛ na maa ŋmaŋee fa balaŋ. Nyaŋ ŋon n lɛɛ maŋ di na n be gyae n ke dɔɔ ditiŋtɛɛ man ya.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ nyii me nombia te ɔ te lɛɛ ŋa do ya na, mɔɔ gyae maa di ɔ nombia ya. Nawolo nyi ma te kɔŋ me kaa di balaŋ nombia tɛɛle kei dɔɔ na maa bu wɔ fɔɔ ya, mɔna me kɔŋae me kaa lɛɛ ba nyee.

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ma te kolosi maŋ gbagba me doŋ man ya, mɔna me kya ŋon ɔ be kpila maŋ nɛ, ŋon yako na maŋ kpene keŋ maa yako na mena keŋ maa yako ke.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Te maŋ gyeŋ mɔ nyi kpene keŋ ɔ be yako daa nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ, keŋ ne faa na nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ. Mena dɔɔ kpene keŋ mɛɛ yako nɛ, yɛɛ keŋ me kya be yako maŋ nyi maa yako.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Pɛ tɛɛ kena na Gyudatena kedi ba nyeekelɛɛwee keŋ nɛ, na Yesu wulaa gyeŋ nyi ɔ debaŋ te lii keŋ waa lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyu ɔ kya gyaŋ. Mɔna mena keŋ ɔ ne gyae ɔ balaŋ baŋ be kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, mena te waa gyae be nombia kelii ɔto.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Yesu na ɔ kaseela baŋ ke kyaa baa di be balinɔɔ weenɛɛ nɛ, na ɔbɔnsam taŋ ka mo nombiakumɛɛ do Simɔn bu Gyudase Isekarɔte nyeeman nyi waa lese Yesu fa na baa ko.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu mɔ gyeŋ nyi ɔ kya ta mo kpene kamasɛ do ɔ nyiŋmaa man, te ɔ gyeŋ mɔ nyi ɔ lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ bo kɔŋ te ɔ gyaŋ te waa bese gyu.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ Yesu korowɔ lee weenɛɛ ŋan tɛɛ te ɔ kpee ɔ kegba wurikyim keŋ ɔ doona nɛ, te ɔ moo bɔroboa kpaŋ ɔ teŋa man.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ toosi loŋ do tasa man te ɔ fiasɛɛ ɔ ne faafo ɔ kaseela baŋ nawɔɔ, te ɔ moo bɔroboa keŋ kpaŋɛɛ ɔ teŋa man nɛ feefo wɔ.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Ɔ kelii Simɔn Pita gyaŋ nɛ Pita bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, nyaŋ ne gyaela n kefaafo me nawɔɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Te Yesu tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Kpene keŋ mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ n be gyae n ke nyii ke man debokeiman ya, mɔna nyaŋ kaa nyii ke man wɔle wɔle.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Keŋte Pita yako e nyiaa, “Koa, mɔɔ sɛɛ na n ke faafo me nawɔɔ korakora ya.” Botɔɔ te Yesu tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Akpaa ma te faafo n nawɔɔ ya na, daa na neŋ be doo daale man ya.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Te Simɔn Pita yako e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, akpaa mena na na faafo me nawɔɔ kaageŋ ya, mɔna faafo me nyiŋmaase na ma nyee mɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Te Yesu yako e nyiaa, “Walaŋ ŋon ɔ be sɔɔ nɛ ɔ wose pou ta lee. Ɔ be kaboena nyi waa sɔ bela ya. Kaboena bo nyi waa faafo ɔ nawɔɔ kaageŋ. Ɛ popou wose ta lee, mɔna walaŋ dokoloŋ wose danaana ayimɛɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi na Yesu gyeŋ walaŋ ŋon waa lese e fa, mena dɔɔ te ɔ yakowɔ nyi “Walaŋ dokoloŋ wose danaana ayimɛɛ.”

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Yesu kefaafo be nawɔɔ taŋ nɛ, ɔ moo ɔ kegba wurikyim keŋ do bela te ɔ gyuuwɔ kekyaa ɔ dekyae man. Te ɔ bɔɔse wɔ nyiaa, “Ɛ ne nyii kpene keŋ mɔɔ yɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ man?

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Ɛ ne baake maŋ nyi ɛ wolale na ɛ Gbeŋgyoo. Dei ŋgba ɛ ne baake maŋ mena nɛ, nawolo nyi ŋe kaboena maŋ.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: Me yɛɛ kei baa wola ŋon na ɛmɛɛ mɔ kenyiŋ yɛɛ fa dɔŋa ŋgba mena keŋ maŋ be yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Anokoare yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon nyiaa, gbeŋi bɛɛ kela ɔ gbeŋgyoo ya, te kpilale mɔ bɛɛ kela walaŋ ŋon ɔ be kpila e nɛ ya.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: Na ɛ popou yaa me dana ya, nawolo nyi ma gyeŋ balaŋ baŋ mɔɔ lese. Mɔna kaboena nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan bɔɔ ŋmarase see nɛ dɛɛ kɔŋ mena. Be ŋmarasewɔ see nyiaa, walaŋ ŋon daa na e na do nyiŋmaa di nɛ, ta koro seŋ me dɔɔ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me wulaa mɛɛ yako ŋon nombii kei baa pɛna ka ke kɔŋ, na ka de kɔŋ na ɛ ke lɛɛ di nyiaa, maŋ yɛna ŋon ɔ kyaa pɛte be yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kaseele ŋon tuuwɔ benaa na Yesu te ɔ bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, amɔte yaa n dana?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Yesu keyako nombia kɛŋa taŋ nɛ, nombia takaa e ɔ konɔɔ man nideli te ɔ kolosiwɔ balaŋ man keŋ ɔ ta mo kolo weese ya nyi, “Ɛ man ŋolo waa lese maŋ fa na baa ko.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Ɔ kaseela baŋ man ŋolo ŋon Yesu ne gyae nideli nɛ kyaa la benaa e,

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: mena dɔɔ Simɔn Pita fatee e te ɔ yakowɔ nyi, “Bɔɔse e walaŋ ŋon ɔ dana.”

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: Na Gyudase ne kɛɛ na be kɔba dɔɔ, mena dɔɔ kaseela baŋ baale gyueŋwɔ nyi Yesu yako e baa nyi waa gyu ke lɛɛ weenɛɛ ŋan baa mo gyu kedi ba nyeekelɛɛwee kedi keŋ man nɛ, yaa waa lese kɔba fa ayematena.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ Gyudase ka betaa lɛɛ bodobodo keŋ di pɛ, te ɔ leewɔ bileŋ. Na tɛɛ te yuu.

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu besewɔ yako nyi, “Akpaa Wurubuarɛ waa ta me dɔɔ lese ɔ gyoorobiiri wola na, mena mɔ te waa ta ŋon gbagba dɔɔ lese me gyoorobiiri wola. Be gyae ke kyare pɛte waa yɛɛ nombii kei ya.

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Me bia mɔɔ gyae maa kyaa ɛ gyaŋ kyare ya. Ɛ ke kɛo maŋ, mɔna ŋgba mena keŋ mɔɔ yako Gyudatena baŋ nɛ, mena yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon debokeiman nyiaa ‘Botɔɔ keŋ mee gyu nɛ ɛ be gyae ɛ ke tale kɔŋ botɔɔ ya.’

english_verse: Simon Peter asked, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “You can't go with me now, but later on you will.”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Simɔn Pita bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, aleŋ yaa n ne gyuu?” Te Yesu tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Botɔɔ keŋ mee gyu nɛ, n be gyae n ke tale sila maŋ debokeiman ya, mɔna nyaŋ kaa sila maŋ wɔle wɔle.”

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Te Pita bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, weera dɔɔ te mɔɔ tale sila neŋ debaŋ kei ya? Ma te sɛɛ nyi maa yeŋ fa neŋ.”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Te Yesu tiranɔɔ nyiaa, “N ne lɛɛdi nyi nyaŋ ke tale yeŋ fa maŋ? Ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako neŋ nyi pɛ kegyim kelɔ woya nɛ, nyaŋ ke bɛɛ betabotooro nyi n ba gyeŋ maŋ korakora ya.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu yako ɔ kaseela baŋ nyiaa, “Ɛ na yeli ɛ wɔe ke lɔ ŋon ya. Ɛ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di na ɛ ke lɛɛ maŋ mɔ di.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Denɛɛ burum doo me kya ŋon dekpaŋalaŋ man. Akpaa te yɛɛ mena ya na nafɔ mɔɔ yako nyi mee gyu me kaa desina akyaese see ŋon ya.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Akpaa me gyu ke desina botɔɔ taŋ na maa bese kɔŋ kaa mo ŋon gyu me gyaŋ, na botɔɔ keŋ me kyaa na ɛmɛɛ mɔ ke kyaa botɔɔ.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ keŋ mee gyu nɛ ɛ gyeŋ ke gbɛɛ.”

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Tomase bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, dɔɔ gyeŋ botɔɔ keŋ ne gyu ya, sena te dɛɛ yɛɛ na dɛɛ gyeŋ ke gbɛɛ?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Maŋ yɛna gbɛɛ keŋ na anokoare keŋ na nyeedoŋ keŋ. Ŋolo be kyaa nyi waa tale gyu me kya ŋon gyaŋ keŋ ɔ te tɛɛ me dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa yeŋ gyeŋ maŋ na nafɔ ɛ ka gyeŋ me kya ŋon mɔ. Lee gyɛŋ ne gyu nɛ, ɛ ta gyeŋ e te ɛ ne naa e mɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Te Yesu mɔ bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Filipo, mena dɔɔ leenaŋ ma ke kyaa ɛ gyaŋ kei nɛ, na ɛ ba gyeŋ maŋ yee? Walaŋ ŋon ɔ naa maŋ na, ɔ te naa me kya ŋon mɔ. Sena yaa n ke tale yako maŋ nyi, ‘Maa wola ŋon me kya ŋon bela?’

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Filipo n bɛɛ lɛɛ di nyi daa na me kya ŋon yɛɛ dokoloŋ yee? Na maŋ gbagba me baam dɔɔ te mee kolosi nombia kɛŋa ya. Mɔna me kya ŋon ɔ doo me man nɛ, ŋon ne tɛɛ la me dɔɔ yɛɛ ɔ tom.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Me yako nyi daa na me kya ŋon yɛɛ dokoloŋ na, ɛ lɛɛ maŋ di. Akpaa nyi ɛ be lɛɛ maŋ di koraŋ ya nɛ, ɛ kɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia ŋan mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ na ɛ ke lɛɛ maŋ di.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ yako ŋon ɛ ke nyii nyiaa, walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon waa lɛɛ maŋ di nɛ, waa yɛɛ abɔɔ ŋan mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ, te waa yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia kela ŋan mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ. Nawolo nyi mee gyu me kya ŋon gyaŋ.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Te kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ke bɔɔse lee ma yele man na, me kya waa yɛɛ fa ŋon na maŋ ɔ bu ŋon ke yela baa lese ɔ yele.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Akpaa ɛ bɔɔse kpene kamasɛ ma yele man na, maa yɛɛ fa ŋon.” Yesu yakowɔ see nyi Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon waa kɔŋ

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: “Akpaa ɛ ne gyae maŋ na, nafɔ ɛ ke di maŋ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Te maa waase me kya ŋon na waa fa ŋon walaŋ ŋon waa yako do ŋon, na ɔ kaa kyaa me nawɔɔ man kekpaakekpaa. Ŋon yɛna ɔ feliŋ ŋon waa lese Wurubuarɛ dinɔɔ wola nɛ.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ be loo gyakaa tɛɛle kei abɔɔ dɔɔ nɛ, bɔɔ gyae baa tale lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ya. Nawolo nyi bɔɔ ne naa e ya te bɔɔ gyeŋ e mɔ ya. Mɔna ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ gyeŋ e, nawolo nyi ɔ kyaa na ŋon te ɔ doo ɛ man.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ me lam nɛ, mɔɔ gyae maa tina ŋon yela ŋgba yoyolobiise nɛ ya, mɔna maa bese kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Teka kyomii balaŋ be gyae baa tekaa naa maŋ bela ya, mɔna ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ kena maŋ. Keŋ me dana nyeedoŋ dɔɔ ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ de lii na ɛ kena nyi daa na me kya ŋon kyaa la, te ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ kyaa na maŋ te maŋ mɔ me kyaa na ŋon.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ lɛɛ maŋ mmaraase ŋan do te ɔ di ŋe dɔɔ na, ŋon ne gyae na me nombia ta me kya ŋon mɔ waa gyae ŋon ɔ ne gyae me nombia nɛ nombia. Maŋ mɔ maa gyae ɔ nombia na maa lese ma wose wola e.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Gyudase bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo, sena te gyae ke tale kɔŋ nyi nyaŋ ka lese n wose wola daa daageŋ, te n be gyae n ka lese wola balaŋ pou ya?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Akpaa ŋolo ne gyae maŋ na, waa lɛɛ me nombia ŋan mɛɛ wolo nɛ do, na daa na me kya ke gyae ɔ nombia na de kaa kyaa ɔ gyaŋ.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ gyae me nombia ya na, ɔ bee di me nombia ŋan mɛɛ wolo nɛ dɔɔ ya. Nombia ŋan mɛɛ yako ŋon nɛ ta lee me gyaŋ ya mɔna ŋa lee me kya ŋon ɔ be kpila maŋ nɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ me sɛɛ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon nombia kɛŋa.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon waa yako do ŋon nɛ, ŋon yɛna feliŋ ŋon me kya waa kpila ma yele man nɛ. Waa kaa wola ŋon abɔɔ pou, na waa tɔɔse ŋon abɔɔ ŋan pou mɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: Ma wosefɛɛreŋ dɛɛ kyaa na ŋon, mɛɛ fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ. Na wosefɛɛreŋ keŋ balaŋ ne nyim tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ yaa mɛɛ fa ŋon ya, mɔna ma wosefɛɛreŋ gbagba yaa mɛɛ fa ŋon. Ɛ na yele ɛ wɔe ke lɔ ŋon ya, te ɛ na yele gyakoloŋ mɔ ke kyaŋ ŋon ya.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: Me yako ŋon nyi, mee gyu mɔna maa bese kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ. Akpaa nyi yeŋ ne gyae me nombia na nafɔ gyae ke yɛɛ ŋon gyoŋ nyi mee gyu me kya ŋon gyaŋ, nawolo nyi ɔ kela maŋ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: Me wulaa mɛɛ yako nombia kɛŋa pou pɛna ŋa ke kɔŋ, na akpaa nyi ŋa de kɔŋ na, ɛ ke nyiŋ lɛɛ maŋ di.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ gyae maa tekaa kolosi na ŋon burum bela ya, nawolo nyi ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ ne di doŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ ne kɔŋ. Ɔ be taŋ doŋ me dɔɔ berɛ ya,

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: mɔna mɛɛ gyae balaŋ pou ka gyeŋ nyi mɛɛ gyae me kya ŋon nombia, te kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɔ yako maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ na keŋ te mɛɛ yɛɛ. Ɛ koro dɛɛ lee kɛbo.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu besewɔ yako ɔ kaseela baŋ nyiaa, “Maŋ yɛna daŋ keŋ gbagba, te me kya yɛna wɔɔfarale ŋon.

english_verse: He cuts away every branch of mine that doesn't produce fruit. But he trims clean every branch that does produce fruit, so that it will produce even more fruit.
translation_verse: Tombii kamasɛ keŋ doo me man te ke bɛɛ see bia ya nɛ waa kara ke leki. Mɔna tombii kamasɛ keŋ doo me man te kɛɛ se bia na, waa kpaase ke na ke kenyiŋ se bia burum.

english_verse: You are already clean because of what I have said to you.
translation_verse: Lee nombia ma ayakoŋ ŋon kɛŋa dɔɔ nɛ, ŋe taŋ ke yela ɛ wose ta lee keŋ ayimɛɛ be doo ɛ man ya.

english_verse: Stay joined to me, and I will stay joined to you. Just as a branch cannot produce fruit unless it stays joined to the vine, you cannot produce fruit unless you stay joined to me.
translation_verse: Ɛ doo me maŋ, na maŋ mɔ ke doo ɛ man. Tombii kamasɛ be kyaa nyi ke gyae ke tale se bia ka wose dɔɔ, keŋ kɔɔ towaa na ke daŋ ya. Mena mɔ yaa ɛmɛɛ mɔ be gyae ɛ ke tale yɛɛ kolo ɛ wose dɔɔ keŋ nyi ɛ be doo me man ya.

english_verse: I am the vine, and you are the branches. If you stay joined to me, and I stay joined to you, then you will produce lots of fruit. But you cannot do anything without me.
translation_verse: Maŋ yɛna daŋ keŋ te ɛmɛɛ yɛna ke tombia ŋan. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ doo me man, te maŋ mɔ doo ɔ man nɛ, waa se bia burum. Nawolo nyi ɛ be gyae ɛ ke tale yɛɛ kolo ɛ wose dɔɔ keŋ mɔɔ kpuɛ na ŋon ya.

english_verse: If you don't stay joined to me, you will be thrown away. You will be like dry branches that are gathered up and burned in a fire.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ be doo me man ya nɛ, ɔ yɛɛ ŋgba tombii keŋ bɔɔ kare leki te kɔɔ wolo nɛ. Baa yilaa mena tombia ŋenaŋ bo na baa mo ŋa do boalaŋ man na ŋa ke kpa.

english_verse: Stay joined to me and let my teachings become part of you. Then you can pray for whatever you want, and your prayer will be answered.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ɛ sɛɛ doo me man te me nombia ŋan mɔ de doo ɛ man nɛ, kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ke bɔɔse na maa yɛɛ fa ŋon.

english_verse: I have loved you, just as my Father has loved me. So remain faithful to my love for you.
translation_verse: Ŋgba mena keŋ me kya ŋon ne gyae me nombia nɛ, mena ke yaa maŋ mɔ ne gyae ɛ nombia. Mena dɔɔ ɛ yela maa gyae ŋon kelii ɔto.

english_verse: If you obey me, I will keep loving you, just as my Father keeps loving me, because I have obeyed him.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ɛ di ma mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ nɛ, maa gyae ɛ nombia kelii ɔto ŋgba mena keŋ mɔɔ di me kya ŋon mmaraase dɔɔ te ɔ ne gyae me nombia nɛ.

english_verse: I have told you this to make you as completely happy as I am.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ yako mena nombia kɛŋa baa na ke yela ma gyoŋ keŋ ke doo ɛ man, na ɛ ke nyiŋ di gyoŋ nideli.

english_verse: Now I tell you to love each other, as I have loved you.
translation_verse: Mmaraa keŋ mɛɛ fa ŋon yɛna nyiaa, ɛ gyae dɔŋa ŋgba mena keŋ mɔɔ gyae ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: The greatest way to show love for friends is to die for them.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kegyae daale be kyaa keŋ ka kela kegyae keŋ ŋolo waa gyae ɔ gyoona na waa yeŋ fa wɔ nɛ ya.

english_verse: Servants don't know what their master is doing, and so I don't speak to you as my servants. I speak to you as my friends, and I have told you everything my Father has told me.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ tekaa baake ŋon me tewulɛɛ bela ya, nawolo nyi tobaale ba gyeŋ ɔ gbeŋgyoo nyeeman nombia ya. Mɔna mɛɛ baake ŋon me gyoona, nawolo nyi ma te yako ŋon kpene kamasɛ keŋ me kya be yako maŋ.

english_verse: You did not choose me. I chose you and sent you out to produce fruit, the kind of fruit that will last. Then my Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Na ɛmɛɛ lese na maŋ ya, mɔna maŋ lese na ŋon. Ma lese ŋon bo nyi yaa yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ. Ɛ yɛɛ mena na me kya waa fa ŋon kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ka sola e lee ma yele man.

english_verse: So I command you to love each other. The World's Hatred
translation_verse: Mmaraa keŋ mɛɛ fa ŋon yɛna nyi, ‘Ɛ gyae dɔŋa.’ ” Ba kekɔla Yesu na ɔ kaseela

english_verse: If the people of this world hate you, just remember that they hated me first.
translation_verse: Akpaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ ne kɔla ŋon nɛ, ɛ tɔɔse nyi mena te be taŋgbɛɛwɔ kɔla maŋ.

english_verse: If you belonged to the world, its people would love you. But you don't belong to the world. I have chosen you to leave the world behind, and this is why its people hate you.
translation_verse: Nyi yeŋ yɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, nafɔ baa gyae ŋon ŋgba baŋ gbagba be balaŋ nɛ. Mɔna kpene keŋ dɔɔ te bɛɛ kɔla ŋon yɛna nyi me ta lese ŋon lee be man, te ɛ ba tekaa kpuɛ na wɔ ya.

english_verse: Remember how I told you that servants are not greater than their master. So if people mistreat me, they will mistreat you. If they do what I say, they will do what you say.
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nɔɔwoya ŋan mɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ nyi, “Tobaale kamasɛ ba kela ɔ gbeŋgyoo ya. Nyi be naase maŋ diyem nɛ, mena ke te baa naase ɛmɛɛ mɔ diyem. Nyi akpaa be lɛɛ me kawola keŋ di na, mena mɔ te baa lɛɛ ɛmɛɛ mɔ wui di.

english_verse: People will do to you exactly what they did to me. They will do it because you belong to me, and they don't know the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Mɔna lee maŋ dɔɔ baa mo mena nombia kɛŋa pou yɛɛ ŋon, nawolo nyi bɔɔ gyeŋ walaŋ ŋon ɔ be kpila maŋ nɛ ya.

english_verse: If I had not come and spoken to them, they would not be guilty of sin. But now they have no excuse for their sin.
translation_verse: Akpaa meŋ te kɔŋ kaa kolosi fa wɔ ya nɛ, nafɔ bɔɔ gyae baa di fɔɔ be dukum keyɛɛ man ya. Mɔna nɛnɛɛ nyi be yɛɛ dukum na, bɔɔ gyae baa tale yako nyi be ta gyem bo te be yɛɛwɔ ya.

english_verse: Everyone who hates me also hates my Father.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ ŋon n ne kɔla maŋ na, n ne kɔla me kya ŋon mɔ.

english_verse: I have done things no one else has ever done. If they had not seen me do these things, they would not be guilty. But they did see me do these things, and they still hate me and my Father too.
translation_verse: Akpaa meŋ te yɛɛ tomse ŋan ŋolo te yɛɛ ta see be man ya nɛ, nafɔ beŋ te di fɔɔ be dukum keyɛɛ man ya. Mɔna nɛnɛɛ ba te naa gyakoloŋ nombia kɛŋa pou mɔna bɛɛ kɔla daa na me kya ŋon.

english_verse: This is why the Scriptures are true when they say, “People hated me for no reason.”
translation_verse: Kei yela kpene keŋ bɔɔ ŋmarase see ba mmaraa tɔne man nɛ kɔŋawɔ mena. Be ŋmarasewɔ nyiaa, ‘Be kɔla maŋ bo yakaa.’

english_verse: I will send you the Spirit who comes from the Father and shows what is true. The Spirit will help you and will tell you about me.
translation_verse: Mɔna maa yela Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ka lee me kya ŋon gyaŋ kɔŋ na ɔ kaa kyaa na ŋon. Ŋon ne gyae la waa yako do ŋon na waa lese anokoare keŋ doo Wurubuarɛ man nɛ wola ŋon, na waa di adansɛɛ lee ma wose man.

english_verse: Then you will also tell others about me, because you have been with me from the beginning.
translation_verse: Te ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ di adansɛɛ lee ma wose man, nawolo nyi lee kewalaŋ keŋ pou na ɛ kyaa me gyaŋ.”

english_verse: I am telling you these things, so that you will not turn away.
translation_verse: “Mɛɛ yako mena nombia kɛŋa pou baa na ɛ be nyiŋ tina ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ yela ya.

english_verse: You will be chased out of the synagogues. And the time will come when people will kill you and think they are doing God a favor.
translation_verse: Gyudatena kegyiise baa tɔ ŋon nyi ɛ na kɔŋ bɔ ɔsom denɛɛ man donɔɔ kamasɛ man ya. Debaŋ daale gyae kelii nɛ, akpaa walaŋ da ko ɛ man ŋolo na waa yako nyi Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nombia dɔɔ te ɔ koo ŋon. Na waa yako nyi ɔ yɛɛ deeli baa fa Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: They will do these things because they don't know either the Father or me.
translation_verse: Baa mo mena nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ ŋon nawolo nyi be ta gyeŋa ta daa na me kya ŋon ya.

english_verse: I am saying this to you now, so that when the time comes, you will remember what I have said. The Work of the Holy Spirit I was with you at the first, and so I didn't tell you these things.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ wulaa yako ŋon nombia kɛŋa baa na akpaa debaŋ kenaŋ de lii na, ɛ ke tɔɔse nyi me wulaa yako ŋon nombia kɛŋa na ɛ ke nyiŋ do ogo.” Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon tom

english_verse: You are very sad from hearing all of this.
translation_verse: Te nɛnɛɛ keŋ mɔɔ yako ŋon na, te ɛ gyoo kayeyɛɛ?

english_verse: But I tell you I am going to do what is best for you. This is why I am going away. The Holy Spirit cannot come to help you until I leave. But after I am gone, I will send the Spirit to you.
translation_verse: Mɔna mɛɛ yako ŋon nombii anokoare baa nyiaa, ɛ deeli dɔɔ te mee gyu nɛ. Nawolo nyi akpaa me te gyu ya na, Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon waa yako do ŋon nɛ be gyae waa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ ya. Mɔna akpaa me gyu na, maa kpila e na waa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: The Spirit will show them that they are wrong about sin, because they didn't have faith in me.
translation_verse: Bɔɔ gyeŋ kpene keŋ yɛɛ dukum ke ya, nawolo nyi ba te lɛɛ maŋ di ya.

english_verse: They are wrong about God's justice, because I am going to the Father, and you won't see me again.
translation_verse: Te bɔɔ gyeŋ kpene keŋ mɔ doo na ke gbɛɛ ya, nawolo nyi mɛɛ bese mee gyu me kya ŋon gyaŋ te ɛ be gyae ɛ ka tekaa naa maŋ bela ya.

english_verse: And they are wrong about the judgment, because God has already judged the ruler of this world.
translation_verse: Bɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia kedi keŋ wose man daale ya, nawolo nyi ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ ne di tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyoori nɛ, Wurubuarɛ te wulaa di ɔ nombia bu e fɔɔ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but right now it would be more than you could understand.
translation_verse: Me dana nombia burum maa yako ŋon, mɔna debokeiman man nɛ ŋe dana yuŋ kela ŋon.

english_verse: The Spirit shows what is true and will come and guide you into the full truth. The Spirit doesn't speak on his own. He will tell you only what he has heard from me, and he will let you know what is going to happen.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ bee di dekara ya nɛ de kɔŋ na, waa lese nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ pou nɛ wola ŋon. Nawolo nyi na ŋon gbagba ɔ baam dɔɔ te ɔ ne kolosi ya, mɔna nombia ŋan pou ɔ be nyii nɛ yaa ɔ ne kolosi na waa lese nombia ŋan pou gyae ke kɔŋ wee daale nɛ wola ŋon.

english_verse: The Spirit will bring glory to me by taking my message and telling it to you.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon waa yela balaŋ kena me gyoorobiiri, nawolo nyi waa lese kpene kamasɛ keŋ me dana maa yako ŋon nɛ wola ŋon.

english_verse: Everything the Father has is mine. This is why I have said that the Spirit takes my message and tells it to you. Sorrow Will Turn into Joy
translation_verse: Kpene kamasɛ keŋ me kya dana na ke yɛɛ me wui, mena dɔɔ te mɛɛ yako ŋon nyi Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon waa lese kpene kamasɛ keŋ me dana maa yako ŋon nɛ wola ŋon.” Ɛ waraŋase gyae kabese gyoŋ

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “For a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.”
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Teka kyomii ɛ be gyae ɛ kena maŋ bela ya, mɔna kenaŋ wɔle nɛ be gyae ke kyare ya, ɛ ka bese naa maŋ.”

english_verse: They said to each other, “What does Jesus mean by saying that for a little while we won't see him, but after a while we will see him? What does he mean by saying he is going to the Father?
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te ɔ kaseela baŋ baale bɔɔse dɔŋa nyiaa, “Sena yaa balee kei ne yako baa, ɔ kpa ‘Teka kyomii ɛ be gyae ɛ kena maŋ bela ya, te kenaŋ wɔle na be gyae ke kyare ya na, ɛ ka bese naa maŋ.’ Nawolo nyi mee gyu me kya gyaŋ dɔɔ?”

english_verse: What is this ‘little while’ that he is talking about? We don't know what he means.”
translation_verse: Keŋte ba besewɔ bɔɔse dɔŋa nyiaa, “ ‘Teka kyomii’ kei mɔ na wolo baa sena? Dɔɔ ne nyii nombia kɛŋa man ya.”

english_verse: Jesus knew they had some questions, so he said: You are wondering what I meant when I said that for a little while you won't see me, but after a while you will see me.
translation_verse: Na Yesu gyeŋ nyi bɛɛ gyae baa bɔɔse e nombia kɛŋa man, mena dɔɔ ɔ bɔɔse wɔ nyiaa, “Keŋ mɔɔ yako ŋon nyi, ‘Teka kyomii ɛ be gyae ɛ kena maŋ bela ya, mɔna kenaŋ wɔle na be gyae ke kyare ya ɛ ka bese naa maŋ’ nɛ yaa ɛ ne bɔɔse dɔŋa nɛ?

english_verse: I tell you for certain that you will cry and be sad, but the world will be happy. You will be sad, but later you will be happy.
translation_verse: Ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon ɛ ke nyii nyiaa, ɛ ke wii na ɛ ka yeyɛɛ mɔna balaŋ baŋ be loo gyakaa tɛɛle kei abɔɔ dɔɔ nɛ baa di gyoŋ. Ɛmɛɛ ɛ ka yeyɛɛ, mɔna ɛ kayeyɛɛ keŋ gyae kaa bese gyoŋ kedi.

english_verse: When a woman is about to give birth, she is in great pain. But after it is all over, she forgets the pain and is happy, because she has brought a child into the world.
translation_verse: Akpaa alo na doŋee na ɔ na yeyɛɛ, nawolo nyi ɔ debaŋ te lii. Mɔna akpaa ɔ lola bu ŋon na, ne yɛɛ e gyoŋ nyi ɔ ta lola bu kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ. Mena gyoŋ kei ne yele ɔ ne wolee ɔ kaale keŋ ɔ be naa nɛ.

english_verse: You are now very sad. But later I will see you, and you will be so happy that no one will be able to change the way you feel.
translation_verse: Mena ke mɔ yaa doo fa ŋon. Debaŋ kei na ɛ na yeyɛɛ, mɔna maa bese kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ na ɛ wose ke fɛɛ ŋon, na ɛ ke di gyoŋ. Te ŋolo be gyae waa tale lese gyoŋ kenaŋ lee ɛ man ya.

english_verse: When that time comes, you won't have to ask me about anything. I tell you for certain the Father will give you whatever you ask for in my name.
translation_verse: Mena wee kenaŋ dɔɔ nɛ, ɛ be gyae ɛ ke bɔɔse maŋ daale ya. Mɛɛ yako ŋon ɛ ke nyii nyiaa, kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ka sola me kya ŋon ma yele man na, waa mo fa ŋon.

english_verse: You have not asked for anything in this way before, but now you must ask in my name. Then it will be given to you, so you will be completely happy.
translation_verse: Kaalii na gyeŋ kei nɛ, ɛ ta sola ta kolo ma yele man ya. Ɛ sola na ɛ ke nyiŋ, na ke yɛɛ ŋon gyoŋ nideli.

english_verse: I have used examples to explain to you what I have been talking about. But the time will come when I will speak to you plainly about the Father and will no longer use examples like these.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ yako ŋon ɛ ke nyii nyiaa, debaŋ daale gyae kelii na mɔɔ gyae maa tekaa kolosi na ŋon aduya man bela ya. Mɔna maa toro me kya ŋon nombia yako ŋon.

english_verse: You will ask the Father in my name, and I won't have to ask him for you.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ de lii nɛ, ɛ ka sola e ma yele man. Mɔna te yɛɛ nyi maa seŋ ɛ nawɔɔ man na maa sola me kya ŋon fa ŋon ya.

english_verse: God the Father loves you because you love me, and you believe I have come from him.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi me kya ŋon gbagba ne gyae ŋon, keŋ ɛ ne gyae maŋ te ɛ be lɛɛ di nyi ma lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: I came from the Father into the world, but I am leaving the world and returning to the Father.
translation_verse: Daa na me kya kyaa la pɛte ma lee ɔ gyaŋ kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ, te nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ bese mɛɛ lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ mee gyu me kya ŋonaŋ gyaŋ.”

english_verse: The disciples said, “Now you are speaking plainly to us! You are not using examples.
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te ɔ kaseela baŋ yako e nyiaa, “Nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ n bɛɛ kolosi aduya man fa daa bela ya. N ta lese nombia ŋan man wola daa.

english_verse: At last we know that you understand everything, and we don't have any more questions. Now we believe you truly have come from God.”
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ da te naa nyi n gyeŋ kpene kamasɛ, te tekaboena nyi ŋolo dɛɛ bɔɔse neŋ nombia daale bela ya. Kei te yeli da te naa nyi n lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Do you really believe me?
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu bɔɔse wɔ nyiaa, “Nɛnɛɛ ɛ ne lɛɛ maŋ di?

english_verse: The time will come and is already here when all of you will be scattered. Each of you will go back home and leave me by myself. But the Father will be with me, and I won't be alone.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ ne kɔŋ te ke taŋ kekɔŋ, keŋ ɛ popou ɛ ke yaasee. Walaŋ kamasɛ waa gyu ɔ dɛɛ tina maŋ yela na ke ka maageŋ. Mɔna na maageŋ kyaa la ya, nawolo nyi me kya ŋon kpuɛ na maŋ.

english_verse: I have told you this, so that you might have peace in your hearts because of me. While you are in the world, you will have to suffer. But cheer up! I have defeated the world.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ yako nombia kɛŋa baa, na ɛ ke ta me dɔɔ nyiŋ wosefɛɛreŋ. Balaŋ baa yela ɛ kena diyem nideli tɛɛle kei dɔɔ, mɔna ɛ nyiŋ konɔɔ na ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ nawolo nyi me te di tɛɛle kei dɔɔ!”

english_verse: After Jesus had finished speaking to his disciples, he looked up toward heaven and prayed: Father, the time has come for you to bring glory to your Son, in order that he may bring glory to you.
translation_verse: Yesu ke yako nombia kɛŋa taŋ nɛ, ɔ gyinaa ɔ sia kɛɛ adido te ɔ fanewɔ nyiaa, “Taata, debaŋ keŋ te lii. Lese maŋ n bu ŋon yele na maŋ mɔ ka lese n yele.

english_verse: And you gave him power over all people, so he would give eternal life to everyone you give him.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi n te fa maŋ doŋ balaŋ pou dɔɔ, nyi maa fa baŋ pou n ba mo do maŋ me nyiŋmaa man nɛ nyeedoŋ kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: Eternal life is to know you, the only true God, and to know Jesus Christ, the one you sent.
translation_verse: Nyeedoŋ kekpaa kenaŋ yɛna nyiaa, balaŋ pou baa gyeŋ neŋ na baa gyeŋ nyi nyaŋ nyaageŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ ŋon n ne di anokoare. Na baa bese gyeŋ maŋ Yesu Kristo ŋon n be kpili nɛ.

english_verse: I have brought glory to you here on earth by doing everything you gave me to do.
translation_verse: Me ta lese n yele tɛɛle kei dɔɔ, nawolo nyi ma te yɛɛ tom keŋ n ba fa maŋ nɛ kelii kɔ ɔto.

english_verse: Now, Father, give me back the glory I had with you before the world was created.
translation_verse: Taata, nɛnɛɛ lese me gyoorobiiri keŋ me dana n siaman pɛte n be yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ wola.

english_verse: You have given me some followers from this world, and I have shown them what you are like. They were yours, but you gave them to me, and they have obeyed you.
translation_verse: Me ta lese n dinɔɔ wola balaŋ baŋ n ba lese wɔ lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ fa maŋ nɛ. Be yɛɛ n balaŋwɔ te n moo wɔ fa maŋ. Be te di n nombia ŋan dɔɔ,

english_verse: They know that you gave me everything I have.
translation_verse: te nɛnɛɛ ba te naa nyi kpene kamasɛ keŋ me dana nɛ lee n gyaŋ.

english_verse: I told my followers what you told me, and they accepted it. They know I came from you, and they believe you are the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ma te yako wɔ nombii kamasɛ keŋ n be yako maŋ nɛ, te be lɛɛ ŋa do. Ba te naa nyi ke yɛɛ ampaŋ nyi ma lee n gyaŋ, te ba te lɛɛ di nyi nyaŋ kpila na maŋ.

english_verse: I am praying for them, but not for those who belong to this world. My followers belong to you, and I am praying for them.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ fane baa fa wɔ. Na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ pou yaa mɛɛ fane maa fa ya. Mɛɛ fane maa fa balaŋ baŋ n ba mo wɔ fa maŋ nɛ, nawolo nyi be yɛɛ n wui.

english_verse: All I have is yours, and all you have is mine, and they will bring glory to me.
translation_verse: Kpene kamasɛ keŋ n dana nɛ yɛɛ me wui, te keŋ maŋ mɔ dana nɛ yɛɛ n wui. Te n te tɛɛ be dɔɔ lese me gyoorobiiri wola.

english_verse: Holy Father, I am no longer in the world. I am coming to you, but my followers are still in the world. So keep them safe by the power of the name you have given me. Then they will be one with each other, just as you and I are one.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ kɔŋ baa n gyaŋ. Mɔɔ gyae maa tekaa kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ bela ya, mɔna baŋ sɛɛ be kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ. Me kya ŋon ayimɛɛ be doo n man ya, doŋ keŋ n ba mo gyee maŋ nɛ, mo mena doŋ kenaŋ gyee wɔ nideli, na baa yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ ŋgba mena keŋ daa na neŋ yɛɛ dokoloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: While I was with them, I kept them safe by the power you have given me. I guarded them, and not one of them was lost, except the one who had to be lost. This happened so that what the Scriptures say would come true.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ me kyaa be gyaŋ nɛ, me gyee wɔ nideli lee n doŋ keŋ n ba do me man nɛ dɔɔ. Me gyee wɔ nideli keŋ be man ŋolo ta yoo ya. Ŋon kaboena nyi waa yo nɛ waageŋ yoo la, na ke yela Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan ke nyiŋ kɔŋ mena.

english_verse: I am on my way to you. But I say these things while I am still in the world, so my followers will have the same complete joy that I do.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ kɔŋ n gyaŋ. Te debaŋ kei keŋ me sɛɛ me kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, mɛɛ yako nombia kɛŋa baa na ke yela gyoŋ keŋ doo me maŋ nɛ ke nyiŋ doo be man nideli.

english_verse: I have told them your message. But the people of this world hate them, because they don't belong to this world, just as I don't.
translation_verse: Ma te kolosi n nombia fa wɔ mɔna tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ kɔla wɔ, nawolo nyi baŋ na wɔ ta tekaa yɛɛ dokoloŋ ya, ŋgba mena keŋ daa na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ ta tekaa yɛɛ dokoloŋ ya nɛ.

english_verse: Father, I don't ask you to take my followers out of the world, but keep them safe from the evil one.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ ne fane nyi nya lese wɔ lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya, mɔna mɛɛ fane bo nyi nya gyee wɔ nideli na bɔɔ yale walaŋkum ŋon kɔta man ya.

english_verse: Your word is the truth. So let this truth make them completely yours.
translation_verse: Mo nya anokoare nombia ŋan desina wɔ see. Nawolo nyi n nombia ŋan doo na ŋe gbɛɛ.

english_verse: I am sending them into the world, just as you sent me.
translation_verse: Mena keŋ n be kpila maŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, mena ke yaa maŋ mɔ ne kpila wɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

english_verse: I have given myself completely for their sake, so they may belong completely to the truth.
translation_verse: Baŋ dɔɔ te ma moo ma wose fa neŋ, na baŋ mɔ ke nyiŋ mo ba wose fa neŋ kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: I am not praying just for these followers. I am also praying for everyone else who will have faith because of what my followers will say about me.
translation_verse: Na me kaseela kɛwɔ baageŋ yaa mɛɛ fane fa ya. Mɔna mɛɛ fane mɛɛ fa balaŋ baŋ pou baa nyii me kaseela kɛwɔ nombia te baa lɛɛ maŋ di nɛ.

english_verse: I want all of them to be one with each other, just as I am one with you and you are one with me. I also want them to be one with us. Then the people of this world will believe that you sent me.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ fane bela nyiaa, be popou baa yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ ŋgba mena keŋ me doo nyaŋ me kya man te nyaŋ mɔ n doo me man nɛ. Mena ke yaa yela baa doo de man na tɛɛle kei balaŋ pou ke nyiŋ lɛɛ di nyi nyaŋ kpila na maŋ.

english_verse: I have honored my followers in the same way you honored me, in order that they may be one with each other, just as we are one.
translation_verse: Ma te fa wɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ n ba mo fa maŋ nɛ, na baa yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ ŋgba mena keŋ daa na neŋ yɛɛ dokoloŋ te loŋ bɛɛ lam da nsana ya nɛ.

english_verse: I am one with them, and you are one with me, so they may become completely one. Then this world's people will know that you sent me. They will know that you love my followers as much as you love me.
translation_verse: Me doo be man ŋgba mena keŋ nyaŋ mɔ n doo me man nɛ, na baa nyiŋ yɛɛ dokoloŋ keŋ nyi loŋ gba be lam ba nsana ya. Na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ ke nyiŋ gyeŋ nyi nyaŋ kpila na maŋ, te n ne gyae be nombia ŋgba mena keŋ n ne gyae me nombia nɛ.

english_verse: Father, I want everyone you have given me to be with me, wherever I am. Then they will see the glory you have given me, because you loved me before the world was created.
translation_verse: Taata! Mɛɛ gyae nyi me kaseela baŋ n ba mo wɔ fa maŋ nɛ, baa kyaa me gyaŋ botɔɔ keŋ me kyaa nɛ, na baa nyiŋ naa me gyoorobiiri keŋ n ba mo fa maŋ nɛ. N moo gyoorobiiri kei fa maŋ nawolo nyi, n wulaa n ne gyae maŋ pɛte n yɛɛ tɛɛle kei.

english_verse: Good Father, the people of this world don't know you. But I know you, and my followers know that you sent me.
translation_verse: Me kya, nyaŋ yɛna walaŋ ŋon n gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ. Balaŋ baŋ be loo gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, be ta gyeŋa ta neŋ ya mɔna maŋ dɔɔ ma gyeŋ neŋ. Te me kaseela baŋ mɔ gyeŋ nyi nyaŋ kpila na maŋ.

english_verse: I told them what you are like, and I will tell them even more. Then the love you have for me will become part of them, and I will be one with them.
translation_verse: Me ta lese n dinɔɔ wola wɔ te maa bese lese ke wola wɔ bela, na kegyae keŋ n ne gyae maŋ nɛ ke nyiŋ doo be man na maŋ mɔ ke doo be man.”

english_verse: One of the high priest's servants was there. He was a relative of the servant whose ear Peter had cut off, and he asked, “Didn't I see you in the garden with that man?”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te saese kegyia ŋon tobaale ŋolo ŋon ɔ loŋto yɛna tobaale ŋon Pita be kara ɔ deŋele nɛ bɔɔse Pita nyiaa, “Ŋgba me naa nyaŋ mɔ n kpuɛ na wɔ oliifi wɔɔbii keŋ man?”

english_verse: Jesus again asked, “Who are you looking for?” “We are looking for Jesus from Nazareth,” they answered.
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Yesu besewɔ bɔɔse wɔ nyiaa, “Amɔte yaa ɛ ne gyae?” Te be yakowɔ nyi, “Yesu Nasarɛte baale ŋon yaa dɛɛ gyae.”

english_verse: This time Jesus replied, “I have already told you that I am Jesus. If I am the one you are looking for, let these others go.
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu yakowɔ nyiaa “Me wulaa yako ŋon nyi maŋ yaa. Akpaa maŋ te ɛ ne gyae berɛ na, ɛ yela me balaŋ kɛwɔ ke ta.”

english_verse: Then everything will happen, just as I said, ‘I did not lose anyone you gave me.’ ”
translation_verse: Kei yela nombia ŋan ɔ be wulaa yako nɛ kɔŋawɔ mena. Ɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Balaŋ baŋ nyaŋ me kya ba mo fa maŋ nɛ, ma te yeli be man dokoloŋ ka yo ya.”

english_verse: Simon Peter had brought along a sword. He pulled it out and struck at Malchus, the servant of the high priest, cutting off his right ear.
translation_verse: Botɔɔ na Simɔn Pita dana yoosila, te ɔ wɔŋa ke lese kara saese kegyia ŋon tobaale ŋolo dunoluŋ deŋele lese ke lɔ. Tobaale ŋonaŋ yele yɛna Maakuse.

english_verse: The Roman officer and his men, together with the temple police, arrested Jesus and tied him up.
translation_verse: Keŋte yoonɔɔtena siamante ŋon na ɔ yoonɔɔtena dikpii keŋ, na Gyudatena kotɔtɔɔtena baŋ kyaŋa Yesu te be bake e,

english_verse: Peter stayed outside near the gate. But the other disciple came back out and spoke to the girl at the gate. She let Peter go in,
translation_verse: Mɔna Pita ŋon dɔe denanɔɔ man. Botɔɔ te kaseele ŋon saese kegyia ŋon gyeŋ nɛ, besewɔ kɔŋ kaa kolosi na alebu ŋon ɔ na deke denanɔɔ keŋ nɛ nyi waa yela Pita mɔ ka gyoo. Keŋte ɔ moo e gyu dekpaŋalaŋ keŋ man.

english_verse: but asked him, “Aren't you one of that man's followers?” “No, I am not!” Peter answered.
translation_verse: Keŋte alebu ŋon bɔɔse Pita nyiaa, “Ŋgba nyaŋ mɔ n yɛɛ Yesu kaseela baŋ man ŋolo e?” Te Pita tiranɔɔ nyi, “Koa, ma te yɛɛ be man ŋolo e ya”

english_verse: It was cold, and the servants and temple police had made a charcoal fire. They were warming themselves around it, when Peter went over and stood near the fire to warm himself. Jesus Is Questioned by the High Priest (Matthew
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ na waare kyaa, mena dɔɔ kotɔtɔɔtena baŋ na dekpaŋalaŋ keŋ man tomyɛɛra baale doo boalaŋ bee woli. Te Pita mɔ gyuuwɔ ka seŋ be gyaŋ ɔ ne woli boalaŋ keŋ. Saese kegyia Anase kebɔɔse Yesu nombia Mateo

english_verse: Why are you questioning me? Why don't you ask the people who heard me? They know what I have said.”
translation_verse: Woŋ dɔɔ te n ne bɔɔse maŋ mena nombia kɛŋa? Bɔɔse balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ nyii me kawola keŋ nɛ. Baŋ gyeŋa na kpene keŋ mɔɔ yako nɛ.

english_verse: Jesus was still tied up, and Annas sent him to Caiaphas the high priest. Peter Again Denies that He Knows Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Keŋte Anase yela ba moo Yesu gyu saese kegyia Kaifase gyaŋ, na ɔ sɛɛ ɔ doo ŋmeeseŋ ŋan bɔɔ mo bake e nɛ man. Pita kabese bɛɛ nyi ɔ ba gyeŋ Yesu ya Mateo

english_verse: It was early in the morning when Jesus was taken from Caiaphas to the building where the Roman governor stayed. But the crowd waited outside. Any of them who had gone inside would have become unclean and would not be allowed to eat the Passover meal.
translation_verse: Tɛɛ kena nebo nebo fuu nɛ, ba moo Yesu lee Kaifase dɛɛ gyu Pilato ŋon ɔ seŋɛɛ Romantena gyoo dinaa nawɔɔ man ɔ ne kɛɛ Gyuda tɛɛle dɔɔ nɛ dɛɛ. Debaŋ kenaŋ na Gyudatena nyeekelɛɛwee kedi keŋ ta benaa. Gyudatena kegyiise baŋ ta gyoo Pilato dekpaŋalaŋ keŋ man ya. Nawolo nyi ba te gyae baa walaa ba wose pɛ baa di ba nyeekelɛɛwee dinaa keŋ ya.

english_verse: They answered, “He is a criminal! That's why we brought him to you.”
translation_verse: Keŋte be tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Nyi ŋon te yɛɛ bu kum e ya nɛ, nafɔ dɔɔ mo e kɔŋ kɛbo ya.”

english_verse: And so what Jesus said about his death would soon come true.
translation_verse: Kei yela Yesu nombia ŋan ɔ be wulaa yako see lee ɔ yeŋ keŋ waa yeŋ wose man nɛ kɔŋawɔ ampaŋ.

english_verse: Pilate then went back inside. He called Jesus over and asked, “Are you the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Keŋte kegyia Pilato besewɔ gyoo ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ man te ɔ baake Yesu bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Nyaŋ yɛna Gyudatena gyoo ŋon?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Are you asking this on your own or did someone tell you about me?”
translation_verse: Te Yesu mɔ besenawɔ bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Nyaŋ gbagba nyeeman nombii yaa n ne bɔɔse maŋ nɛ yaa ŋolo yako na ma wose man nombia fa neŋ?”

english_verse: “You know I'm not a Jew!” Pilate said. “Your own people and the chief priests brought you to me. What have you done?”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Pilato bɔɔse e nyiaa, “Me yɛɛ Gyuda baale e? Nyaŋ gbagba n balaŋ na ɛ saese kegyiise moona neŋ kɔna maŋ. Woŋ dukum te n yɛɛwɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My kingdom doesn't belong to this world. If it did, my followers would have fought to keep me from being handed over to our leaders. No, my kingdom doesn't belong to this world.”
translation_verse: Keŋte Yesu tiranɔɔ fa e nyiaa, “Me gyoori ta lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya, nyi ke deŋ lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, nafɔ me tewulɛɛ baa yoo lɛɛ maŋ na bɔɔ nyiŋ mo maŋ ka do Gyudatena nyiŋmaa man ya. Mɔna me gyoori ta lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya.”

english_verse: “So you are a king,” Pilate replied. “You are saying that I am a king,” Jesus told him. “I was born into this world to tell about the truth. And everyone who belongs to the truth knows my voice.”
translation_verse: Keŋte Pilato yako e nyiaa, “Kenaŋ na ŋgba n yɛɛ gyoo e baa?” Te Yesu tiranɔɔ nyiaa, “Keŋ yaa n yakowɔ nɛ. Mena nombia kɛŋa dɔɔ te ba lola maŋ, te ŋan mɔ dɔɔ te me kɔŋawɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ na me kaa yako anokoare keŋ. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne gyae anokoare keŋ nɛ ɔ ne tei maŋ.”

english_verse: And since I usually set a prisoner free for you at Passover, would you like for me to set free the king of the Jews?”
translation_verse: Mɔna ke yɛɛ ya mmaraa ke nyi ɛ nyeekelɛɛwee kedi kamasɛ man na, maa tina balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ kyam tɔ deni nɛ man dokoloŋ yela fa ŋon. Mena dɔɔ ɛ ne gyae nyi maa tina Gyudatena gyoo ŋon yela yaa sena?”

english_verse: Pilate gave orders for Jesus to be beaten with a whip.
translation_verse: Keŋte Kegyia Pilato yela ba ŋmeree Yesu mpiree.

english_verse: The soldiers made a crown out of thorn branches and put it on Jesus. Then they put a purple robe on him.
translation_verse: Kei wɔle nɛ, Romantena yoonɔɔtena baŋ moo sɔɔse loo gyooro kotɔtɔɔ te ba moowɔ wuu Yesu. Te ba doo e kegba yayam wurikyim daale ŋgba gyoo nɛ.

english_verse: They came up to him and said, “Hey, you king of the Jews!” They also hit him with their fists.
translation_verse: Na bee gyu bɛɛ kɔŋ kaa ŋmiŋ e kulu e nyiaa, “Gyudatena gyoo! N nyee dɛɛ wolose!” Na bɛɛ felee e ɔ lakaase man.

english_verse: Once again Pilate went out. This time he said, “I will have Jesus brought out to you again. Then you can see for yourselves that I have not found him guilty.”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te kegyia Pilato besewɔ kɔŋ debɔɔ man te ɔ yako Gyudatena baŋ nyiaa, “Ɛ nyii, mɛɛ mo e maa lee kɔna ŋon debɔɔ man kɛbo na ɛ kena nyi ma te naa ɔ dukum keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ ya.”

english_verse: Jesus came out, wearing the crown of thorns and the purple robe. Pilate said, “Here is the man!”
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ te kyare ya te Yesu leewɔ debɔɔ man, na ɔ wuuna gyooro kotɔtɔɔ keŋ te ɔ doona ɔ kegba yayam keŋ mɔ! Keŋte kegyia Pilato yako wɔ nyiaa, ɛ walaŋ ŋon yaa.

english_verse: When the chief priests and the temple police saw him, they yelled, “Nail him to a cross! Nail him to a cross!” Pilate told them, “You take him and nail him to a cross! I don't find him guilty of anything.”
translation_verse: Saese kegyiise na Wurubuarɛ dɛɛ kotɔtɔɔtena baŋ ke gyɔ ba sibii na Yesu nɛ, ba fae yeesa nedoŋ nyiaa, “Gyɔ e sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ, gyɔ e sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ.” Botɔɔ te kegyia Pilato yako wɔ nyiaa, “Ma te naa dukum keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ ya. Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ mo e kegyɔ sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ.”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “He claimed to be the Son of God! Our law says that he must be put to death.”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Gyudatena baŋ tiranɔɔ nyiaa, “Daa dana mmaraa daale te kɛɛ wolo nyi kaboena nyi waa yeŋ, nawolo nyi ɔ ta mo ɔ wose nyi ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he was terrified.
translation_verse: Kegyia Pilato ka betaa nyii nombia kɛŋa nɛ, gyakoloŋ gyoo e gbaa.

english_verse: He went back inside and asked Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus did not answer.
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te ɔ besewɔ gyu dekpaŋalaŋ keŋ man ke bɔɔse Yesu nyiaa, “N lee aleŋ?” Mɔna Yesu diŋi e bo.

english_verse: “Why won't you answer my question?” Pilate asked. “Don't you know I have the power to let you go free or to nail you to a cross?”
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kegyia Pilato bɔɔse e nyiaa, “N be kolosi yee? N ba gyeŋ nyi me dana doŋ keŋ maa tale tina neŋ yela, yaa maa yela baa gyɔ neŋ sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ yee?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If God had not given you the power, you couldn't do anything at all to me. But the one who handed me over to you did something even worse.”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Yesu tiranɔɔ nyiaa, “Me kya faa na neŋ gbɛɛ, mena dɔɔ te n nyiŋa doŋ me dɔɔ. Nafɔ nyaŋ gbagba n baam dɔɔ na, n be dana doŋ me dɔɔ ya. Mena dɔɔ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ba lese maŋ fa nɛ, ŋon wui dukum kela la.”

english_verse: Then Pilate wanted to set Jesus free. But the crowd again yelled, “If you set this man free, you are no friend of the Emperor! Anyone who claims to be a king is an enemy of the Emperor.”
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ kegyia Pilato be nyii nombia kɛŋa nɛ, ɔ gyae gbɛɛ keŋ waa mo tina Yesu yela, mɔna na Gyudatena baŋ ne fae yeesa yako nyiaa, “Akpaa n tina balee kei yela na, n te yɛɛ Romantena gyoo dinaa Kaesa ɔ dɔɔ e ya. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ see ɔ wose gyoo nɛ, na ɔ na koro baa seŋ tia gyoo dinaa Kaesa.”

english_verse: When Pilate heard this, he brought Jesus out. Then he sat down on the judge's bench at the place known as “The Stone Pavement.” In Aramaic this pavement is called “Gabbatha.”
translation_verse: Kegyia Pilato ka betaa nyii nɔɔwoya kɛŋa nɛ, ɔ moo Yesu lee kɔŋ debɔɔ man te ɔ kaa gyeŋawɔ kyaa ɔ gbeli keŋ dɔɔ ɔ ne kyaa di nombia nɛ. Boya te ba moowɔ ma ɔ dekyae kenaŋ, te Gyudatena dei man na bɛɛ baake ke nyi “Gabata.”

english_verse: It was about noon on the day before Passover, and Pilate said to the crowd, “Look at your king!”
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ na weese ta seŋ dɛɛ. Wee kenaŋ te Gyudatena ne desina ba wose na ke tɛɛ naa na, baa di ba nyeekelɛɛwee keŋ. Keŋte kegyia Pilato yako Gyudatena baŋ nyiaa, “Ɛ kɛɛ, ɛ gyoo ŋon yaa.”

english_verse: Then Pilate handed Jesus over to be nailed to a cross. Jesus Is Nailed to a Cross (Matthew
translation_verse: Kɛŋa pou wɔle nɛ, kegyia Pilato moo Yesu do balaŋ baŋ nyiŋmaa man nyi baa gyu ke gyɔ e sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ. Ba kegyɔ Yesu sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ Mateo

english_verse: The soldiers first broke the legs of the other two men who were nailed there.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ yoonɔɔtena baŋ gyuuwɔ ke tekerii balaŋ bala baŋ bɔɔ gyɔ wɔ sakaa kpu na Yesu nɛ nawɔɔ.

english_verse: So the chief priests went to Pilate and said, “Why did you write that he is King of the Jews? You should have written, ‘He claimed to be King of the Jews.’ ”
translation_verse: Gyudatena saese kegyiise kena keŋmarase keŋ nɛ be yako kegyia Pilato nyiaa, “Nyeŋ te ŋmarase ke nyi Gyudatena gyoo ya. Nyeŋ ŋmarase ke bo nyi, balee kei kpa ŋon yɛna Gyudatena gyoo.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw his mother and his favorite disciple with her, he said to his mother, “This man is now your son.”
translation_verse: Yesu kena ɔ naa na ɔ kaseele ŋon ɔ ne gyae ɔ nombia seŋɛɛ benaa na dɔŋa nɛ, ɔ yako ɔ naa nyiaa, “Nna, n bu ŋonaŋ.”

english_verse: There Jesus was nailed to the cross, and on each side of him a man was also nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te be gyɔɔ e nyeelabia sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ. Keŋte be gyɔɔ balaŋ bala baale mɔ sakaa ɔpaŋdaase dɔɔ kpu na e. Ŋolo sakaa ɔ dunoluŋ dɔɔ te ŋolo mɔ sakaa ɔ demena dɔɔ.

english_verse: Pilate ordered the charge against Jesus to be written on a board and put above the cross. It read, “Jesus of Nazareth, King of the Jews.”
translation_verse: Keŋte kegyia Pilato yela be ŋmarase nɔɔwoya kɛŋa mataa na ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ. Nɔɔwoya ŋenaŋ yɛna nyiaa, “yesu nasarɛte baale, gyudatena gyoo ŋon.”

english_verse: The words were written in Hebrew, Latin, and Greek. The place where Jesus was taken wasn't far from the city, and many of the people read the charge against him.
translation_verse: Gyudatena burum kala keŋmarase kei nawolo nyi botɔɔ keŋ bɔɔ gyɔ Yesu ɔpaŋ dɔɔ nɛ betaŋ lem na donɔɔ keŋ ya. Be ŋmarase ke Gyudatena dei man na Romantena dei man na Giriki dei man.

english_verse: But Pilate told them, “What is written will not be changed!”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te kegyia Pilato tiranɔɔ nyiaa, “Kpene keŋ mɔɔ ŋmarase nɛ, me taŋ keŋmarase.”

english_verse: The soldiers said to each other, “Let's not rip it apart. We will gamble to see who gets it.” This happened so the Scriptures would come true, which say, “They divided up my clothes and gambled for my garments.” The soldiers then did what they had decided.
translation_verse: Keŋte yoonɔɔtena baŋ yako dɔŋa nyiaa, “Ɛ na fa dee tirii kegba kei ya. Ɛ fa dɛɛ lɔ boe na dɛɛ kɛɛ ŋon waa nyiŋ ke.” Kei yela Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan kɔŋawɔ ampaŋ. Be ŋmarasewɔ see nyiaa, “Be kpala ma abɔɔ, te ma kegba atetate dɔɔ be lɔɔ boe bo ke dɔɔ” Keŋ dɔɔ mena mɔ te yoonɔɔtena baŋ yɛɛwɔ.

english_verse: Jesus' mother stood beside his cross with her sister and Mary the wife of Clopas. Mary Magdalene was standing there too.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ na Yesu ɔ naa na ɔ niinaa na Kilopase wɛɛle Mɛɛre, na Mɛɛre ŋon ɔ ba lee Magedala nɛ seŋɛɛ benaa na Yesu ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ.

english_verse: But when they came to Jesus, they saw he was already dead, and they did not break his legs.
translation_verse: Mɔna ba kekɔŋ Yesu gyaŋ te ba kena nyi ɔ taŋ ke wulaa yeŋ nɛ, ba te tekerii ɔ nawɔɔ ya.

english_verse: In the place where Jesus had been nailed to a cross, there was a garden with a tomb that had never been used.
translation_verse: Na wɔɔbii daale kyaa botɔɔ keŋ bɔɔ gyɔ Yesu sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ. Yebɔɔ wɔle wɔle daale doo botɔɔ keŋ be te wuu ta walaŋ ke man see ya.

english_verse: Jesus knew that he had now finished his work. And in order to make the Scriptures come true, he said, “I am thirsty!”
translation_verse: Kɛŋa wɔle Yesu kena nyi nɛnɛɛ kpene kamasɛ te taŋ nɛ ɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Loŋboaneŋ dana maŋ.” Kei yela Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan kɔŋawɔ mena.

english_verse: A jar of cheap wine was there. Someone then soaked a sponge with the wine and held it up to Jesus' mouth on the stem of a hyssop plant.
translation_verse: Na osuŋ na soloŋ denyaŋesa daale baŋɛɛ botɔɔ. Mena dɔɔ ba moo kolo ŋgba kokyaa keŋ gyae ke tale lɛɛ loŋ nɛ do soloŋ keŋ man, te ba moo ke tooso na daŋ daale te ba moo ke sɔɔ ɔ nɔɔ nyi waa nyɔɔ.

english_verse: kilograms of spices made from myrrh and aloes. This was the same Nicodemus who had visited Jesus one night.
translation_verse: Soloŋ keŋ ke tina Yesu nɔɔ nɛ te ɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Te taŋ.” Botɔɔ te ɔ gɔŋase ɔ nyee te ɔ kara weesi.

english_verse: The next day would be both a Sabbath and the Passover. It was a special day for the Jewish people, and they did not want the bodies to stay on the crosses during this day. So they asked Pilate to break the men's legs and take their bodies down.
translation_verse: Wee kenaŋ yɛna wee keŋ Gyudatena na mo desina ba wose fa ba kefɛɛfowee kedi. Mena kefɛɛfowee kei yɛɛ wee dinaa ke. Te ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ bɛɛ kɔle nyi baa tina woo yela ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ na ba kefɛɛfowee keŋ kaa tuŋ e. Lee mena dɔɔ Gyudatena kegyiise baŋ gyuu kegyia Pilato gyaŋ ka sola e nyi, waa fa wɔ gbɛɛ na be kaa tekerii balaŋ baŋ bee fiti na yeŋ nɛ nawɔɔ na baa nyiŋ yeŋ bileŋ, na baa nyiŋ lese wɔ ɔpaŋ daase ŋan dɔɔ.

english_verse: One of the soldiers stuck his spear into Jesus' side, and blood and water came out.
translation_verse: Keŋte yoonɔɔtena baŋ ŋolo moo wa apia sɔɔ Yesu yenaabia man. Debokenaŋ man te fatabo na loŋ leewɔ.

english_verse: We know this is true, because it was told by someone who saw it happen. Now you can have faith too.
