english_verse: I realize God has treated me with undeserved grace, and so I tell each of you not to think you are better than you really are. Use good sense and measure yourself by the amount of faith that God has given you.
translation_verse: Lee Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba mo boele maŋ te ɔ be fa maŋ tom kei nyi maa yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ, mɛɛ sola ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ nyi ɔ na kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ŋolo be kyaa ɔ wɔle ya. Mɔna ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ waa yɔkɔse ɔ wose na waa gyoo ɔ wose man kɛɛ nyi, mena keŋ ɔ ne kɛɛ ɔ wose na bɛrɛɛ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo boele e lee ɔ kelɛɛdi dɔɔ nɛ doo na ke gbɛɛ.

english_verse: A body is made up of many parts, and each of them has its own use.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi de man walaŋ kamasɛ yɛɛ deniwalaŋ na ɔ nyee e te ɔ dana yenaase kpookpoo, mɔna yenaŋ kamasɛ dana ka tom keŋ kɛɛ yɛɛ.

english_verse: That's how it is with us. There are many of us, but we each are part of the body of Christ, as well as part of one another.
translation_verse: Mena ke mɔ te daa Kristotena mɔ boe, mɔna lee Kristo kelɛɛdi dɔɔ de ta bese walaŋ dokoloŋ. De yɛɛ kpookpoo, mɔna Kristo dɔɔ da towaa na dɔŋa ŋgba walaŋ dokoloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: If we can serve others, we should serve. If we can teach, we should teach.
translation_verse: Akpaa ŋolo wui yɛna balaŋ kasom na waa yɛɛ kakyeŋ som. Te akpaa ŋolo mɔ wui yɛna Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan kawola na, kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ kakyeŋ wola.

english_verse: If we can encourage others, we should encourage them. If we can give, we should be generous. If we are leaders, we should do our best. If we are good to others, we should do it cheerfully. Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Akpaa ŋolo wui yɛna balaŋ kakyeŋ kado na, waa do balaŋ kakyeŋ. Te akpaa ŋolo mɔ wui yɛna wɔe keyɛɛ na, kaboena nyi waa lese ɔ tɔɔman yɛɛ wɔe. Akpaa ŋolo wui yɛna nyi waa yɛɛ siamante ɔ tebia man na, waa lese ɔ konɔɔ man yɛɛ ke nideli. Akpaa ŋolo wui yɛna balaŋ waraŋase kewii na, waa yɛɛ ke gyoŋ man keŋ ɔ na toroŋ ya. Ɛ gyae dɔŋa

english_verse: Be sincere in your love for others. Hate everything that is evil and hold tight to everything that is good.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyae dɔŋa lee ɛ konɔɔse man. Ɛ kɔla abɔɔ ŋan pou ŋe yɛɛ abɔɔ kumɛɛ ŋa nɛ, na ɛ ke kyaŋ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan man keŋkeŋ.

english_verse: Love each other as brothers and sisters and honor others more than you do yourself.
translation_verse: Ɛ yase ɛ sia gyae ɛ tebia Kristotena nideli ŋgba naalolobia nɛ, na ɛ ka mo obuo fa dɔŋa nideli. Ɛ na kɛɛ nyi ɛmɛɛ kela na ŋolo ya.

english_verse: Let your hope make you glad. Be patient in time of trouble and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela ɛ lookegyakaa keŋ ɛ dana nɛ ke yela ɛ ke di gyoŋ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ konɔɔ lee ɛ kayeyɛɛ man, na ɛ ke fane debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Take care of God's needy people and welcome strangers into your home.
translation_verse: Ɛ kyɔ ɛ tebia Kristotena baŋ be yɛɛ ayematenawɔ nɛ, na ɛ ke lɛɛ ŋɔɔla mɔ nideli.

english_verse: Ask God to bless everyone who mistreats you. Ask him to bless them and not to curse them.
translation_verse: Ɛ sola wosefɛɛreŋ fa balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ naase ŋon diyem nɛ. Ɛ sola Wurubuarɛ wosefɛɛreŋ fa wɔ. Ɛ na falaa wɔ ya.

english_verse: Be friendly with everyone. Don't be proud and feel that you know more than others. Make friends with ordinary people.
translation_verse: Ɛ kyaa na dɔŋa nideli. Ɛ na gyina ɛ wose adido ya, mɔna ɛ mo ɛ wose do na balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ doo daale man ya nɛ. Ɛ na kɛɛ ɛ wose nyi ɛ dei kela wɔ ya.

english_verse: and do your best to live at peace with everyone.
translation_verse: Gbɛɛ kamasɛ man na, ɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na ɛ ke kyaa na walaŋ kamasɛ wosefɛɛreŋ man.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't try to get even. Let God take revenge. In the Scriptures the Lord says, “I am the one to take revenge and pay them back.”
translation_verse: Me tebia, ɛ na mo nombiakumɛɛ tɔ dɔŋa kom ya. Ɛ mo kpene kamasɛ fa Wurubuarɛ. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan ne yako nyiaa, “Wurubuarɛ kpa, maŋ ɛ Gbeŋgyoo ne gyae la maa tɔ balaŋ kom lee be nombiakumɛɛ ŋan bɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “If your enemies are hungry, give them something to eat. And if they are thirsty, give them something to drink. This will be the same as piling burning coals on their heads.”
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ, “Akpaa tanam na ko walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne kɔla neŋ na, fa e weenɛɛ waa di. Akpaa loŋboaneŋ na ko e na, fa e loŋ waa nyɔɔ. N yɛɛ mena na, desɛŋ gyae ke kyaŋ e nideli.”

english_verse: Don't let evil defeat you, but defeat evil with good.
translation_verse: Na yeli nombiakumɛɛ ke di n dɔɔ ya, mɔna mo nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ di nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Obey the rulers who have authority over you. Only God can give authority to anyone, and he puts these rulers in their places of power.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa yɔkɔse ɔ wose fa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ kegyiise baŋ bee di de dɔɔ nɛ, nawolo nyi kegyia ŋolo be kyaa keŋ na Wurubuarɛ see na e ya. Kegyiise baŋ be kyaa nɛ pou, Wurubuarɛ see na wɔ.

english_verse: People who oppose the authorities are opposing what God has done, and they will be punished.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ akpaa ŋolo da koro seŋ tia kegyiise benaŋ na, ɔ ta seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ baa. Te walaŋ ŋon waa yɛɛ mena na, Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ ɔ deŋele.

english_verse: Rulers are a threat to evil people, not to good people. There is no need to be afraid of the authorities. Just do right, and they will praise you for it.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa nɛ, bɔɔ ne yee kegyiise ya. Nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra ne yee na kegyiise benaŋ. Akpaa n bɛɛ gyae nyi n ke yee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ kegyiise ya na, kenaŋ na yɛɛ kpene keŋ dei na baa nyiŋ kɛlɛɛ neŋ.

english_verse: After all, they are God's servants, and it is their duty to help you. If you do something wrong, you ought to be afraid, because these rulers have the right to punish you. They are God's servants who punish criminals to show how angry God is.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi kegyia ŋon bɔɔ lese e see kolo nɔɔman nɛ, ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tobaale e keŋ ɔ ne yɛɛ ɔ tom lee nyaŋ gbagba n deeli dɔɔ. Mɔna akpaa n yɛɛ kolo kum na yela gyakoloŋ ke kyaŋ neŋ, nawolo nyi ɔ doŋ keŋ ɔ dana nɛ te yɛɛ yakaa ya. Ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tobaale e ŋon Wurubuarɛ ne tɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ wɔŋ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra deŋele.

english_verse: But you should obey the rulers because you know it is the right thing to do, and not just because of God's anger.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa yɔkɔse ɔ wose fa kegyiise baŋ. Te yɛɛ keŋ nyi ɔ ne yee nyi keŋ baa wɔŋ ɔ deŋele kaageŋ dɔɔ ya, mɔna keŋ ɔ gyeŋ lee ɔ konɔɔ man nyi kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ mena dɔɔ.

english_verse: You must also pay your taxes. The authorities are God's servants, and it is their duty to take care of these matters.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ dɔɔ te kaboena nyi yaa tɔ lempoo nɛ. Nawolo nyi kegyiise baŋ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tewulɛɛwɔ te bɛɛ mo ba debaŋ pou yɛɛ tom.

english_verse: In the Law there are many commands, such as, “Be faithful in marriage. Do not murder. Do not steal. Do not want what belongs to others.” But all of these are summed up in the command that says, “Love others as much as you love yourself.”
translation_verse: Nnɛ te Mosesi mmaraase ŋan ŋaale ne yako nyiaa, “Na lee n wɛɛle yaa n baale wɔle ya, na ko walaŋ ya, na ŋmɛɛle ya, na yeli n sia keyɛɛ n dɔɔ kolo ya.” Kɛŋa na mmaraase akaŋ ŋan pou nyee yɛna mmaraa keŋ ne yako nyiaa, “Gyae n dɔɔ ŋgba nyaŋ gbagba n wose nɛ.”

english_verse: No one who loves others will harm them. So love is all that the Law demands. The Day When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ŋolo ne gyae ɔ dɔɔ nɛ, ɔ be gyae waa yɛɛ e nombiikum ya. Mena dɔɔ nyi n gyae n dɔɔ na, n dii mmaraase ŋan pou dɔɔ baa kelii ɔto. Nawolo nyi mmaraase ŋan pou nyee yɛna kegyae.

english_verse: You know what sort of times we live in, and so you should live properly. It is time to wake up. You know that the day when we will be saved is nearer now than when we first put our faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Kɛŋa pou wɔle nɛ, ɛ kɛɛ debaŋ keŋ man de kyaa nɛ na ɛ kena nyi te lii debaŋ keŋ dee foŋ lee da dosoroŋ man. Nawolo nyi nɛnɛɛ da nyeekelɛɛweeya ŋan ta benaa kela debaŋ keŋ dɔɔ taŋgbɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ.

english_verse: Night is almost over, and day will soon appear. We must stop behaving as people do in the dark and be ready to live in the light.
translation_verse: Teka kyomii na nelim te lam, na tɛɛ kena mɔ te lii. Mena dɔɔ ɛ yela dee tina ditiŋtɛɛ man abɔɔ keyɛɛ yela, na dɛɛ mo keŋmaŋee kegba keŋ dɛɛ mo yoo na ditiŋtɛɛ abɔɔ nɛ do.

english_verse: Let the Lord Jesus Christ be as near to you as the clothes you wear. Then you won't try to satisfy your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ yela de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kedi ɛ nyee, na ba tekaa yela ɛ ka gyueŋ nombiakumɛɛ ŋan ɛ dinɔɔ kum keŋ ne yeli ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ ya.

english_verse: Welcome all the Lord's followers, even those whose faith is weak. Don't criticize them for having beliefs that are different from yours.
translation_verse: Ɛ lɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ be dana doŋ ɔ Kristo kelɛɛdi man ya nɛ do ɛ man. Mɔna ɛ na yeli ɛ konɔɔ man nombia ŋan dɔɔ walaŋ kamasɛ seŋɛɛ nɛ, ka mo kewɔŋee kɔŋ ya nsana ya.

english_verse: Some think it is all right to eat anything, while those whose faith is weak will eat only vegetables.
translation_verse: Ŋolo kyaa na lee ɔ Kristo kelɛɛdi dɔɔ ɔ ne lɛɛ di nyi waa tale di kpene kamasɛ. Ŋolo mɔ kelɛɛdi be dana doŋ ya mena dɔɔ ŋon ne di faareŋ weenɛɛ kaageŋ bo.

english_verse: What right do you have to criticize someone else's servants? Only their Lord can decide if they are doing right, and the Lord will make sure that they do right.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ yɛna amɔte keŋ n ke tale bu ŋolo tobaale yaa wa alebu fɔɔ? Walaŋ ŋonaŋ ɔ gbeŋgyoo waageŋ ne gyae la waa tale naa nyi ɔ seŋɛɛ nideli yaa ɔ ba seŋɛɛ nideli ya. Te waa tale seŋ nideli nawolo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ dana doŋ keŋ waa tale yela waa seŋ nideli.

english_verse: Some of the Lord's followers think one day is more important than another. Others think all days are the same. But each of you should make up your own mind.
translation_verse: Ŋolo waa tale yako nyi wee daale kela weeya akaŋ ŋan, te ŋolo mɔ gyaŋ na weeya ŋan pou yɛɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Nombia kɛŋa man na, kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa lɛɛ ɔ wui keŋ dɔɔ ɔ seŋɛɛ nɛ do nideli.

english_verse: Whether we live or die, it must be for God, rather than for ourselves.
translation_verse: Da ke kyaa kei, yeŋ man o nyeedoŋ man o, ŋolo be kyaa fa ɔ wose ya.

english_verse: This is because Christ died and rose to life, so that he would be the Lord of the dead and of the living.
translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te Kristo yeŋawɔ te ɔ foŋawɔ lee yeŋ man. Na ke yela waa nyiŋ bese balaŋ baŋ be kyaa na be sia, na baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ pou Gbeŋgyoo.

english_verse: Why do you criticize other followers of the Lord? Why do you look down on them? The day is coming when God will judge all of us.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ tekaboena nyi ŋolo waa bu ɔ dɔɔ fɔɔ yaa waa kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ɔ dei kela ɔ dɔɔ ya. Nawolo nyi de popou dɛɛ kaa seŋ Wurubuarɛ siaman na waa di de nombia.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “I swear by my very life that everyone will kneel down and praise my name!”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan ne yako nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo kpa, ‘Maŋ nyiŋa me kyaa nɛ, walaŋ kamasɛ waa kaa buŋ me siaman na waa toro yako nyi maŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ.’ ”

english_verse: And so, each of us must give an account to God for what we do. Don't Cause Problems for Others
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ de man walaŋ kamasɛ waa kaa tɔlɛɛ ɔ nɔɔwoya fa Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: We must stop judging others. We must also make up our minds not to upset anyone's faith.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ yela dee tina dɔŋa fɔɔ kebu yela. Mɔna kaboena bo nyi dɛɛ kɛɛ nyi dɔɔ yɛɛ kolo na ke yela ŋolo ke yɛɛ dukum ya.

english_verse: The Lord Jesus has made it clear to me that God considers all foods fit to eat. But if you think some foods are unfit to eat, then for you they are not fit.
translation_verse: Me ka bese Kristo baale kei dɔɔ nɛ, ma te naa nyi weenɛɛ kamasɛ be kyaa keŋ ke yɛɛ kolo kum ke ya. Mɔna akpaa Kristo baale ŋolo de lɛɛ weenɛɛ ŋaale do nyi ke yɛɛ kolo anekɔlaŋ ke na, na ɔtenate gyaŋ te ke yɛɛ kolo anekɔlaŋ.

english_verse: If you serve Christ in this way, you will please God and be respected by people.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ som Kristo lee mena gbɛɛ kei man nɛ, ɔ nombia na gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia. Mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ mɔ te balaŋ na lese ɔ yele.

english_verse: We should try to live at peace and help each other have a strong faith.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ yela dɛɛ mo de loo gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan gyae ka mo wosefɛɛreŋ kɔŋ, te ŋɛɛ do daa doŋ da kelɛɛdi man nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Don't let your appetite destroy what God has done. All foods are fit to eat, but it is wrong to cause problems for others by what you eat.
translation_verse: Na yeli weenɛɛ ŋan nyaŋ ke di nɛ, ke wɔlɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tom ya. Gbɛɛ doo nyi dɛɛ tale di weenɛɛ kamasɛ, mɔna akpaa weenɛɛ ŋan nyaŋ kedi nɛ ne gyae la ke yela ŋolo ke yala ɔ kelɛɛdi man na, kenaŋ na na di ŋa korakora ya.

english_verse: It is best not to eat meat or drink wine or do anything else that causes problems for other followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi akpaa ŋolo de bɛɛ naane ketao, yaa ɔ bɛɛ soloŋ kenyɔɔ yaa ɔ bɛɛ kpene kamasɛ keŋ gyae ke yela ɔ dɔɔ ŋolo ke yala ɔ kelɛɛdi man na, keŋ gba dei la kela.

english_verse: But if you do have doubts about what you eat, you are going against your beliefs. And you know that is wrong, because anything you do against your beliefs is sin.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa ŋolo de di kolo keŋ ɔ konɔɔ man nombia ta tenee e ya nɛ, kenaŋ na Wurubuarɛ waa bu e fɔɔ. Nawolo nyi ɔtenate te lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di lee kpene kenaŋ keyɛɛ man ya. Te kpene kamasɛ keŋ ŋolo te lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di lee ka keyɛɛ man ya nɛ, na ke yɛɛ dukum ke.

english_verse: If our faith is strong, we should be patient with the Lord's followers whose faith is weak. We should try to please them instead of ourselves.
translation_verse: Daa baŋ da seŋɛɛ da kelɛɛdi man keŋkeŋ nɛ, kaboena nyi dee nyiŋ konɔɔ fa baŋ bɔɔ seŋɛɛ ba kelɛɛdi man keŋkeŋ ya nɛ, na dee nyiŋ kyɔ wɔ. Ɛ na yeli dɛɛ kɛɛ daa daageŋ wui ya.

english_verse: We should think of their good and try to help them by doing what pleases them.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela de man walaŋ kamasɛ ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ dei fa ɔ dɔɔ, na ke kyɔ e na ŋon mɔ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ ɔ kelɛɛdi man.

english_verse: Even Christ did not try to please himself. But as the Scriptures say, “The people who insulted you also insulted me.”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Kristo gba koraŋ te kɛɛ ŋon waageŋ wui ya. Be ŋmarasewɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see man nyi ɔ yako Wurubuarɛ nyiaa, “Tuubia ŋan balaŋ ba tee neŋ nɛ, maŋ te ŋe kaa wuraawɔ.”

english_verse: God is the one who makes us patient and cheerful. I pray that he will help you live at peace with each other, as you follow Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne yeli balaŋ ne nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ keŋkeŋ te ɔ na do wɔ kakyeŋ nɛ nyiaa, debaŋ kei keŋ ɛ silana Kristo Yesu nɛ, waa yela ɛ ke yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ.

english_verse: Then all of you together will praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. The Good News Is for Jews and Gentiles
translation_verse: Dekɔŋ mena na gyae ke yela ɛ popou ka mo konɔɔ dokoloŋ, na nɔɔdokoloŋ lese Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ɔ kya e nɛ yele.

english_verse: I tell you that Christ came as a servant of the Jews to show that God has kept the promises he made to their famous ancestors. Christ also came,
translation_verse: Ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon nyiaa, Kristo kaa bese Gyudatena somre na ka wola nyi Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia dɔɔ. Te ɔ nombia ŋan ɔ be yako see fa Gyudatena be naanaɔ baŋ nɛ, gyae ke kɔŋ mena.

english_verse: so that the Gentiles would praise God for being kind to them. It is just as the Scriptures say, “I will tell the nations about you, and I will sing praises to your name.”
translation_verse: Kei gyae ke yela balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, ka lese Wurubuarɛ yele lee mena keŋ ɔ be wii be waraŋase ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan be yako nɛ nyiaa, “Lee kei dɔɔ maa lese n yele balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ siaman, na maa kpee nɔɔneŋ kɛlɛɛ neŋ.”

english_verse: Again the Scriptures say, “Praise the Lord, all you Gentiles. All you nations, come and worship him.”
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Ɛmɛɛ baŋ pou ɛ te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, ɛ lese de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ yele. Ɛmɛɛ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ pou, ɛ lese Wurubuarɛ yele.”

english_verse: Isaiah says, “Someone from David's family will come to power. He will rule the nations, and they will put their hope in him.”
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ dekpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔre Yesaya mɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Walaŋ ŋolo waa kaa lee de naana Gyese duuluŋ man kɔŋ. Ŋon ne gyae la ɔ kaa di gyoori balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ dɔɔ, te ɔ dɔɔ te baa mo be loo gyakaa.”

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives hope, will bless you with complete happiness and peace because of your faith. And may the power of the Holy Spirit fill you with hope. Paul's Work as a Missionary
translation_verse: Mɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne fa balaŋ lookegyakaa nɛ nyi waa yela ɛ ke kyaa gyoŋ na wosefɛɛreŋ man lee kelɛɛdi keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ e di nɛ dɔɔ. Na ɔ feliŋ ŋon ke yela ɛ ka mo ɛ loo gyakaa ɔ dɔɔ nideli.

english_verse: My friends, I am sure that you are very good and that you have all the knowledge you need to teach each other.
translation_verse: Me tebia Kristotena, maŋ gbagba gyeŋ nideli nyi ɛ yɛɛ balaŋ kpaakpaawɔ, te ɛ gyeŋ nombia mɔ nideli keŋ ɛ ke tale wola ɛ tebia.

english_verse: But I have spoken to you plainly and have tried to remind you of some things. God treated me with undeserved grace!
translation_verse: Mɔna ma te gyɔ me konɔɔ yako ŋon nombia ŋaale me tɔne kei man, na ɛ be nyiŋ wolee ŋa ya. Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba mo boele maŋ nɛ dɔɔ, te me talewɔ yako ŋon nombia ŋenaŋ.

english_verse: He chose me to be a servant of Christ Jesus for the Gentiles and to do the work of a priest in the service of his good news. God did this so that the Holy Spirit could make the Gentiles into a holy offering, pleasing to him.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ lese na maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ Yesu Kristo kpilale balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ man. Mɛɛ yɛɛ tom ŋgba Wurubuarɛ sae nɛ lee ŋon Wurubuarɛ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan keyako man. Kei gyae ke yela balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, kaa yɛɛ ŋgba kpene keŋ bɛɛ mo deesi fa Wurubuarɛ te na gyoo ɔ sia nɛ. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon te desina wɔ keŋ kolo kum kamasɛ be doo be man bela ya.

english_verse: Because of Christ Jesus, I can take pride in my service for God.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me dana gbɛɛ keŋ maa tale wola ma wose, lee tom keŋ Kristo doŋ keŋ ne yeli mɛɛ yɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “All who haven't been told about him will see him, and those who haven't heard about him will understand.” Paul's Plan To Visit Rome
translation_verse: Mena te Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan ne yako nyiaa, “Balaŋ baŋ ba te yako ta wɔ Kristo nombia ŋan ya nɛ baa naa e, te balaŋ baŋ be te nyii ta ɔ nombia ŋan ya nɛ baa nyii ŋe man.”

english_verse: My work has always kept me from coming to see you.
translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te kaa lii naŋ gyɛŋ me te nyiŋa ta gbɛɛ maa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ ya nɛ.

english_verse: Now there is nothing left for me to do in this part of the world, and for years I have wanted to visit you.
translation_verse: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ma te taŋ ma tom keyɛɛ kɛbo, te leenaŋ bene bene me wulaa mɛɛ gyae gbɛɛ nyi maa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ,

english_verse: So I plan to stop off on my way to Spain. Then after a short, but refreshing, visit with you, I hope you will quickly send me on.
translation_verse: mena dɔɔ ma te yɛɛ ma agyueŋ nyi akpaa mɛɛ lam mee gyu Sepeni na maa ta ɛ gyaŋ. Mɛɛ kɔŋ me kaa talaa me sia ɛ gyaŋ weeya ala, na ɛ ke nyiŋ lɔ maŋ gbɛɛ.

english_verse: I am now on my way to Jerusalem to deliver the money that the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia collected for God's needy people.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Masedonia na Akaya tɛɛlese man nɛ, ta mo gyoŋ yilaa abɔɔ na baa mo yelee Kristotena ayematena baŋ be kyaa Gyerusalɛm donɔɔ man nɛ.

english_verse: This is something they really wanted to do. But sharing their money with the Jews was also like paying back a debt, because the Jews had already shared their spiritual blessings with the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Baŋ gbagba kegyaebii man te ba moowɔ yilaa abɔɔ kɛŋa, te kaboena nyi baa taŋ yɛɛ mena. Nawolo nyi nyeedoŋ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan bɔɔ nyii lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ nɛ, Gyudatena yele la te be nyii ŋa. Mena dɔɔ nyi baŋ mɔ da mo ba wose man abɔɔ gyu ke kyɔ Gyudatena benaŋ na, ke doo na ke gbɛɛ.

english_verse: And when I do arrive in Rome, I know it will be with the full blessings of Christ.
translation_verse: Te ma gyeŋ nyi me kɛɛ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ kei nɛ, gyae ke yela Kristo ke hiraa daa nideli.

english_verse: My friends, by the power of the Lord Jesus Christ and by the love that comes from the Holy Spirit, I beg you to pray sincerely with me and for me.
translation_verse: Me tebia kpaakpaa, me ta mo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo na balaŋ kegyae keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon be yeli ɛ dana nɛ mɛɛ sola ŋon nyiaa, ɛ yase ɛ sia fane fa Wurubuarɛ kyɔ maŋ.

english_verse: Ask God to let me come to you and have a pleasant and refreshing visit.
translation_verse: Te akpaa Wurubuarɛ de sɛɛ na maa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ na gyoŋ, na daa na ŋon pou ke kyaa na dee di gyoŋ na dɔŋa.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will be with all of you. Amen.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ, waa kyaa na ɛ popou. Amɛn.

english_verse: I have good things to say about Phoebe, who is a leader in the church at Cenchreae.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ lese de deesi Kristo alo Foobe maa wola ŋon nyi ɔ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne yee Wurubuarɛ nideli. Foobe kei yɛɛ kegyia e Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Kenkiria donɔɔ man nɛ man.

english_verse: Welcome her in a way that is proper for someone who has faith in the Lord and is one of God's own people. Help her in any way you can. After all, she has proved to be a respected leader for many others, including me.
translation_verse: Nyi ɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ na ɛ lɛɛ e lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man na ɛ ke kyɔ e lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man, ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi Kristotena baa kyɔ dɔŋa nɛ. Nawolo nyi ŋon gbagba mɔ te kyɔ balaŋ burum, te ɔ te kyɔ maŋ gbagba mɔ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila. They have not only served Christ Jesus together with me,
translation_verse: Ɛ do Pirisila na Akuila nɔɔ fa maŋ, nawolo nyi be yɛɛ me tebiawɔ te daa na wɔ pou ne yɛɛ na Kristo Yesu tom keŋ.

english_verse: but they have even risked their lives for me. I am grateful for them and so are all the Gentile churches.
translation_verse: Ba moo ba wose fa yeŋ lee me dɔɔ. Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ do wɔ nɔɔ nideli. Na maŋ maageŋ na do na wɔ nɔɔ ya, mɔna Kristotena baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ mɔ na do wɔ nɔɔ.

english_verse: Greet the church that meets in their home. Greet my dear friend Epaenetus, who was the first person in Asia to have faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Kristotena baŋ bɛɛ gyaŋee ba dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ. Ɛ do me gyoo gyaagyi Epanetuse nɔɔ fa maŋ. Ŋon yɛna walaŋ ŋon ɔ be taŋgbɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo di Esia tɛɛle man.

english_verse: Greet Mary, who has worked so hard for you.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Mɛɛre ŋon ɔ be naa diyem nideli ɛ dɔɔ nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ.

english_verse: Greet my relatives Andronicus and Junia, who were in jail with me. They are highly respected by the apostles and were followers of Christ before I was.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Andoronikuse na Gyuniase nɔɔ fa maŋ. Be yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ŋgba maŋ nɛ, te daa na wɔ pou te be kyaŋawɔ tɔ deni see. Be yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ Kristo kpilala baŋ pou ne bu wɔ nideli, te be taŋgbɛɛ maŋ lɛɛ Kristo di gba.

english_verse: Greet Ampliatus, my dear friend whose faith is in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Ampeliatuse nɔɔ fa maŋ. Ɔ yɛɛ me gyoo gyaagyi e lee Kristo dɔɔ.

english_verse: Greet Urbanus, who serves Christ along with us. Greet my dear friend Stachys.
translation_verse: Ɛ do de gyoo Ubanuse ŋon daa na e pou ne yɛɛ tom Kristo man nɛ, na de dɔɔ kpaakpaa Setakise nɔɔ fa maŋ.

english_verse: Greet Herodion, who is a relative of mine. Greet Narcissus and the others in his family, who have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Herodiɔn nɔɔ fa maŋ. Ŋon mɔ yɛɛ Gyuda baale e ŋgba maŋ nɛ. Ɛ do Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Nasisuse dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ.

english_verse: Greet Tryphaena and Tryphosa, who work hard for the Lord. Greet my dear friend Persis. She also works hard for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Tirifena na Tirifosa nɔɔ fa maŋ. Be yɛɛ ala baŋ bɔɔ kyaŋ ba wose yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo tom keŋ. Ɛ do me gyoo gyaagyi Pɛɛsi nɔɔ fa maŋ. Ŋon mɔ yɛɛ alo ŋon ɔ be yɛɛ tom dinaa fa de Gbeŋgyoo.

english_verse: Greet Rufus, that special servant of the Lord, and greet his mother, who has been like a mother to me.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Rufuse na ɔ naa ŋon ɔ ba mo maŋ yɛɛ ɔ bu nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ. Rufuse yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo tobaale ŋon ɔ yele ba lee nideli.

english_verse: Greet Asyncritus, Phlegon, Hermes, Patrobas, and Hermas, as well as our friends who are with them.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Asinkirituse na Felegɔn na Hemise na Patorobase na Hɛmase na Kristotena baŋ pou be kyaa kpu na wɔ nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ.

english_verse: Greet Philologus, Julia, Nereus and his sister, and Olympas, and all of God's people who are with them.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Filologuse na Gyulia na Neruse na ɔ deesi na Olimpase na Kristotena baŋ pou be kyaa kpu na wɔ nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ.

english_verse: Be sure to give each other a warm greeting. All of Christ's churches greet you.
translation_verse: Ɛ pukaa dɔŋa, na ɛ ka do dɔŋa nɔɔ na gyoŋ. Kristotena akpii akpii ŋan pou na do ŋon nɔɔ.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to watch out for anyone who causes trouble and divides the church by refusing to do what all of you were taught. Stay away from them!
translation_verse: Me tebia, mɛɛ waase ŋon nyi ɛ kɛɛ nideli na ɛ ka gyene balaŋ baŋ be kpuɛ na ŋon te bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ ya nsana nɛ. Mena balaŋ benaŋ ne yeli baale ne yale ba kelɛɛdi man, te be nombia ŋan bɛɛ wolo nɛ mɔ yɛɛ kpoo lee ŋan mɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ man. Ɛ lese ɛ wose lee mena balaŋ benaŋ man.

english_verse: They want to serve themselves and not Christ the Lord. Their flattery and fancy talk fool people who don't know any better.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi mena balaŋ kɛwɔ bɛɛ som de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo ya, mɔna bɛɛ gyae baŋ gbagba deeli bo. Be dɔŋɛɛ bɛɛ mo nɔɔman yeliŋ na nɔɔwoya gyoŋ nyiŋan mo beo balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ daale ya nɛ.

english_verse: I am glad that everyone knows how well you obey the Lord. But still, I want you to understand what is good and not have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ balaŋ pou te nyii mena keŋ ɛ ba mo ɛ wose fa Kristo nɛ, mena dɔɔ dana maŋ gyoŋ nideli. Mɔna mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ nyansa na ɛ ka gyeŋ nombia ŋan ŋe dei, na ɛ ka lese ɛ wose lee dukum keyɛɛ man.

english_verse: Then God, who gives peace, will soon crush Satan under your feet. I pray that our Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Be gyae ke kyare ya Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ pou Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ, waa yela ɛ ke sakatee ɔbɔnsam ɛ nawɔɔ tɛɛ. De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon.

english_verse: I, Tertius, also send my greetings. I am a follower of the Lord, and I wrote this letter.
translation_verse: Maŋ Tɛtiyuse ŋon mɔɔ ŋmarase tɔne kei fa Pɔɔl nɛ, mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ lee de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo yele man.

english_verse: Gaius welcomes me and the whole church into his home, and he sends his greetings. Erastus, the city treasurer, and our dear friend Quartus send their greetings too. Paul's Closing Prayer
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle. Amɛn.

english_verse: Praise God! He can make you strong by means of my good news, which is the message about Jesus Christ. For ages and ages this message was kept secret,
translation_verse: Ɛ yela dɛɛ lese Wurubuarɛ yele. Ŋon ne tale la yela ɛ ne tale seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man, lee Yesu Kristo nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan mɔɔ kolosi fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ. Nafɔ anokoare nombii kei yɛɛ nombii aweeseŋ ke, mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te yeli de ta gyeŋ ke.

english_verse: but now at last it has been told. The eternal God commanded his prophets to write about the good news, so that all nations would obey and have faith.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ nombii kei ta tekaa yɛɛ nombii aweeseŋ ya. Wurubuarɛ te yeli wa akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra te ŋmarase anokoare nombii kei see. Te Wurubuarɛ ŋon mɔ ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ te yeli ba te kolosi nombii kei fa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ pou, na baa lɛɛ e di na baa ta ɔ gbɛɛneŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: And now, because of Jesus Christ, we can praise the only wise God forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela dɛɛ ta de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ na dɛɛ lese Wurubuarɛ yele kekpaakekpaa. Nawolo nyi ŋon waageŋ kooŋ yɛna nyansa pou nyee. Amɛn.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Sosthenes, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon Wurubuarɛ be baake lee ɔ kegyaebii man nyi me kaa yɛɛ ɔ kpilale nɛ, na de dɔɔ Sositene gyaŋ.

english_verse: To God's church in Corinth. Christ Jesus chose you to be his very own people, and you worship in his name, as we and all others do who call him Lord.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena dikpii keŋ ɛ kyaa Korinto donɔɔ man, na baŋ pou be kyaa yenaŋ kamasɛ te bɛɛ som de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ daa na wɔ pou Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ. Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ Kristo Yesu dɔɔ baake ŋon te ɔ gberaa ayimɛɛ lee ɛ wose man te ɔ desina ŋon see fa ɔ wose.

english_verse: My prayer is that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon, na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

english_verse: I never stop thanking my God for treating you with undeserved grace by giving you Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ fane na, mɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee mena keŋ ɔ be tɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo Yesu dɔɔ mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Now you are certain that everything we told you about our Lord Christ Jesus is true.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Kristo nombia ŋan dee kolosi te ɛ be nyii nɛ, ta gyoo ɛ man nideli.

english_verse: God can be trusted, and he chose you to be partners with his Son, our Lord Jesus Christ. Taking Sides
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ lee ɔ nombia wɔle ya nɛ baake na ŋon nyi ɛ kaa yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ. Kristotena ne kale na dɔŋa

english_verse: My dear friends, as a follower of our Lord Jesus Christ, I beg you to get along with each other. Don't take sides. Always try to agree in what you think.
translation_verse: Me tebia Kristotena, me ta mo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yele mee doo ŋon teree nyiaa, ɛ popou ɛ yako nombii sɛɛ dɔŋa na kekpase be kɔŋ ɛ man ya. Ɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ lee ɛ nyeeman nombia na ɛ kekolosi pou man.

english_verse: Several people from Chloe's family have already reported to me that you keep arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Me tebia, balaŋ baale ta lee Koloe dekpaŋalaŋ man kaa yako maŋ nyi kale doo ya nsana.

english_verse: Has Christ been divided up? Was I nailed to a cross for you? Were you baptized in my name?
translation_verse: Mɛɛ bɔɔse ŋon baa nyiaa, dɛɛ tale kpase Kristo? Pɔɔl te be gyɔɔwɔ sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ fa ŋon? Yaa maŋ Pɔɔl yele maŋ te be sɔɔ ŋon Wurubuarɛ loŋ?

english_verse: I thank God that I didn't baptize any of you except Crispus and Gaius.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ nyi lee Krispuse na Gayose wɔle na, ma te sɔ ŋolo Wurubuarɛ loŋ ya.

english_verse: Not one of you can say that you were baptized in my name.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ ŋolo be tale yako nyi, be sɔɔ e Wurubuarɛ loŋ bo lee ma yele man ya.

english_verse: I did baptize the family of Stephanas, but I don't remember if I baptized anyone else.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ tɔɔse mɔ nyi me sɔɔ Setefanase na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋmantena Wurubuarɛ loŋ. Lee kɛwɔ wɔle na, mɔɔ ne tɔɔse nyi me sɔɔ ŋolo Wurubuarɛ loŋ bela ya.

english_verse: Christ did not send me to baptize. He sent me to tell the good news without using words that sound wise and would make the cross of Christ lose its power. Christ Is God's Power and Wisdom
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Kristo te kpila maŋ nyi me kaa sɔ balaŋ Wurubuarɛ loŋ ya. Mɔna ɔ kpila maŋ bo nyi me kaa kolosi ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan. Me ta mo denibalaŋ nyansa kolosi nombia kpaakpaa ŋenaŋ ya. Nyi meŋ moo denibalaŋ nyansa kolosi nombia kpaakpaa ŋenaŋ nɛ, nafɔ Kristo yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ wose man nombia be gyae ke yɛɛ nɔɔdoŋ ya. Kristo yɛna Wurubuarɛ doŋ na ɔ nyansa

english_verse: The message about the cross doesn't make any sense to lost people. But for those of us who are being saved, it is God's power at work.
translation_verse: Kristo ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ yeŋ keŋ nombia yɛɛ diyiŋ nombia ŋa fa balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yoo Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛ man nɛ, mɔna daa baŋ Wurubuarɛ ne lɛɛ da nyee nɛ dɔɔ ŋe yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ doŋ ke fa daa.

english_verse: As God says in the Scriptures, “I will destroy the wisdom of all who claim to be wise. I will confuse those who think they know so much.”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan ne yako nyiaa, “Maa yela nyansatena baŋ nyansa ke yɛɛ yakaa, na maa yela baŋ be sia be kare nɛ, mɔ sia kekara keŋ ke yɛɛ yakaa.”

english_verse: What happened to those wise people? What happened to those experts in the Scriptures? What happened to the ones who think they have all the answers? Didn't God show that the wisdom of this world is foolish?
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa nnɛ te doo na, kenaŋ na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansatena na tɔne gyeŋara na nombia gyeŋara baŋ daseŋae yɛna aleŋ Wurubuarɛ siaman? Wurubuarɛ ta lese wola nyi tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansa yɛɛ diyiŋ nombia ŋa ɔ siaman.

english_verse: God was wise and decided not to let the people of this world use their wisdom to learn about him. Instead, God chose to save only those who believe the foolish message we preach.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nyansa man na, ɔ yɛɛ ke nyi balaŋ be gyae baa tale mo baŋ gbagba be nyansa gyeŋ e ya. Mena dɔɔ ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii nyi waa ta na nombia kpaakpaa ŋan dee kolosi te balaŋ kpa ŋe yɛɛ diyiŋ nombia ŋa nɛ dɔɔ lɛɛ balaŋ baŋ baa lɛɛ ŋa di nɛ nyee.

english_verse: Jews ask for miracles, and Greeks want something that sounds wise.
translation_verse: Gyudatena ne gyae gyakoloŋ nombia bo baa naa, te Girikitena mɔ ne gyae nyansa nombia bo baa nyii.

english_verse: But we preach that Christ was nailed to a cross. Most Jews have problems with this, and most Gentiles think it is foolish.
translation_verse: Mɔna daa ne kolosi Kristo ŋon bɔɔ gyɔ e sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ wose man nombia bo. Mena nombia ŋenaŋ yɛɛ baŋ nombia ŋa fa Gyudatena, te ŋe yɛɛ diyiŋ nombia ŋa fa balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ.

english_verse: Our message is God's power and wisdom for the Jews and the Greeks that he has chosen.
translation_verse: Te balaŋ baŋ pou Wurubuarɛ be baake nɛ dɔɔ, be yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ o, yaa ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, Kristo yɛna Wurubuarɛ doŋ na ɔ nyansa fa wɔ.

english_verse: Even when God is foolish, he is wiser than everyone else, and even when God is weak, he is stronger than everyone else.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nyansa keŋ deniwalaŋ bee bu ke ya nɛ, keŋ kela na deniwalaŋ nyansa, te ɔ doŋ keŋ deniwalaŋ bee bu ke ya nɛ, keŋ kela na deniwalaŋ doŋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember what you were when God chose you. The people of this world didn't think that many of you were wise. Only a few of you were in places of power, and not many of you came from important families.
translation_verse: Me tebia, ɛ tɔɔse mena keŋ ɛ doo pɛte Wurubuarɛ be baake ŋon nɛ. Nawolo nyi debaŋ kenaŋ na, na ɛ popou yɛna siakaralatena balaŋ siaman ya, te na ɛ popou mɔ yɛna balaŋ dinaana balaŋ siaman ya, te na ɛ popou mɔ yɛna gyoorobia ya.

english_verse: God did all this to keep anyone from bragging to him.
translation_verse: Ɔ yɛɛwɔ mena na ka wola nyi, ŋolo be tale gyina ɔ wose adido Wurubuarɛ siaman ya.

english_verse: Friends, when I came and told you the mystery that God had shared with us, I didn't use big words or try to sound wise.
translation_verse: Me tebia, debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ kaa di Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan wose man adansɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ, ma te kɔŋ kaa wola nyi ma gyeŋ kekolosi yaa ma gyeŋ nyansa kela ɛ man ŋolo ya.

english_verse: In fact, while I was with you, I made up my mind to speak only about Jesus Christ, who had been nailed to a cross.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, ma te gyae nyi maa gyeŋ kolo kpu na Yesu Kristo na ɔ yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ ya.

english_verse: At first, I was weak and trembling with fear.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ma moo wose keyɔkɔse na gyakoloŋ na wose keseree kyaa ɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: When I talked with you or preached, I didn't try to prove anything by sounding wise. I simply let God's Spirit show his power.
translation_verse: Ma kekolosi na me kawola ta lee deniwalaŋ agyueŋ na adao gbɛɛneŋ man ya, mɔna kɛɛ lese doŋ keŋ doo Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon man nɛ debɔɔ bo.

english_verse: That way you would have faith because of God's power and not because of human wisdom.
translation_verse: Na ɛ be nyiŋ mo ɛ kelɛɛdi gyakaa deniwalaŋ nyansa dɔɔ ya, mɔna ɛ ka mo gyakaa Wurubuarɛ doŋ keŋ dɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ nyansa

english_verse: We do use wisdom when speaking to people who are mature in their faith. But it isn't the wisdom of this world or of its rulers, who will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ mo nyansa bo kolosi fa Kristotena baŋ bɔɔ bee Kristo ɔsom keŋ man nɛ. Na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansa na gyooneŋ baŋ be doŋ pou ne gyu kɔ ɔto nɛ nyansa yaa de dana dee kolosi ya.

english_verse: We speak of God's hidden and mysterious wisdom that God decided to use for our glory long before the world began.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nyansa keŋ ka weesɛɛ, te ɔ ba mo ke weese nyi waa mo lese de gyoorobiiri wola pɛte ɔ be yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ nɛ, keŋ te dɛɛ mo kolosi.

english_verse: The rulers of this world didn't know anything about this wisdom. If they had known about it, they would not have nailed the glorious Lord to a cross.
translation_verse: Tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyooneŋ baŋ man ŋolo na ŋolo te nyii nyansa kei man ya. Nyi beŋ nyii ke man na, nafɔ beŋ te gyɔ gyoorobiiri Gbeŋgyoo ŋon sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: But it is just as the Scriptures say, “What God has planned for people who love him is more than eyes have seen or ears have heard. It has never even entered our minds!”
translation_verse: Mɔna ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ bɔɔ ŋmarase do Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan man. Be ŋmarasewɔ nyiaa, “Kpene keŋ sibii te naa ta see ya, na keŋ deŋele te nyii ta see ya, na kpene keŋ deniwalaŋ agyueŋ te gyakaa ta ke dɔɔ see ya nɛ, keŋ te Wurubuarɛ desinawɔ see fa baŋ bɛɛ gyae e nɛ.”

english_verse: God's Spirit has shown you everything. His Spirit finds out everything, even what is deep in the mind of God.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ ɔ feliŋ ŋon dɔɔ lese ɔ nombia aweeseŋ ŋan wola daa. Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋonaŋ ne kɛola kpene kamasɛ man, te ɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia dinaana ŋan mɔ man.

english_verse: You are the only one who knows what is in your own mind, and God's Spirit is the only one who knows what is in God's mind.
translation_verse: Amɔte gyeŋa na deniwalaŋ nyeeman nombia kpu na feliŋ ŋon doo ɔtenate man nɛ? Mena mɔ te walaŋ be kyaa keŋ ɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nyeeman nombia kpu na Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ya.

english_verse: But God has given us his Spirit. This is why we don't think the same way that the people of this world think. This is also why we can recognize the blessings God has given us.
translation_verse: Daa dɔɔ, na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansa te Wurubuarɛ faa daa ya, mɔna ɔ feliŋ ŋon te ɔ faa daa na dee nyiŋ nyii Wurubuarɛ nombia dinaana ŋan ɔ ba mo fa daa nɛ man.

english_verse: Every word we speak was taught to us by God's Spirit, not by human wisdom. And this same Spirit helps us teach spiritual things to spiritual people.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ na mena keŋ deniwalaŋ nyansa na wolo nɛ te dɛɛ mo kolosi ya, mɔna nyansa keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ na wolo nɛ, te dɛɛ mo kolosi nombia ŋan fa balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ doo be man nɛ.

english_verse: People who are guided by the Spirit can make all kinds of judgments, but they cannot be judged by others.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon Wurubuarɛ feliŋ doo ɔ man nɛ, ɔ ne tale gyeŋ abɔɔ pou man, mɔna walaŋ kamasɛ bɛɛ tale gyeŋ ɔtenate nombia man ya.

english_verse: The Scriptures ask, “Has anyone ever known the thoughts of the Lord or given him advice?” But we understand what Christ is thinking.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ne yako nyiaa, “Amɔte gyeŋa na de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ nyeeman, na waa wola e nombia?” Mɔna daa gyeŋ nombia kɛŋa pou man, nawolo nyi de dana Kristo agyueŋ.

english_verse: My friends, you are acting like the people of this world. That's why I could not speak to you as spiritual people. You are like babies as far as your faith in Christ is concerned.
translation_verse: Me tebia, debaŋ keŋ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, ma te tale kolosi fa ŋon ŋgba balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ doo be man nideli nɛ ya, mɔna me kolosiwɔ fa ŋon bo ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be sia gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ dɔɔ nɛ, yaa balaŋ baŋ be sɛɛ be yɛɛ kyokyoosewɔ Kristo man nɛ.

english_verse: because you are not yet spiritual. You are jealous and argue with each other. This proves you are not spiritual and you are acting like the people of this world.
translation_verse: Ɛ sɛɛ ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be loo gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ dɔɔ nɛ. Nawolo nyi daaworo na aŋmaareŋ na kale nombia doo ɛ man. Kenaŋ na ŋgba ɛ sɛɛ ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be loo gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ dɔɔ nɛ baa?

english_verse: Some of you say you follow me, and others claim to follow Apollos. Isn't this how ordinary people behave?
translation_verse: Akpaa ŋolo de yako nyi, “Me silana Pɔɔl bo” te ŋolo mɔ kpa “Me silana Apolo bo” na, ŋgba ɛ sɛɛ ɛ yɛɛ baa ŋgba tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ nɛ?

english_verse: What matters isn't those who planted or watered, but God who made the plants grow.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ na walaŋ ŋon ɔ be duu, yaa ŋon ɔ ba do ke loŋ nɛ danaana yele ya, mɔna Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be yeli kɔɔ bee nɛ danaana yele.

english_verse: The one who plants is just as important as the one who waters. And each one will be paid for what they do.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ be duu na ŋon ɔ ba do ke loŋ nɛ, be popou loo gyakaa bo kolo dokoloŋ dɔɔ. Te Wurubuarɛ waa tɔ walaŋ kamasɛ kom lee ɔ tom keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Apollos and I work together for God, and you are God's garden and God's building. Only One Foundation
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi daa na Wurubuarɛ bom la dɛɛ yɛɛ ɔ tom keŋ. Ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba Wurubuarɛ wɔɔ keŋ ɔ ne fare yaa ɔ deni keŋ ɔ ne maa nɛ.

english_verse: God treated me with undeserved grace and let me become an expert builder. I laid a foundation on which others have built. But we must each be careful how we build,
translation_verse: Lee Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba mo boele maŋ dɔɔ nɛ, me ta see deni keŋ mokɔɔ ŋgba deni maare kpaakpaate ŋon ɔ gyeŋ ɔ tom nɛ. Keŋte baale mɔ kaŋawɔ bɛɛ maa gyakaa ke dɔɔ. Mɔna kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa kɛɛ mena keŋ ɔ ne maa gyakaa nɛ nideli.

english_verse: Whatever we build on this foundation will be tested by fire on the day of judgment. Then everyone will find out if we have used gold, silver, and precious stones, or wood, hay, and straw.
translation_verse: wee dinaa keŋ Kristo waa bese kɔŋ na, baa lese kpene kamasɛ debɔɔ na walaŋ kamasɛ tom keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ nɛ ka lee debɔɔ. Nawolo nyi boalaŋ te baa mo lese kpene kamasɛ debɔɔ. Boalaŋ kenaŋ ne gyaela ka lese tom keŋ walaŋ kamasɛ be yɛɛ nɛ dinɔɔ wola.

english_verse: But if it is destroyed by the fire, we will lose everything. Yet we ourselves will be saved, like someone escaping from flames.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa ŋolo wui de kpaa na, ɔ te yɛɛ tom leki. Walaŋ ŋonaŋ gbagba dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ waa lɛɛ e, mɔna gyae ke yɛɛ bo ŋgba ɔ kɔlee e bo lee boalaŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: All of you surely know you are God's temple and his Spirit lives in you.
translation_verse: Ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi ɛmɛɛ gbagba yɛna Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ, te ɔ feliŋ ŋon doo ɛ man yee?

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves! If any of you think you are wise in the things of this world, you will have to become foolish before you can be truly wise.
translation_verse: Ɛ na beo ɛ wose ya. Akpaa ŋolo doo ɛ man te ɔ ne kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ɔ yɛɛ siakaralate e tɛɛle kei dɔɔ na, kaboena nyi waa besena ɔ wose yɛɛ diyiŋte na waa nyiŋ bese siakaralate gbagba.

english_verse: This is because God considers the wisdom of this world to be foolish. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God catches the wise when they try to outsmart him.”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansa yɛɛ diyiŋ nombia ŋa Wurubuarɛ siaman. Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ne yako nyiaa, “Siakaralatena adao man te Wurubuarɛ na mo kyaŋ wɔ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “The Lord knows that the plans made by wise people are useless.”
translation_verse: Te ba besewɔ ŋmarase see nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ gyeŋ nyi siakaralatena konɔɔ man nombia be dana tɔnɔɔ ya.”

english_verse: So stop bragging about what anyone has done. Paul and Apollos and Peter all belong to you. In fact, everything is yours, including the world, life, death, the present, and the future. Everything belongs to you,
translation_verse: Pɔɔl o Apolo o Pita o tɛɛle kei o nyeedoŋ o yeŋ o debaŋ kei o wee daale o, ŋe popou yɛɛ ɛ wui.

english_verse: and you belong to Christ, and Christ belongs to God.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ mɔ yɛɛ Kristo wui, te Kristo mɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ wui.

english_verse: Think of us as servants of Christ who have been given the work of explaining God's mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa lɛɛ daa do nyi de yɛɛ Kristo kpilalawɔ, te de yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo ɔ nombia dinaana aweeseŋ ŋan do de nyiŋmaa man.

english_verse: And since our first duty is to be faithful to the one we work for,
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne kɛɛ ŋolo kolo dɔɔ nɛ, kpene keŋ kaboena nyi waa yɛɛ yɛna nyi, waa di anokoare fa ɔ gbeŋgyoo ŋon.

english_verse: it doesn't matter to me if I am judged by you or even by a court of law. In fact, I don't judge myself.
translation_verse: Te maŋ dɔɔ akpaa nyi ɛ man baale yaa balaŋ wɔlɛɛ baale de bu maŋ fɔɔ na, bɛɛ takaa maŋ ya. Maŋ gbagba koraŋ bee bu ma wose fɔɔ ya.

english_verse: I don't know of anything against me, but this doesn't prove I am right. The Lord is my judge.
translation_verse: Me konɔɔ man nombia bee bu maŋ fɔɔ ya, mɔna kei bɛɛ wolo nyi nombiikum daale be doo me man ya. De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yɛna ŋon ɔ ne di me nombia.

english_verse: So don't judge anyone until the Lord returns. He will show what is hidden in the dark and what is in everyone's heart. Then God will be the one who praises each of us.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na barase bu ŋolo fɔɔ pɛte de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu kekɔŋ keŋ kelii ya. Ŋon ne gyae la ɔ kaa lese kpene kamasɛ keŋ weesɛɛ nɛ debɔɔ, na waa lese walaŋ konɔɔ man nombia pou debɔɔ. Debaŋ kenaŋ te Wurubuarɛ waa kɛlɛɛ walaŋ kamasɛ lee ɔ tom wa ayɛɛŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: What is so special about you? What do you have that you were not given? And if it was given to you, how can you brag?
translation_verse: Amɔte yako na ŋon nyi ɛ kela ɛ tebia? Woŋ te ɛ dana keŋ nyi na Wurubuarɛ faa na ŋon ya? Te akpaa Wurubuarɛ faa na ŋon na, weera te ɛ ne gyina ɛ wose adido ŋgba na ŋon faa na ŋon ya nɛ?

english_verse: Are you already satisfied? Are you now rich? Have you become kings while we are still nobodies? I wish you were kings. Then we could have a share in your kingdom.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyeŋ nyi ɛ taŋ ke wulaa nyiŋ kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne hia ŋon? Te ɛ gyeŋ nyi ɛ taŋ wulaa nyiŋ ɛ wose? Ɛ gyeŋ nyi ɛ taŋ lee de wɔle di gyoori keŋ daa sɛɛ de yɛɛ balaŋ yakaa nyibaŋwɔ? Nafɔ me gyaewɔ nyi yaa bese gyooneŋ, na daa mɔ ke di gyoori kpu na ŋon.

english_verse: It seems to me that God has put us apostles in the worst possible place. We are like prisoners on their way to death. Angels and the people of this world just laugh at us.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ne yɛɛ maŋ ŋgba Wurubuarɛ ta mo daa Kristo kpilala baŋ see wɔle wɔle, ŋgba balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ doo daale man ya, te bɔɔ lese wɔ see nyi baa ko balaŋ man nɛ. De ta bese kpene keŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ na Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ be kyaa adido nɛ pou ne kɛɛ.

english_verse: Even today we go hungry and thirsty and don't have anything to wear except rags. We are mistreated and don't have a place to live.
translation_verse: Mo kaa lii naŋ gyɛŋ kei nɛ, de dɔŋ na de tanam na da loŋboaneŋ! De doo abɔɔ akyekpɛɛ man, te bee tuku daa yeŋ yeŋ te daa gbagba mɔ be dana dekyae ya.

english_verse: We work hard with our own hands, and when people abuse us, we wish them well. When we suffer, we are patient.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ mo daa gbagba nyiŋmaase yɛɛ tom nideli. Akpaa balaŋ de falaa daa na, daa na sola Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ bo fa wɔ. Akpaa be naase daa diyem na, dɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ kelii ɔto.

english_verse: When someone curses us, we answer with kind words. Until now we are thought of as nothing more than the trash and garbage of this world.
translation_verse: Akpaa be wɔlɛɛ da yele na, dɛɛ mo nɔɔwoya kpaakpaa nyiŋan tiranɔɔ fa wɔ. Kaa lii naŋ gyɛŋ wee kei nɛ, de ta bese tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ ayimɛɛ nyiŋan, na walaŋ kamasɛ dufuŋ.

english_verse: I am not writing to embarrass you. I want to help you, just as parents help their own dear children.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ ne ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa na maa mo do ŋon desɛŋ ya, mɔna mɛɛ faree ŋon bo ŋgba me bia kpaakpaa nɛ.

english_verse: Ten thousand people may teach you about Christ, but I am your only father. You became my children when I told you about Christ Jesus,
translation_verse: Akpaa de kɔŋ nyi ɛ dana balaŋ baŋ baa kɛɛ ɛ dɔɔ Kristo man ŋgba balaŋ kakpoŋse kufu (

english_verse: and I want you to be like me.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ sola ŋon nideli nyi yaa kasee me dinɔɔ.

english_verse: This is why I sent Timothy to you. I love him like a son, and he is a faithful servant of the Lord. Timothy will tell you what I do to follow Christ and how it agrees with what I always teach about Christ in every church.
translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te mee kpila me bu Timoti ŋon mɛɛ gyae e, te ɔ ne di anokoare Kristo man nɛ ɛ gyaŋ. Ŋon ne gyae la ɔ kaa tɔɔse ŋon me gbɛɛneŋ ŋan mɛɛ mo sila Kristo Yesu te mɛɛ mo wola Kristotena akpiise ŋan man yenaŋ kamasɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Some of you think I am not coming for a visit, and so you are bragging.
translation_verse: Ɛ man baale ne yɛɛ konɔɔyuŋ ŋgba mɔɔ gyae maa tekaa bese kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ bo ya nɛ.

english_verse: But if the Lord lets me come, I will soon be there. Then I will find out if the ones who are doing all this bragging really have any power.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa de Gbeŋgyoo de sɛɛ na, be gyae ke kyare ya maa bese kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ. Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ konɔɔyuŋ nɛ, na be nombia ŋan bee kolosi nɛ ŋaageŋ te mɛɛ gyae me kaa nyii ya, mɔna mɛɛ gyae me kaa naa doŋ keŋ be dana bɛɛ yɛɛ mena nombia kɛŋa nɛ.

english_verse: God's kingdom isn't just a lot of words. It is power.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ gyoorobiiri keŋ nombia ba seŋɛɛ kekolosi yaa nɔɔwoya ŋaageŋ dɔɔ ya, mɔna ka seŋae Wurubuarɛ doŋ keŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: What do you want me to do when I arrive? Do you want me to be hard on you or to be kind and gentle?
translation_verse: Woŋti te ɛ ne gyae? Ɛ ne gyae nyi maa mo dambila kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ yaa, maa mo balaŋ kegyae na konɔɔ kefɛɛ bo kɔŋ.

english_verse: I have heard terrible things about some of you. In fact, you are behaving worse than Gentiles. A man is even sleeping with his own stepmother.
translation_verse: Balaŋ te yeli me te nyii nyi kafoŋ kum daale dinɔɔ ta gyoo ɛ man, keŋ ɛ man baale gba ne doo na be kyaɔ wɛɛla. Mena dinɔɔ kum kei be doo banɛɛ somra man gba koraŋ ya.

english_verse: I am with you only in my thoughts. But in the name of our Lord Jesus I have already judged this man, as though I were with you in person. So when you meet together and the power of the Lord Jesus is with you, I will be there too.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ ɛmɛɛ Kristotena ɛ gyaŋee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man, te me konɔɔ man na me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ, te de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu doŋ keŋ doo ɛ man nɛ,

english_verse: You must then hand that man over to Satan. His body will be destroyed, but his spirit will be saved when the Lord Jesus returns.
translation_verse: ɛ mo mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ do ɔbɔnsam nyiŋmaa man, na waa naase ɔ wosenaane diyem, na Wurubuarɛ kenyiŋ lɛɛ ɔ nyee de Gbeŋgyoo wee ɔtomante keŋ man.

english_verse: Stop being proud! Don't you know how a little yeast can spread through the whole batch of dough?
translation_verse: Mena keŋ ɛ na wola ɛ wose nɛ be dei ya. Ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi bodobodo tee kyomii ne yele la te bodobodo na koro yee?

english_verse: Get rid of the old yeast! Then you will be like fresh bread made without yeast, and this is what you are. Our Passover lamb is Christ, who has already been sacrificed.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ lese bodobodo tee keŋ seŋɛɛ fa dukum nɛ lee ɛ wose man, na ɛ ka bese bodobodo biliŋ keŋ tee be doo ke man ya nɛ. Dinɔɔ kei kaboela na ŋon. Nawolo nyi be ta mo Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ da nyeekelɛɛ nambu e nɛ deesi.

english_verse: In my other letter I told you not to have anything to do with immoral people.
translation_verse: Me te wulaa ŋmarase tɔne yelee ŋon nyi, ɛ na mo ɛ wose do na balaŋ kafoŋtena ya.

english_verse: But I wasn't talking about the people of this world. You would have to leave this world to get away from everyone who is immoral or greedy or who cheats or worships idols.
translation_verse: Mɔna na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ kafoŋ, na baŋ be dana sibii, na ŋmɛɛlatena na banɛɛ somra yaa me dana ya. Nyi akpaa mena balaŋ kɛwɔ yaa me dana na, kenaŋ na nafɔ kaboena nyi yaa lese ɛ wose lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ pou.

english_verse: When one of you has a complaint against another, do you take your complaint to a court of sinners? Or do you take it to God's people?
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ɛmɛɛ Kristotena wolɛɛwolɛɛ de nyiŋ nombia na, weera dɔɔ te ɛ na mo gyu balaŋ yakaa nyibaŋ gyaŋ, te ɛ bɛɛ mo gyu ɛ tebia Kristotena gyaŋ ya?

english_verse: Don't you know that God's people will judge the world? And if you are going to judge the world, can't you settle small problems?
translation_verse: Ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi ɛmɛɛ Wurubuarɛ balaŋ ne gyae la ɛ ke di tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ nombia yee? Akpaa nyi ɛmɛɛ ne gyae la ɛ ke di tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ nombia na, weera dɔɔ te ɛ be tale di ɛmɛɛ gbagba nsana nombia buruburu kɛŋa ya?

english_verse: Why do you take everyday complaints to judges who are not respected by the church?
translation_verse: Akpaa nyi mena nombia kɛŋa doo ya nsana na, woŋ dɔɔ te ɛ na lese balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ dana daseŋae Kristotena siaman ya nɛ nyi baa di ɛ nombia?

english_verse: I say this to your shame. Aren't any of you wise enough to act as a judge between one follower and another?
translation_verse: Nombii kei dana desɛŋ! Mena dɔɔ ɛ be dana siakaralate ŋolo ɛ man keŋ waa tale di ɛ nombia fa ŋon yee?

english_verse: But instead, you cheat and rob other followers.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ gbagba koraŋ ne yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ tia ɛ tebia Kristotena, te ɛ na ŋere dɔŋa do.

english_verse: Don't you know that evil people won't have a share in the blessings of God's kingdom? Don't fool yourselves! No one who is immoral or worships idols or is unfaithful in marriage or is a pervert or behaves like a homosexual
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra be gyae baa nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo Wurubuarɛ gyoori keŋ man yee? Ɛ na yeli baa beo ŋon ya, nawolo nyi balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ kafoŋ, na baŋ bɛɛ som banɛɛ na baŋ bɛɛ lee be baala yaa be wɛɛla wɔle, na baala baŋ bee doo na dɔŋa,

english_verse: will share in God's kingdom. Neither will any thief or greedy person or drunkard or anyone who curses and cheats others.
translation_verse: na ŋmɛɛlatena na baŋ be dana sibii na soloŋ nyɔɔra na balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ balaŋ na balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ mo doŋ lɛo balaŋ abɔɔ nɛ, be gyae baa nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo Wurubuarɛ gyoori keŋ man ya.

english_verse: Some of you used to be like that. But now the name of our Lord Jesus Christ and the power of God's Spirit have washed you and made you holy and acceptable to God. Honor God with Your Body
translation_verse: Nafɔ na mena te ɛ man baale mɔ doo. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ baake na ŋon, te ɔ faafo ŋon te ɔ desina ŋon see fa ɔ wose. Nɛnɛɛ Wurubuarɛ te lɛɛ ŋon do nyi ɛ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ ɔ siaman lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo na Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon yele man. Tekaboena nyi Kristotena baa yɛɛ kafoŋ ya

english_verse: Some of you say, “We can do anything we want to.” But I tell you not everything is good for us. So I refuse to let anything have power over me.
translation_verse: “Me dana gbɛɛ nyi maa tale yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, mɔna na ŋe popou deila fa maŋ ya. Me dana gbɛɛ nyi maa tale yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, mɔna mɔɔ gyae maa fa kpene kamasɛ gbɛɛ na ke kedi gyoori me dɔɔ ya.”

english_verse: You also say, “Food is meant for our bodies, and our bodies are meant for food.” But I tell you that God will destroy them both. We are not supposed to do indecent things with our bodies. We are to use them for the Lord who is in charge of our bodies.
translation_verse: Weenɛɛ doo bo fa dubulu, te dubulu mɔ doo bo fa weenɛɛ. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ waa kɔŋ kaa wɔlɛɛ kɛŋa pou. Ba te yɛɛ wosenaane bo fa kafoŋ nombia ya, mɔna be yɛɛ ke bo nyi dɛɛ mo som de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ. De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ tee wosenaane keŋ.

english_verse: God will raise us from death by the same power he used when he raised our Lord to life.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ ɔ doŋ keŋ dɔɔ gyuusu de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu lee yeŋ man, mena ke te waa ta ɔ doŋ kenaŋ dɔɔ gyuusu daa mɔ lee yeŋ man.

english_verse: Don't you know that your bodies are part of the body of Christ? Is it right for me to join part of the body of Christ to a prostitute? No, it isn't!
translation_verse: Ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi ɛ wosenaane yɛɛ Kristo gbagba wosenaane yenaŋ daale ke yee? Kaboena nyi maa mo Kristo wosenaane yenaŋ daale ke tina kafoŋte? Korakora, be kɔŋ mena ya.

english_verse: Don't you know that a man who does that becomes part of her body? The Scriptures say, “The two of them will be like one person.”
translation_verse: Ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi walaŋ ŋon ɔ mo ɔ wose tina kafoŋte na, ŋon na e ta bese wosenaane dokoloŋ yee? Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ne yako nyiaa, “Alo na ɔ baale baa bese walaŋ dokoloŋ.”

english_verse: But anyone who is joined to the Lord is one in spirit with him.
translation_verse: Mɔna walaŋ ŋon ɔ mo ɔ wose fa de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na, ŋon na e ta bese walaŋ dokoloŋ.

english_verse: Don't be immoral in matters of sex. That is a sin against your own body in a way no other sin is.
translation_verse: Ɛ lese ɛ wose lee kafoŋ nombia man. Nombii kamasɛ be kyaa keŋ ne yɛɛ walaŋ wosenaane ayimɛɛ ŋgba kafoŋ nombia nɛ ya. Nawolo nyi walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ kafoŋ nombia na, ɔ ne yɛɛ dukum bo tia ŋon gbagba wosenaane.

english_verse: You surely know that your body is a temple where the Holy Spirit lives. The Spirit is in you and is a gift from God. You are no longer your own.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ ba mo fa ŋon te ɔ doo ɛ man nɛ, ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi ɛ wosenaane yɛna ɔ deni dinaa yee? Ɛ be kyaa fa ɛ wose ya.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So use your body to honor God.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ ŋon bo na koya doŋ, mena dɔɔ ɛ mo wosenaane lese ŋon Wurubuarɛ yele.

english_verse: Now I will answer the questions you asked in your letter. You asked, “Is it best for people not to marry?”
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ lee nombia ŋan ɛ be ŋmarase kaa bɔɔse maŋ nɛ, keŋ me dana maa yako ŋon yɛna nyi, nafɔ dei nyi ŋolo na yale ya.

english_verse: Well, having your own husband or wife should keep you from doing something immoral.
translation_verse: Mɔna lee kafoŋ kum dɔɔ nɛ, kaboena nyi baale kamasɛ waa nyiŋ ɔ wose dɔɔ alo, na alo kamasɛ mɔ ke nyiŋ ŋon gbagba ɔ wose dɔɔ baale.

english_verse: A wife belongs to her husband instead of to herself, and a husband belongs to his wife instead of to himself.
translation_verse: Alo yalale be kyaa ɔ wose dɔɔ ya, mɔna ɔ kyaa bo fa ɔ baale. Mena mɔ te baale yalale kamasɛ be kyaa ŋon gbagba ɔ wose dɔɔ ya, mɔna ɔ kyaa bo fa ɔ wɛɛle.

english_verse: So don't refuse sex to each other, unless you agree not to have sex for a little while, in order to spend time in prayer. Then Satan won't be able to tempt you because of your lack of self-control.
translation_verse: Alo na ɔ baale na bɛɛse dɔŋa dedoi ya, gyisɛ be bala pou be sɛɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ nyi baa kyaa weeya akalansɛɛ ŋaale na baa nyiŋ debaŋ fane. Mɔna kenaŋ wɔle na kaboena nyi baa bese kɔŋ dɔŋa gyaŋ bileŋ, na ɔbɔnsam be nyiŋ gbɛɛ kaa kɛɛse wɔ, nyi keŋ bɔɔ tale kyaŋ ba wose dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: In my opinion that is what should be done, though I don't know of anything the Lord said about this matter.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ yako ŋon nombia kɛŋa baa ŋgba kpene keŋ doo na ke gbɛɛ nɛ, mɔna ka te yɛɛ mmaraa te mɛɛ fa ŋon ya.

english_verse: I wish all of you were like me, but God has given different gifts to each of us.
translation_verse: Nyi balaŋ pou deŋ doo ŋgba maŋ nɛ nafɔ me gyae, mɔna walaŋ kamasɛ dana kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ be fa e. Ŋolo dana kei, te ŋolo mɔ wui yɛɛ kpoo.

english_verse: My advice for the unmarried and for widows is that it is acceptable for them to remain single, just as I am.
translation_verse: Dayarase na liala dɔɔ nɛ, nyi beŋ kyaa ŋgba maŋ nɛ keŋ nyi bɔɔ yale ya na nafɔ me gyae.

english_verse: But if you don't have enough self-control, then go ahead and get married. After all, it is better to marry than to burn with desire.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa nyi bɔɔ gyae baa tale kyaŋ ba wose ya na, dei nyi baa yala. Nawolo nyi be yale na dei kela keŋ baa kyaa na ba wose ke kyaŋ wɔ.

english_verse: I instruct married couples to stay together, and this is exactly what the Lord himself taught. A wife who leaves her husband
translation_verse: Ala na baala yalala baŋ dɔɔ mɛɛ yako ŋon nyi, alo na bɛɛ ɔ baale ya. Na maŋ ne yako na nombii kei ya, mɔna ka lee de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: I don't know of anything else the Lord said about marriage. All I can do is to give you my own advice. If your wife isn't a follower of the Lord, but is willing to stay with you, don't divorce her.
translation_verse: Te balaŋ akaŋ baŋ mɔ nɛ mɛɛ yako wɔ nyiaa, kei ta lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu gyaŋ ya mɔna ka lee me gyaŋ, akpaa Kristo baale ŋolo yala na alo ŋon ɔ te yɛɛ Kristo alo e ya, te alo ŋon de sɛɛ nyi waa kyaa ɔ gyaŋ na ɔ na bɛɛ e ya.

english_verse: Your husband or wife who isn't a follower is made holy by having you as a partner. This also makes your children holy and keeps them from being unclean in God's sight.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi lee Kristo alo ŋon dɔɔ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ te lɛɛ baale ŋon do. Mena mɔ te lee Kristo baale ŋon dɔɔ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ te lɛɛ alo ŋon do. Na mena ya na, nafɔ ɛ bia baŋ baa yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ba wose dana ayimɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman. Te nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te lɛɛ wɔ do.

english_verse: If your husband or wife isn't a follower of the Lord and decides to divorce you, then you should agree to it. You are no longer bound to that person. After all, God chose you and wants you to live at peace.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa ŋon ɔ bɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo di ya nɛ de bɛɛ nyi ɔ be kyaa yale keŋ tɛɛ ya na, yela e waa ta. Kolo be kyaa keŋ ne tɔ Kristo alo yaa Kristo baale gbɛɛ lee mena nombia kɛŋa man ya. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ baake daa bo nyi de kaa kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man.

english_verse: And besides, how do you know if you will be able to save your husband or wife who isn't a follower? Obeying the Lord at All Times
translation_verse: Alo yalale, sena te nyaŋ ke tale gyeŋ nyi mberem lee nyaŋ dɔɔ na, n baale ŋon waa kaa lɛɛ Kristo di na waa nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa? Yaa baale yalale sena te nyaŋ ke tale gyeŋ nyi mberem lee nyaŋ dɔɔ na, n wɛɛle waa kaa lɛɛ Kristo di na waa nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa?

english_verse: In every church I tell the people to stay as they were when the Lord Jesus chose them and God called them to be his own. Now I say the same thing to you.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa kyaŋ kpene keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ba mo boele e nɛ man, na waa kyaa ŋgba mena keŋ nafɔ ɔ kyaa pɛte Wurubuarɛ be baake e nɛ. Kei yɛna mmaraa keŋ mɛɛ mo fa Kristotena pou yenaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mee gyu nɛ.

english_verse: Being circumcised or uncircumcised isn't really what matters. The important thing is to obey God's commands.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi n kara n baala wose o, n te kare ya o, keŋ bee hia ya. Kpene keŋ ne hia yɛna nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa di Wurubuarɛ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ.

english_verse: So don't try to change what you were when God chose you.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa kyaa ɔ kekyaabii keŋ man ɔ kyaa pɛte Wurubuarɛ be baake e nɛ.

english_verse: When the Lord chooses slaves, they become his free people. And when he chooses free people, they become slaves of Christ.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi walaŋ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ gbeŋi e pɛte Wurubuarɛ be baake e nɛ, ɔ ta bese gyooro bu Kristo man. Mena mɔ te walaŋ ŋon ɔ ba lee gbeŋiri man pɛte Kristo be baake e na, ɔ ta bese Kristo gbeŋi.

english_verse: God paid a great price for you. So don't become slaves of anyone else.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ ŋon bo na koya doŋ, mena dɔɔ ɛ na mo ɛ wose bese balaŋ gbeŋa ya.

english_verse: Stay what you were when God chose you. Unmarried People
translation_verse: Me tebia, mena keŋ walaŋ kamasɛ doo pɛte Wurubuarɛ be baake e nɛ, kaboena nyi waa kyaa mena fa Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: I don't know of anything the Lord said about people who have never been married. But I will tell you what I think. And you can trust me, because the Lord has treated me with kindness.
translation_verse: Dayarase dɔɔ, ma te lɛɛ ta mmaraa daale lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu gyaŋ fa wɔ ya. Mɔna mee kolosi bo fa wɔ lee maŋ gbagba me nyansa man, ŋgba walaŋ ŋon de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ be wii me waraŋase, te ɔ be yeli ɛ ne lɛɛ maŋ di nɛ.

english_verse: We are now going through hard times, and I think it is best for you to stay as you are.
translation_verse: Mo lee gyɛŋ wee kei tɛɛle nombia kedoo dɔɔ nɛ, kpene keŋ mɛɛ gyueŋ yɛna nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa kyaa ɔ kekyaabii.

english_verse: If you are married, stay married. If you are not married, don't try to get married.
translation_verse: Akpaa n te yale na, na bɛɛ yale keŋ ya. Te akpaa n te yala ta ya na, na gyae yale gbɛɛ ya.

english_verse: It isn't wrong to marry, even if you have never been married before. But those who marry will have a lot of trouble, and I want to protect you from this.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa nyi n yale na, ka te yɛɛ dukum ke ya. Te akpaa alebu mɔ de yale na, ka te yɛɛ dukum ke ya. Mɔna baŋ bɔɔ yale nɛ, baa naa diyem ba kekyaa man. Mena dɔɔ te mɛɛ gyae maa lese ŋon lee ke man.

english_verse: My friends, what I mean is that the Lord will soon come, and it won't matter if you are married or not.
translation_verse: Me tebia, kpene keŋ mɛɛ gyae maa yako ŋon yɛna nyiaa, dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ kyare ya, mena dɔɔ lee gyɛŋ ne gyu nɛ, ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ be yale na, ɛ kyaa ŋgba ɛ te yala ta ya nɛ.

english_verse: It won't make any difference how much good you are getting from this world or how much you like it. This world as we know it is now passing away.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ mo be sia gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ keyɛɛ dɔɔ nɛ, baa kyaa ŋgba balaŋ baŋ ba agyueŋ be gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kɛŋa dɔɔ ya nɛ. Nawolo nyi tɛɛle kei, na ka abɔɔ pou ne gyu ɔto baa.

english_verse: But a married man has more worries. He must worry about the things of this world, because he wants to please his wife.
translation_verse: Mɔna baale ŋon ɔ be yale dɔɔ, wa agyueŋ gyakaa bo tɛɛle kei abɔɔ dɔɔ, lee mena keŋ waa yɛɛ na ɔ nombia ka gyoo ɔ wɛɛle sia.

english_verse: So he is pulled in two directions. Unmarried women and women who have never been married worry only about pleasing the Lord, and they keep their bodies and minds pure. But a married woman worries about the things of this world, because she wants to please her husband.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ wa agyueŋ te kpase ala. Mena mɔ te alo yaa alebu keteŋ ŋon ɔ te yala ta ya na, wa agyueŋ gyakaa bo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu tom keyɛɛ dɔɔ. Lee mena keŋ waa mo ɔ wose pou fa de Gbeŋgyoo, na ayimɛɛ be doo ɔ man ya. Mɔna alo yalale dɔɔ, wa agyueŋ pou gyakaa bo tɛɛle kei abɔɔ dɔɔ, lee mena keŋ waa yɛɛ na ɔ nombia ka gyoo ɔ baale sia.

english_verse: What I am saying is for your own good—it isn't to limit your freedom. I want to help you to live right and to love the Lord above all else.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ deeli dɔɔ te mɛɛ yako nombia kɛŋa, te yɛɛ nyi mɛɛ tɔ ŋon kolo gbɛɛ bo ya. Mɔna mɛɛ gyae ɛ ke kyaa na ɛ ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ kaboena, na ɛ ka mo ɛ konɔɔ pou fa de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu kekpaa.

english_verse: But suppose you are engaged to someone old enough to be married, and you want her so much that all you can think about is getting married. Then go ahead and marry. There is nothing wrong with that.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa baale ŋolo de kɛɛ nyi, ɔ be gyae waa tale kyaŋ ɔ wose kyaa daa alebu ŋon ŋon na e be bake see nyi baa yala dɔŋa ya, te ɔ kɛɛ nyi alebu ŋon ne ŋmɛɛ na, ɛ yela waa kpeo alo ŋon bileŋ. Kei te yɛɛ nombiikum ya.

english_verse: It is perfectly all right to marry, but it is better not to get married at all.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ walaŋ ŋon ɔ yala alebu keteŋ ŋon na, ɔ te yɛɛ ke nideli. Te ŋon mɔ ɔ bɛɛ ɔ te yala alebu keteŋ ŋon ya na, ŋon mɔ ta bese yɛɛ gbaa.

english_verse: A wife should stay married to her husband until he dies. Then she is free to marry again, but only to a man who is a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Akpaa alo yalale baale kyaa na ɔ sia keŋ ɔ ta yeŋa ta ya na, yale mmaraa keŋ ne bake alo ŋon. Mɔna akpaa ɔ baale ŋon da yem na, gbɛɛ doo nyi waa tale yala baale ŋon ŋon gbagba ne gyae. Mɔna waa kɛɛ nyi baale ŋonaŋ yɛɛ Kristo walaŋ e.

english_verse: However, I think I am obeying God's Spirit when I say she would be happier to stay single.
translation_verse: Maŋ ma agyueŋ man na, akpaa ɔ kyaa mena ɔ te yale bela ya na, waa di gyoŋ nideli kela, te ma gyeŋ mɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon doo maŋ mɔ man.

english_verse: In your letter you asked me about food offered to idols. All of us know something about this subject. But knowledge makes us proud of ourselves, while love makes us helpful to others.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ gyae maa kolosi fa ŋon lee bane weenɛɛ wose man. Ke yɛɛ ampaŋ ke nyi walaŋ kamasɛ gyeŋ nombia, mɔna mena nombia kagyeŋ kei ne yeli walaŋ ne gyɔ ɔ konɔɔ wola ɔ wose bo, te balaŋ kegyae ne yele la Kristotena ne tale kyɔ dɔŋa na baa seŋ nideli ba kelɛɛdi man.

english_verse: In fact, people who think they know so much don't know anything at all.
translation_verse: Akpaa walaŋ na gyueŋ nyi ɔ gyeŋ nombia nɛ, ɔtenate ba gyeŋ kolo ya. Nawolo nyi ɔ ba gyeŋ ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi waa gyeŋ nɛ ya.

english_verse: But God has no doubts about who loves him.
translation_verse: Mɔna walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne gyae Wurubuarɛ na, ŋon mɔ te Wurubuarɛ gyeŋ.

english_verse: Even though food is offered to idols, we know that none of the idols in this world are alive. After all, there is only one God.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ lee bane weenɛɛ kedi wose man nɛ, da gyeŋ nyi bane te yɛɛ kolo ke tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya, te da gyeŋ mɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ dokoloŋ kyaa la.

english_verse: Many things in heaven and on earth are called gods and lords, but none of them really are gods or lords.
translation_verse: Doo nyi bɛɛneŋ na gbeŋgyoona burum kyaa. Nyi akpaa bɛɛneŋ baŋ balaŋ ne baake wɔ nyi be gbeŋgyoona nɛ kyaa adido bo o, yaa be kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ bo o nɛ,

english_verse: We have only one God, and he is the Father. He created everything, and we live for him. Jesus Christ is our only Lord. Everything was made by him, and by him life was given to us.
translation_verse: daa dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ dokoloŋ kooŋ te de dana. Ŋon yɛna de kya ŋon kpene kamasɛ ba lee ɔ gyaŋ, te ŋon mɔ dɔɔ te de dana nyeedoŋ. Gbeŋgyoo dokoloŋ kooŋ mɔ te de dana, ŋon yɛna Yesu Kristo. Ɔ dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, te ŋon mɔ dɔɔ te de dana nyeedoŋ.

english_verse: Not everyone knows these things. In fact, many people have grown up with the belief that idols have life in them. So when they eat meat offered to idols, they are bothered by a weak conscience.
translation_verse: Mɔna na balaŋ pou gyeŋa na mena nombii kei ya. Nawolo nyi bane nombia ta gyoo be man nideli keŋ nyi akpaa be di mena weenɛɛ kɛŋa na, ne yɛɛ wɔ nyi be te di bane weenɛɛ. Te keŋ ba kelɛɛdi taŋ doŋ dɔɔ ya nɛ, na ne yɛɛ wɔ nyi be ta mo ayimɛɛ tina ba wose.

english_verse: But food doesn't bring us any closer to God. We are no worse off if we don't eat, and we are no better off if we do.
translation_verse: Mɔna weenɛɛ be gyae ke tale mo daa benaa na Wurubuarɛ ya. Akpaa de di ŋa o, yaa de te di ŋa ya nɛ, ŋe bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ daa na Wurubuarɛ nsana ya.

english_verse: Don't cause problems for someone with a weak conscience, just because you have the right to eat anything.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ kɛɛ ke nideli nyi gbɛɛ keŋ ɛ dana nyi ɛ ke tale di mena weenɛɛ ŋenaŋ nɛ, na bese kateesa fa walaŋ ŋon ɔ kelɛɛdi taŋ doŋ nɛ ya.

english_verse: You know all this, and so it doesn't bother you to eat in the temple of an idol. But suppose a person with a weak conscience sees you and decides to eat food that has been offered to idols.
translation_verse: Akpaa walaŋ ŋon ɔ kelɛɛdi taŋ doŋ ya nɛ de naa nyi nyaŋ ŋon n gyeŋ nombia kɛŋa kyaa bane deni man n ne dii na, ŋgba n na wola e gbɛɛ baa nyi waa ta di bane dɛɛ weenɛɛ?

english_verse: that Barnabas and I have the right to our food and drink.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ tekaboena nyi baa fa daa weenɛɛ na loŋ yee?

english_verse: We each have the right to marry one of the Lord's followers and to take her along with us, just as the other apostles and the Lord's brothers and Peter do.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ tekaboena nyi daa mɔ dɛɛ yala ala baŋ be yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ, na baa ta sila daa ŋgba mena keŋ bee sila Pita na Kristo kpilala akaŋ baŋ, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ɔ naabia baŋ nɛ yee?

english_verse: Are we the only ones who have to support ourselves by working at another job?
translation_verse: Yaa daa na Banabase daageŋ te kaboena nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ tom, na dɛɛ mo kɛɛ da wose dɔɔ?

english_verse: Do soldiers pay their own salaries? Don't people who raise grapes eat some of what they grow? Don't shepherds get milk from their own goats?
translation_verse: Yoonɔɔte woŋti ne gyuu na yoo, te ŋon gbagba ne tɔ ɔ wose kom? Yaa wɔɔfarale woŋti kyaa la keŋ ɔ ne fara wɔɔ, te ɔ bee dii lee wɔɔ kenaŋ man ya? Wonembia kɛɛlere woŋti kyaa la, keŋ ɔ ne kɛɛle wonembia te ɔ bee di be naane ya?

english_verse: I am not saying this on my own authority. The Law of Moses tells us not to muzzle an ox when it is grinding grain. But was God concerned only about an ox?
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi be ŋmarasewɔ do mmaraase ŋan Wurubuarɛ ba mo fa Mosesi nɛ man nyiaa, “Na bake nunkyue ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ tom wɔɔman nɛ nɔɔ, na ɔ be nyiŋ di weenɛɛ ŋan ŋaale ya.” Mena dɔɔ ɛ gyeŋ nyi nunkyue waraŋase yaa Wurubuarɛ ne wii nɛ?

english_verse: No, he wasn't! He was talking about us. This was written in the Scriptures so that all who plow and all who grind the grain will look forward to sharing in the harvest.
translation_verse: Na daa te Wurubuarɛ ne yako mena nombia kɛŋa fa yee? Ayi, daa te be ŋmarase ŋa fa. Nawolo nyi walaŋ ŋon ɔ na boolaa wɔɔ na ŋon ɔ ne gbee weenɛɛ nɛ, be popou loo gyakaa nyi baa nyiŋ kolo lee wɔɔ keŋ man.

english_verse: When we told the message to you, it was like planting spiritual seed. So we have the right to accept material things as our harvest from you.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ kolosi fa ŋon nɛ, ŋe yɛɛ yaa ŋgba abɔɔ ŋan dɔɔ duu ɛ man nɛ. Mena dɔɔ akpaa ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ fa daa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ na, ta kela ŋon?

english_verse: If others have the right to do this, we have an even greater right. But we haven't used this right of ours. We are willing to put up with anything to keep from causing trouble for the message about Christ.
translation_verse: Akpaa nyi ɛ ne kyɔ baale lee gbɛɛ kei man na, tekaboena nyi yaa kyɔ daa kela wɔ yee? Mɔna daa ta mo mena gbɛɛ kei dɔɔ ŋere ŋon ya. De kyaŋa da wose te da seŋawɔ keŋkeŋ nombia kɛŋa pou man, na dɔɔ nyiŋ tɔ Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan gbɛɛ ya.

english_verse: Don't you know that people who work in the temple make their living from what is brought to the temple? Don't you know that a person who serves at the altar is given part of what is offered?
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ ba gyeŋ nyi balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ tom Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man nɛ, bee nyiŋ be weenɛɛ bo lee botɔɔ yee? Te na botɔɔ keŋ bee deesi fa Wurubuarɛ nɛ, te somra baŋ mɔ na nyiŋ be weenɛɛ lee yee?

english_verse: In the same way, the Lord wants everyone who preaches the good news to make a living from preaching this message.
translation_verse: Mena ke te de Gbeŋgyoo mɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, balaŋ baŋ bee kolosi nombia kpaakpaa ŋan nɛ, kaboena nyi baa nyiŋ be weenɛɛ lee nombia kpaakpaa ŋan kekolosi man.

english_verse: But I have never used these privileges of mine, and I am not writing this because I want to start now. I would rather die than have someone rob me of the right to take pride in this.
translation_verse: Mɔna me ta mo mena gbɛɛ keŋ me dana nɛ, yɛɛ kolo ya. Te mɔɔ ne ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa fa ŋon, na ke yela ɛ ke yɛɛ mena abɔɔ kɛŋa fa maŋ ya. Nyi ma yem gba na dei kela nyi ŋolo ke fa maŋ kolo, keŋ gyae ketɔ maŋ gbɛɛ na mɔɔ nyiŋ gyɔ me konɔɔ wola ma wose lee tom keŋ mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ man ya.

english_verse: I don't have any reason to brag about preaching the good news. Preaching is something God told me to do, and if I don't do it, I am doomed.
translation_verse: Mɔna gbɛɛ be doo nyi maa wola ma wose lee nombia kpaakpaa kɛŋa kekolosi dɔɔ ya, nawolo nyi me gyae o, ma te gyae ya o, ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ ke taŋ doo nyi maa kolosi nombia kpaakpaa ŋenaŋ. Akpaa ma te yako nombia ŋenaŋ ya na, maa laako.

english_verse: If I preach because I want to, I will be paid. But even if I don't want to, it is still something God has sent me to do.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa maŋ gbagba kegyaebii man te mee kolosi nombia kpaakpaa kɛŋa na, maa nyiŋ kom ketɔ. Mɔna akpaa te yɛɛ maŋ gbagba kegyaebii man ya na, kenaŋ na mɛɛ yɛɛ tom keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ba mo fa maŋ nyi kaboena nyi maa yɛɛ nɛ bo.

english_verse: What pay am I given? It is the chance to preach the good news free of charge and not to use the privileges that are mine because I am a preacher.
translation_verse: Woŋ yɛna kom keŋ baa tɔ maŋ? Keŋ yɛna nyi maa yako nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa balaŋ keŋ nyi me na lɛɛ kolo ya. Te mɔɔ gyae maa mo gbɛɛ keŋ me dana nombia kpaakpaa kɛŋa keyako man nɛ, mo gyae kolo fa ma wose ya.

english_verse: I am not anyone's slave. But I have become a slave to everyone, so I can win as many people as possible.
translation_verse: Doo nyi me kyae ma wose dɔɔ keŋ ma te yɛɛ ŋolo gbeŋi e koraŋ ya nɛ, me ta mo ma wose besena gbeŋi fa balaŋ pou, na maa nyiŋ yela be man balaŋ burum kekɔŋ Kristo gyaŋ.

english_verse: And when I am with people who are not ruled by the Law, I forget about the Law to win them. Of course, I never really forget about the law of God. In fact, I am ruled by the law of Christ.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te akpaa me gyu balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ doo Gyudatena mmaraa keŋ tɛɛ ya nɛ gyaŋ na, mɛɛ yɛɛ ma wose ŋgba walaŋ ŋon ɔ be doo mmaraa kenaŋ tɛɛ ya nɛ. Mɔna ma te yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon mɔɔ doo Wurubuarɛ mmaraa tɛɛ ya. Me doo Kristo mmaraa tɛɛ. Mɛɛ yɛɛ mena na maa nyiŋ yela be man balaŋ burum baŋ bɔɔ doo mmaraa kenaŋ tɛɛ ya nɛ kekɔŋ Kristo gyaŋ.

english_verse: I do all this for the good news, because I want to share in its blessings. A Race and a Fight
