translation_verse: Me tebia, akpaa ɛ naa nyi ɛ man ŋolo ne yɛɛ dukum nɛ ɛmɛɛ baŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon doo ɛ man nideli nɛ, ɛ gyu kekolosi fa e wose keyɔkɔse man na waa nyiŋ bese kɔŋ gbɛɛ kpaakpaate keŋ man. Mɔna ɛ kɛɛ ɛ wose nideli, keŋ nyi ɛmɛɛ mɔ be yɛɛ dukum kenaŋ ya.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela ɛ tebia nombia ke yɛɛ ɛ nombia. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, na nawolo baa nyi Kristo kegyaebii yaa ɛ ne yɛɛ.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Akpaa ŋolo ne kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ɔ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋolo e, mɔna kegbagba na ɔ te yɛɛ ŋolo e ya nɛ kenaŋ na ɔ na beo ɔ wose bo.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi, kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa seele ŋon gbagba ɔ kasolɔ.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Ɛ na beo ɛ wose ya. Ŋolo be gyae waa tale kulu Wurubuarɛ ya, nawolo nyi kpene kamasɛ keŋ walaŋ de duu na, keŋ ke te waa kɔ.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yeli deeli keyɛɛ ke takaa daa ya. Nawolo nyi akpaa deeli keyɛɛ te takaa daa ya nɛ, Wurubuarɛ waa tɔ daa kom debaŋ kpaakpaate keŋ man.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ me nɔɔwoya ɔtoman nyiŋan kɛŋa na ɛ kena nyi maŋ gbagba moona me nyiŋmaa ŋmarase keŋmarasebia dinaana kɛŋa yelee ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ gyae nyi be nombia ka gyoo Gyudatena sia nɛ, baŋ na ŋere na ŋon nyi yaa kara ɛ baala wose. Mena balaŋ benaŋ ne yee nyi akpaa be kolosi Kristo yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ wose man nombia na, balaŋ baa naase wɔ diyem.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Te maŋ dɔɔ nyi maa gyina ma wose adido koraŋ na, kenaŋ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ, ke nombia dɔɔ te maa gyina ma wose adido. Nawolo nyi lee Kristo yeŋ keŋ dɔɔ, tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ pou ta tekaa yɛɛ kolo ke me siaman ya. Mena ke mɔ yaa lee Kristo yeŋ keŋ dɔɔ, tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae loo ta lee me man.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Nyi ŋolo kara ɔ baala wose yaa ɔ te kare ya o nɛ, keŋ bee hia ya. Kpene keŋ ne hia yɛna nyi lee Kristo dɔɔ ɔtenate te nyiŋ dinɔɔ wɔle.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ pou bee nyii nombia kɛŋa te bee di ŋe dɔɔ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ waa wii be waraŋase na waa fa wɔ wosefɛɛreŋ. Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ yɛna Wurubuarɛ bia gbagba baŋ ɔ ba lese nɛ.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Lee gyɛŋ ne gyu nɛ, mɛɛ fane nyi ŋolo na tekaa naase maŋ diyem bela ya. Nawolo nyi gyaŋtarɛɛ ŋan mɔɔ nyim lee ketuku na boya kefuŋii keŋ me yɛɛ Kristo kpilale e dɔɔ nɛ tekaboe maŋ.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Me tebia, de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle Amɛn.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon Wurubuarɛ be gyae nyi maa bese Yesu Kristo kpilale nɛ gyaŋ. Mɛɛ ŋmarase ke mee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa Efeso donɔɔ man, te Wurubuarɛ ba mo ɔ nyiŋmaa gyakaa ɛ dɔɔ te ɛ ne di anokoare ɛ gbɛɛneŋ man fa Yesu Kristo nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ de kya e, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon, na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ. Wurubuarɛ tɛe Kristo dɔɔ hiraa balaŋ

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo dɔɔ te ɔ lese daa pɛte ɔ yɛɛ tɛɛle kei na abɔɔ pou, nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ de yɛɛ ŋon gbagba wui ɔ siaman keŋ ayimɛɛ be doo de man ya, lee mena keŋ daa na Kristo yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: Lee kegyae keŋ ɔ ne gyae daa dɔɔ ɔ taŋgbɛɛwɔ yako see nyi waa ta Yesu Kristo dɔɔ mo daa yɛɛ ɔ bia lee ŋon gbagba kegyaebii man.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Ɔ lese daa mena na dee nyiŋ lese ɔ gyooro bɛrɛɛ yele keŋ ɔ ba moo fa daa, nawolo nyi de yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon ɔ ne gyae daa nɛ wui.

english_verse: Christ sacrificed his life's blood to set us free, which means our sins are now forgiven. Christ did this because of God's gift of undeserved grace to us. God has great wisdom and understanding,
translation_verse: Keŋ Kristo ba yem kyɛɛkee ɔ fatabo leki dɔɔ, Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ da nyee te ɔ moo de dukum kyɛɛ daa. Kei ne yele la dɛɛ naa nyi Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba mo boele daa nɛ boe nideli. Wurubuarɛ gbagba nyansa na ɔ nombia kagyeŋ man te ɔ moowɔ yɛɛ mena.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: Kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa yɛɛ nɛ yɛna nyi, debaŋ keŋ de lii nɛ waa yilaa kpene kamasɛ keŋ kyaa adido na keŋ kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ pou do Kristo tɛɛ.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kɛŋa pou na daa baŋ dɔɔ taŋgbɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo nɛ, ka lese ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ yele.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Mena te doo fa ɛmɛɛ mɔ. Ɛ ke nyii Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo ŋe gbɛɛ dɔɔ te ŋɛɛ fa nyeedoŋ nɛ, ɛ lɛɛwɔ di. Lee mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ moo ŋon yɛɛ ɔ wui, te ɔ moo ɔ feliŋ ŋon ɔ be yako see nyi waa mo do ɛ man tɔ nɔɔ nɛ see ŋon. Kei nawola la nyi ɔ ta mo ɔ nyiŋmaa gyakaa ɛ dɔɔ nyi ɛ yɛɛ ɔ wui.

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ me ke nyii mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di, na mena keŋ ɛ ne gyae balaŋ baŋ pou bɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo nombia ŋan di nɛ,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: me bee tina Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ ka do yela ya. Mɛɛ tɔɔse ɛ yela debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ fane fa Wurubuarɛ nɛ.

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ fane mɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo na gyoorobia pou be kya e nɛ, waa mo ɔ feliŋ ŋon do ɛ man na waa yela ɛ sia kekara, na ɔ feliŋ ŋon ka lese Wurubuarɛ ŋon wola ŋon na ɛ ka gyeŋ e nideli.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ solo nyi waa gyuusu ɛ konɔɔse, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gyeŋ kpene keŋ dɔɔ ɔ ba lese ŋon na kpene keŋ dɔɔ ɛ loo gyakaa nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gyeŋ abɔɔ ŋan Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa mo fa baŋ bɔɔ mo ba wose fa Kristo nɛ. Ŋe yɛɛ abɔɔ ŋan ŋa koya dana doŋ nideli.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ te yeli Kristo te di doŋ kela yela pou na gyoorise pou na bɛɛneŋ pou na yola pou na woya pou na ŋmeeseŋ pou na kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ deniwalaŋ dɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ta mo kpene kamasɛ do Kristo tɛɛ, te ɔ moo e yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ nyee fa Kristo balaŋ baŋ pou.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba keŋ na nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ te tira ɛmɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ nsana,

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: gyaŋgba kenaŋ na, ɛ silana tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombiakumɛɛ. Ɛ silana ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ yɛɛ dukum pou nyee e nɛ. Te ŋon mɔ ne diina baŋ pou bɔɔ ne tɛɛ Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ dɔɔ ya nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: ɔ tɛɛwɔ Kristo dɔɔ fa daa baŋ nafɔ debaŋ kenaŋ man dɔɔ yem de dukum man nɛ nyeedoŋ. Mena dɔɔ ɛ tɔɔse nyi Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba mo boele daa dɔɔ te ɛ nyiŋa nyeedoŋ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Te mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ be gyuusu Kristo lee yeŋ man nɛ, mena mɔ yaa ɔ gyuusu daa mɔ lee mena yeŋ kei man, te ɔ moo daa kekyaa Yesu Kristo gyaŋ adido na daa na e kaa di gyoori.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Ɔ yɛɛ nnɛ kei na debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ kɛŋa pou gyae kekɔŋ na, kenyiŋ lese ɔ bɛrɛɛ na ɔ wɔe keŋ doo Kristo man te ka kela kpene kamasɛ nɛ wola.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi, bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba moo boele daa, na da kelɛɛdi keŋ dɔɔ lɛɛdi dɔɔ te ɔ fa daa nyeedoŋ. Kɛŋa pou ta lee daa gbagba gyaŋ ya, ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo fa daa.

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: Ta lee tomse ŋan dɔɔ yɛɛ dɔɔ ya, mena dɔɔ ŋolo na wola ɔ wose ŋe dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ na daa mena keŋ gyɛŋ de doo nɛ. Keŋ daa na Kristo be yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ, te ɔ lese daa nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ tomse kpaakpaa ŋan ɔ be wulaa desina see nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ. De popou yɛɛ dokoloŋ Kristo man

english_verse: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, you used to be called “uncircumcised” by those who take pride in being circumcised.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ tɔɔse mena keŋ nafɔ lolo man na, ɛ te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ. Ɛmɛɛ te Gyudatena ne baake nyi, baŋ ba te kara be baala wose ya nɛ. Be wui baala wose keŋ bɔɔ kare nɛ, nyiŋmaa te ba moowɔ kara.

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nyi debaŋ kenaŋ na, ɛmɛɛ na Kristo betaŋ loŋtoro ya. Na ɛ yɛɛ yenaasetenawɔ, ɛ te yɛɛ baŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese nɛ ya. Na ɛ yɛɛ ŋɔɔla baŋ ɛ be kpuɛ kebakesee keŋ Wurubuarɛ na ɔ balaŋ be bake see nɛ man ya. Na ɛ sia be gyakaa kolo mɔ dɔɔ ya, te ɛ ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Te nɛnɛɛ keŋ ɛ doo Kristo man dɔɔ, ɛmɛɛ baŋ nafɔ ɛ kyaa lemlem, te ɛ ba benaa na Kristo ya nɛ, lee ɔ yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem nɛ dɔɔ, ɔ te tuu ŋon benaa na ɔ wose.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Ŋon gbagba yɛna da wosefɛɛreŋ. Ɔ te yɛɛ Gyudatena na baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ walaŋ dokoloŋ. Lee ɔ yeŋ dɔɔ, ɔ tekerii dekyaŋ keŋ nafɔ ke yɛɛ kekɔla dekyaŋ te ne kpase mena balaŋ akpeŋ ala kɛwɔ nsana nɛ.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi, ɔ wose te ɔ moowɔ lese Gyudatena mmaraase, na gbɛɛneŋ, na nombia burum ŋan. Kpene keŋ dɔɔ ɔ be yɛɛ kei yɛna nyi, na waa nyiŋ mo mena balaŋ akpeŋ ala kɛwɔ yɛɛ dokoloŋ kɔŋ ŋon gbagba man. Nnɛ te ɔ yela ɔ wosefɛɛreŋ kɔŋawɔ be man.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Ɔ tɛɛwɔ ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ dɔɔ pataa akpiise ala kɛwɔ, kyaŋ wɔ mo do Wurubuarɛ man, yɛɛ wɔ walaŋ dokoloŋ. Nawolo nyi, ɔ ta mo ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ dɔɔ lese kpene keŋ ne yele bɛɛ kɔla dɔŋa nɛ.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Ɔ kɔŋawɔ kaa yako wosefɛɛreŋ nombia ŋan fa ɛmɛɛ Gyudatena baŋ ɛ benaa na Wurubuarɛ, na baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Ŋon dɔɔ te Gyudatena na baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ pou nyiŋa gbɛɛ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ dokoloŋ man, mo gyu kya ŋon gyaŋ.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ nɛnɛɛ nafɔ ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ ba benaa na e ya nɛ, ɛ ta tekaa yɛɛ ŋɔɔla na balaŋ yenaasetenawɔ bela ya. Ɛ yɛɛ baŋ Wurubuarɛ be hiraa wɔ nɛ be dɔɔna na be tebia na Wurubuarɛ dekpaŋalaŋmantenawɔ.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ mɔ, be ta mo ŋon ŋgba deni nɛ, Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra na Yesu kpilala baŋ yɛna dekyaŋ keŋ mokɔɔ kasee. Ɛmɛɛ te bɛɛ mo ma gyakaa ke dɔɔ. Yesu Kristo gbagba yɛna boe keŋ kɛɛ fa deni keŋ pou doŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ŋon dɔɔ te deni keŋ boe kamasɛ na sem nideli, te kɛɛ bee bese Wurubuarɛ kedeesa deni keŋ bɔɔ maa see fa Wurubuarɛ ɔsom, te ayimɛɛ be doo ke man ya nɛ.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ na Yesu te yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ, te yela ɛmɛɛ na akaŋ baŋ pou bese dekyae keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne tɛɛ ɔ feliŋ ŋon dɔɔ kyaa.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ te nyii nyi ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ moo ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ boele maŋ, na maa nyiŋ tale yako Yesu Kristo nombia ŋan fa ŋon lee ɛ deeli dɔɔ.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ta lese nombia ŋan weesɛɛ nɛ wola maŋ, ŋgba mena keŋ mɔɔ taŋgbɛɛ ŋmarase fa ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Akpaa ɛ kala ke na, ɛ kena mena keŋ mɔɔ nyii Kristo nombia ŋan nafɔ ŋa weesɛɛ nɛ man.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Mena nombia aweeseŋ kɛŋa yɛna nyi; lee Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, ta bese Wurubuarɛ wui ŋgba Gyudatena nɛ. Be popou ta bese walaŋ dokoloŋ na baŋ baa di abɔɔ ŋan Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa ta Yesu Kristo dɔɔ fa wɔ nɛ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Keŋ dɔɔ te ɔ moo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele maŋ, te ɔ moo maŋ yɛɛ Yesu Kristo nombia ŋan kegbetibii, lee ŋon gbagba ɔ doŋ keŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: N kɛɛ na, maŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ man pou kemaasa, mɔna maŋ mɔ te ɔ moo ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ boele, nyi maa yako Kristo wose man nombia ŋan ŋɛɛ lee koya te ŋa betaŋ ɔto ya nɛ fa baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ.

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: Na maa yela balaŋ pou kena Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ nɛ, gbɛɛ keŋ ɔ ba weese lee kewalaŋ keŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: Te ɔ kegyae yɛna nyi, debaŋ kei man nɛ waa ta Kristotena dikpii keŋ dɔɔ yela feliŋ man gyooneŋ na doŋse ŋan pou ŋe kyaa adido nɛ ka gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ sia kekara keŋ betaŋ ɔto ya nɛ kpene kamasɛ man.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kei, lee kebake keŋ ɔ be bake see ɔ nyeeman, te betaŋ ɔto ya nɛ dɔɔ. Ɔ tɛe de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ te ɔ yɛɛ kei.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Keŋ dɔɔ lɛɛ e di te daa na e be yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ, te dɛɛ tale gyɔ de konɔɔ gyu ŋon Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ keŋ dɔɔ ne yee ya.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ waase ŋon nyi, ɛ na yela ɛ wose ke tekerii ŋon lee diyem keŋ mɛɛ naa fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ ya. Kɛŋa pou yɛɛ fa ɛ deeli dɔɔ. Pɔɔl kefane fa Efesotena

english_verse: I kneel in prayer to the Father.
translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te mee buŋ ma doona dɔɔ de kya Wurubuarɛ siaman.

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: Lee ŋon dɔɔ te loŋtoro kamasɛ keŋ kyaa adido na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ ne nyiŋ ka yele.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: Mɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ nyi, waa mo ɔ gyooro wose deeli keŋ na waa ta ɔ feliŋ ŋon dɔɔ, na waa fa ŋon doŋ, na waa do ŋon kakyeŋ.

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: Waa yela Kristo kekyaa ɛ konɔɔ man ɛ kelɛɛdi dɔɔ, na kegyae keŋ ɛ ne gyae Wurubuarɛ na balaŋ nɛ kefa ŋon doŋ na ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ.

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: Na ɛmɛɛ na Kristotena akaŋ baŋ pou kenyiŋ gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ kegyae keŋ ɔ ne gyae daa nɛ boe nideli te ka betaŋ ɔto ya.

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: Na ɛ ka gyeŋ nyi kegyae keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae daa nɛ boe, keŋ dɔɔ dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ tale naa ke man taŋ ya. Na Wurubuarɛ ka mo ɔ dinɔɔ pou do ɛ man.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ nɛnɛɛ maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon me doo deni man keŋ mɛɛ yako Kristo nombia ŋan dɔɔ nɛ, mɛɛ waase ŋon nyi ɛ yela ɛ dinɔɔse ke kaboena kebaake kpaakpaa keŋ Wurubuarɛ be baake ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Ɛ yɔkɔse ɛ wose. Ɛ woo na ɛ kenyiŋ konɔɔ. Ɛ gyae dɔŋa nombia na ɛ kewii fa dɔŋa. Ɛ na mo ŋolo mɔ nombia do ɛ tɔɔ man ya.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Ɛ kyaŋ ɛ wose na nɔɔdokoloŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ne tɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ dɔɔ fa daa nɛ kekyaŋ ŋon bom.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: De popou yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Wurubuarɛ feliŋ dokoloŋ kyaa la mena dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ baake daa te de sia gyakaa kolo dokoloŋ kooŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: De popou dana Wurubuarɛ dokoloŋ na kya dokoloŋ. Ŋon yɛna de popou de Gbeŋgyoo ŋon ɔ kela kpene kamasɛ, te ɔ doo de popou man te ɔ ne yɛɛ tom de popou man nɛ.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Yesu gbagba kegyaebii te ɔ moo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele daa dokoloŋ dokoloŋ, walaŋ kamasɛ na ɔ wui.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ te be ŋmarasewɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan man nyiaa, “Debaŋ keŋ ɔ ne gyu adido nɛ ɔ moo baŋ ɔ be yoo dii be dɔɔ nɛ kpu na ɔ wose laŋ, te ɔ moo abɔɔ fa balaŋ.”

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: Te akpaa be yako nyi ɔ gyeŋawɔ gyu adido na nawolo nyi sena? Kei nawolo baa nyi, ɔ taŋgbɛɛwɔ tisi gyoo tɛɛle kei ateta pɛ.

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Te ŋon ɔ ba gyoo tɛɛle man nɛ, ŋon ke yɛna walaŋ ŋon mɔ ɔ ba koro gbaa ŋɔma pou na waa nyiŋ kyaa yenaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: so his people would learn to serve and his body would grow strong.
translation_verse: Ɔ moo tomse kɛŋa boele ɔ balaŋ, na waa desina wɔ fa wɔ ɔsom keŋ, na kenyiŋ yela Kristotena dikpii keŋ ka bee nideli,

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: kelii debaŋ keŋ de popou dɛɛ bee yɛɛ dokoloŋ, na dɛɛ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon di nideli na dɛɛ lee Kristo de dinɔɔ man, da kelɛɛdi na de kagyeŋ keŋ da gyeŋ e nideli nɛ man.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Na dɔɔ tekaa bese bia wɔlɛɛ keŋ balaŋ ka mo kawola kumɛɛ kamasɛ na ba adao gbɛɛneŋ kaa beo daa, na kegyɔ daa gyu sia na wɔle ŋgba mena keŋ feliŋ ne gyɔ degbele loŋ dɔɔ nɛ ya.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ di anokoare fa dɔŋa lee ɛ konɔɔse man, na ɛ kegyae dɔŋa nombia, na ɛ ka mo gbɛɛ kamasɛ man bee Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ dikpii keŋ nyee nɛ man.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo man te wose man yenaase kpookpoo ŋan pou ne gyaŋee nkyakaase man kyaŋ dɔŋa nideli. Te akpaa yenaase kpookpoo kamasɛ kɛŋa ne gyae dɔŋa, te ŋɛɛ yɛɛ tomse ŋan ne kaboena ŋa na, ne yeli Kristotena dikpii keŋ na bee nideli. Nyeedoŋ wɔle keŋ doo Kristo man nɛ

english_verse: As a follower of the Lord, I order you to stop living like stupid, godless people.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ faree ŋon de Gbeŋgyoo ŋon yele man nyi, ɛ na kyaa bela ŋgba balaŋ akaŋ baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ Kristo ya, te be gbɛɛneŋ betaŋ tɔnɔɔ nɛ ya.

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: Ba nyeeya man dana ditiŋtɛɛ, te bɔɔ taŋ nyeedoŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be fa daa nɛ ya, nawolo nyi ba te tɔ be konɔɔse bɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan kenyii.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Ampaŋ te ɛ nyii Kristo wose man nombia ŋan. Te keŋ ɛ yɛɛ ɔ silalawɔ dɔɔ, be ta wola ŋon anokoare keŋ doo Yesu man nɛ.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ tina ɛ dinɔɔ benɛɛ ŋan na beo ŋon, te ne wɔlɛɛ ŋon nɛ yela.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Ɛ yela ɛ nyeeya na ɛ konɔɔse man nombia ke yɛɛ wɔlɛɛ.

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: Ɛ yela Wurubuarɛ dinɔɔ keŋ tenɛɛ, te ka betaŋ ayimɛɛ ya nɛ ke yɛɛ dinɔɔ wɔlɛɛ ɛ man.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ tina akɛrɛɛ kedi yela, na ɛ kedi anokoare fa dɔŋa. Nawolo nyi de man walaŋ kamasɛ yɛɛ Kristotena dikpii keŋ yenaŋ daale ke.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon nafɔ ɔ yɛɛ ŋmɛɛlate e na, waa tina ŋmɛɛleŋ yela, na waa mo ɔ nyiŋmaase yɛɛ tom gbɛɛ kpaakpaa dɔɔ, na waa nyiŋ kolo na waa fa ayematena mɔ.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yeli nɔɔwoya ŋan tekaboena ya nɛ ka lee ɛ nɔɔse man ya, mɔna ɛ yela ɛ kekolosi ka do balaŋ kakyeŋ na baa bee.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Ɛ tina nombia akarankaraŋ kɛŋa pou, ŋgba tɔɔman ŋaŋ na akpanyaŋnyaŋ na baŋ na nyeeman boalaŋ na balaŋ kewɔlɛɛ na kale na balaŋ katee na kelabereketao na dinɔɔ kumɛɛ ŋan pou keyɛɛ yela.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ yɛɛ wɔe, na ɛ ke wii fa dɔŋa. Ɛ mo walaŋ kamasɛ dukum kyɛɛ e, ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ be tɛɛ Kristo dɔɔ mo ɛ nombiakumɛɛ kyɛɛ ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bia baŋ ɔ ne gyae ɛ nombia nɛ, ɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na ɛ kekasee e.

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Ɛ kyaa na dɔŋa gyoŋ man, ŋgba mena keŋ Kristo be gyae daa, te ɔ ba mo ɔ wose yɛɛ ŋgba kedeesa nam, te ba gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia nɛ.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Te kafoŋ na dinɔɔse kumɛɛ ŋan tekaboena ya, yaa sibii dɔɔ, ɛ na yeli baa baake ŋa yela ɛ man ya. Nawolo nyi ŋan tekaboena Kristotena ya.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Mena yaa desɛŋ nombia, na diyiŋ ayɛɛsa, na nsendeekum tekaboena ŋon ya, mɔna ɛ fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ nyi, kafoŋtena yaa baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ ayimɛɛ nombia na baŋ be dana sibii nɛ betaŋ dekyae Kristo na Wurubuarɛ gyoori keŋ man ya. Nawolo nyi n dana sibii na, abɔɔ na bese bɛɛneŋ bo fa neŋ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yeli ŋolo ka mo akɛrɛɛ nɔɔwoya ŋan betaŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ beo ŋon ya, nawolo nyi nombia kɛŋa dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ baŋ ne kɔŋ balaŋ baŋ ba deŋela dana doŋ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na mo ɛ wose do na balaŋ kɛwɔ dinɔɔ ya.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Nafɔ gyaŋgba keŋ na ɛmɛɛ mɔ kyaa ditiŋtɛɛ man, te nɛnɛɛ keŋ ɛ ba bese Kristotena dɔɔ ɛ kyaa keŋmaŋee keŋ man. Lee mena dɔɔ ɛ ta ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be kyaa keŋmaŋee keŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: Keŋmaŋee kei tɔnɔɔ yɛna nyi, balaŋ ne yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa na abɔɔ ŋan tenɛɛ te bee di anokoare mɔ.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Ɛ na mo ɛ wose do na balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ ditiŋtɛɛ man abɔɔ ŋan betaŋ tɔnɔɔ nɛ ya. Mɔna ɛ lese mena ditiŋtɛɛ man abɔɔ kumɛɛ ŋenaŋ debɔɔ.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Yɛɛ desɛŋ ke gba nyi ɛmɛɛ mɔ yaa yɔɔ nombiakumɛɛ ŋan balaŋ ne yɛɛ ditiŋtɛɛ man nɛ afa.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Te kpene kamasɛ keŋ keŋmaŋee keŋ da lee ke dɔɔ na, kɛɛ lese ke dinɔɔ gbagba wola.

english_verse: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ ɛ keta man nideli. Ɛ na tɛɛ ŋgba ayiŋtena ya, mɔna ɛ ta ŋgba siakaralatena nɛ.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na gyim ya, ɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na ɛ ka gyeŋ kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae ɛ ke yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Ɛ na dɛɛse ya, nawolo nyi soloŋ kedɛɛse ne wɔlɛɛ walaŋ bo. Mɔna ɛ yela Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ke doo ɛ man nideli.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Ɛ mo nombia ŋan doo Wurubuarɛ nɔɔneŋse man nɛ do dɔŋa kakyeŋ. Ɛ mo nɔɔneŋ kekpee na suya kegyɔ keŋ ba lee ɛ konɔɔse man nɛ lese de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ yele.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ ta de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ fa de kya Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee kpene kamasɛ man. Ala na baala

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Ala, ɛ yɔkɔse ɛ wose fa ɛ baala kpene kamasɛ man, ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ ne yɔkɔse ɛ wose fa de Gbeŋgyoo nɛ.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi baale ŋon ne diina doŋ ɔ wɛɛle ŋon dɔɔ, ŋgba mena keŋ Kristo ne di doŋ Kristotena dikpii keŋ dɔɔ nɛ. Te Kristo kei gbagba lɛɛ na balaŋ baŋ be doo Kristotena dikpii keŋ yɛɛ ɔ wose ke nɛ nyee.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Baala, ɛ gyae ɛ wɛɛla nombia ŋgba mena keŋ Kristo ne gyae Kristotena dikpii keŋ nombia, te ɔ ba yem fa ke nɛ.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: Kristo yeŋawɔ fa Kristotena dikpii keŋ, te ɔ moo ɔ nombia ŋan yɛɛ ŋgba loŋ nɛ, faafo balaŋ baŋ be doo Kristotena dikpii keŋ man lese ba ayimɛɛ te ɔ moo wɔ see fa Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: Ɔ yɛɛ kei na waa nyiŋ mo Kristotena dikpii kei kɔŋ ŋon gbagba ɔ siaman kaa yɛɛ ɔ wui, keŋ gyaŋtare yaa ayimɛɛ, yaa nombiikum kamasɛ be doo ka wose man ya.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Mena ke mɔ te kaboena nyi baala baa gyae be wɛɛla nombia, ŋgba mena keŋ bɛɛ gyae baŋ gbagba ba wose nɛ. Baale ŋon ɔ ne gyae ɔ wɛɛle nombia nɛ, ne gyae ŋon gbagba ɔ wose baa.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Keŋ dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ne yako nyiaa, “Lee mena dɔɔ baale waa lee ɔ kya na ɔ naa gyaŋ, na waa gyu ke kpu na ɔ wɛɛle na ŋon na e ka bese walaŋ dokoloŋ.”

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi baale kamasɛ mɔ waa gyae ɔ wɛɛle ŋgba ŋon gbagba ɔ wose nɛ, na alo kamasɛ mɔ ke yɔkɔse ɔ wose fa ɔ baale.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Bia, keŋ ɛ yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ dɔɔ kaboena nyi yaa tei ɛ kya na ɛ naa dei. Nawolo nyi ɛ ne yɛɛ kei na, ɛ ne yɛɛ kpene keŋ dei.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Kyaɔ, ɛ na do ɛ bia baŋ lee kpene keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ wɔ nɛ dɔɔ ya. Mɔna kaboena nyi yaa kɛɛ be dɔɔ na ɛ ka wola wɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia na baa di ŋe dɔɔ. Gbeŋa na be gbeŋgyoona

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Mee kolosi mɛɛ fa ɛmɛɛ gbeŋa mɔ nyi, ɛ tei ɛ gbeŋgyoona baŋ ɛ kyaa be gyaŋ nɛ dei lee ɛ konɔɔse man, ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ ne tei Kristo nɛ.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yako nyi, debaŋ keŋ be kyaa ɛ gyaŋ te bɛɛ kɛɛ ŋon dɔɔ te ɛ ke yɛɛ tom ka gyoo be sia na baa kɛlɛɛ ŋon ya.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yɛɛ ɛ tomse ŋgba denibalaŋ yaa ɛ ne yɛɛ fa nɛ ya, mɔna ɛ yɛɛ ŋa na gyoŋ ŋgba ɛ Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yaa ɛ ne yɛɛ fa nɛ.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Nyi n yɛɛ gbeŋi o, n yɛɛ gyooro bu e o, ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako ŋon nyi, Wurubuarɛ waa tɔ walaŋ kamasɛ kom, lee ɔ tom kpaakpaa keŋ ɔ ne yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ gbeŋgyoona baŋ mɔ, ɛ tela ɛ gbeŋa ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nɛ, ɛ naa ŋmaase wɔ ya. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi, ɛmɛɛ na ɛ gbeŋa baŋ pou yɛɛ ɛ Gbeŋgyoo ŋon ɔ kyaa adido nɛ wui. Ŋon ne diina nombia keŋ ɔ bɛɛ kɛɛ ŋolo siaman ya. Ɛ do Wurubuarɛ yoo abɔɔ

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Pɛ me nɔɔwoya kesi na, me nɔɔwoya akaŋ yɛna nyi, ɛ seŋ de Gbeŋgyoo wɔɔle dinaa keŋ man keŋkeŋ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Ɛ mo Wurubuarɛ yoo abɔɔ ŋan pou do ŋgba yoo kegbase nɛ, na ɛ ke tale di ɔbɔnsam ŋon adao gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ ŋan pou dɔɔ.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ do Wurubuarɛ yoo abɔɔ ŋan pou, na ɛ kenyiŋ tale seŋ keŋkeŋ ŋmanyaŋ ɔbɔnsam ŋon nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ debaŋ kei man. Te akpaa ɛ yoo keŋ de taŋ na, baa naa nyi ɛ sɛɛ ɛ seŋɛɛ ɛ da seŋae keŋ man.

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: Te kegyae keŋ ɛ ne gyae nyi ɛ ke yako Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ne fa balaŋ wosefɛɛreŋ nɛ, ke yɛɛ ŋgba nkyokotase ŋan ɛ na doo nɛ.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: Kɛŋa pou wɔle nɛ, ɛ yela ɛ kelɛɛdi ke yɛɛ ŋgba nyeele pampasaŋ keŋ nɛ. Kei te ɛ ke tale mo lɛɛ ɔbɔnsam ŋon apiase ŋan ŋe nɔɔse dana boalaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Ɛ fane fa maŋ mɔ, nyi me na yee ya. Te me gyu mɛɛ yako Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan na, Wurubuarɛ gbagba ka mo ɔ nɔɔwoya ŋan do me nɔɔman, na maa tale lese nombia aweeseŋ ŋan doo Wurubuarɛ nombia man nɛ wola.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Lee mena keŋ ma seŋɛɛ fa nombia kɛŋa dɔɔ, te be kyaŋa maŋ do deni man. Ɛ fane fa maŋ, na maa gyɔ me konɔɔ yako nombia ŋan ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi maa yako nɛ. Nɔɔkado ɔtomante

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa fa ɛmɛɛ de tebia baŋ ɛ silana Kristo nɛ wosefɛɛreŋ. Na baa yela ɛ ke gyae dɔŋa na ɛ ke lɛɛ Kristo di nideli.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele baŋ pou bɛɛ gyae de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kegyae keŋ betaŋ ɔto ya nɛ.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl na Timoti baŋ de yɛɛ Yesu Kristo tewulɛɛwɔ nɛ gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou ɛmɛɛ na Yesu Kristo be yɛɛ dokoloŋ, te ɛ kyaa Filipi donɔɔ man nɛ na Kristotena kegyiise na baŋ pou bɛɛ kyɔ wɔ nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ. Pɔɔl kefane fa Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Filipi donɔɔ man nɛ

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ me tɔɔse ŋon na, mɛɛ fane fa me Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee ɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ fane fa ŋon na mɛɛ mo gyoŋ fane.

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi lee debaŋ keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan di nɛ, te ɛ gyakaa ɛ ne kyɔ maŋ lee nombia ŋenaŋ kekolosi man kaa lii naŋ gyɛŋ.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Te mɛɛ lɛɛ di nideli nyi Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be fi tom kpaakpaa kei asɛɛ ɛ man nɛ, waa yɛɛ ke tɔɔle kelii wee keŋ Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae ŋon nideli lee me konɔɔ man. Mena dɔɔ ma gyeŋ nyi ke dei nyi maa gyueŋ ɛ wose man ŋgba mena keŋ mɛɛ gyueŋ nɛ. Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ bɔɔ kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni, na debaŋ keŋ mee yoo lee Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan dɔɔ, na debaŋ keŋ mɛɛ lese Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋenaŋ man wola balaŋ nyi ŋe yɛɛ ampaŋ nɛ, ɛ popou kyɔɔ maŋ lee tom keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo boele maŋ nɛ keyɛɛ man.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ gbagba gyeŋ nyi ɛ nombia doo me loo man, te mɛɛ gyae ŋon nideli ŋgba mena keŋ Yesu Kristo ne gyae daa nɛ.

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: Kei gyae ke yela ɛ ke tale gyeŋ kpene keŋ dei nɛ nideli, na ɛ ke kyaa keŋ nombiikum kamasɛ yaa ayimɛɛ kamasɛ be doo ɛ wose man ya, kelii wee keŋ Kristo waa bese kɔŋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Me tebia, mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ nyi nombia ŋan be tuŋ maŋ nɛ gba te yeli Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan te yaasee.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ yoonɔɔtena baŋ bɛɛ deke gyoo dɛɛ, na balaŋ akaŋ baŋ pou te nyii nyi keŋ mɛɛ som Kristo dɔɔ te be kyaŋa maŋ tɔ deni nɛ.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ nyi sibii na daaworo dɔɔ te balaŋ baale dɔŋɛɛ bee kolosi Kristo nombia ŋan. Mɔna baale mɔ na, baŋ ne kolosi nombia ŋan bo lee be konɔɔ kpaakpaa man.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Mɔna maŋ dɔɔ kei bee hia maŋ ya. Kpene keŋ ne hia maŋ yɛna nyi bee kolosi Kristo nombia ŋan. Nyi ba moo konɔɔ kpaakpaa bo kolosi ŋa o, be ta mo konɔɔ kpaakpaa kolosi ŋa ya o nɛ, gbɛɛ kamasɛ man na bee kolosi Kristo nombia ŋan. Kei dɔɔ te dana maŋ gyoŋ nɛ, te gyae ke yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ menɛɛ kelii ɔto.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ ne fane fa maŋ, te Yesu Kristo feliŋ ŋon mɔ ne kyɔ maŋ. Mena dɔɔ ma gyeŋ nyi kɛŋa pou gyae ke yela maa kaa nyiŋ ma wose.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae me konɔɔ man nideli te me loo mɔ gyakaa nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ be gyae waa yela desɛŋ ke kyaŋ maŋ lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man ya. Waa yela maa gyɔ me konɔɔ kolosi ŋgba mena keŋ mɛɛ taŋ yɛɛ nɛ, na nyi me kyaa na me sia bo o, yaa ma yeŋae o nɛ, na maa nyiŋ lese Kristo yele lee ma kekyaabii man.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Maŋ dɔɔ, akpaa me kyaa na me kyaa bo fa Kristo. Te akpaa ma yem mɔ na, ke yɛɛ tɔnɔɔ ke fa maŋ.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Ma te dɔɔ abɔɔ ala kɛŋa nsana. Nafɔ ma kegyae yɛna nyi maa yeŋ lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ na me kaa kyaa Kristo gyaŋ adido, nawolo nyi keŋ dei kela ma kekyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ lɛɛ di nideli nyi daa na ŋon pou dɛɛ kyaa, na maa nyiŋ kyɔ ŋon na ɛ ka bee ɛ kelɛɛdi man na ɛ ke nyiŋ di gyoŋ lee ɛ Wurubuarɛ kelɛɛdi man.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: Kei gyae ke yela nyi akpaa ma bese kaa kyaa na ŋon na, lee maŋ dɔɔ gyoŋ keŋ ɛ ne dii lee Yesu Kristo dɔɔ nɛ, gyae ka bese gbaa.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ kpene keŋ be kaa ɛ ke yɛɛ yɛna nyiaa, ɛ yela ɛ kekyaabii ke kyaa na mena keŋ nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan nawolo nɛ. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena nɛ, kenaŋ na nyi me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ yaa mɔɔ kyaa ɛ gyaŋ koraŋ ya na, maa nyii nyi ɛ dana Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan keŋkeŋ, te ɛ seŋɛɛ na ɛ tebia nɔɔdokoloŋ na ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa pou man, te ɛ ta mo nɔɔdokoloŋ ɛ ne kyɔ balaŋ na baa lɛɛ Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan di.

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: Te maa nyii mɔ nyi ɛ bee yee balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ koro seŋ tia ŋon nɛ lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man ya. Ɛ yɛɛ mena na gyae ka lese wola wɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa wɔlɛɛ wɔ, mɔna ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ waa lɛɛ ɛ nyee.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te fa ŋon gbɛɛ nyi yaa lɛɛ Kristo di kaageŋ bo ya, mɔna ɔ faa ŋon gbɛɛ nyi lee ŋon Kristo dɔɔ yaa naa diyem mɔ.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Ɛ naa diyem keŋ mɔɔ naa debaŋ keŋ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, te ɛ ne nyii mena keŋ me gyakaa mɛɛ naa diyem nɛ. Mena diyem kenaŋ ŋaale yaa ɛmɛɛ mɔ ne naa nɛ.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ yela ya agyueŋ ke yɛɛ dokoloŋ, na ɛ ke gyae dɔŋa kyɛɛkyɛɛ. Ɛ yela ɛmɛɛ na ɛ tebia pou ke yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ na ɛ ka seŋ nombii dokoloŋ dɔɔ. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, ɛ ke yela gyoŋ keŋ doo me man nɛ ka bo kpu.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Ɛ na yeli ɛ sia keyɛɛ ɛmɛɛ yaageŋ wui abɔɔ dɔɔ ya, mɔna ɛ gyae ɛ tebia mɔ deeli.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Ɛ yela ɛ dinɔɔ ke kyaa na Yesu Kristo wui.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nyiaa, Yesu na Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ dokoloŋ lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man. Mɔna ɔ te kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ŋon na Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ ya.

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: Ɔ te kɛɛ ɔ wose nyi ɔ yɛɛ ŋolo e ya. Mɔna ɔ moo ɔ wose yɛɛ ŋgba gbeŋi nɛ, te ɔ yela ba lola e ŋgba deniwalaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ gyina e adido adido te ɔ faa e gyooro dekyae, te ɔ fa e yele keŋ kela yele kamasɛ.

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: Lee mena yele kenaŋ dɔɔ, balaŋ na kpene kamasɛ keŋ kyaa adido na ŋan pou ŋe kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ, na ŋan pou ŋe doo tɛɛle kei ateta nɛ gyae ke buŋ som Yesu.

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: Mena ke te walaŋ kamasɛ waa gyuusu ɔ nɔɔ yako nyi Yesu Kristo yɛna de Gbeŋgyoo. Kei gyae ke yela balaŋ ka lese de kya Wurubuarɛ yele.

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me tebia kpaakpaa, debaŋ keŋ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ na ɛ ne di nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ. Mena mɔ yaa mɛɛ gyae nyi nɛnɛɛ keŋ mɔɔ kyaa ɛ gyaŋ ya nɛ, ɛ kyaŋ ɛ wose na ɛ ke di ŋe dɔɔ kela gyaŋgba keŋ. Ɛ mo Wurubuarɛ keyee deke ɛ wose, na ɛ ke sila nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan nideli.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Ɛ yɛɛ mena na ayimɛɛ kamasɛ be gyae ke doo ɛ wose man ya, te ŋolo mɔ be gyae waa nyiŋ nombiikum daale yako lee ɛ wose man ya. Na ɛ ke nyiŋ bese Wurubuarɛ bia baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa balaŋ kumɛɛ man. Ɛ yela ɛ nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ ka lee debɔɔ be man, ŋgba mena keŋ kyolobiise ne ŋalakee ditiŋtɛɛ man nɛ.

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: Ɛ kyaŋ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan man nideli. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ maa tale gyɔ me konɔɔ wee keŋ Kristo waa kɔŋ nɛ, na ka wola nyi me kaale na ma tom keŋ mɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ pou te yɛɛ yakaa ya.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: N te kɛɛ ya na baa ko maŋ. Nyi de kɔŋ mena na maa yɛɛ ŋgba wonembu ŋon ɛ ba mo deesi fa Wurubuarɛ lee mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ e di dɔɔ nɛ. Dekɔŋ mena na gyae ke yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ, na ke yela de popou ke nyaŋee.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Mena ke te kaboena nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ ɛmɛɛ mɔ gyoŋ, na daa na ŋon pou ke kyaa gyoŋ man. Pɔɔl kekpila Timoti na Epaferadituse

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Me loo gyakaa de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu dɔɔ nyi ɔ fa maŋ gbɛɛ na, be gyae ke kyare ya maa kpila Timoti ɛ gyaŋ. Na ke yela maa nyii ɛ kekyaabii man, na ɛmɛɛ mɔ ke nyii ma kekyaabii man na ka do maŋ kakyeŋ.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Ma be dana ŋolo keŋ ɔ na gyueŋ ɛ deeli dɔɔ kpu na ŋon Timoti ya.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi balaŋ akaŋ baŋ pou dɔɔ, be sia gyakaa baŋ gbagba abɔɔ dɔɔ bo. Bɔɔ na gyueŋ Yesu Kristo nombia ŋan dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ akpaa ma betaa naa mena keŋ ma kekyaabii man doo na, maa kpila e ɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Mɔna me naawɔ nyi kaboena nyi maa kpila me dɔɔ Kristo baale Epaferadituse ŋon daa na e ne yɛɛ tom dokoloŋ, te ɛ be kpila e nyi waa kɔŋ kaa kyɔ maŋ nɛ nyi waa bese kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ. Daa na e ne yɛɛ na tom dokoloŋ, te dee yoo na nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan keyako ŋgba yoonɔɔtena nɛ.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Ɔ ne gyae lee ɔ konɔɔ man nyi waa naa ɛ popou. Nawolo nyi ɛ ke nyii nyi ɔ na wee nɛ ke takaa e nideli.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Kawee gbagba na ɔ weewɔ keŋ koraŋ ɔ yela waa yeŋ, mɔna Wurubuarɛ wii ɔ waraŋase. Na ŋon waageŋ waraŋase te Wurubuarɛ wiiwɔ ya, mɔna ɔ wii maŋ gbagba mɔ waraŋase. Na mena ya na nafɔ meŋ yeyɛɛwɔ nideli.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ gyae nyi waa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ bileŋ, na ɛ naa e na ke yɛɛ ŋon gyoŋ na maŋ mɔ wɔe ke fɛɛ maŋ.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ɔ kɔŋ na ɛ lɛɛ e gyoŋ man, nawolo nyi de popou yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Kristo balaŋwɔ. Ɛ mo obuo fa mena balaŋ kɛwɔ dinɔɔ.

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Kristo tom keŋ dɔɔ te ɔ yela waa yeŋ nɛ. Ŋon moona ɔ wose fa yeŋ kaa seŋ ɛ nawɔɔ man kyɔ maŋ tom keŋ keyɛɛ man.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Me tebia, nombii keŋ be kaa maa yako ŋon yɛna nyi ɛ yela ke yɛɛ ŋon gyoŋ lee kpene keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ne yɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ. Maŋ dɔɔ bɛɛ takaa maŋ nyi me ta bese mɛɛ ŋmarase ŋon nombia ŋan mɔɔ wulaa ŋmarase ŋon kaalaŋ nɛ ya. Nawolo nyi ma gyeŋ nyi nombia ŋenaŋ gyae ke kyɔ ŋon, na ɛ ke tale seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ ɛ wose man nideli na balaŋ baŋ be dana nombiakumɛɛ te bɛɛ gyae baa wɔlɛɛ ɛ kelɛɛdi, te bɛɛ ŋere balaŋ nyi baa kara be baala wose nɛ.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Daa yɛna balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ kara de baala wose gbagba. Nawolo nyi daa ne tɛɛ bo Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon dɔɔ som Wurubuarɛ. Lee Yesu Kristo mɔ dɔɔ dɛɛ gyɔ de konɔɔ. Mena dɔɔ bɛɛ tekaa hia nyi dɛɛ mo de sia gyakaa baala wose kekara keŋ bɛɛ mo nyiŋmaa kara nɛ nombia dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: Ma doo kakyeŋ Gyudatena ɔsom keŋ man nideli, te me naase Kristo silala baŋ diyem nideli. Akpaa nyi nafɔ kaboena bo nyi walaŋ waa di mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ pɛna Wurubuarɛ ke lɛɛ e do na, nafɔ maŋ dɔɔ nombiikum daale be doo ma wose man ya.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Abɔɔ ŋan pou nafɔ ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ fa maŋ nɛ, nɛnɛɛ lee Kristo dɔɔ ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ fa maŋ bela ya.

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Na daa na e ke yɛɛ dokoloŋ kekpaa na me nombia ke nyiŋ tenee Wurubuarɛ siaman. Kei te yɛɛ nyi lee tom keŋ maŋ gbagba be yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ yaa keŋ mɔɔ di Wurubuarɛ mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ nɛ dɔɔ ya. Mɔna keŋ mɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo di dɔɔ te me nombia teneewɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman ya.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae nyi maa gyeŋ Kristo nideli, na maa naa doŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ. Na maa kpu na e naa diyem keŋ ɔ be naa nɛ, na ke yɛɛ ŋgba daa na e yeŋa la nɛ.

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Na mɛɛ yako baa nyi me taŋ ke nyiŋ mena abɔɔ kɛŋa pou, yaa me gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman kekpaa ya. Mɔna mɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ bo nyi maa nyiŋ kpene keŋ dɔɔ Yesu Kristo be baake maŋ nyi me kaa bese ɔ wui nɛ.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Daa baŋ pou dɔɔ bee Wurubuarɛ ɔsom keŋ man nɛ, mena dinɔɔ kei te kaboena nyi de popou dee nyiŋ. Mɔna akpaa ɛ man baale dana agyueŋ kpoo daale na, Wurubuarɛ waa kyɔ ŋon na ɛ ke nyii me nombia kɛŋa man nideli.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Kpene keŋ ne hia yɛna nyi, ɛ yela dɛɛ kyaa ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ be wulaa yako nyi dɛɛ kyaa nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Me tebia, ɛ popou ɛ kasee ma kekyaabii ŋgba mena keŋ baale ne yɛɛ nɛ. Ɛ see ɛ sia tɛɛle man, na ɛ ke kasee balaŋ baŋ ba kekyaabii yɛɛ ŋgba mena keŋ dɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Me te wulaa yako ŋon nombii kei. Te nɛnɛɛ mɛɛ mo siasaraŋ mɛɛ yako ŋon bela nyiaa, balaŋ baale ta besena ba wose Kristo kɔlala. Be nombia ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ nawolo nyi baŋ gyaŋ na, Kristo yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem nɛ be dana tɔnɔɔ ya.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ waa wɔlɛɛ mena balaŋ benaŋ kekpaakekpaa. Nawolo nyi be ta mo abɔɔ ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae nɛ besena be Wurubuarɛ. Kpene keŋ yɛɛ desɛŋ nombia ŋa nɛ, ŋan man te baŋ ne gyɔ be konɔɔ. Tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae kaageŋ te baŋ na gyueŋ.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Mɔna daa dɔɔ de dɛɛ yɛna Wurubuarɛ man adido. Botɔɔ te de loo gyakaa nideli nyi da nyeelɛɛre ŋon waa lee kɔŋ. Ŋon yɛna de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ me tebia gyaagyi baŋ mɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia te ɛ nombia ne gyɔ maŋ loo, ɛ seŋ keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke di de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan dɔɔ. Ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ te maa di gyoŋ na maa nyiŋ yele.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Ewodia na Sintike, mɛɛ waase ŋon bo nyi ɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ nawolo nyi ɛ popou yɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo balaŋwɔ.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ nyaŋ me dɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋon mɛɛ mo ma wose lɔ n dɔɔ, mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke desina ala bala kɛwɔ nsana. Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ mee kolosi Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan nɛ, ba seŋawɔ na maŋ demena na dunoluŋ pou. Mena ala kɛwɔ na Kelemente na me dɔɔna akaŋ baŋ pou kyɔɔ maŋ nideli ma tom keŋ keyɛɛ man. Ba te ŋmarase mena balaŋ kɛwɔ pou yela do nyeedoŋ kekpaa tɔne keŋ man.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, keŋ ɛ ne lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ wosefɛɛreŋ keŋ walaŋ bɛɛ tale nyii ke man ya nɛ, gyae ke yela ɛ wɔe ke fɛɛ ŋon na ɛ konɔɔ man nombia mɔ ke kyaa ŋon kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Abɔɔ ŋan mɔɔ wola ŋon te ɛ be lɛɛ ŋa do, na ŋan ɛ be naa me man na ŋan ɛ be nyii mɔɔ kolosi nɛ, ŋan te kaboena nyi yaa yɛɛ. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ waa kyaa na ŋon. Pɔɔl kado Filipitena nɔɔ lee kekyɔ keŋ bɔɔ kyɔ e nɛ dɔɔ

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Dana maŋ gyoŋ te mɛɛ lese de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele, nawolo nyi nɛnɛɛ ɛ ta bese lese wola nyi me nombia ne hia ŋon. Ma gyeŋ nyi me nombia wulaa ne hia ŋon, mɔna gbɛɛ te ɛ te nyim na ɛ ka lese wola ya.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Na ma wose kyaŋa na maŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ yako nombia kɛŋa ya. Nawolo nyi maŋ dɔɔ, me te wulaa kasee mena keŋ maa kyaa gyoŋ man lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ diyem man kekyaa, te ma gyeŋ wosekenyiŋ man mɔ kekyaa. Kpene kamasɛ man na, ma gyeŋ ma wose katela. Me dii baa bo o, yaa tanam na koo na maŋ bo o, me dana o mɔɔ dana ya o, ma gyeŋ ma wose katela.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Kristo doŋ keŋ doo me man dɔɔ, maa tale yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ yɛɛ ke nideli ŋgba ma wose be kyaŋ maŋ te ɛ be kyɔ maŋ nɛ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ Filipitena gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nyiaa, debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ fiasɛɛ mee kolosi Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa ŋon te mɔɔ lee Masedonia tɛɛle man nɛ, lee ɛmɛɛ wɔle na Kristotena baŋ ŋolo na ŋolo te kyɔ maŋ na kolo ya.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ gba me kyaa Tesalonika donɔɔ man te ma wose be kyaŋ maŋ nɛ, ɛ yelee maŋ abɔɔ agbaatee agbaatee.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Na me sia ne yɛɛ bo nyi yaa yelee maŋ abɔɔ ya. Mɔna kpene keŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ lɛɛ ya abɔɔ yɛna nyi, mɛɛ gyae nyi Wurubuarɛ ke hiraa ŋon lee ɛ deeli keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ man.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Me Wurubuarɛ ŋon mɛɛ som e nɛ, waa fa ŋon abɔɔ ŋan pou kaboena nyi yaa nyiŋ ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri man abɔɔ boe nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ te kaa bese Yesu Kristo balaŋ.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ɛ yela dɛɛ lese de kya Wurubuarɛ yele kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou be kyaa botɔɔ nɛ nɔɔ. Me tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa me gyaŋ kɛbo bɛɛ kyɔ maŋ nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou be kyaa kɛbo nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Tuturu na, baŋ be kyaa gyoo dinaa Kaesa dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon Wurubuarɛ ba lese maŋ lee ɔ kegyaebii man nyi maa yɛɛ Yesu Kristo kpilale nɛ, na de dɔɔ Kristobaale Timoti gyaŋ.

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ de tebia Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di, te ɛ silana anokoare keŋ te ɛ kyaa Kolose donɔɔ man nɛ. De kya Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ. Nɔɔkado na kefane

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ dɛɛ fane na dɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ɔ kya ŋon karaŋ lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi de te nyii mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di, na mena keŋ ɛ ne gyae Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ pou nɛ.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Ɛ ne yɛɛ kɛŋa pou nawolo nyi, ɛ sia gyakaa abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan Wurubuarɛ be desina see ŋon adido nɛ dɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ɛ be taŋgbɛɛ nyii nɛ, yele la te ɛ gyeŋawɔ nyi abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋaale doo adido fa ŋon. Wurubuarɛ nombia kɛŋa yɛna anokoare nombia ŋan.

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: Nombia kpaakpaa ŋan bɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ te lɛɛ tɛɛle kei pou dɔɔ. Te ŋa te yeli balaŋ burum ne kyɛɛkee lee be gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ man kɔŋ Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ, ŋgba mena keŋ ŋa be kyɛɛkee ŋon lee wee gyaŋgbate keŋ ɛ be nyii nombia ŋenaŋ, te ɛ be nyii Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ man nideli nɛ.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: Ŋon mɔ kaa yako na daa mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon be yeli ɛ ne gyae Wurubuarɛ balaŋ nideli nɛ.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ lee wee keŋ dɔɔ nyii ɛ wose man nombia nɛ, dɛɛ fane fa ŋon wee kamasɛ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa fa ŋon nyansa na waa yela ɛ ka gyeŋ ɔ kegyaebii na ɛ ke nyii ɔ nombia ŋan pou man nideli.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Kei ne gyae la ke yela ɛ ke tale kyaa ŋgba mena keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nɛ, na ɛ ke yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan kaboena nɛ gbɛɛ kamasɛ man, na ɛ ka gyeŋ ɔ nombia ŋan mɔ kpu.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ fane nyi Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ gyoorobiiri doŋ keŋ ka dokoso be kyaa ya nɛ do ɛ man, na waa yela ɛ kenyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ keŋkeŋ kpene kamasɛ keŋ gyae ke kɔŋ ɛ dɔɔ nɛ man.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ fane nyi gyoŋ dee doo ɛ man na ɛ ke fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ debaŋ kamasɛ, nawolo nyi ŋon yele la te ɛ kaboewɔ nyi yaa nyiŋ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan ɔ be desina see ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ man fa ɔ balaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ŋon Wurubuarɛ lese na daa lee ɔbɔnsam ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ man, te ɔ moo daa kɔŋ ɔ bu Yesu ŋon ɔ ne gyae ɔ nombia nɛ gyoorobiiri man.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Ŋon Yesu dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ abɔɔ pou. Abɔɔ ŋan ŋe kyaa adido na ŋan ŋe kyaa tɛɛle man, ŋan dɛɛ mo de sia fonɛɛ naa ŋa na ŋan de bɛɛ naa ŋa ya nɛ, mo kpu na kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ yenaŋ kamasɛ ŋgba gbeŋgyoona na gyooneŋ pou. Ŋon Yesu dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ abɔɔ pou, te ŋe popou mɔ kyae fa e.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Ŋon Yesu Kristo kei wulaa ɔ kyaa pɛte Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, te ɔ doŋ man dɔɔ te kpene kamasɛ mɔ kyaa.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Ŋon yɛna ɔ balaŋ Kristotena dikpii keŋ pou nyee, te ɔ na wola wɔ gbɛɛ ŋgba mena keŋ deniwalaŋ nyee na wola na ɔ wose pou gbɛɛ nɛ. Ŋon ke yɛna be nyeedoŋ pou nyee, na walaŋ ŋon Wurubuarɛ be taŋgbɛɛ gyuusu lee yeŋ man, na ke yela waa bese abɔɔ pou man siamante.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Ke yɛɛ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gbagba kegyaebii ke nyi, ɔ dinɔɔ pou de kaa doo ɔ bu ŋon man.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: Yesu yeŋ keŋ ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ na ɔ fatabo keŋ be kyɛɛkee leki nɛ, keŋ kaa desina na kpene kamasɛ na Wurubuarɛ nsana. Keŋ moona wosefɛɛreŋ kɔŋ adido na ateta abɔɔ pou na ŋon Wurubuarɛ nsana.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba keŋ na nafɔ ɛmɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ nsana be dana gyoŋ ya, te ɛ nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ kɔla e lee ɛ konɔɔse man.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ Kristo ŋon ɔ be kaa bese deniwalaŋ te ɔ ba yem ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ nɛ dɔɔ desina ɛmɛɛ na ŋon Wurubuarɛ nsana. Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kei na ɛ ke tale kaa seŋ ɔ siaman keŋ dukum kamasɛ be doo ɛ man na ke yela waa bu ŋon fɔɔ ya.

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: Mɔna kaboena nyi yaa seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ, keŋ nyi ɛ ba lese ɛ loo lee abɔɔ ŋan Wurubuarɛ be yako see ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan man nyi waa yɛɛ fa ŋon nɛ dɔɔ ya. Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ɛ be wulaa nyii nɛ, ŋan ke te be dɔŋɛɛ bee kolosi fa balaŋ yenaŋ kamasɛ. Wurubuarɛ yele la te maŋ Pɔɔl mɔ kaa bese nombia ŋenaŋ tomyɛɛre te me dɔŋ mee kolosi ŋa fa balaŋ nɛ. Tom keŋ Pɔɔl be yɛɛ fa Kristotena

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Dana maŋ gyoŋ ŋgba ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ mɛɛ naa diyem debaŋ kei nɛ. Kei nawolo nyi mena keŋ Yesu be naa diyem ɔ balaŋ dɔɔ nɛ, mena diyem kenaŋ ke yaa ma seŋɛɛ ɔ nawɔɔ man mɛɛ naa ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi Kristo walaŋ waa naa diyem Kristotena dikpii keŋ dɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ gbagba lese na maŋ nyi maa bese Kristotena pou tobaale. Tom keŋ ɔ ba mo do me nyiŋmaa man yɛna nyi maa lese ŋon Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan man pou wola ŋon.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba keŋ na Wurubuarɛ moo nombia kɛŋa weese beneŋtena baŋ, mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ ta lese ŋa debɔɔ wola ɔ balaŋ Kristotena baŋ.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Ke yɛɛ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gbagba kegyaebii ke nyi waa lese ɔ nombia aweeseŋ ŋan ŋe yɛɛ nombia dinaana ŋa, te ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ nɛ wola ɔ balaŋ pou. Nombia ŋenaŋ yɛna nyi, keŋ Kristo doo ɛ konɔɔse man dɔɔ ɛ loo gyakaa nyi wee daale ɛ ka bese gyoorobia.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te me yase me sia mɛɛ mo Kristo doŋ keŋ ɔ ba mo do me man nɛ mo yɛɛ ɔ tom keŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ mena keŋ mɛɛ ko ma wose Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man, na baŋ pou ba te naa ta maŋ see ya nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Mee wulaa yako ŋon nombia kɛŋa pou baa, na ŋolo be nyiŋ mo nɔɔman yeliŋ mo nombia wɔlɛɛ ŋaale kaa beo ŋon ya.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Doo nyi maŋ gbagba be kyaa ɛ gyaŋ botɔɔ koraŋ ya nɛ, me konɔɔ man na ma gyeŋ nyi me kpuɛ na ŋon. Mena dɔɔ me ke nyii nyi ɛ ne yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ ke gbɛɛ dɔɔ, na mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Kristo di te ɛ seŋɛɛ nombia ŋan man keŋkeŋ nɛ yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ nideli.

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di nyi ŋon yɛna ɛ gbeŋgyoo nɛ, ɛ betaa kyaa na e mena.

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Ɛ mo ɛ wose teeli na e na ɛ ke kasee ɔ nombia kpu, na ɛ ka seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ ŋgba mena keŋ bɔɔ wulaa wola ŋon nɛ, na ɛ ka do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ nideli debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ ɛ wose dɔɔ nideli na ŋolo be nyiŋ mo tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nyansa nombia ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ kaa beo ŋon ya. Mena nombia ŋenaŋ yɛɛ denibalaŋ beneŋ nombia na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombia ayɛɛsa ŋa. Mena nombia ŋenaŋ bɛɛ wola kolo lee Kristo wose man ya.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ keŋ ɛmɛɛ na Kristo be kaa yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ, ɛ te nyiŋ ɔ dinɔɔ keŋ pou. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi Kristo yɛna kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ nɛ nyee.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Ba ke sɔ ŋon Wurubuarɛ loŋ keŋ nɛ, yɛɛ yaa ŋgba be wuu ŋon baa na Kristo te ba besewɔ gyuusu ɛmɛɛ na e nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ te lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ba mo ɔ doŋ dinaa gyuusu Kristo lee yeŋ man nɛ di.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ te tɛɛ Yesu Kristo yeŋ keŋ dɔɔ yɔkɔse feliŋkumɛɛ, na kpene kamasɛ keŋ ne di doŋ nɛ. Ɔ yɛɛ kɛŋa pou do wɔ desɛŋ na walaŋ kamasɛ ke nyiŋ naa nyi, Yesu Kristo te di doŋ feliŋkumɛɛ ŋan pou dɔɔ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na yeli ŋolo ke bu ŋon fɔɔ lee mmaraase ŋan ŋɛɛ tɔ ɛ kedi na ɛ kenyɔɔ gbɛɛ, yaa ɛ weeya dinaana kedi yaa gyaalaŋ wɔle weeya kedi yaa ɛ kefɛɛfoweeya kedi mmaraase dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi mena nombia kɛŋa pou doe, na kawola nyi abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋaale dɔŋ wɔle ne kɔŋ. Te nombia kɛŋa pou seŋɛɛ bo fa Kristo.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Kristo ka yeŋ ɔpaŋdaŋ keŋ dɔɔ nɛ yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ɛmɛɛ na e yeŋala nɛ, mena dɔɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ ba tekaa taŋ doŋ ɛ dɔɔ bela ya. Lee mena dɔɔ tekaboena nyi yaa sila tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ ŋgba mena keŋ balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ ya nɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ ya.

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa pou gyae kaa kyom, nawolo nyi ŋe yɛɛ ŋan denibalaŋ gbagba be bake see te bɛɛ wola balaŋ nyi baa di ŋe dɔɔ.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Balaŋ burum na gyueŋ nyi mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa kesila yɛɛ nyansa nombia ŋa, mɔna nyansa kamasɛ be doo ŋe man ya. Balaŋ baŋ bee sila mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa nɛ, ne naa na sia naase ba wose diyem yɛɛ abɔɔ ŋaale na kawola nyi bɛɛ som Wurubuarɛ nideli. Bɛɛ beo yɔkɔse ba wose te bɛɛ naase ba wose diyem, mɔna mena abɔɔ anekɔlaŋ kɛŋa dɔɔ kedi nɛ, bee yeli baa tale di ba wose dɔɔ nyi bɔɔ yɛɛ dukum bela ya.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ mo ya agyueŋ pou gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan kyaa adido nɛ dɔɔ. Ɛ na mo ya agyueŋ gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ɛ ta yem te ɛ nyeedoŋ weesɛɛ Kristo man Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Akpaa Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ ɛ nyeedoŋ gbagba e nɛ de bɛɛ lee adido kɔŋ na, ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ ke kpu na e ɔ gyoorobiiri dinaa keŋ man.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombiakumɛɛ pou keyɛɛ man. Ɛ tina nombiakumɛɛ ŋgba kafoŋ na ayimɛɛ ka mo wuu wose na lookum na agyueŋ kum yela. Ɛ na yɛɛ kedikum ya nawolo nyi walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ kedikum na, ŋon na bane somra yɛɛ kyɛɛkyɛɛ.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Ɛ tina nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou keyɛɛ yela, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ balaŋ baŋ pou bɛɛ yɛɛ mena nombiakumɛɛ ŋenaŋ nɛ deŋele.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nyi gyaŋgba ɛ kekyaabii man pɛte ɛ be kaa lɛɛ Kristo di na, ɛmɛɛ mɔ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ kaboena nyi yaa wɔŋ ɛ wose lee mena nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou man. Ɛ tina baŋ kagyeŋ, na baŋ kum na balaŋ katee na balaŋ yela kewɔlɛɛ na nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ kekolosi yela.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Ɛ na dii akɛrɛɛ fa dɔŋa ya, nawolo nyi ɛ te tina ɛ dinɔɔ bene na ka abɔɔ kumɛɛ ŋan pou yela.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela Kristo nombia ŋan ke doo ɛ man nideli. Ɛ mo nyansa wola dɔŋa nombia ŋenaŋ na ɛ ke faree wɔ nyi be na yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ ya. Ɛ kpee Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nɔɔneŋ kpookpoo do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ gyoŋ man lee ɛ konɔɔse man.
