english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Te kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ yaa keŋ ɛ keyako na, ɛ yɛɛ ŋe popou lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man. Na ɛ ke ta ɔ dɔɔ do de kya Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ. Kristotena dekpaŋalaŋ man kekyaabii

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ ala yalala, ɛ yɔkɔse ɛ wose fa ɛ baala ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi Kristo walaŋ waa yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ baala yalala mɔ, ɛ gyae ɛ wɛɛla nombia. Ɛ na ŋmanyaŋ wɔ ya.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ lolala, ɛ na yɛɛ ɛ bia akpanyaŋnyaŋ ya. Ɛ yɛɛ mena na, ba wose gyae ke yɔkɔse wɔ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ yɛɛ gbeŋawɔ nɛ, ɛ mo obuo fa ɛ gbeŋgyoona tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gbɛɛ kamasɛ man. Ɛ na bu wɔ be siaman kaageŋ keŋ ɛ ne gyae nyi baa kɛlɛɛ ŋon dɔɔ ya, mɔna ɛ bu wɔ lee ɛ konɔɔ man nawolo nyi ɛ ne yee Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Ɛ yase ɛ sia fane debaŋ kamasɛ. Akpaa ɛ ne fane na, ɛ mo ya agyueŋ pou gyakaa Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ na ɛ ke fa e karaŋ.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Ɛ fane fa daa mɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa toro gbɛɛ fa daa, na dee nyiŋ kolosi ɔ nombia ŋan nafɔ ŋa weesɛɛ nɛ fa balaŋ. Wurubuarɛ nombia kɛŋa keyako dɔɔ te be kyaŋa maŋ tɔ deni nɛ.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Ɛ fane nyi maa tale lese nombia ŋan man wola balaŋ nideli ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nyi maa yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ɛ ne kolosi fa wɔ na, ɛ yela ɛ nɔɔwoya keyɛɛ gyoŋ na ka do wɔ kakyeŋ na baa nyiŋ tei ŋon. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena te ŋolo de bɔɔse ŋon kolo lee ɛ Kristo kelɛɛdi keŋ man na, ɛ ka gyeŋ mena keŋ ɛ ke tiranɔɔ fa e.

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: De dɔɔ gyaagyi Tikikuse ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ ɔ tom anokoare man te ɔ kpuɛ na maŋ te dɛɛ yɛɛ Kristo tom kei nɛ de kɔŋ na, waa kaa yako ŋon ma kekyaabii man nombia pou.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ te mee kpila e ɛ gyaŋ na ɔ kaa yako ŋon da kekyaabii man nombia na waa do ŋon kakyeŋ.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Ŋon na de dɔɔ Onesimuse ŋon dɛɛ gyae ɔ nombia nideli, te ɔ ne di anokoare fa Kristo te ɔ yɛɛ ɛ man ŋolo e nɛ ne kɔŋala. Baŋ ne gyae la be kaa yako ŋon de kɛbo nombia na da kekyaabii man pou.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Arisitakuse ŋon bɔɔ kyaŋ daa na e tɔ deni nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Mena mɔ te Banabase ɔ naabu Maake mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Me taŋ wulaa yako ŋon Maake kei wose man nombia, mena dɔɔ akpaa ɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ botɔɔ na ɛ lɛɛ e nideli.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Gyosua ŋon bɛɛ bese baake e Gyustuse nɛ mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Mena balaŋ batooro kɛwɔ baageŋ yɛna Gyudatena baŋ be kpuɛ na maŋ te dee kolosi Wurubuarɛ gyoorobiiri keŋ nombia. Ba te yeli me wɔe te fɛɛ maŋ nideli.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Ɛ dɛɛ baale Epafirase ŋon ɔ na som Yesu Kristo nideli nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ. Debaŋ kamasɛ na ɔ ne yase ɔ sia fane fa Wurubuarɛ nyi waa yela ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man, na ɛ ka bee nideli Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan kagyeŋ man na ɛ ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Maa tale gyɔ me konɔɔ yako nyi ɔ na yeŋ ɛ yeŋ. Mena ke te ɔ na yeŋ Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia na Hirapolise donɔɔse man mɔ nɛ yeŋ.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: De dɔɔ gyaagyi Luka ŋon ɔ yɛɛ dɔketa e nɛ, na Demase mɔ na do ŋon nɔɔ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Ɛ do de tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man nɛ, na de deesi Nimfa na baŋ bɛɛ gyaŋee ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ nɔɔ fa maŋ.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Akpaa be kala tɔne kei fa ŋon na, ɛ mo ke yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man nɛ, na baŋ mɔ ke kala ke, na ɛmɛɛ mɔ ke lɛɛ keŋ mɔɔ ŋmarase yelee wɔ nɛ kala.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Ɛ yako Akipuse nyi waa yɛɛ kakyeŋ na waa kɛɛ nyi ɔ te tɔɔle tom keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ba mo do ɔ nyiŋmaa man nɛ pou.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Maŋ Pɔɔl gbagba moona me nyiŋmaa ŋmarase nɔɔkado ɔtomante kei nɛ. Ɛ tɔɔse nyi me doo deni man, na ɛ ke fane fa maŋ. Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl na Silase na Timoti gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa Tesalonika donɔɔ man, te ɛ ba mo ɛ wose fa de kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nɛ. De kya Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ dɛɛ fane na, dɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee ɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: De tebia, da gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ ne gyae ŋon te ɔ lese ŋon nyi yaa bese ɔ balaŋ.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Ɛ kasee daa na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ. Mena dɔɔ ɛ kayeyɛɛ man koraŋ na, ɛ moo gyoŋ keŋ ba lee Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon gyaŋ nɛ lɛɛ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ te yeli Kristotena baŋ pou be kyaa Masedonia na Akaya tɛɛle man nɛ, ne kɛɛ ya abɔɔ ayɛɛsa mo kasee ŋon.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ, de Gbeŋgyoo nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan te yaasee bo gyu Masedonia na Akaya tɛɛle man kaageŋ ya, mɔna ŋa te yaasee gyu yenaŋ kamasɛ. Mena dɔɔ kolo be doo keŋ dɛɛ yako lee ke man bela ya.

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: Bee kolosi mɔ nyi ɛ ne daa ɔ bu Yesu ŋon ɔ be gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ ka bese lee adido kɔŋ. Ŋon Yesu ne gyae la waa lese daa wee keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa mo baŋ di balaŋ nombia nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Me tebia, ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nyi da kekɔŋ keŋ dɔɔ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ nɛ te yɛɛ yakaa ya.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyeŋ mena keŋ bɔɔ naase daa diyem, te bɔɔ fulu daa Filipi donɔɔ man pɛte dɔɔ kɔŋ kaa lii ɛ gyaŋ. Mɔna keŋ na balaŋ ka koro seŋ tia daa koraŋ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ doo daa kakyeŋ te de gyɔɔ de konɔɔ kolosi ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa ŋon.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi de nombia ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ, te yɛɛ dekara yaa adao nombia ya. Te na dɛɛ gyae bo nyi dɛɛ kɔ ɛ nyeeya man di dɔɔ te dɛɛ yako ŋon mena nombia ŋenaŋ ya.

english_verse: God was pleased to trust us with his message. We didn't speak to please people, but to please God who knows our motives.
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ na daa do, te ɔ mo nyeedoŋ nombia kɛŋa kekolosi do daa de nyiŋmaa man. Na denibalaŋ kegyaebii yaa dɛɛ yɛɛ ya, mɔna Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ de konɔɔse man nɛ kegyaebii yaa dɛɛ yɛɛ.

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyeŋ nideli nyi de ta mo nɔɔwoya ŋan ŋe dana gyoŋ, yaa kabeo nombia kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ na dɛɛ mo nyiŋ kolo lee ɛ gyaŋ ya. Wurubuarɛ gbagba yɛna da adansɛɛte lee mena nombia kɛŋa man.

english_verse: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
translation_verse: Mɔna de yɔkɔse da wose kyaa na ŋon, ŋgba mena keŋ talabo ne kɛɛ ɔ bia dɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Mena keŋ dɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia nideli dɔɔ, na Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ŋaageŋ te da moowɔ kɔna ŋon ya. Mɔna da moo daa gbagba da wose kpu fa ŋon gyoŋ man, nawolo nyi ɛ ta bese balaŋ baŋ ɛ nombia doo de konɔɔ man nideli.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Me tebia, ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ ne tɔɔse mena keŋ dɔɔ yɛɛ tom na kaale nɛ. Debaŋ keŋ dee kolosi Wurubuarɛ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan fa ŋon nɛ, de yɛɛ tom nelim na ka weese, na dɔɔ nyiŋ mo de kasolɔ lɔ ŋolo dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ Kristotena na Wurubuarɛ ne diina adansɛɛ fa daa nyi, debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ na da wose be dana ayimɛɛ ya. De gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ te da wose mɔ be dana nombiikum daale ya.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyeŋ nyi da tela ŋon ŋgba mena keŋ kya na tela ɔ bia nɛ.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: Da wola ŋon kpene keŋ dei, te da doo ŋon kakyeŋ te de kolosiwɔ fa ŋon na ɛ kekyaabii ke nyiŋ kaboena Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be baake ŋon kɔŋ ɔ gyoori na ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ, nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ ɛ be nyii Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan lee de gyaŋ nɛ, ɛ te lɛɛ nombia ŋenaŋ ŋgba denibalaŋ nombia nɛ ya. Mɔna ɛ lɛɛ ŋa di nyi ŋe yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋa ampaŋ. Mena nombia kɛŋa ne yɛɛ na tom ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ be lɛɛ di nɛ man.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: De tebia, da te naa nyi ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ be yɛɛ Kristo Yesu wui, te be kyaa Gyudia tɛɛle man nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ naa diyem ɛ tebia nyiŋmaa man, ŋgba mena keŋ baŋ mɔ be naa diyem be tebia Gyudatena nyiŋmaa man nɛ.

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: Baŋ Gyudatena benaŋ koona de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu, na Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra, te be naase daa mɔ diyem gegi daa lee be donɔɔse man. Be nombia bɛɛ gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia ya, te bɔɔ ne gyae balaŋ mɔ nombia ya.

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi be ta koro seŋ tɔ daa gbɛɛ, na dɔɔ nyiŋ kolosi nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan fa balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, na Wurubuarɛ ke nyiŋ lɛɛ ba nyee ya. Kei te yeli be nombiakumɛɛ ta boo kpu, mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ ta gyeŋ baŋ nyi waa wɔŋ ba deŋele.

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: De tebia, ba ke yela daa na ŋon nsana ketira te dii ta weeya ya. Keŋ na de kyaa lem na lem de bɛɛ naa dɔŋa koraŋ ya nɛ, ɛ nombia doo de konɔɔ man nideli. Mena dɔɔ dɛɛ gyae gbɛɛ nideli nyi dɛɛ bese kɔŋ kaa kɛɛ ŋon.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ da kena nyi nombia ta kela daa keŋ dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ tale kaa naa ŋon dɔɔ ya nɛ, de yɛɛ da agyueŋ nyi dɛɛ bese kyaa Atɛnse donɔɔ man.

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ dee kpila de dɔɔ Timoti ŋon ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tobaale e, te ɔ kpuɛ na daa Kristo nombia kpaakpaa ŋan kekolosi man nɛ ɛ gyaŋ. Dee kpila e nyi ɔ kaa do ŋon kakyeŋ na ɛ ka seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man,

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ, de wulaa yako ŋon agbaatee agbaatee nyiaa, baa naase daa diyem ŋgba mena keŋ be kɔŋ te ɛ ne naa nɛ.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Mɔna Timoti ka lee ɛ gyaŋ kɔŋ yaa, te ɔ te kɔŋ kaa yako daa nombia kpaakpaa nyi ɛ seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man te ɛ ne gyae balaŋ mɔ. Ɔ te kaa yako daa nyi debaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ ne tɔɔse daa, te ɛ sia te yɛɛ nyi ɛ kena daa ŋgba mena keŋ daa mɔ ne gyae nyi dɛɛ naa ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: De tebia, mena dɔɔ keŋ na de kayeyɛɛ na be kɛɛ naase daa diyem pou man na, ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ na do daa kakyeŋ.

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi lee mena keŋ ɛ seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan ɛ be lɛɛ di nɛ man dɔɔ, de wɔe te fɛɛ daa nideli.

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Nelim na ka weese na dɛɛ fane fa Wurubuarɛ nyiaa, waa yela dɛɛ bese naa ŋon na de sia, na dɛɛ kyɔ ŋon na ɛ ka seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ kelii ɔto.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ fane nyi de kya Wurubuarɛ gbagba na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu, baa toro gbɛɛ fa daa na dɛɛ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ fane nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa yela ɛ balaŋ kegyae keŋ ke doo ɛ man nideli, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gyae dɔŋa na balaŋ pou, ŋgba mena keŋ daa mɔ ne gyae ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa desina ɛ konɔɔse man, na wee keŋ ŋon na balaŋ baŋ pou Wurubuarɛ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ baa kɔŋ na, ɛ ke yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ayimɛɛ na nombiikum kamasɛ be doo ɛ man ya de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋonaŋ siaman.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: De tebia, nombia ŋan be kaa mɛɛ gyae maa yako ŋon yɛna nyi, da wola ŋon mena keŋ yaa kyaa na ɛ kekyaabii na ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa pou kenyiŋ gyoo Wurubuarɛ sia, ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ be taŋ wulaa ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ. Dɛɛ waase ŋon lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man nyi, ɛ kyaŋ ke keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke yɛɛ kela mena gba.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ɛ gyeŋ nombia ŋan dɔɔ tɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo doŋ dɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii yɛna nyi ɛ na mo ayimɛɛ wuu ɛ wose ya, na ɛ ka lese ɛ wose lee kafoŋ nombia man.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yɛɛ kewɔlɛɛ nombia ŋgba mena keŋ balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya ne yɛɛ nɛ ya.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Mena ke mɔ te ŋolo na yɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ nombiikum yaa ɔ na ŋere e do ya. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ mena nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou na, de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ ɔtenate deŋele ŋgba mena keŋ dɔɔ wulaa yako ŋon te dɔɔ faree ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ mena kawola kei na, na deniwalaŋ nombia te ɔ bɛɛwɔ ya mɔna Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ba mo ɔ feliŋ do ɛ man nɛ nombia yaa ɔ bɛɛwɔ.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ lee ɛmɛɛ na ɛ tebia dɔŋa kegyae wose man nombia dɔɔ, tekaboena nyi dɛɛ bese ŋmarase ke man kolo yelee ŋon bela ya, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te wulaa wola ŋon nyi yaa gyae dɔŋa.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Ke yɛɛ ampaŋ nyi ɛ wulaa ɛ ne gyae ɛ tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Masedonia tɛɛle keŋ pou dɔɔ nɛ. Mɔna de tebia, dɛɛ waase ŋon bo nyi yaa yɛɛ kela mena.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Ɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na ɛ ke kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man, na ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ ke nyii na ɔ wui. Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ kyaŋ ɛ wose yɛɛ tom, ŋgba mena keŋ dɔɔ wulaa wola ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Ɛ yɛɛ mena na, ɛ be gyae ɛ ka mo ɛ wose lɔ ŋolo dɔɔ ya. Kei gyae ke yela balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ kpuɛ na ŋon ya nɛ ke bu ŋon. De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu kabese kɔŋ

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: De tebia, lee balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ wose man nombia dɔɔ, dɔɔ ne gyae ɛ ke kyaa ditiŋtɛɛ man na ɛ ka yeyɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ baŋ be loo be gyakaa kolo dɔɔ nɛ ya.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ lɛɛ di nyi Yesu yeŋawɔ te Wurubuarɛ gyuusu e lee yeŋ man. Mena ke mɔ te dɛɛ lɛɛ di nyi wee keŋ Yesu waa bese kɔŋ na, Wurubuarɛ waa gyuusu baŋ pou bɔɔ lɛɛ e di pɛte bɔɔ yem nɛ lee yeŋ man na baa kpu na e.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan ɔ ba wolo te dɛɛ yako ŋon nɛ yɛna nyi wee keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, daa baŋ dɔɔ kaa te de sɛɛ de kyaa nyeedoŋ man nɛ, dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ taŋgbɛɛ baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ foŋ gyu ke gyaŋee na e ya.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu gbagba waa mo yeesa dinaa kolosi lee adido kɔŋ, te Wurubuarɛ kpilale kegyia ŋon mɔ waa mo yeesa kolosi, na baa wola Wurubuarɛ kaberɛ keŋ. Dekɔŋ mena na, balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ e di pɛte bɔɔ yem nɛ, baŋ ne gyae la baa taŋgbɛɛ foŋ lee yeŋ man.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Kenaŋ wɔle na, daa baŋ de sɛɛ de kyaa nyeedoŋ man debaŋ kenaŋ nɛ, baa mo daa na wɔ pou gyu adido ŋɔma man, na de kaa gyaŋee na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na daa na e ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ mo mena nombia kɛŋa do dɔŋa kakyeŋ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: De tebia, bɛɛ tekaa hia nyi ŋolo waa bese ŋmarase kolo lee debaŋ yaa wee keŋ mena nombia kɛŋa gyae kekɔŋ nɛ wose man nombia fa ŋon bela ya.

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ nyi wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, gyae ke yɛɛ bo ŋgba mena keŋ ŋmɛɛlate ne kɔŋ nelim nɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Mɔna de tebia, ɛmɛɛ ba tekaa doo ditiŋtɛɛ man, na wee kenaŋ kaa futaa ŋon ŋgba ŋmɛɛlate nɛ ya.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi ɛ popou yɛɛ keŋmaŋee man balaŋwɔ, te ɛ doo keŋmaŋee kenaŋ man. Dɔɔ tekaa yɛɛ ditiŋtɛɛ man balaŋ baŋ be dɔŋ ditiŋtɛɛ man nɛ ya.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi baŋ bee doo nɛ ne doo bo nelim, te baŋ mɔ bɛɛ dɛɛse nɛ ne dɛɛse bo balinɔɔ.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Mɔna keŋ daa doo keŋmaŋee man dɔɔ, ɛ yela dɛɛ kɛɛ da wose dɔɔ nideli na dɛɛ mo da kelɛɛdi na de balaŋ kegyae mo yɛɛ nyeele pampasaŋ mo gyee da wose ŋgba yoonɔɔtena nɛ, na dɛɛ mo da nyeekelɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ wuu da nyeeya dɔɔ ŋgba nyeele kotɔtɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ te baake daa nyi waa naase daa diyem ya, mɔna ɔ baake daa bo nyi dɛɛ ta de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ nyiŋ nyeekelɛɛ.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Ŋon de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yeŋa la fa daa, mena dɔɔ nyi de kyae na de sia yaa da yeŋae koraŋ na, daa na e pou dɛɛ kyaa.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ kolosi fa dɔŋa na ɛ ka do dɔŋa kakyeŋ, ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ ne taŋ yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: De tebia, nɛnɛɛ dɛɛ waase ŋon bo nyiaa, balaŋ baŋ de Gbeŋgyoo ba lese wɔ nyi baa yɛɛ ɛ siamantena, te bɛɛ yɛɛ ba tom na kakyeŋ kolosi fa ŋon nɛ, ɛ bu wɔ nideli.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyae wɔ na ɛ ke bu wɔ nideli lee ba tom keŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ, na ɛ ke kyaa wosefɛɛreŋ man na dɔŋa.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: De tebia, dee kolosi fa ŋon nyiaa, ɛ kolosi fa kebɔŋaletena baŋ. Ɛ kolosi do baŋ gyakoloŋ dana wɔ nɛ. Ɛ kyɔ baŋ bɔɔ dana doŋ ya nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ konɔɔ fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ nyi ŋolo na ŋolo na mo dukum tɔ dukum kom ya, mɔna ɛ yɛɛ deeli fa dɔŋa na balaŋ pou debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Ɛ kyaa gyoŋ man debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Ɛ fane debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Ɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ abɔɔ pou man debaŋ kamasɛ. Mena nombia kɛŋa te Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nyi yaa yɛɛ, nawolo nyi ɛmɛɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yɛɛ dokoloŋ.

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ gyoo nombia pou man kɛɛ, na ɛ ke kyaŋ ŋan dei nɛ man nideli.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee nombiikum kamasɛ man.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Wurubuarɛ e nɛ, nyi waa gberaa ɛ wose ayimɛɛ pou leki na waa yela ɛ gbɛɛneŋ ka tenee keŋ nombiikum daale na doo ɛ man ya, mo kelii wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ be baake ŋon nɛ, waa yela kekɔŋ mena nawolo nyi ɔ ne di ɔ nombia dɔɔ.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: De tebia, ɛ fane fa daa mɔ.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Ɛ do de tebia Kristotena baŋ pou nɔɔ nideli.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ waase ŋon de Gbeŋgyoo yele man nyiaa, ɛ kala tɔne kei fa ɛ tebia Kristotena baŋ pou.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl na Silase na Timoti gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa Tesalonika donɔɔ man, te ɛ yɛɛ de kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo balaŋwɔ nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: De tebia, kaboena nyi wee na wee na dɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ lee ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ŋgba mena keŋ kaboena nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ na bee kpu, te walaŋ kamasɛ mɔ balaŋ kegyae keŋ ɔ dana fa ɔ dɔɔ nɛ na bee kpu.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ dɛɛ tale gyɔ de konɔɔ kolosi ɛ wose man nombia Wurubuarɛ balaŋ man yenaŋ kamasɛ. Nawolo nyi ɛ kayeyɛɛ na ɛ diyem kena pou man koraŋ na, ɛ ne yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Kɛŋa pou na lese la wola nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia na ke gbɛɛ bo. Kei gyae ke yela ɛ ke kaboena Wurubuarɛ gyoori keŋ dɔɔ ɛ ne naa diyem nɛ man kagyoo.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ne di ɔ nombia na ke gbɛɛ, mena dɔɔ waa tɔ balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ naase ŋon diyem nɛ kom,

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: na waa yela daa baŋ de yɛɛ ɔ balaŋwɔ te dɛɛ naa diyem nɛ ke fɛɛfo wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na ɔ kpilala baŋ be dana doŋ te boalaŋ gyae ke kilisiwɔ lee adido kɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ e ya, te be ta mo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan yɛɛ kolo ya nɛ deŋele.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Waa wɔŋ mena balaŋ benaŋ deŋele, na baa naa diyem kekpaakekpaa. Keŋ kpuɛ bela yɛna nyi, waa lese wɔ lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu na ɔ gyoori dinaa keŋ man.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kenaŋ man keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ, ɔ balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ be baake wɔ te ɔ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ baa lese ɔ yele adido, na baŋ pou bɔɔ lɛɛ e di nɛ ke kɛlɛɛ e. Ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ ke kpu na wɔ, nawolo nyi ɛ lɛɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ di.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Lee mena nombia kɛŋa dɔɔ te dɛɛ fane fa ŋon debaŋ kamasɛ nɛ. Dɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ nyi waa yela ɛ ke kaboena ɔ kebaake keŋ ɔ be baake ŋon nɛ, na waa fa ŋon doŋ na ɛ ka mo tɔɔle nombia kpaakpaa ŋan pou ɛ ne gyae ɛ ke yɛɛ nɛ. Na ɛ ke tale yɛɛ tom keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ kelii ɔto lee mena keŋ ɛ ne lɛɛ e di nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: De kɔŋ mena na, de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele gyae ka koro adido. Balaŋ baa naa ɔ gyoori keŋ, te Yesu dɔɔ ɛmɛɛ mɔ ɛ yele gyae ka lee. Lee de kya Wurubuarɛ, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo bɛrɛɛ keŋ bɔɔ mo boele ŋon dɔɔ, baa yela kekɔŋ mena.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Me tebia, lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kabese kɔŋ na mena keŋ waa yilaa de popou mena wee kenaŋ nɛ man nombia yaa mɛɛ gyae maa lese wola ŋon nideli nɛ.

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baale dɔŋ bɛɛ yako nyiaa, de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu taŋ ke kɔŋ. Mena dɔɔ dɛɛ sola ŋon bo nyi, ɛ na yele mena nombia kɛŋa ke yela ɛ wɔe kelɔ ŋon ya. Nnɛ balaŋ baale te di dekara nyi daa kpa Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon yako na daa nombia kɛŋa te daa mɔ kaa yako ŋon yaa daa gbagba yako na ŋon nombia kɛŋa yaa daa gbagba ŋmarase na tɔne yelee ŋon nyi Yesu taŋ ke kɔŋ.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Waa gyina ɔ wose adido, na waa koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ na kpene kamasɛ keŋ balaŋ na som nɛ. Waa kaa kyaa Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man, na waa yako nyi ŋon yɛna Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Ɛ bɛɛ tɔɔse nyi debaŋ keŋ me kyaa ɛ gyaŋ na, mɛɛ kyaa yako ŋon mena nombia kɛŋa yee?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ ɛ gyeŋ kpene keŋ be kyaŋ e dɔɔse dɔɔ te ɔ te kɔŋa ta ya. Debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba see e nyi waa kɔŋ nɛ de lii na, waa kɔŋ.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Balaŋ taŋ ke fiasɛɛ bɛɛ lee Wurubuarɛ wɔle yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ weese. Mɔna pɛna nombii keŋ mɔɔ yako ŋon nyi gyae kekɔŋ nɛ ke kɔŋ na, kaboena nyi Wurubuarɛ waa lese walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tɔ ke gbɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Kenaŋ wɔle na te baa lese walaŋ ŋon ɔ bee di mmaraase dɔɔ ya nɛ debɔɔ. De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nɔɔman weesɛɛ te waa mo feefu e ko, na waa mo ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋalakee keŋ wɔlɛɛ e kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ bee di mmaraase dɔɔ ya na, waa mo ɔbɔnsam doŋ bo kɔŋ. Waa kaa beo yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia na nombia dinaana burum.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Waa mo nombiakumɛɛ kamasɛ beo baŋ pou baa yeŋ leki nɛ. Baa yeŋ leki kekpaa nawolo nyi ba te bɛɛ nyi bɔɔ lɛɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ, ŋan gyae ke yela Wurubuarɛ ke lɛɛ ba nyee nɛ do ya.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te yeli akɛrɛɛ nombia te kaa gyoo be man, te akɛrɛɛ nombia ŋaageŋ te bɛɛ lɛɛ di.

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ waa bu balaŋ baŋ pou ba te lɛɛ anokoare nombia ŋan di ya, te bɛɛ gyae akɛrɛɛ nombia bo nɛ fɔɔ.

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛmɛɛ de tebia baŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ne gyae ŋon nɛ dɔɔ, kaboena nyi debaŋ kamasɛ na dɛɛ fane fa Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee ɛ dɔɔ. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ wulaa lese ŋon see leenaŋ kewalaŋ keŋ nyi waa lɛɛ ɛ nyee. Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ ɔ feliŋ ŋon doŋ man te ɔ desina ŋon see, nawolo nyi ɛ lɛɛ nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ nɛ di.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ŋon Wurubuarɛ tɛɛ la nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ dɔɔ baake ŋon kɔŋ nyeedoŋ kei man, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo gyoori keŋ man.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: De tebia, lee mena dɔɔ ɛ seŋ keŋkeŋ na ɛ ke kyaŋ de nombia ŋan dɛɛ wola ŋon nɛ, na ŋan dee kolosi fa ŋon nɛ, na ŋan dɔɔ ŋmarase yelee ŋon nɛ man nideli.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: De kya Wurubuarɛ ne gyae daa, te ɔ tɛɛwɔ ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ do daa kakyeŋ kekpaakekpaa, te ɔ faa daa loo kegyakaa kpaakpaate. Dɛɛ solo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo gbagba na de kya Wurubuarɛ,

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: baa do ŋon kakyeŋ na baa fa ŋon doŋ na ɛ ke tale yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa lee ɛ kekolosi na ya abɔɔ ayɛɛsa pou man.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: De tebia, nombia ŋan be kaa mɛɛ gyae maa yako ŋon yɛna nyi ɛ fane fa daa, na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu nombia ŋan ke nyiŋ gbɛɛ yaasee bileŋbileŋ na balaŋ ke lɛɛ ŋa di obuo man ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ ŋa di obuo man nɛ.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Ɛ bese fane nyi Wurubuarɛ waa lese daa lee nombiakumɛɛ na balaŋ kumɛɛ nyiŋmaa man, nawolo nyi na balaŋ pou lɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ di ya.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ lɛɛ di lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu yele man nyi ɛ ne yɛɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ wola ŋon nɛ. Te dɛɛ lɛɛ di mɔ nyi ɛ ke yɛɛ mena kelii ɔto.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Dɛɛ sola de Gbeŋgyoo nyi waa desina ɛ konɔɔse na ɛ ka gyeŋ kegyae keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae ŋon nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ kayeyɛɛ man ŋgba mena keŋ Kristo mɔ be nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ nɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: De tebia, dɛɛ faree ŋon lee Yesu Kristo yele man nyiaa, Kristobaale kamasɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ kebɔŋalete e te ɔ nombia ayɛɛsa mɔ bɛɛ kyaa na nombia ŋan dɔɔ wola ŋon ya nɛ, ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ man.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ gbagba ɛ gyeŋ mena keŋ kaboena nyi yaa kasee daa, nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ de kyaa ɛ gyaŋ nɛ da te yɛɛ kebɔŋale ya.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te de te di ŋolo weenɛɛ yakaa keŋ nyi da te tɔ e kom ya. Mɔna de yase de sia kyaŋ da wose yɛɛ tom nideli nelim na ka weese, na dɔɔ nyiŋ bese kasolɔ ɛ man ŋolo dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: De te nyii nyi ɛ man balaŋ baale dɔŋɛɛ keŋ bɔɔ ne yɛɛ tom daale ya. Be dɔŋ bo bɛɛ do be nɔɔse balaŋ nombia man.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ dɛɛ faree mena balaŋ benaŋ te dɛɛ do wɔ kakyeŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yele man nyiaa, baa tisi kyaa ba mokɔɔ dɔɔ na baa yɛɛ tom na baa nyiŋ kolo do be nɔɔman.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: De tebia, ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ na yela nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ ke takaa ŋon ya.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Akpaa ŋolo te di de nombia ŋan doo tɔne kei man dɔɔ ya nɛ, ɛ mo ɛ sia gyakaa ɔ dɔɔ na ɛ ke wɔŋ ɛ wose lee ɔ man, na desɛŋ kenyiŋ kyaŋ e.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ na kɛɛ e nyi ɔ yɛɛ ɛ kɔlare e ya, ɛ faree e ŋgba ɛ dɔɔ Kristobaale nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ dɛɛ fane nyi Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ wosefɛɛreŋ Gbeŋgyoo e nɛ, waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ abɔɔ pou man debaŋ kamasɛ na waa kpu na ɛ popou.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl gyaŋ. Da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ, lese na maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ Kristo kpilale.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: Mɛɛ ŋmarase tɔne kei mee yelee nyaŋ Timoti ŋon lee Yesu Kristo kelɛɛdi man dɔɔ te n ba bese me bu gbagba nɛ. Mɛɛ fane nyi de kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele neŋ, na baa wii n waraŋase na baa fa neŋ wosefɛɛreŋ. Pɔɔl ke faree Timoti lee akɛrɛɛ wolala wose man

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Yako wɔ nyi be na wɔlɛɛ debaŋ na beneŋ beneŋ ŋɔla kegyɔ, na be naanaɔ kalola kegyakaare nombia kawola ya. Nawolo nyi kɛŋa pou na mo aŋmaareŋ bo kɔŋ, te ŋe bee yeli balaŋ ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii ya. N lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di na te nyaŋ ke tale yɛɛ ɔ kegyaebii.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baale ta yoo gbɛɛ lee abɔɔ kpaakpaa kɛŋa man te ba gyoo afa kumɛɛ keyɔɔ.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Bɛɛ gyae nyi baa bese Wurubuarɛ mmaraa wolala, mɔna kpene keŋ baŋ gbagba ne kolosi na nombia ŋan dɔɔ ba seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ bee kolosi nɛ bɔɔ gyeŋ ŋe man ya.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ nyi mmaraa dei. Akpaa ŋolo de di ke dɔɔ nideli na ke dei fa e.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ mɔ nyi ba te yɛɛ mmaraa bo fa balaŋ kpaakpaa ya. Mɔna be yɛɛ ke bo fa baŋ bɔɔ ne di mmaraase ŋan dɔɔ ya, na baŋ bɔɔ ne yɔkɔse ba wose ya, na baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya na nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra na baŋ ayimɛɛ doo ba wose man na baŋ bɔɔ ne sila Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ ya, na baŋ bɛɛ koe be kyaɔ yaa be naɔ nɛ na baŋ mɔ bɛɛ koe balaŋ nɛ,

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: na kafoŋtena na baala baŋ bee doo na dɔŋa, na baŋ bɛɛ mo balaŋ gyae kɔba, na akɛrɛɛtena na baŋ bɛɛ beo kaŋ ntamse, na kpene kamasɛ keŋ bɛɛ kyaa na kawola kpaakpaate keŋ ya nɛ.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba keŋ na me kolosi mmusuo nombia tia Yesu, te me naase ɔ kaseela baŋ diyem te me kɔla wɔ mɔ. Mɔna kɛŋa pou wɔle na Wurubuarɛ wii me waraŋase, nawolo nyi na mɔɔ gyeŋ keŋ mɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ ya te ma te lɛɛ Kristo mɔ di ya.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo moo ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ boele maŋ nideli, te ɔ yela me lɛɛ e di te ɔ moo ɔ kegyae keŋ do me man.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Kei yɛna anokoare nombii keŋ kaboena nyi walaŋ kamasɛ waa lɛɛ di. Nombii kenaŋ yɛna nyi, Kristo Yesu kɔŋae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ɔ kaa lɛɛ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra nyee. Maŋ Pɔɔl gba yɛna nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra pou nyee.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Mɔna lee mena nombii kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ wii me waraŋase, na Yesu Kristo ke nyiŋ ta maŋ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra pou nyee kei dɔɔ lese ɔ konɔɔ keŋ ɔ dana nɛ wola. Na ka ke yɛɛ kekasee nombii fa balaŋ baŋ pou baa kaa lɛɛ e di na baa nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Me bu Timoti, nombia ŋan mɔɔ mo do n nyiŋmaa man, na ŋan Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra be wulaa yako see lee n wose man nɛ, mena nombia ŋenaŋ pou yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Mena dɔɔ mo nombia ŋenaŋ tela ŋgba yoo abɔɔ nɛ, na n ka mo yoo na akɛrɛɛ nombia wolala baŋ.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Na tina n kelɛɛdi na n konɔɔ man nombia kpaakpaa ŋan yela ya. Baale te bɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa kɛŋa te be yela ba Kristo kelɛɛdi keŋ mɔ wɔlɛɛwɔ.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Balaŋ benaŋ baale yɛna Hameneyose na Alɛkesanda. Me ta mo wɔ fa ɔbɔnsam nyi waa wɔŋ ba deŋela na bɔɔ tekaa kolosi mmusuo nombia tia Wurubuarɛ bela ya.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kpene keŋ mɛɛ gyae ɛ ke taŋgbɛɛ yɛɛ yɛna nyi, mɛɛ waase ŋon nyi yaa fane fa walaŋ kamasɛ na ɛ ka sola Wurubuarɛ wosefɛɛreŋ fa wɔ. Ɛ sola Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ fa wɔ, na ɛ ke fa e karaŋ lee kpene kamasɛ keŋ ɔ ne yɛɛ fa wɔ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Mena nombia kɛŋa deila, te ŋɛɛ gyoo da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ ŋon sia.

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nyi waa lɛɛ walaŋ kamasɛ nyee na baa gyeŋ wa anokoare keŋ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ dokoloŋ kooŋ kyaa la, te walaŋ dokoloŋ kooŋ mɔ doo la Wurubuarɛ na balaŋ nsana. Ŋon yɛna Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Lee kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ lese maŋ nyi maa bese ɔ kpilale, na maa yako ɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan fa balaŋ baŋ ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ. Nombia ŋan mɛɛ yako nɛ te yɛɛ dekara ya.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ gyae nyi baala baa gyina ba nyiŋmaase ŋan ayimɛɛ be doo ŋe man ya nɛ adido, na baa fane debaŋ kamasɛ. Be na mo baŋ na aŋmaareŋ do ba kefane man ya.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te mɛɛ gyae nyi ala baa do abɔɔ ŋan kaboena nɛ, na baa desina ŋa nideli. Be na do ba nyeenyɔɔse adaose beiŋ ŋgba balaŋ yakaa nyibaŋ nɛ ya. Te be na mo kɔba abɔɔ na abɔɔ ŋan ŋa koya dana doŋ nɛ mia ba wose ŋgba mena keŋ tekaboena nɛ ya.

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: Mɔna baa yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan kaboena na balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ som Wurubuarɛ nɛ.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi ala baa yɔkɔse ba wose na baa kyaa yididi na baa kasee Wurubuarɛ nombia.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Mɔɔ ne fa ala gbɛɛ nyi baa wola yaa baa di doŋ baala dɔɔ ya. Kaboena nyi baa wuu be nɔɔ.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Adam te Wurubuarɛ taŋgbɛɛwɔ yɛɛ, pɛte ɔ yɛɛ Efa.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Na Adam te ɔbɔnsam beowɔ ya. Mɔna alo ŋon te ɔbɔnsam beowɔ te ɔ leewɔ Wurubuarɛ wɔle yɛɛ dukum.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa alo de kyaa ɔ kelɛɛdi man nideli na balaŋ kegyae te ayimɛɛ be doo ɔ konɔɔ man ya na, Wurubuarɛ waa lɛɛ e ɔ kalola man.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Ke yɛɛ ampaŋ nyi “Akpaa ŋolo ne gyae waa yɛɛ Kristotena kegyia na, tom kpaakpaate yaa ɔ ne gyae nɛ.”

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tale kɛɛ ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ dɔɔ nideli, te ɔ bia mɔ ne nyii ɔ dei nideli te bee bu e lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man.

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi akpaa ŋolo bɛɛ tale kɛɛ ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ dɔɔ nideli ya na, sena te waa tale kɛɛ Kristotena dikpii keŋ dɔɔ nideli?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋonaŋ na yɛɛ walaŋ wɔle ɔsom keŋ man ya. Na mena ya na waa gyina ɔ wose adido na waa yala, na Wurubuarɛ ke bu e fɔɔ ŋgba mena keŋ ɔbɔnsam be yɛɛ te Wurubuarɛ be bu e fɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ doo Kristo man koraŋ ya nɛ, baa baake Kristotena kegyia ŋonaŋ yele kpaakpaa, na ɔ be nyiŋ yala ɔbɔnsam kɔta man na desɛŋ kedi e ya.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Baa mo konɔɔ kpaakpaa kyaŋ anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola wɔ lee ba kelɛɛdi keŋ man nɛ nideli.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi Kristotena baa gyoo kegyiise baŋ man nideli, na baa kɛɛ nyi nombiikum kamasɛ be doo be man ya pɛna baa mo wɔ see kegyiise.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi kegyia wɛɛle dɛɛ yɛɛ dokoloŋ, te waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne tale kɛɛ ɔ bia na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ dɔɔ nideli.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Kegyiise baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ tom nideli nɛ, baa nyiŋ daseŋae kpaakpaa na baa nyiŋ doŋ mo di adansɛɛ lee ba kelɛɛdi keŋ doo Yesu Kristo man nɛ man.

english_verse: I hope to visit you soon. But I am writing these instructions,
translation_verse: Me loo gyakaa nyi be gyae ke kyare ya maa kɔŋ n gyaŋ. Te mɛɛ ŋmarase neŋ tɔne kei baa na,

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: nyi me dɔɔ wɔle koraŋ nɛ, tɔne kei gyae ke yela n ka gyeŋ mena keŋ kaboena nyi balaŋ baa kyaa Wurubuarɛ dekpaŋalaŋ man. Dekpaŋalaŋ kenaŋ man balaŋ yɛna Kristotena dikpii keŋ be yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ balaŋwɔ nɛ. Anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ, Kristotena dikpii kei yɛna ka mokɔɔ na ka tuula.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan ta tekaa yɛɛ nombia aweeseŋ dɔ ɔsom keŋ man ya nɛ, yɛɛ nombia ŋan ŋe dana yuŋ. Nombia kɛŋa te dɛɛ mo nɔɔdokoloŋ yako nyiaa, “Wurubuarɛ ta lese ɔ wose wola ŋgba deniwalaŋ nɛ. Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ta lese e wola nyi ɔ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman. Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ naa e, te Kristotena yako ɔ wose man nombia tɛɛle kei pou dɔɔ. Balaŋ lɛɛ e di tɛɛle kei pou dɔɔ, te Wurubuarɛ moo e gyu adido gyoorobiiri man.”

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon yakowɔ nideli nyiaa, tɛɛle kei da benaa kɔ ɔto na balaŋ baale baa tina Wurubuarɛ kelɛɛdi yela, na baa tei feliŋkumɛɛ na ɔbɔnsam dekarate ŋon nombia.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Mena kawola kɛŋa lee balaŋ baŋ be dɔŋɛɛ bɛɛ beo ba wose te bee dii akɛrɛɛ laŋ nɛ gyaŋ. Ba nyeeya ta yem ŋgba nyeela te ba moowɔ do boalaŋ man nyakee ŋa nɛ.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Bɛɛ tɔ balaŋ gbɛɛ nyi be na yale ya, te bɛɛ yako wɔ bela nyi be na di weenɛɛ ŋaale ya. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ weenɛɛ bo nyi balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ e di te ba gyeŋ anokoare keŋ nɛ, baa fane fa e karaŋ na baa di.

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi kpene kamasɛ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ na ke dei, te akpaa nyi de fane fa e karaŋ na tekaboena nyi dɛɛ bɛɛ ŋa ya.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan na kefane keŋ te desina ŋa.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Akpaa n mo mena nombia kɛŋa wola Kristotena na, n ke yɛɛ Yesu Kristo tobaale kpaakpaate ŋon bɔɔ mo kelɛɛdi na kawola kpaakpaate keŋ n silana nɛ kɛɛle e nɛ.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Lese n wose lee ŋɔla nombia na kawola ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ man, na n ke sila Wurubuarɛ ɔsom kpaakpaate keŋ gbɛɛ nideli na ka ke male neŋ.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te dɛɛ kyaŋ da wose yɛɛ tom nideli debaŋ kamasɛ, nawolo nyi de loo gyakaa Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ dɔɔ. Ŋon yɛna balaŋ pou nyeelɛɛre, tuturu na balaŋ baŋ pou bɛɛ lɛɛ e di nɛ.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Wola wɔ mena nombia kɛŋa, na n ke kɛɛ nyi walaŋ kamasɛ te kasee ŋa nideli.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Na yeli ŋolo na ŋolo ke kɛɛ neŋ nyi n yɛɛ bu e ya, mɔna yela n kekolosi na n dinɔɔ na n balaŋ kegyae na n kelɛɛdi na n kekyaa keŋ ayimɛɛ be doo n wose man ya nɛ, ka bese kolo kekasee fa balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di nɛ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Pɛte maa kɔŋ na, mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke yɛɛ kakyeŋ mo n debaŋ na n doŋ kala Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan balaŋ man, na n ke yako wɔ nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan, na n kawola wɔ ŋe man nideli.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Mo Wurubuarɛ kolo anefaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra be yako ke nombia, debaŋ keŋ kegyiise ba mo ba nyiŋmaase gyakaa n dɔɔ te n be nyim nɛ yɛɛ tom nideli.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Kɛɛ n dinɔɔ na n kawola man nideli. Yɛɛ kakyeŋ di ŋe dɔɔ debaŋ kamasɛ. Akpaa n yɛɛ mena na, n ke lɛɛ ɛmɛɛ na baŋ bee tei neŋ nɛ pou nyee.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Akpaa n ne kolosi na baala kegyiise nɛ, na fae wɔ ŋgba nya akoso nɛ ya mɔna kolosi na wɔ ŋgba n kyaɔ nɛ. Kolosi na tewulɛɛ mɔ ŋgba n kegyiise yaa n naabia nɛ.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: Kolosi na ala kegyiise ŋgba n naɔ nɛ, na n ke kolosi na alebia ŋgba n desina nɛ, keŋ n ba gyueŋ ba wose man agyueŋ kum kamasɛ ya.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa lialo ŋolo dana bia yaa naanasebia nɛ, kaboena nyi bia yaa naanasebia baŋ baa tela e nideli na ka lese be Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nombia ŋan bɔɔ kasee nɛ wola. Be yɛɛ mena nɛ, na bɛɛ tɔ be kyaɔ na be naanaɔ kom baa nawolo nyi mena te Wurubuarɛ ne gyae.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Lialo ŋon ɔ kyaa ɔ wose dɔɔ keŋ ɔ be dana walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne kɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ ya nɛ, ɔ na mo ɔ loo pou gyakaa Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ bo. Mena dɔɔ nelim na ka weese pou na ɔ gyakaa ɔ ne fane fa Wurubuarɛ nyi waa kɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Mɔna lialo ŋon ɔ ne gyae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyoŋ kedi nɛ dɔɔ ɔ dɔŋ bo yakaa keŋ ɔ be dana nyeedoŋ ya.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Kolosi nombia kɛŋa fa Kristotena baŋ, na ŋolo be nyiŋ nombiikum daale yako lee ba wose man ya.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ŋolo bɛɛ tale kɛɛ ɔ loŋtona dɔɔ ya, tuturu na ŋon gbagba ɔ denimantena dɔɔ ya nɛ, na nawolo baa nyi ɔ te tina ɔ Wurubuarɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ yela. Mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ gba kela walaŋ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ ya.

english_verse: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
translation_verse: Lialo ŋon ɔ te dii ta kela kulutooneŋ sɔŋotooro (

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Liala baŋ ba te ŋmɛɛ ta ya nɛ, na kala wɔ kpu mena liala dikpii kei man ya. Nawolo nyi yale de gyɔ wɔ loo kela ba kelɛɛdi keŋ na, baa lee Yesu Kristo wɔle na be kaa yala bela.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Kenaŋ wɔle na, bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ ba debaŋ yakaa na be dɔŋ na akpaŋalaŋ akpaŋalaŋ. Kei wɔle na, bɛɛ kolosi balaŋ wose man nombia na be dana ba wose bɛɛ yɛɛ abɔɔ ŋan tekaboena nyi baa yɛɛ ya nɛ, te bɛɛ kolosi nombia ŋan tekaboena nyi baa kolosi ya nɛ.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ mɛɛ gyae nyi liala baŋ be yɛɛ alebiawɔ nɛ, baa yala na baa lola bia na baa kɛɛ ba akpaŋalaŋse dɔɔ nideli. Be yɛɛ mena na, de kɔlala baŋ be gyae baa nyiŋ nombiikum kamasɛ kolosi lee da wose man ya.

english_verse: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi liala baale taŋ lee Wurubuarɛ wɔle gyu be silana ɔbɔnsam.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa Kristo alo ŋolo dana liala ɔ dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ, kaboena nyi waa kɛɛ be dɔɔ keŋ ɔ na mo wɔ lɔ Kristotena baŋ dɔɔ ya. Na Kristotena baŋ ke nyiŋ kɛɛ liala baŋ bɔɔ taŋ baŋ baa kɛɛ be dɔɔ ya nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Kristotena kegyiise baŋ be yɛɛ siamantenawɔ te bɛɛ yɛɛ ba tom nideli nɛ, kaboena nyi baa bu wɔ nideli. Tuturu na kegyiise baŋ bɛɛ kyaŋ ba wose kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan te bɛɛ wola balaŋ ŋe man nideli nɛ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ne yako daa nyiaa, “Wonembu ŋon ɔ ne tuku amɔla nɛ, bɔɔ ne bake ɔ nɔɔ ya. Mena mɔ te walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ tom na, kaboena nyi baa tɔ e kom.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ŋolo da mo nombiikum daale gyakaa kegyia ŋolo dɔɔ nɛ, ɛ na lɛɛ ke do ya. Gyisɛ ɛ be nyiŋ adansɛɛtena bala yaa batooro pɛna ɛ ke lɛɛ ke do.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ nɛ, ɛ lese si wɔ balaŋ nsana na gyakoloŋ ke nyiŋ gyoo balaŋ akaŋ baŋ mɔ.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ faree neŋ nideli lee Wurubuarɛ na Yesu Kristo na ɔ kpilala baŋ ɔ ba lese wɔ nɛ siaman nyiaa, kɛɛ nyi n te di mmaraase kɛŋa dɔɔ keŋ nyi n be gyae ŋolo kela ŋolo ya.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Na barase na n nyiŋmaa ka mo gyakaa balaŋ dɔɔ bileŋbileŋ nyi n na lese wɔ nyi baa yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ tom ya, te na mo n wose do balaŋ nombiakumɛɛ ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ man ya. Tela n wose nideli keŋ nyi n be yɛɛ nombiikum ya.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Lee n tɔɔ kawee na n kɛɛ wee bileŋbileŋ keŋ dɔɔ nɛ, na tekaa nyɔɔ loŋ kaageŋ ya mɔna nyɔɔ soloŋ kyomii kyomii.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baale wui nombiakumɛɛ na lee debɔɔ bileŋ pɛna baa di be nombia. Mɔna baale wui nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ ŋa weesɛɛ bo, wɔle wɔle pɛte na lee debɔɔ.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te nombia kpaakpaa keyɛɛ bɛɛ weese ya. Ŋan ŋa weesɛɛ koraŋ nɛ, ŋe gyae kaa lee debɔɔ.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ doo balaŋ tɛɛ nɛ, ɛ mo obuo fa ɛ gbeŋgyoona lee gbɛɛ kamasɛ man. Ɛ yɛɛ mena na ŋolo be nyiŋ kolosi nombiikum lee Wurubuarɛ na de kawola keŋ wose man ya.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ŋolo ɔ gbeŋgyoo yɛɛ Kristo baale e nɛ, ɔ na kɛɛ nyi keŋ be popou yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ dɔɔ ɔ be bu e nideli ya. Keŋ gba te kaboena nyi waa mo obuo fa e nideli nawolo nyi baŋ bee di ba tom tɔnɔɔ nɛ, be yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ te bɛɛ gyae be nombia mɔ. Mena nombia kɛŋa te kaboena nyi nya wola wɔ na n ka do wɔ kakyeŋ na baa di ŋe dɔɔ.

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ na wola nombia kpoo ŋan ŋɔɔ ne kyaa na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kawola keŋ na Wurubuarɛ ɔsom nombia ya nɛ,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: na mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne gyina ɔ wose adido te ɔ ba gyeŋ daale mɔ ya. Aŋmaareŋ kum na kale nombia ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ doo la ɔ kawola keŋ man. Kɛŋa na moona nombiakumɛɛ ŋgba balaŋ kekɔla na aŋmaareŋ kelɛɛ na daaworo na ɔmanso na balaŋ katee na nyeeman ditiŋtɛɛ na dɔŋa kekɔla nɛ kɔŋ.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ nyeeya ta yekee, mena dɔɔ te debaŋ kamasɛ na be dana nombia bɛɛ wɔŋee na dɔŋa. Anokoare be doo be man ya. Baŋ gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ ɔsom yɛɛ gbɛɛ keŋ baa mo nyiŋ kɔba.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa kyomii keŋ n dana te n yela ke da gyoo n sia na, Wurubuarɛ ɔsom dana tɔnɔɔ nideli fa neŋ.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi de ta mo kolo kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya, mena mɔ te dɔɔ gyae dɛɛ mo kolo lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyu ya.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Mɔna nyi akpaa de dana weenɛɛ na abɔɔ ŋan dɛɛ do na, kaboena nyi ŋe dɛɛ gyoo de sia.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ gyae kɔba beiŋ nɛ ne yale kekɛɛsekɛɛ na ɔbɔnsam kɔta man, te ne yeli bɛɛ yɛɛ abɔɔ nkaraŋkaraŋ na be ta yoo lee Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ man na ba te wɔlɛɛ kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Nyi walaŋ de yase ɔ sia do kɔba kegyae dɔɔ beiŋ man na, na mo e gyu dukum man. Baale te sila kɔba kegyae beiŋ kei te be tinaa ba kelɛɛdi keŋ yela, te ba moo ba wose do kayeyɛɛ dinaa man. Pɔɔl kekolosi fa Timoti

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Mɔna nyaŋ Wurubuarɛ walaŋ dɔɔ yeu lee mena nombia kɛŋa pou man, na n ke sila nombia ŋan ŋa tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman nɛ na Wurubuarɛ ɔsom kpaakpaate, na nombia ŋan n be lɛɛ di nɛ na balaŋ kegyae na n ke yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ, na n ke bu n wose debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Yoo keŋ n ne yoo nyi keŋ n be lɛɛ Kristo di dɔɔ nɛ, seŋ keŋkeŋ na n ke yoo ke nideli na n ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ. Kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ lɔɔ yele baake neŋ, debaŋ keŋ n be gyuusu n nɔɔ kolosi n kelɛɛdi keŋ nombia balaŋ burum siaman nɛ.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Ma seŋɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne fa kpene kamasɛ nyeedoŋ nɛ, na Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ be di Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan adansɛɛ kegyia Pɔntiɔse Pilato gyaŋ nyi ŋe yɛɛ anokoare nɛ siaman mɛɛ yako neŋ nyiaa,

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ waageŋ kaboela nyi dɛɛ lese ɔ yele. Nawolo nyi ŋon waageŋ yɛna doŋ pou nyee, na gyooneŋ pou Gyoo na gbeŋgyoona pou Gbeŋgyoo. Ŋon ne gyae la waa yela Yesu Kristo kabese kɔŋ wee keŋ ŋon gbagba ba see nɛ man.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Ŋon waageŋ kyaa la kekpaakekpaa te ɔ bɛɛ yem ya, te ɔ kyaa keŋmaŋee keŋ walaŋ bɛɛ tale benaa ke ya nɛ man. Ŋon te walaŋ te naa ta e see ya, te ŋolo mɔ be gyae waa tale naa e ya. Ŋon danaana doŋ keŋ be taŋ ɔto ya, te ɔ kaboena nyi baa lese ɔ yele debaŋ kamasɛ. Amɛn.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Faree balaŋ baŋ be dana ba wose tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ nyi be na gyina ba wose adido ya te be na mo be loo gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan be dana nɛ dɔɔ ya, nawolo nyi ŋɔɔ gyae ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa ya. Mɔna kaboena nyi baa mo be loo pou gyakaa Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ ne fa daa abɔɔ pou te ne yɛɛ daa gyoŋ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Faree wɔ nyi baa yɛɛ deeli, na baa yela be deeli keyɛɛ keŋ ka bo. Baa yɛɛ wɔe na baa nyiŋ tale mo ba abɔɔ ŋan be dana nɛ ŋaale fa balaŋ.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa be yɛɛ kɛŋa na, bɛɛ yɛɛ bo see ba wose wee daale. Kei man te baa tale mo nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoti, kɛɛ kpene keŋ bɔɔ mo do n nyiŋmaa man nɛ dɔɔ nideli. Lese n wose lee afa kumɛɛ keyɔɔ na aŋmaareŋ yakaa yakaa ŋan balaŋ ne baake nyi nyansa nombia nɛ man.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi balaŋ baale kpa be dana mena nyansa kei, mena dɔɔ te yeli be ta yoo lee ba kelɛɛdi man. Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon. Amɛn.

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ fane na, mɛɛ tɔɔse neŋ te mɛɛ fa Wurubuarɛ mɔ karaŋ. Mɛɛ som e lee me konɔɔ kpaakpaa man ŋgba mena keŋ me naanaɔ be yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ tɔɔse debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ tina neŋ yela te n be wii nɛ. Mena dɔɔ me loo gyakaa nyi maa naa neŋ na me wɔe ke fɛɛ maŋ.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ tɔɔse mena keŋ n ba mo n konɔɔ pou lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di ŋgba mena keŋ n naana alo Lɔise na n naa Yunisi be lɛɛ di nɛ. Ma gyeŋ mɔ nyi nyaŋ mɔ n sɛɛ n dana mena kelɛɛdi kenaŋ.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ tɔɔse neŋ nyiaa, kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo fa neŋ debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ mo me nyiŋmaa gyakaa n dɔɔ nɛ, kɛɛ na n ke kyaŋ ke nideli keŋ kɔɔ lee n nyiŋmaa man ya.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Na yeli desɛŋ ke kyaŋ neŋ lee de Gbeŋgyoo nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan keyako man ya. Mena mɔ te na yeli desɛŋ ke kyaŋ neŋ nyi ba te kyaŋ maŋ do deni man ya. Mɔna lee Wurubuarɛ doŋ keŋ dɔɔ, nyaŋ mɔ yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kena diyem nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan keyako man ŋgba maŋ nɛ.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Ŋon Wurubuarɛ lɛɛ na da nyee, te ɔ baake daa nyi de kaa bese ɔ bia. Na de nombia ŋan dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ te ɔ baake daa ya, mɔna lee mena keŋ ŋon gbagba be wulaa yako see dɔɔ te ɔ boele daa. Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ ɔ bu Yesu Kristo dɔɔ mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ kei boele daa pɛte ɔ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Mɔna nɛnɛɛ ɔ ta lese ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ wola lee da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo kekɔŋ man. Ŋon diina yeŋ dɔɔ te ɔ tɛɛwɔ nyeekelɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan dɔɔ wola daa gbɛɛ keŋ dɛɛ mo nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ lese na maŋ nyi maa yɛɛ ɔ kpilale na maa ta kolosi na maa wola ɔ nombia ŋan.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Lee kei dɔɔ te mɛɛ naa diyem ma anenaaŋ kei. Mɔna desɛŋ be dana maŋ ya, nawolo nyi ma gyeŋ walaŋ ŋon mɔɔ lɛɛ e di. Te mɛɛ lɛɛ di nideli mɔ nyi waa tale kɛɛ kpene keŋ mɔɔ mo do e ɔ nyiŋmaa maŋ nɛ dɔɔ nideli kelii wee keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Tela nombia kpaakpaa ŋan n be nyii lee me gyaŋ nɛ nideli, na n ka mo ŋa yɛɛ gbɛɛ keŋ nyaŋ ke sila. Tela kelɛɛdi na balaŋ kegyae keŋ dɔɔ nyim lee Kristo Yesu dɔɔ nɛ nideli.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Tela kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ doo de man ba do n nyiŋmaa man nɛ nideli.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: N gyeŋ nyi Kristotena baŋ bɔɔ lee Esia tɛɛle man nɛ pou te bɛɛ maŋ. Be man baale yɛna Figeluse na Hɛmogenese.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Mɔna Onesiforuse dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ waa wii ŋon na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋmantena pou waraŋase, nawolo nyi ɔ ne yeli ma wose ne fɛɛ maŋ te bɛɛ yɛɛ e desɛŋ gba nyi ba te kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni ya.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Kenaŋ wɔle koraŋ na ɔ ka gyoo Roman donɔɔ man na ɔ yɛɛ kakyeŋ kɛo maŋ kaboena ɔ naa maŋ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ waa yela de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu ke wii ɔ waraŋase ɔ wee dinaa keŋ waa bese kɔŋ nɛ man. N gyeŋ mena keŋ ɔ be kyɔ maŋ lee gbɛɛneŋ burum man debaŋ keŋ me kyaa Efeso donɔɔ man nɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me bu Timoti, sola Wurubuarɛ na waa ta Yesu Kristo bɛrɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ yela n ka seŋ keŋkeŋ.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Nombia ŋan mɔɔ wola neŋ balaŋ burum siaman nɛ, mo ŋa do balaŋ baŋ n ne lɛɛ wɔ di nɛ nyiŋmaa man, na baŋ mɔ ke tale mo wola balaŋ wɔlɛɛ.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: N nyiŋa n yɛɛ Yesu Kristo yoonɔɔte kpaakpaate e nɛ, yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kena diyem ŋgba daa nɛ.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Wɔɔfarale ŋon ɔ yɛɛ ɔ tom nideli na, ŋon te kaboena nyi waa taŋgbɛɛ di ɔ wɔɔ keŋ man weenɛɛ.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Gyueŋ nombia ŋan mɛɛ yako neŋ nɛ man, nawolo nyi de Gbeŋgyoo waa yela n ke nyii nombia ŋenaŋ pou man nideli.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Na wolee Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ ba lee gyoo Defidi loŋtoro man, te Wurubuarɛ be gyuusu e lee yeŋ man nɛ nombia ya. Kei yɛna Wurubuarɛ nombii kpaakpaa keŋ me dɔŋ mee kolosi nɛ.

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: Keŋ mɔ dɔɔ te mɛɛ naa diyem, te be kyaŋa maŋ ketɔ deni te ba doo maŋ agbaraagbaraase ŋgba nombiakumɛɛyɛɛre nɛ. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ, ŋolo be tale do ŋa agbaraagbaraase ya.

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
