translation_verse: Kei dɔɔ te mɛɛ yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ me diyem kena man lee balaŋ baŋ Wurubuarɛ be wulaa lese wɔ see nɛ dɔɔ. Na Wurubuarɛ keta Yesu Kristo dɔɔ lɛɛ ba nyee na baŋ mɔ kenyiŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri keŋ ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Nombia ŋan bɔɔ yako see nɛ yɛɛ ampaŋ. Be yakowɔ nyi, “Akpaa daa na Kristo ta yem na, daa na e dɛɛ kyaa bela.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Akpaa de yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ da diyem kena man na, dee kpu na e di gyoori. Te akpaa de bɛɛ e na, ŋon mɔ waa bɛɛ daa.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Akpaa daa bɛɛ lɛɛ di ya na, ŋon dɔɔ waa di ɔ nombia dɔɔ nawolo nyi ɔ bɛɛ yako nombii bese lee ke wɔle ya.” Tomyɛɛre kpaakpaate ŋon Wurubuarɛ be lɛɛ e do

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ na tɔɔse Kristotena baŋ nombia kɛŋa na n ke faree wɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman nyiaa, baa tina nombia kewɔŋee yela nawolo nyi ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya. Mɔna ŋɛɛ wɔlɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bee tei wɔ nɛ bo.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n ke nyiŋ yele Wurubuarɛ siaman, ŋgba tomyɛɛre kpaakpaate ŋon ɔ bee di desɛŋ ɔ tom keyɛɛ man ya nɛ. Kaboena nyi nya tale wola nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan ŋe yɛɛ anokoare nombia ŋa nɛ man nideli.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Lese n wose lee nombia ŋan ŋa te yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii ya nɛ afa keyɔɔ man. Nawolo nyi ŋɛɛ desina bo wɔlɛɛ walaŋ na Wurubuarɛ nsana.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Ba afa ŋan bɛɛ yɔɔ nɛ, ne yaasee bo ŋgba kawee kum nɛ. Balaŋ benaŋ man baale yɛna Hameneyose na Filetuse.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ ta yoo lee anokoare gbɛɛ keŋ man. Bɛɛ wola balaŋ nyi debaŋ keŋ balaŋ baa foŋ lee yeŋ man nɛ taŋ ke kɔŋ laŋ, mena dɔɔ ba te yeli baale ta lee wɔle ba kelɛɛdi man wɔlɛɛ.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ anokoare keŋ seŋɛɛ keŋkeŋ keŋ nyi kolo be tale wosi ke ya. Nombia kɛŋa te ba moowɔ tɔ ke nɔɔ. Nombia ŋenaŋ yɛna nyiaa, “Wurubuarɛ gyeŋ balaŋ baŋ be yɛɛ ɔ wui.” “Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ be lɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu di na, kaboena nyi waa lese ɔ wose lee nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ man.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Dekpaŋalaŋ dinaa kamasɛ man na, be dana kuruwaase kpookpoo. Kɔba yayam na kɔba wolom wui doo, te ŋan bɔɔ mo tɛɛle na daase yɛɛ ŋa mɔ nɛ doo. Bɛɛ mo ŋaale do weenɛɛ debaŋ kamasɛ, te bɛɛ mo ŋaale bo see daa wee dinaa.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te nyaŋ walaŋ ŋon n lese n wose lee nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ man na, Wurubuarɛ waa mo neŋ yɛɛ kolo kpaakpaa. Nawolo nyi nyaŋ walaŋ ŋonaŋ wose taŋ ayimɛɛ ya. N wose dana tɔnɔɔ fa n Gbeŋgyoo te n te desina n wose fa tom kpaakpaa kamasɛ keyɛɛ.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Lese n wose lee aŋmaareŋ ŋan ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ ya nɛ man, nawolo nyi n gyeŋ nyi ŋɛɛ mo kale bo kɔŋ.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Tekaboena nyi de Gbeŋgyoo tobaale waa mo ɔ wose do kale nombia man korakora ya. Mɔna kaboena bo nyi waa yɛɛ deeli fa walaŋ kamasɛ, na waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia kawola, te ɔ ne nyiŋ konɔɔ fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi waa nyiŋ konɔɔ na waa kolosi fa balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ e aŋmaareŋ nɛ. Na waa gyakaa loo nyi mberem Wurubuarɛ waa yela baa kyɛɛkee be konɔɔse, na baa gyeŋ anokoare keŋ.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Kei gyae ke yela be sia ke ŋmaŋee wɔ, na baa yeu lee ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ be di be dɔɔ te ɔ ne yeli bɛɛ yɛɛ ɔ kegyaebii nɛ kɔta man.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Me bu Timoti, tɔɔse nyi tɛɛle kei da benaa kɔ ɔto nɛ kayeyɛɛ gyae kekɔŋ.

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi balaŋ baa gyae baŋ baageŋ wui bo na kɔba kegyae, na baa gyina ba wose adido na baa wola ba wose na baa tee balaŋ yakaa yakaa. Baa yɛɛ deŋele doŋ ba lolala dɔɔ te baa yɛɛ boniayɛtena te bɔɔ gyae baa gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya.

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: Balaŋ kegyae be gyae ke doo be man ya, te bɔɔ gyae baa mo nombia kyɛɛ ya. Baa tao balaŋ kelabere te bɔɔ gyae baa tale di ba wose dɔɔ ya. Baa yɛɛ akpanyaŋnyaŋ te bɔɔ gyae baa gyae kolo kpaakpaa mɔ ya.

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: Baa lese dɔŋa fa na baa barase yɛɛ abɔɔ. Baa gyina ba wose adido beiŋ na baa gyae tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyoŋ kedi kela Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: Baa gyae Wurubuarɛ ɔsom keŋ nombia na be sia, mɔna be konɔɔse man na bɔɔ ne lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ doŋ keŋ di ya. Mena dɔɔ lese n wose lee mena balaŋ benaŋ man.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Mena balaŋ benaŋ baale dɔŋɛɛ la na akpaŋalaŋ akpaŋalaŋ bɛɛ beo ala baŋ bɔɔ ne tale kyaŋ ba wose ya te nombiakumɛɛ be wulu wɔ, te lookum dɔɔ bee sila gbɛɛ kum kamasɛ nɛ.

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kamasɛ na mena balaŋ kɛwɔ ne kasee nombia, mɔna bɔɔ gyae baa gyeŋ anokoare keŋ ya.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Mena keŋ Gyanese na Gyamberese ba seŋ tia Mosesi nɛ, mena ke yaa balaŋ kɛwɔ mɔ na sem tia anokoare nombia ŋan. Be yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ ba nyeeya man nombia be wɔlɛɛ te bɔɔ dana daseŋae kelɛɛdi keŋ man ya.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Mɔna bɔɔ gyae baa lii lem ya te be diyiŋ nombia ŋan gyae ka lee debɔɔ, na walaŋ kamasɛ kena ŋgba mena keŋ be yɛɛ Gyanese na Gyamberese nɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Mɔna nyaŋ dɔɔ n gyeŋ me kawola na me dinɔɔ na nombia ŋan dɔɔ ma seŋɛɛ nɛ, na ma kelɛɛdi na me konɔɔ kenyiŋ na me balaŋ kegyae na me kakyeŋ keŋ me dana,

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Ampaŋ yaa mɛɛ yako neŋ n ke nyii nyiaa, walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne gyae nyi waa yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii lee de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo yele man nɛ, balaŋ baa naase e diyem.

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: Te balaŋ kumɛɛ na baŋ bɛɛ beo balaŋ nɛ, baa bese yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ kpu. Baa beo balaŋ na balaŋ mɔ ka beo wɔ.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Mɔna nyaŋ dɔɔ kyaŋ kpene keŋ n be kasee te n be lɛɛdi nɛ man nideli, nawolo nyi n gyeŋ balaŋ baŋ gyaŋ n be kasee mena nombia ŋenaŋ lee.

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi leenaŋ n biatɛɛ te n wulaa kasee Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan gyae ke yela n ka gyeŋ nyansa na n ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ lee Yesu Kristo kelɛɛdi man nɛ.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan pou lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ, te ŋe dei fa nombia kawola na nombia kalese si walaŋ, na nombia kedesina na mena keŋ n ka wola walaŋ kolo lee Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii man.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Timoti, tɔɔse nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri man na ɔ kaa di balaŋ baŋ be kyaa na be sia, na baŋ bɔɔ yekee nɛ pou nombia. Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ faree neŋ nideli lee Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo siaman nyiaa,

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan fa balaŋ. Yɛɛ kakyeŋ kolosi ŋa debaŋ kamasɛ. Kolosi fa wɔ na n ka wola wɔ gbɛɛ keŋ kaboena nyi baa mo, na n ka lese nombiakumɛɛ ŋan balaŋ ne yɛɛ nɛ si wɔ, na n ka do wɔ kakyeŋ na n ke nyiŋ konɔɔ fa wɔ lee n kawola keŋ man.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi debaŋ daale gyae kekɔŋ keŋ balaŋ baa bɛɛ nyi bɔɔ tei nombia kpaakpaa ŋan ya. Te lee mena keŋ ba deŋela man na toree wɔ dɔɔ nɛ, baa ta yilaa akɛrɛɛ wolala na be kaa kolosi nombia ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae nyi baa nyii nɛ fa wɔ.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Baa bɛɛ anokoare keŋ kenyii, na baa tei ŋɔla nombia.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Mɔna nyaŋ Timoti dɔɔ, yela n sia ke doo tɛɛle man na n ke yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ diyem kamasɛ man. Yɛɛ tom keŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia kolosire ne yɛɛ nɛ, na n ke yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom tom keŋ nideli kelii ɔto.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi maŋ Pɔɔl dɔɔ, ma debaŋ te lii nyi baa kyɛɛkee me fatabo leki ŋgba mena keŋ bee deesi te bɛɛ toosi soloŋ woli nɛ. Ma debaŋ te lii nyi maa lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Ma te yoo yoo kpaakpaa keŋ taŋ, te ma te yeu keyeu keŋ mɔ kelii ɔto. Ma te kyaŋ ma kelɛɛdi keŋ man mɔ kelii ɔto.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ ne di nombia na ŋe gbɛɛ nɛ, te desina gyooro kotɔtɔɔ keŋ nawolo nyi me gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ nɛ see na waa mo tɔ maŋ kom. Na maageŋ te waa yɛɛ mena fa ya, mɔna baŋ pou bee gyeki ɔ kabese kɔŋ nɛ mɔ kpuɛ.

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Timoti, yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kekɔŋ me gyaŋ bileŋ,

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: nawolo nyi keŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae loo doo Demase man dɔɔ nɛ, ɔ te tina maŋ yela laŋ Tesalonika donɔɔ man. Kiresɛnse te lam Galatia donɔɔ man, te Tituse mɔ te lam Dalematia donɔɔ man.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka waageŋ kyaa la me gyaŋ. N ne kɔŋ na mo Maake kpu na n wose kɔŋ, nawolo nyi ɔ ne kyɔ maŋ ma Wurubuarɛ tom keyɛɛ man.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Me te kpila Tikikuse nyi waa gyu Efeso donɔɔ man.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Akpaa n ne kɔŋ na, mo ma kegba wurikyim keŋ mɔɔ tina yela Kapuse gyaŋ Torase donɔɔ man nɛ na me tɔna ŋan kɔna maŋ. Tuturu na mo tɔna ŋan bɔɔ mo wonembu tɔne yɛɛ ŋa nɛ kɔna maŋ.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Alɛkesanda ŋon ɔ yɛɛ luure e nɛ, te yɛɛ maŋ nombiikum daale. De Gbeŋgyoo waa tɔ e kom lee nombiikum keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ maŋ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kɛɛ n wose man nideli na e, nawolo nyi ɔ bɛɛ gyae de nombia kpaakpaa ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ korakora ya.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Me nombia kedi gyaŋgbate keŋ man nɛ walaŋ na walaŋ ta sem me wɔle ya, be popou bɛɛ maŋ bo. Mɛɛ sola Wurubuarɛ nyi ɔ na mo mena nombia kɛŋa tɔ wɔ kom ya.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Mɔna de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu seŋawɔ me wɔle, te ɔ doo maŋ kakyeŋ te me kolosi ɔ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan fa baŋ pou ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, te be nyiiwɔ te Wurubuarɛ lese maŋ lee yeŋ man.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ de Gbeŋgyoo waa lese maŋ lee dukum kamasɛ man, na waa mo maŋ gyu ɔ gyoori keŋ man adido wosefɛɛreŋ man. Ŋon te kaboena nyi baa lese ɔ yele kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ do Pirisila na Akuila na Onesiforuse na ɔ dekpaŋalaŋmantena pou nɔɔ.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasituse kyaa Korinto donɔɔ man, te me te tina Tirofimuse ŋon ɔ na wee nɛ yela Miletuse donɔɔ man.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kekɔŋ pɛna waare debaŋ keŋ kelii. Ubuluse na Pudense na Linuse na Klɔɔdia na de tebia Kristotena baŋ pou na do neŋ nɔɔ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa kpu na neŋ, na Wurubuarɛ ka mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ boele ŋon.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: Mɛɛ ŋmarase tɔne kei mee yelee nyaŋ Tituse ŋon mɔɔ mo neŋ ŋgba me bu gbagba nɛ. Nawolo nyi Kristo te daa na neŋ pou lɛɛwɔ di. De kya Wurubuarɛ na da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele neŋ na baa fa neŋ wosefɛɛreŋ. Tituse keyɛɛ tom Kreti tɛɛle man

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Kpene keŋ dɔɔ te mɔɔ tina neŋ yela Kreti tɛɛle man yɛna nyi, mɛɛ gyae na n kenyiŋ desina abɔɔ ŋan be kaa na kedesina nɛ nideli, na n ka lese kegyiise fa donɔɔ kamasɛ ŋgba mena keŋ mɔɔ wola neŋ nɛ.

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: Kaboena nyi Kristotena kegyia waa yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ wose man be dana nombiikum kamasɛ ya. Ɔ wɛɛle dɛɛ yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Kaboena nyi ɔ bia mɔ baa yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ Yesu di te bee bu balaŋ, te ba wose man be dana nombiikum daale keŋ balaŋ baa naa kolosi ya.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Baŋ Kretitena benaŋ gbagba be kegyia ŋolo yako ba wose man nombia nyiaa, “Kretitena yɛɛ akɛrɛɛtenawɔ. Be dana akpanyaŋnyaŋ ŋgba wonembu kum nɛ, te be yɛɛ kebɔŋaletena na diirawɔ.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Mena nombii keŋ ɔ be yako nɛ yɛɛ ampaŋ, mena dɔɔ faree Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Kreti tɛɛle dɔɔ nɛ nideli nyi baa kyaŋ ba Kristo kelɛɛdi keŋ man nideli.

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: Na baa tina Gyudatena beneŋ nombia ŋan ŋa te yɛɛ ampaŋ ya, na balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ ne lɛɛ anokoare keŋ di ya nɛ mmaraase dɔɔ kedi yela.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
translation_verse: Bɛɛ gyɔ be konɔɔ yako nyi ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ, mɔna be nombia ayɛɛsa bɛɛ wolo nyi ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya. Be yɛɛ balaŋ kumɛɛwɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman te bɔɔ ne bu e ya. Ba tekaboena nombii kpaakpaa mɔ keyɛɛ ya.

english_verse: Titus, you must teach only what is correct.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ dɔɔ wola wɔ anokoare nombia ŋan ne kyaa na Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan nɛ.

english_verse: Tell the older women to behave as those who love the Lord should. They must not gossip about others or be slaves of wine. They must teach what is proper,
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te wola ala kegyiise baŋ nyi baa kyaa ŋgba balaŋ baŋ bee yee Wurubuarɛ nɛ. Be na yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bee kolosi balaŋ wose man nombia ya, te be na yɛɛ soloŋnyɔɔra ya. Mɔna kaboena bo nyi baa wola nombia kpaakpaa.

english_verse: so the younger women will be loving wives and mothers.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa be yɛɛ mena na, baa tale wola alebia mɔ na baa gyae be baala na be bia nombia,

english_verse: Each of the younger women must be sensible and kind, as well as a good homemaker, who puts her own husband first. Then no one can say insulting things about God's message.
translation_verse: na baa gyeŋ ba wose katela keŋ bɔɔ wɔlɛɛ ba wose ya. Na baa yɛɛ ala yalala kpaakpaa nyibaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ deeli, te bɛɛ yɔkɔse ba wose fa be baala. Dekɔŋ mena na, ŋolo be gyae waa nyiŋ nombiikum daale kolosi lee Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan wose man ya.

english_verse: Tell the young men to have self-control in everything.
translation_verse: Mena ke te do tewulɛɛ mɔ kakyeŋ na baa tale di ba wose dɔɔ.

english_verse: Tell slaves always to please their owners by obeying them in everything. Slaves must not talk back to their owners
translation_verse: Wola tewulɛɛ na alebia nyi baa yɔkɔse ba wose fa be gbeŋgyoona lee kpene kamasɛ man, na baa yɛɛ kpene keŋ gyae ka gyoo be gbeŋgyoona baŋ sia. Be na kolosi na be gbeŋgyoona baŋ kyɛɛkyɛɛ ya.

english_verse: or steal from them. They must be completely honest and trustworthy. Then everyone will show great respect for what is taught about God our Savior. God's Kindness and the New Life
translation_verse: Be na ŋmɛɛle be gbeŋgyoona baŋ kolo ya. Mɔna baa yɛɛ kpene keŋ gyae ke yela be gbeŋgyoona baŋ ke lɛɛ wɔ di nideli. Na be nombia ayɛɛsa pou ke yela da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan bɛɛ wolo nɛ kegyɔ balaŋ loo.

english_verse: God has shown us undeserved grace by coming to save all people.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ ta lese ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ gyae ke yela balaŋ ke nyiŋ nyeedoŋ nɛ wola balaŋ pou.

english_verse: We are filled with hope, as we wait for the glorious return of our great God and Savior Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela dɛɛ yɛɛ mena debaŋ keŋ de kyaa dɛɛ daa Wurubuarɛ na da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo kabese kɔŋ ɔ gyoorobiiri man keŋ dɔɔ de loo gyakaa nɛ.

english_verse: He gave himself to rescue us from everything evil and to make our hearts pure. He wanted us to be his own people and to be eager to do right.
translation_verse: Yesu moona ɔ wose fa nyi baa ko na waa mo tɔ da nyeeman kom lɛɛ daa lee de nombiakumɛɛ pou man. Na dɛɛ bese balaŋ baŋ de yɛɛ ŋon waageŋ wui, na waa desina daa na dɛɛ tale yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa.

english_verse: Remind your people to obey the rulers and authorities and not to be rebellious. They must always be ready to do something helpful
translation_verse: Tɔɔse Kristotena baŋ nyi baa yɔkɔse ba wose fa gyooneŋ na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ kegyiise, na baa di kegyiise baŋ mmaraase dɔɔ, na baa doo ba wose dɔɔ na abɔɔ kpaakpaa nyiŋan keyɛɛ debaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: We used to be stupid, disobedient, and foolish, as well as slaves of all sorts of desires and pleasures. We were evil and jealous. Everyone hated us, and we hated everyone.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi nafɔ gyaŋgba keŋ na daa mɔ yɛɛ ayiŋtenawɔ te de yɛɛ deŋele doŋ te da yoo gbɛɛ. Da abɔɔ ŋan dɛɛ gyae, na tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ kegyae dii da nyeeya. Da kekyaabii man na, de dana agyueŋ kumɛɛ na sibii. Balaŋ kɔla daa te daa mɔ kɔla wɔ.

english_verse: God our Savior showed us how good and kind he is.
translation_verse: Mɔna debaŋ keŋ da nyeelɛɛre Wurubuarɛ ba lese ɔ deeli na ɔ balaŋ kegyae keŋ debɔɔ nɛ,

english_verse: He saved us because of his mercy, and not because of any good things we have done. God washed us by the power of the Holy Spirit. He gave us new birth and a fresh beginning.
translation_verse: ɔ lɛɛ da nyee. Kei te yɛɛ nyi daa gbagba tom kpaakpaa keŋ dɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ te ɔ lɛɛ da nyee ya, mɔna ɔ wii de waraŋase bo te ɔ tɛɛwɔ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon dɔɔ saase de nombiakumɛɛ pou leki, te ɔ yela de dinɔɔ kyɛɛkeewɔ ŋgba ba bese yaa lola daa wɔle nɛ.

english_verse: God sent Jesus Christ our Savior to give us his Spirit.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ da nyeelɛɛre Yesu Kristo dɔɔ yela ɔ feliŋ ŋon ka kyaawɔ de man nideli.

english_verse: Jesus treated us much better than we deserve. He made us acceptable to God and gave us the hope of eternal life.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ yɛɛwɔ mena na ke yela waa lɛɛ daa do, na dee nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaakekpaa keŋ de loo gyakaa ke dɔɔ nɛ, lee ɔ bɛrɛɛ keŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: This message is certainly true. These teachings are useful and helpful for everyone. I want you to insist that the people follow them, so that all who have faith in God will be sure to do good deeds.
translation_verse: Mena nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ ampaŋ te mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke yase n sia wola ŋe man nideli. Kei gyae ke yela baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di nɛ ke kyaŋ ba wose yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa. Nawolo nyi mena nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋa, te ŋe dana tɔnɔɔ fa walaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: But don't have anything to do with stupid arguments about ancestors. And stay away from disagreements and quarrels about the Law of Moses. Such arguments are useless and senseless.
translation_verse: Ɛ tina diyiŋ na aŋmaareŋ nombia yela. Ɛ tina ɛ lolo kegyakaare dɔɔ aŋmaareŋ kelɛɛ yela. Ɛ lese ɛ wose lee kale na aŋmaareŋ lee Gyudatena mmaraase ŋan wose man. Nawolo nyi mena nombia kɛŋa pou yɛɛ yakaa te ŋɔɔ taŋ tɔnɔɔ daale ya.

english_verse: You know their minds are twisted, and their own sins show how guilty they are. Personal Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Gyeŋ nyi mena walaŋ kei dinɔɔ yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛyɛɛre e te ɔ bɛɛ gyae anokoare ya. Ŋon gbagba nombia ayɛɛsa ne buu na e fɔɔ. Nɔɔkado ɔtomante

english_verse: I plan to send Artemas or Tychicus to you. After he arrives, please try your best to meet me at Nicopolis. I have decided to spend the winter there.
translation_verse: Maa kpila Atemase yaa Tikikuse n gyaŋ. Ɔ kɔŋ na yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n kaa gyaŋee na maŋ Nikopolise donɔɔ man. Nawolo nyi ma te yɛɛ ma agyueŋ nyi maa kyaa botɔɔ waare tɛɛ.

english_verse: When Zenas the lawyer and Apollos get ready to leave, help them as much as you can, so they won't have need of anything.
translation_verse: Yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n ke kyɔ Senase ŋon ɔ yɛɛ mmaraa wolale e nɛ na Apolo be gbɛɛ keta man, na n ke kɛɛ nyi baa nyiŋ kpene kamasɛ keŋ bɛɛ gyae.

english_verse: Greetings to you from everyone here. Greet all of our friends who share in our faith. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ pou be kyaa me gyaŋ kɛbo nɛ na do neŋ nɔɔ. Yako de gyoona baŋ bɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo di te bɛɛ gyae daa nɛ nyi dɛɛ do wɔ nɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou.

english_verse: From Paul, who is in jail for serving Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is like a brother because of our faith. Philemon, you work with us and are very dear to us. This letter is to you
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon me silana Yesu Kristo dɔɔ te bɔɔ kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni nɛ, na de gyoo Kristobaale Timoti gyaŋ. Dɛɛ ŋmarase ke dee yelee nyaŋ de gyoo gyaagyi Filemɔn ŋon daa na neŋ ne yɛɛ tom dokoloŋ nɛ,

english_verse: and to the church that meets in your home. It is also to our dear friend Apphia and to Archippus, who serves the Lord as we do.
translation_verse: na Kristotena baŋ bɛɛ kyaa gyaŋee n dekpaŋalaŋ man nɛ, na de gyoo Kristo alo Afia, na de gyoo Akipuse ŋon daa na e yɛɛ yoonɔɔtenawɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan keyako man nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Philemon's Love and Faith
translation_verse: De kya Wurubuarɛ na de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

english_verse: Philemon, each time I mention you in my prayers, I thank God.
translation_verse: Me dɔɔ Filemɔn debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ mɛɛ tɔɔse neŋ ma kefane man na, mɛɛ fa me Wurubuarɛ karaŋ lee n dɔɔ,

english_verse: My friend, your love has made me happy and has greatly encouraged me. It has also cheered the hearts of God's people. Paul Speaks to Philemon about Onesimus
translation_verse: Me dɔɔ, n balaŋ kegyae keŋ na do maŋ kakyeŋ te kɛɛ yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ nideli, nawolo nyi kɛɛ do Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baŋ ɔ be baake wɔ te ɔ be desina wɔ see fa ɔ wose nɛ kakyeŋ nideli. Pɔɔl doo Filemɔn teree fa Onesimuse

english_verse: Christ gives me the courage to tell you what to do.
translation_verse: Kristo dɔɔ nafɔ me dana gbɛɛ nyi maa ŋere neŋ nyi nya yɛɛ kpene keŋ kaboena nyi nya yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: But I would rather ask you to do it simply because of love. Yes, as someone in jail for Christ,
translation_verse: Mɔna lee kegyae dɔɔ mɔɔ na ŋere neŋ ya, mɛɛ waase neŋ bo. Maŋ Pɔɔl ŋon ma seŋɛɛ Yesu nawɔɔ man te nɛnɛɛ me sɛɛ me doo deni man lee ŋon dɔɔ nɛ ne waase na neŋ nɛ.

english_verse: I beg you to help Onesimus! He is like a son to me because I led him to Christ here in jail.
translation_verse: Me bu Onesimuse nombia yaa mɛɛ sola neŋ nɛ. Kristo dɔɔ ɔ ta bese me bu nawolo nyi me dɔɔ te ɔ tɛɛwɔ lɛɛ Kristo di debaŋ keŋ bɔɔ kyaŋ maŋ tɔ deni nɛ.

english_verse: Before this, he was useless to you, but now he is useful both to you and to me.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba keŋ na nafɔ ɔ be dana tɔnɔɔ daale fa neŋ ya, mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ dana tɔnɔɔ fa daa na neŋ pou.

english_verse: I would like to keep him here with me, where he could take your place in helping me while I am here in prison for preaching the good news.
translation_verse: Nafɔ me gyaewɔ nyi waa kyaa n nawɔɔ man me gyaŋ kɛbo, na waa kyɔ maŋ debaŋ keŋ me doo deni man lee nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan keyako dɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: But I won't do anything unless you agree to it first. I want your act of kindness to come from your heart, and not be something you feel forced to do.
translation_verse: Mɔna mɔɔ ne gyae nyi maa ŋere neŋ nyi nya kyɔ maŋ ya, mɛɛ gyae bo nyi nya kyɔ maŋ lee nyaŋ gbagba n konɔɔ man. Mena dɔɔ nyi n te sɛɛ ya na mɔɔ gyae maa yɛɛ kolo ya.

english_verse: Perhaps Onesimus was taken from you for a little while so you could have him back for good,
translation_verse: Mberem na Onesimuse wɔŋa ɔ wose bo lee n gyaŋ debaŋ kyomii na ke yela waa nyiŋ kaa bese n wui kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: but not as a slave. Onesimus is much more than a slave. To me he is a dear friend, but to you he is even more, both as a person and as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ ta tekaa ɔ yɛɛ n gbeŋi e kaageŋ ya, ɔ kela gbeŋi. Ɔ yɛɛ de naabu gyaagyi e. Mɛɛ gyae ɔ nombia nideli te ma gyeŋ nyi nyaŋ ne gyae ɔ nombia nideli gba kela maŋ. Nawolo nyi ɔ yɛɛ n gbeŋi e te ɔ besewɔ ɔ yɛɛ n naabu e de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu dɔɔ.

english_verse: If you consider me a friend because of Christ, then welcome Onesimus as you would welcome me.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ nyi akpaa n gyeŋ nyi me yɛɛ n dɔɔ e na, lɛɛ e do ŋgba mena keŋ nyaŋ ke lɛɛ maŋ do nɛ.

english_verse: If he has cheated you or owes you anything, charge it to my account.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ɔ te yɛɛ neŋ nombiikum daale, yaa ɔ dana neŋ kolo kom na mo ke nyi maŋ danaana neŋ kom nɛ.

english_verse: My dear friend and follower of Christ our Lord, please cheer me up by doing this for me.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me dɔɔ kpaakpaa yɛɛ nombii kei fa maŋ lee de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ yele man. Kristo dɔɔ yɛɛ ke fa maŋ, na n ke yela me wɔe ke fɛɛ maŋ.

english_verse: Please get a room ready for me. I hope your prayers will be answered, and I can visit you.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ ŋmarase neŋ tɔne kei nɛ, mɛɛ gyae nyi n ke desina dekyae see maŋ nawolo nyi ma gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa nyii ɛ kefane keŋ pou, na waa besena maŋ kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: Epaphras is also here in jail for being a follower of Christ Jesus. He sends his greetings,
translation_verse: Epafirase ŋon lee Kristo Yesu dɔɔ te bɔɔ kyaŋ daa na e tɔ deni nɛ, na do neŋ nɔɔ.

english_verse: and so do Mark, Aristarchus, Demas, and Luke, who work together with me.
translation_verse: Mena ke te Maake na Arisitakuse na Demase na Luka baŋ daa na wɔ ne yɛɛ tom dokoloŋ nɛ mɔ na do neŋ nɔɔ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ɛ popou na waa seŋ ɛ wɔle.

english_verse: Long ago in many ways and at many times God's prophets spoke his message to our ancestors.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba gyaŋgba keŋ na, Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ wa akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra dɔɔ kolosi agbaatee agbaatee fa de naanaɔ lee gbɛɛneŋ kpookpoo man.

english_verse: But now at last, God sent his Son to bring his message to us. God created the universe by his Son, and everything will someday belong to the Son.
translation_verse: Mɔna debaŋ kei man keŋ tɛɛle kei ne gyu kɔ ɔto nɛ, ɔ tɛe ɔ bu Yesu dɔɔ kolosi fa daa. Ɔ bu ŋonaŋ dɔɔ te ɔ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ tɛɛle kei pou. Ŋon te Wurubuarɛ lesewɔ see nyi tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ pou dee doo ɔ tɛɛ.

english_verse: God's Son has all the brightness of God's own glory and is like him in every way. By his own mighty word, he holds the universe together. After the Son had washed away our sins, he sat down at the right side of the glorious God in heaven.
translation_verse: Ɔ bu ŋonaŋ dɔɔ te ŋon Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ lese ɔ gyoorobiiri wola, te ɔ bu ŋonaŋ mɔ lesena Wurubuarɛ dinɔɔ gbagba keŋ wola. Ɔ bu kei nɔɔwoya ŋan ŋe dana doŋ nɛ, te ɔ moowɔ ɔ dana tɛɛle kei pou. Ɔ ka yeŋ lɛɛ denibalaŋ lee ba dukum man wɔle na, te ɔ gyuuwɔ ke kyaa adido ɔ kya Wurubuarɛ dekpatakpere ŋon dunoluŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: He had become much greater than the angels, and the name he was given is far greater than any of theirs. God's Son Is Greater than Angels
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ bu kei kela Wurubuarɛ kpilala pou, te yele keŋ mɔ Wurubuarɛ be fa e nɛ kela Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ wui.

english_verse: God has never said to any of the angels, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!” Neither has God said to any of them, “I will be his Father, and he will be my Son!”
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see man nɛ, Wurubuarɛ te yako ta ɔ kpilala baŋ man ŋolo see nyi, “N yɛɛ me bu e, te gyɛŋ maŋ yɛna n kya ya.” Mena mɔ te ɔ te yako ta be man ŋolo see nyi, “Me ta bese n kya, te nyaŋ mɔ n ta bese me bu ya.”

english_verse: When God brings his first-born Son into the world, he commands all of his angels to worship him.
translation_verse: Mɔna debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae waa kpila ɔ bu kegyia nyi waa kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ ɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Kaboena nyi Wurubuarɛ kpilala pou baa som e.”

english_verse: And when God speaks about the angels, he says, “I change my angels into wind and my servants into flaming fire.”
translation_verse: Te nnɛ te Wurubuarɛ kolosiwɔ lee ɔ kpilala baŋ wose man. Ɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Maa yela me kpilala ke yɛɛ ŋgba feliŋ nɛ, na maa yela me tewulɛɛ ke yɛɛ ŋgba boalaŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: But God says about his Son, “You are God, and you will rule as King forever! Your royal power brings about justice.
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ yakowɔ lee ɔ bu ŋon wose man nyiaa, “Wurubuarɛ, n ke di gyoori kekpaakekpaa, te nyaŋ ke di ke ke gbɛɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: You loved justice and hated evil, and so I, your God, have chosen you. I appointed you and made you happier than any of your friends.”
translation_verse: N ne gyae nombia ŋan ŋe doo na ŋe gbɛɛ, te n ne kɔla nombiakumɛɛ. Mena dɔɔ maŋ n Wurubuarɛ ŋon ta lese neŋ yele kela n tebia pou, te me yela n dii gyoŋ mɔ kela wɔ.”

english_verse: The Scriptures also say, “In the beginning, Lord, you were the one who laid the foundation of the earth and created the heavens.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ besewɔ yako nyiaa, “De Gbeŋgyoo, lee kewalaŋ keŋ na nyaŋ see na tɛɛle kei mokɔɔ, te nyaŋ yɛɛna abɔɔ ŋan pou ŋe kyaa adido nɛ.

english_verse: They will all disappear and wear out like clothes, but you will last forever.
translation_verse: Adido na ateta pou gyae kaa ŋaalaa, mɔna nyaŋ dɔɔ nyaŋ ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa. Ŋe popou gyae kaa lɔɔree ŋgba kanyaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: You will roll them up like a robe and change them like a garment. But you are always the same, and you will live forever.”
translation_verse: Nyaŋ ke bɔ adido na ateta ŋgba kanyaŋ nɛ na n ke kyɛɛkee ŋa. Mɔna nyaŋ dɔɔ n kedoobii te n doo, te nyaŋ ke kyaa kekpaakekpaa.”

english_verse: God never said to any of the angels, “Sit at my right side until I make your enemies into a footstool for you!”
translation_verse: Nombii keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba bese yako ɔ bu ŋon yɛna nyi, “Kɔŋ kaa kyaa me dunoluŋ dɔɔ, kelii debaŋ keŋ maa yoo di n kɔlala pou dɔɔ.” Kpilala baŋ man woŋti te Wurubuarɛ yako e mena nombii kei see?

english_verse: We must give our full attention to what we were told, so we won't drift away.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi dɛɛ kyaŋ nombia ŋan dɔɔ nyii nɛ man nideli na dɔɔ nyiŋ yo gbɛɛ ya.

english_verse: So if we refuse this great way of being saved, how can we hope to escape? The Lord himself was the first to tell about it, and people who heard the message proved to us that it was true.
translation_verse: Akpaa nnɛ te doo na, kenaŋ na nyi de bɛɛ nyeekelɛɛ dinaa kei nombia ŋan Wurubuarɛ be fa daa debaŋ kei na, sena te dɛɛ yɛɛ na dɛɛ tale lee deŋele kewɔŋ keŋ waa wɔŋ daa nɛ man? De Gbeŋgyoo Yesu gbagba taŋgbɛɛ la yako nyeekelɛɛ nombia kɛŋa fa balaŋ. Kenaŋ wɔle na balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ taŋgbɛɛ nyii ŋa nɛ, mɔ dii nombia kɛŋa adansɛɛ fa daa nyi ŋe yɛɛ ampaŋ.

english_verse: God himself showed that his message was true by working all kinds of powerful miracles and wonders. He also gave his Holy Spirit to anyone he chose to. The One Who Leads Us To Be Saved
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ gbagba mɔ lesewɔ wola nyi nombia ŋan bɔɔ kolosi nɛ doo na ŋe gbɛɛ. Nawolo nyi ɔ faa wɔ doŋ te be yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia na nombia dinaana, te ɔ moo ɔ feliŋ ŋon abɔɔ ŋan ɔ na mo boele balaŋ nɛ boele wɔ ɔ kegyaebii man. Walaŋ ŋon dee sila na dee nyiŋ nyeekelɛɛ

english_verse: Somewhere in the Scriptures someone says to God, “What makes you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for weaklings such as we?
translation_verse: Gyoo Defidi yakowɔ Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan man yenaŋ daale nyiaa, “Deniwalaŋ yɛna amɔte te n na gyueŋ ɔ dɔɔ, yaa tɔnɔɔ woŋti doo la deniwalaŋ bu man te n ne kɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ mena?

english_verse: You made us lower than the angels for a while. Yet you have crowned us with glory and honor.
translation_verse: N ke yɛɛ deniwalaŋ na, n yɔkɔse e te n yela n kpilala baŋ kela e debaŋ kyomii daale, kenaŋ wɔle te n kaa faa e gyoorobiiri na obuo,

english_verse: And you have put everything under our power!” God has put everything under our power and has not left anything out of our power. But we still don't see it all under our control.
translation_verse: te n moo kpene kamasɛ do ɔ tɛɛ.” Kei na wolo baa nyi Wurubuarɛ moo kpene kamasɛ do ɔ tɛɛ keŋ ɔ te kaase kolo ya. Mɔna debaŋ kei man nɛ, de bɛɛ naa nyi abɔɔ ŋan pou doo ɔ tɛɛ ya.

english_verse: What we do see is Jesus, who for a little while was made lower than the angels. Because of God's gift of undeserved grace, Jesus died for everyone. And now that Jesus has suffered and died, he is crowned with glory and honor!
translation_verse: Mɔna da te naa nyi Yesu ŋon Wurubuarɛ be yɔkɔse e kyomii kela ɔ kpilala baŋ debaŋ kyomii nɛ, nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ ta mo gyoorobiiri na obuo fa e nawolo nyi ɔ naa diyem te ɔ yeŋawɔ. Wurubuarɛ bɛrɛɛ keŋ ɔ na mo boele balaŋ nɛ dɔɔ, te Yesu lɛɛ walaŋ kamasɛ yeŋ yeŋ.

english_verse: He even said to God, “I will tell them your name and sing your praises when they come together to worship.”
translation_verse: Yesu yako Wurubuarɛ nyiaa, “Maa lese n nombia ŋan n be yɛɛ nɛ wola ma loŋtona. Botɔɔ keŋ balaŋ de gyaŋee nyi baa som neŋ na, maa kɛlɛɛ neŋ be siaman.”

english_verse: He also said, “I will trust God.” Then he said, “Here I am with the children God has given me.”
translation_verse: Ɔ besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Maa mo me loo pou gyakaa n dɔɔ.” Te ɔ besewɔ yako bela nyiaa, “Kɛɛ, daa na balaŋ baŋ n ba mo wɔ do me nyiŋmaa man nɛ yaa”

english_verse: We are people of flesh and blood. This is why Jesus became one of us. He died to destroy the devil, who had power over death.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ Yesu be baake wɔ nyi ɔ loŋtona nɛ be yɛɛ denibalaŋwɔ keŋ be dana wosenaane na fatabo. Mena dɔɔ te Yesu mɔ kaa bese deniwalaŋ ŋgba baŋ nɛ, na waa ta ɔ yeŋ keŋ dɔɔ di ɔbɔnsam ŋon ɔ dana doŋ yeŋ dɔɔ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: But he also died to rescue all of us who live each day in fear of dying.
translation_verse: Ɔ yɛe mena na waa nyiŋ lɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bee yee yeŋ, te debaŋ kamasɛ na ba agyueŋ pou gyakaa bo yeŋ dɔɔ nɛ nyee.

english_verse: Jesus clearly did not come to help angels, but he did come to help Abraham's descendants.
translation_verse: Kei nawolo baa nyi na Wurubuarɛ kpilala te Yesu kɔŋawɔ ɔ kaa kyɔ ya, mɔna ɔ kɔŋae ɔ kaa kyɔ Aberaham duuluŋ man balaŋ.

english_verse: He had to be one of us, so he could serve God as our merciful and faithful high priest and sacrifice himself for the forgiveness of our sins.
translation_verse: Lee kei dɔɔ te ɔ bese deniwalaŋ ŋgba ɔ loŋtona nɛ gbɛɛ kamasɛ man, na waa nyiŋ bese Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ŋon ɔ ne wii balaŋ waraŋase, te ɔ ne di anokoare Wurubuarɛ ɔsom keŋ man. Na waa nyiŋ yeŋ pataa denibalaŋ na Wurubuarɛ nsana.

english_verse: And now that Jesus has suffered and was tempted, he can help anyone else who is tempted.
translation_verse: Ɔbɔnsam kɛɛse ŋon gbagba kɛɛ te ɔ naa diyem nideli, mena dɔɔ waa tale kyɔ balaŋ baŋ pou ɔbɔnsam ne kɛɛse wɔ kɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: My friends, God has chosen you to be his holy people. So think about Jesus, the one we call our apostle and high priest!
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ ɛmɛɛ me tebia Kristotena baŋ mɔ ɛ be lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di nɛ, ɛ mo ya agyueŋ pou gyakaa Yesu dɔɔ. Ŋon yɛna Wurubuarɛ kpilale na Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ŋon dɔɔ lɛɛ e di nɛ.

english_verse: But Jesus deserves more honor than Moses, just as the builder of a house deserves more honor than the house.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ nyi walaŋ de baŋ deni na, ŋon ne nyiŋa na yele kela deni keŋ ɔ be bam nɛ. Mena mɔ te Yesu dana yele kela Mosesi.

english_verse: Of course, every house is built by someone, and God is really the one who built everything.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ne baŋa na deni, mɔna Wurubuarɛ yɛɛna walaŋ na kpene kamasɛ.

english_verse: Moses was a faithful servant and told God's people what would be said in the future.
translation_verse: Mosesi moo ɔ konɔɔ pou yɛɛ tom Wurubuarɛ balaŋ man ŋgba Wurubuarɛ tobaale nɛ, te ɔ taŋgbɛɛwɔ kolosi nombia ŋan Wurubuarɛ waa kaa kolosi wee daale nɛ.

english_verse: But Christ is the Son in charge of God's people. And we are those people, if we keep on being brave and don't lose hope. A Rest for God's People
translation_verse: Mɔna Kristo dɔɔ ŋon yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e, te ɔ lese ɔ konɔɔ pou kɛɛ Wurubuarɛ balaŋ dɔɔ. Mena dɔɔ akpaa de nyiŋ konɔɔ te da mo de sia gyakaa abɔɔ ŋan ɔ be yako see nyi waa fa daa nɛ dɔɔ na, keŋ ne gyae la ke yela dɛɛ tale bese ɔ balaŋ. Ɛ na yɛɛ deŋele doŋ ya

english_verse: It is just as the Holy Spirit says, “If you hear God's voice today,
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon yakowɔ nyiaa, “Gyɛŋ kei akpaa nyaŋ ŋon n nyii Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan na,

english_verse: don't be stubborn! Don't rebel like those people who were tested in the desert. *
translation_verse: na yɛɛ deŋele doŋ ŋgba mena keŋ ɛ naanaɔ be yɛɛ te bɔɔ koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ depampaa dinaa keŋ man, te bɔɔ teese ɔ nɔɔman nɛ ya.

english_verse: For forty years your ancestors tested God and saw the things he did.
translation_verse: Ɛ naanaɔ naa kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ kulutooneŋ sɔŋola ŋan man, mɔ kenaŋ wɔle na ba teese ɔ nɔɔman kɛɛse e kɛɛ.

english_verse: “Then God got tired of them and said, ‘You people never show good sense, and you don't understand what I want you to do.’
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ gyeŋa baŋ ɔ balaŋ benaŋ dɔɔ te ɔ yakowɔ nyiaa, ‘Debaŋ kamasɛ na bɛɛ yo gbɛɛ nawolo nyi bɔɔ ne sila me nɔɔwoya ya.’

english_verse: God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ”
translation_verse: Keŋte ma gyeŋa baŋ kaŋ ntam nyiaa, ‘Bɔɔ gyae baa nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo botɔɔ keŋ mɔɔ desina see wɔ nyi be kaa kyaa na baa fɛɛfo nɛ korakora ya.’ ”

english_verse: My friends, watch out! Don't let evil thoughts or doubts make any of you turn from the living God.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me tebia, ɛ kɛɛ nideli nyi ɛ man ŋolo be nyiŋ agyueŋ kum na waa lɛɛ aŋmaareŋ na waa lee Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ wɔle ya.

english_verse: You must encourage one another each day. And you must keep on while there is still a time that can be called “today.” If you don't, then sin may fool some of you and make you stubborn.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ nyiŋaa ɛ kyaa na ɛ sia nɛ, ɛ kolosi do dɔŋa kakyeŋ wee na wee. Na nombiakumɛɛ ba beo ɛ man ŋolo na waa yɛɛ deŋele doŋ ya.

english_verse: We were sure about Christ when we first became his people. So let's hold tightly to our faith until the end.
translation_verse: Akpaa de kyaŋ da kelɛɛdi keŋ dɔɔ taŋgbɛɛ lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ man keŋkeŋ kelii da yeŋ wee na, na daa na Kristo yɛɛ dokoloŋ baa.

english_verse: Who were those people that heard God's voice and rebelled? Weren't they the same ones that came out of Egypt with Moses?
translation_verse: Balaŋ bomɔ nyiina Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan te ba korowɔ seŋ tia e? Na baŋ yɛna balaŋ baŋ Mosesi be tɛɛ be siaman mo wɔ lee Igyipite tɛɛle man nɛ yee?

english_verse: We see that those people did not enter the place of rest because they did not have faith.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ da te naa nyi keŋ ba te lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di dɔɔ ya, te ba te tale ka gyoo botɔɔ keŋ ɔ be desina see wɔ nyi be kaa kyaa fɛɛfo nɛ ya.

english_verse: We have heard the message, just as they did. But they failed to believe what they heard, and the message did not do them any good.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi nombia kpaakpaa ŋan bɔɔ kolosi fa de naanaɔ nɛ, ŋan ke te be kolosiwɔ fa daa mɔ. Mɔna nombia ŋan bɔɔ nyii nɛ te yɛɛ tɔnɔɔ fa wɔ ya, nawolo nyi ba te lɛɛ ŋa di ya.

english_verse: Only people who have faith will enter the place of rest. It is just as the Scriptures say, “God became angry and told the people, ‘You will never enter my place of rest!’ ” God said this, even though everything has been ready from the time of creation.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ daa baŋ dɔɔ lɛɛ ɔ nombia ŋan di nɛ, daa daageŋ ne gyae la dee nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo botɔɔ keŋ ɔ be desina see ɔ balaŋ nyi be kaa kyaa fɛɛfo nɛ. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ yakowɔ nyiaa, “Me ta mo baŋ kaŋ ntam nyi, ‘Bɔɔ gyae baa gyoo botɔɔ keŋ mɔɔ desina see me balaŋ nyi be kaa kyaa fɛɛfo nɛ korakora ya.’ ” Mɔna da gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ wulaa bake ɔ nombia see leenaŋ debaŋ keŋ ɔ be yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ taŋ nɛ.

english_verse: In fact, somewhere the Scriptures say that by the seventh day, God had finished his work, and so he rested.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan yakowɔ yenaŋ daale lee wee nyetoorote keŋ man nyiaa, “Weeya looro te Wurubuarɛ moowɔ yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ, te ɔ fɛɛfowɔ wee nyetoorote keŋ man.”

english_verse: We also read that he later said, “You people will never enter my place of rest!”
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ besewɔ yako lee kefɛɛfo kei wose man bela nyiaa, “Bɔɔ gyae baa gyoo botɔɔ keŋ mɔɔ desina see me balaŋ nyi be kaa kyaa fɛɛfo nɛ ya.”

english_verse: If Joshua had really given the people rest, there would not be any need for God to talk about another day of rest.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ de naana Gyosua be tɛɛ Iseraetena siaman nɛ, ɔ te tale yela baa nyiŋ mena kefɛɛfo kei ya. Nyi ŋon talewɔ yela baa nyiŋ mena kefɛɛfo kei nɛ, nafɔ Wurubuarɛ be gyae waa kolosi kefɛɛfowee wɔle daale wose man nombia bela ya.

english_verse: But God has promised us a Sabbath when we will rest, even though it has not yet come.
translation_verse: Kei nawolo baa nyi wee daale kyaa keŋ Wurubuarɛ balaŋ baa fɛɛfo ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ be fɛɛfo wee nyetoorote keŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: God's word is alive and powerful! It is sharper than any double-edged sword. His word can cut through our spirits and souls and through our joints and marrow, until it discovers the desires and thoughts of our hearts.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombii keŋ nɔɔ dana boalaŋ te kɛɛ fa nyeedoŋ kekpaa. Ke yɛɛ ŋgba sila sia na wɔlete nɛ, te ke dana beeleŋ kela sila sia na wɔlete kamasɛ. Kɛɛ tale kara gyoo deniwalaŋ yenaŋ kamasɛ, lese deniwalaŋ dinɔɔ na ɔ nyeeman na ɔ konɔɔ man nombia pou debɔɔ.

english_verse: Nothing is hidden from God! He sees through everything, and we will have to tell him the truth. Jesus Is the Great High Priest
translation_verse: Abɔɔ ŋan pou Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ nɛ, ŋe man dokoloŋ be kyaa keŋ ka weesɛɛ ɔ siaman ya. Kpene kamasɛ doo ɔ siaman peŋteŋpereiŋ. Ŋon Wurubuarɛ siaman te de popou dɛɛ kaa seŋ tɔlɛɛ de nɔɔwoya wee daale. Yesu yɛna de Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia

english_verse: We have a great high priest, who has gone into heaven, and he is Jesus the Son of God. This is why we must hold on to what we have said about him.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ yela dɛɛ kyaŋ da kelɛɛdi keŋ de dana nɛ man keŋkeŋ. Nawolo nyi de dana Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia kpaakpaate ŋolo. Ŋon yɛna Yesu, Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon ɔ be lam Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ adido nɛ.

english_verse: So whenever we are in need, we should come bravely before the throne of our merciful God. There we will be treated with undeserved grace, and we will find help.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ na yeli dee yee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ kegyu ya. Nawolo nyi da gyeŋ nyi waa wii de waraŋase na waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele daa, na waa kyɔ daa debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ da wose de kyaŋ daa na.

english_verse: This is why he must offer sacrifices for his own sins and for the sins of others.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ te kaboena nyi waa taŋgbɛɛ deesi fa Wurubuarɛ lee ŋon gbagba wui nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ, pɛna waa tale deesi fa ɔ balaŋ baŋ mɔ wui nombiakumɛɛ ŋan bɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: But no one can have the honor of being a high priest simply by wanting to be one. Only God can choose a priest, and God is the one who chose Aaron.
translation_verse: Akpaa Wurubuarɛ te baake ŋolo nyi ɔ kaa yɛɛ ɔ sae kegyia ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ be baake Aarɔn ya nɛ, walaŋ ŋonaŋ gbagba be tale see ɔ wose Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ya.

english_verse: This is how it was with Christ. He became a high priest, but not just because he wanted the honor of being one. It was God who told him, “You are my Son, because today I have become your Father!”
translation_verse: Mena te Kristo mɔ ta see ɔ wose Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ya. Mɔna Wurubuarɛ lese na e te ɔ yako e nyiaa, “N yɛɛ me bu e, gyɛŋ me ta bese n kya.”

english_verse: God had the power to save Jesus from death. And while Jesus was on earth, he begged God with loud crying and tears to save him. He truly worshiped God, and God listened to his prayers.
translation_verse: Yesu ke kyaa tɛɛle dɔɔ nɛ, ɔ moo yeesa wii lese siasaraŋ fane fa Wurubuarɛ. Nawolo nyi ŋon waageŋ kooŋ ne gyae la waa tale lese e lee yeŋ man. Lee mena keŋ ɔ be yɔkɔse ɔ wose mo obuo fa Wurubuarɛ dɔɔ, Wurubuarɛ nyii ɔ kefane keŋ.

english_verse: Jesus is God's own Son, but still he had to suffer before he could learn what it really means to obey God.
translation_verse: Keŋ na keŋ Yesu yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e koraŋ na, ɔ naa diyem nideli. Lee ɔ diyem kena kenaŋ man nɛ, ɔ kasee mena keŋ waa nyii ɔ kya dei.

english_verse: This is because God chose him to be a high priest like Melchizedek. Warning against Turning Away
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ lese e nyi waa yɛɛ ɔ sae kegyia, ŋgba mena keŋ Mɛkesɛdɛke be yɛɛ ɔ sae kegyia nɛ. Ɛ na bese ɛ wɔle ya

english_verse: Much more could be said about this subject. But it is hard to explain, and all of you are slow to understand.
translation_verse: Nafɔ de dana nombia burum dɛɛ yako lee Mɛkesɛdɛke na Yesu saere kedi kei wose man, mɔna nombia ŋan man kalese dana baŋ nawolo nyi ɛ nombia man kenyii dana doŋ.

english_verse: By now you should have been teachers, but once again you need to be taught the simplest things about what God has said. You need milk instead of solid food.
translation_verse: Debaŋ kei nɛ nafɔ kaboena nyi ɛmɛɛ mɔ yaa bese Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan wolala. Mɔna ɛ sɛɛ ɛ yɛɛ ŋgba bia baŋ be kaboena bo nyi ŋolo waa bese wola wɔ Yesu Kristo ɔsom nombia ŋan kewalaŋ nɛ. Ɛ yɛɛ yaa ŋgba bia baŋ be sɛɛ bɛɛ ŋmase dide nɛ. Ɛ ta bee ta na weenɛɛ doŋ nyiŋan kedi ya.

english_verse: People who live on milk are like babies who don't really know what is right.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ sɛɛ ɔ ne ŋmase dide nɛ, na ɔ yɛɛ bu e. Ɔ ta gyeŋa ta kpene keŋ yɛɛ dukum yaa debam ya.

english_verse: We must try to become mature and start thinking about more than just the basic things we were taught about Christ. We shouldn't need to keep talking about why we ought to turn from deeds that bring death and why we ought to have faith in God.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ ɛ yela dee tina Kristo ɔsom nombia ŋan dɔɔ kasee kewalaŋ nɛ yela mena, na dɛɛ kasee abɔɔ ŋan ŋe doo de siaman te ŋe gyae ke yela da Kristo kelɛɛdi ke yɛɛ doŋ nɛ. Ta tekaa kaboena nyi dɛɛ bese kasee nombia kewalaŋ ŋan dɔɔ kasee kaalaŋ, ŋgba kekyɛɛkee lee dinɔɔ ŋan be dana tɔnɔɔ ya te ŋɛɛ mo daa gyu yeŋ man, na Wurubuarɛ kelɛɛdi nɛ ya.

english_verse: And we shouldn't need to keep teaching about baptisms or about the laying on of hands or about people being raised from death and the future judgment.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yeli dɛɛ tekaa kasee kolo lee Wurubuarɛ loŋkesɔ, na nyiŋmaa kamo gyakaa balaŋ dɔɔ, na woya kefoŋ lee yeŋ man, na Wurubuarɛ nombia kedi debaŋ ɔtomante keŋ man bela ya.

english_verse: But what about people who turn away after they have already seen the light and have received the gift from heaven and have shared in the Holy Spirit? What about those who turn away after they have received the good message of God and the powers of the future world? There is no way to bring them back. What they are doing is the same as nailing the Son of God to a cross and insulting him in public!
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ nyi akpaa ba lee mena nombia kɛŋa wɔle nɛ, gyae ke yɛɛ doŋ fa wɔ nyi baa tina be nombiakumɛɛ ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ yela na baa kɔŋ Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ bela. Be nombia ayɛɛsa ŋenaŋ nawolo baa nyi, na yɛɛ yaa ŋgba ba bese yaa bɛɛ gyɔ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon baa sakaa ɔpaŋdaŋ dɔɔ fulu e balaŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: A field is useful to farmers, if there is enough rain to make good crops grow. In fact, God will bless such a field.
translation_verse: Tɛɛle keŋ ɔga ne ŋɛɛ woli ke te ne yeli wɔɔfarale ne nyiŋ weenɛɛ kpaakpaa lee ke man nɛ, Wurubuarɛ ne hiraa na ke.

english_verse: But land that produces only thornbushes is worthless. It is likely to fall under God's curse, and in the end it will be set on fire.
translation_verse: Mɔna akpaa sɔɔse na ŋalese ne tuu la ke dɔɔ na, na mena tɛɛle kenaŋ be dana tɔnɔɔ ya. Te n te kɛɛ ya na Wurubuarɛ waa tale falaa ke, na waa yela boalaŋ ke kpa ke.

english_verse: My friends, we are talking this way. But we are sure that you are doing those really good things people do when they are being saved.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, keŋ na de kɛɛ yako kei koraŋ nɛ, da gyeŋ nyi ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ nombia kpaakpaa ŋaale doo ɛ man, keŋ ŋɛɛ kyaa na nyeekelɛɛ nombia ŋan.

english_verse: God is always fair. He will remember how you helped his people in the past and how you are still helping them. You belong to God, and he won't forget the love you have shown his people.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne di ɔ nombia ke gbɛɛ dɔɔ. Mena dɔɔ ɔ be gyae waa wolee ɛ tom keŋ ɛ be yɛɛ, na ɛ balaŋ kegyae keŋ ɛ na lese wola e nɛ ya. Nawolo nyi lee ŋon dɔɔ ɛ te kyɔ ɛ tebia Kristotena, te ɛ gyakaa ɛ ne kyɔ wɔ.

english_verse: We wish each of you would always be eager to show how strong and lasting your hope really is.
translation_verse: Da kegyaebii yɛna nyi, ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ waa kyaŋ nombia kpaakpaa kɛŋa man nideli kelii ɔto. Kei gyae ke yela ɛ ka gyeŋ nideli nyi ɛ ke nyiŋ kpene keŋ dɔɔ ɛ loo gyakaa nɛ.

english_verse: Then after Abraham had been very patient, he was given what God had promised.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ de naana Aberaham mɔ nyiŋa konɔɔ kyaa daa kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa fa e nɛ, te ɔ nyiŋmaa kaŋa ke.

english_verse: God cannot tell lies! And so his promises and vows are two things that can never be changed. We have run to God for safety. Now his promises should greatly encourage us to take hold of the hope that is right in front of us.
translation_verse: Nombii keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yako see na ntam keŋ ɔ be kam nɛ, ɔ be gyae waa kyɛɛkee nombia ala kɛŋa man daale ya nawolo nyi ɔ bee di dekara ya. Mena dɔɔ nombii kei na do daa baŋ dɔɔ yeu kaa gyoo e nɛ kakyeŋ da kelɛɛdi man, na dɛɛ tale kyaŋ kpene keŋ dɔɔ ɔ be yeli de loo gyakaa nɛ man nideli.

english_verse: This hope is like a firm and steady anchor for our souls. In fact, hope reaches behind the curtain and into the most holy place.
translation_verse: Da nyeedoŋ pou seŋɛe mena lookegyakaa kei dɔɔ. Keŋ yele la te de nyiŋa gbɛɛ gyoo Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man, botɔɔ keŋ bɔɔ mo kanyaŋ kpase ke keŋ nafɔ gyaŋgba na walaŋ yakaate bee nyiŋ gbɛɛ gyoo botɔɔ ya nɛ.

english_verse: Melchizedek was both king of Salem and priest of God Most High. He was the one who went out and gave Abraham his blessing, when Abraham returned from killing the kings.
translation_verse: Na Mɛkesɛdɛke kei yɛɛ donɔɔ keŋ bɛɛ baake ke nyi Saalɛm nɛ gyoo e, te ɔ besewɔ ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ dekpatakpere ŋon sae e. Debaŋ keŋ de naana Aberaham be gyu ke yoo gyooneŋ baale di be dɔɔ bese ɔ ne kɔŋ nɛ, ɔ kaa gyaŋeewɔ na gyoo Mɛkesɛdɛke kei. Botɔɔ te Mɛkesɛdɛke hiraa ŋon de naana Aberaham.

english_verse: Then Abraham gave him a tenth of everything he had. The meaning of the name Melchizedek is “King of Justice.” But since Salem means “peace,” he is also “King of Peace.”
translation_verse: Keŋte de naana Aberaham kpase abɔɔ ŋan pou ɔ be nyim lee yoo keŋ man nɛ akpeŋ kufu, te ɔ moo dekpeŋ daale fa Mɛkesɛdɛke ŋonaŋ. Mɛkesɛdɛke yele kei asɛɛ yɛna nyi “Gyoo ŋon ɔ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman,” te Saalɛm gyoo mɔ nawolo nyi “Wosefɛɛreŋ gyoo.”

english_verse: We are not told he had a father or mother or ancestors or beginning or end. He is like the Son of God and will be a priest forever.
translation_verse: Ŋolo ba gyeŋ Mɛkesɛdɛke kei ɔ kya yaa ɔ naa yaa ɔ duuluŋ man dalee ya. Ba te yako kolo mɔ lee ɔ kalola yaa ɔ yeŋ wose man ya. Ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ sae e kekpaakekpaa ŋgba Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: Although Melchizedek wasn't a descendant of Levi, Abraham gave him a tenth of what he had. Then Melchizedek blessed Abraham, who had been given God's promise.
translation_verse: Mɛkesɛdɛke kei ta lee Lewi duuluŋ man gba ya, mɔna ɔ talewɔ lɛɛ abɔɔ kekpase kufu man dekpeŋ dokoloŋ kei lee de naana Aberaham ŋon Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa yɛɛ kolo fa e nɛ gyaŋ te ɔ hiraa e.

english_verse: Everyone agrees a person who gives a blessing is greater than the one who receives the blessing.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ taŋ gyeŋ nyi kegyia ne hiraa na kemaasa keŋ aŋmaareŋ be doo ke man ya.

english_verse: Priests are given a tenth of what people earn. But all priests die, except Melchizedek, and the Scriptures teach that he is alive.
translation_verse: Lewitena baŋ bɛɛ lɛɛ abɔɔ kekpala kufu man dekpeŋ kei nɛ be yɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yem, mɔna Mɛkesɛdɛke ŋon de naana Aberaham be tɔ abɔɔ kɛŋa fa nɛ dɔɔ, ɔ ta yem ya ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ nombia be yako nɛ.

english_verse: Levi's descendants are now the ones who receive a tenth from people. We could even say that when Abraham gave Melchizedek a tenth, Levi also gave him a tenth.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ tale yako nyi Lewi mɔ tɛɛwɔ de naana Aberaham dɔɔ tɔ abɔɔ kufu man dekpeŋ kei fa Mɛkesɛdɛke.

english_verse: This is because Levi was born later into the family of Abraham, who gave a tenth to Melchizedek.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ de naana Aberaham be gyaŋee na Mɛkesɛdɛke nɛ, na be ta lola ta Lewi ya. Debaŋ kenaŋ na ɔ sɛɛ ɔ doo ɔ naana Aberaham teŋa man.

english_verse: The person we are talking about is our Lord, who came from a tribe that had never had anyone to serve as a priest at the altar.
translation_verse: Mena nombia kɛŋa dɛɛ yako nɛ, na Yesu Kristo wose man nombia yaa dɛɛ yako nɛ. Nawolo nyi ɔ ta lee Lewi dekpaŋalaŋ man ya te ɔ kaa dii Wurubuarɛ saere. Ɔ lee dekpaŋalaŋ kpoo daale man, te ŋolo mɔ te dii ta Wurubuarɛ saere lee mena dekpaŋalaŋ kenaŋ man see ya.

english_verse: Everyone knows he came from the tribe of Judah, and Moses never said priests would come from that tribe.
translation_verse: De popou gyeŋ nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu lee Gyuda dekpaŋalaŋ man, te de naana Mosesi mɔ te yako kolo lee Gyuda dekpaŋalaŋmantena benaŋ saere kedi wose man ya. Yesu yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ sae e ŋgba Mɛkesɛdɛke nɛ

english_verse: All of this becomes clearer, when someone who is like Melchizedek is appointed to be a priest.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ nombii kei man kenyii be dana baŋ bela ya. Nawolo nyi walaŋ wɔle kpoo kɔŋala kaa di Wurubuarɛ saere ŋgba Mɛkesɛdɛke nɛ.

english_verse: because the Law cannot make anything perfect. At the same time, we are given a much better hope, and it can bring us close to God.
translation_verse: Mosesi mmaraase ŋan te tale yela de gbɛɛneŋ ka tenee ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nɛ ya. Mena dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te fa daa lookegyakaa kpaakpaate keŋ ka kela bene keŋ. Lee mena dɔɔ nɛnɛɛ dɛɛ tale tuu benaa Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: God himself made a promise when this priest was appointed. But he did not make a promise like this when the other priests were appointed. The promise he made is, “I, the Lord, promise that you will be a priest forever! And I will never change my mind!”
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ ne yako nyi, pɛ Wurubuarɛ ka see Yesu saere na ɔ kaŋa ntam nyiaa, “Maŋ Wurubuarɛ te kaŋ ntam te mɔɔ gyae maa kyɛɛkee ma agyueŋ ya. ‘Nyaŋ ke di me saere kekpaakekpaa.’ ”

english_verse: There have been a lot of other priests, and all of them have died.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba keŋ na Wurubuarɛ saese baŋ boe, nawolo nyi yeŋ bee yeli baa yɛɛ be saere tom keŋ kelii ɔto ya.

english_verse: But Jesus will never die, and so he will be a priest forever!
translation_verse: Mɔna Yesu dɔɔ ɔ saere kedi keŋ be gyae ka lee ɔ gyaŋ gyu ŋolo gyaŋ ya, nawolo nyi ŋon kyaa kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: He is forever able to save the people he leads to God, because he always lives to speak to God for them.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ waa tale lɛɛ balaŋ baŋ pou bɛɛ tɛɛ ɔ dɔɔ kɔŋ Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ nɛ nyee, nawolo nyi ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa te ɔ ne fane fa Wurubuarɛ lee be dɔɔ.

english_verse: Jesus is the high priest we need. He is holy and innocent and faultless, and not at all like us sinners. Jesus is honored above all beings in heaven,
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo yɛna Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ŋon ɔ ne tale yɛɛ kpene keŋ dɛɛ gyae nɛ fa daa. Nawolo nyi ɔ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman, te nombiikum kamasɛ na ayimɛɛ kamasɛ mɔ be doo ɔ man ya. Wurubuarɛ lese e lee nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra man te ɔ gyinaa e adido kela walaŋ kamasɛ.

english_verse: What I mean is we have a high priest who sits at the right side of God's great throne in heaven.
translation_verse: Nombia ŋan dɛɛ yako nɛ pou nyee yɛna nyiaa, de dana Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ŋon ɔ kyaa Wurubuarɛ dekpatakpere ŋon gyoorogbeli keŋ dunoluŋ dɔɔ.

english_verse: He also serves as the priest in the most holy place inside the real tent there in heaven. This tent of worship was set up by the Lord, not by humans.
translation_verse: Ɔ ne yɛɛ ɔ saere tom keŋ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man adido botɔɔ. Kei yɛna Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni gbagba keŋ. Na denibalaŋ baŋa na mena deni kenaŋ ya, mɔna Wurubuarɛ gbagba baŋa na ke.

english_verse: If he were here on earth, he would not be a priest at all, because here the Law appoints other priests to offer sacrifices.
translation_verse: Nyi Yesu deŋ kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ, nafɔ ŋon te nyiŋ gbɛɛ di saere kei ya. Nawolo nyi na be te wulaa lese balaŋ baŋ baa di saere nɛ see, ŋgba mena keŋ Mosesi mmaraase ŋan ba wola wɔ nɛ.

english_verse: But the tent where they serve is just a copy and a shadow of the real one in heaven. Before Moses made the tent, he was told, “Be sure to make it exactly like the pattern you were shown on the mountain!”
translation_verse: Tom keŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man adido nɛ, keŋ yaa saese baŋ ne kasee yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nɛ. Mena mɔ ke te debaŋ keŋ Mosesi ne gyae waa baŋ Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni keŋ bɔɔ mo kanyaŋ yɛɛ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ faree e nyiaa, “Kɛɛ na n ke yɛɛ kpene kamasɛ nideli, na ke kyaa na keŋ mɔɔ lese wola neŋ bula keŋ dɔɔ nɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ.”

english_verse: If the first agreement with God had been all right, there would not have been any need for another one.
translation_verse: Nyi nɔɔkebakesee gyaŋgbate keŋ wose man deŋ be dana nombii ya nɛ, nafɔ nɔɔkebakesee wɔle ba tekaa hia bela ya.

english_verse: But the Lord found fault with it and said, “I tell you the time will come, when I will make a new agreement with the people of Israel and the people of Judah.
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ naawɔ nyi nɔɔkebakesee bene keŋ te yeli ɔ balaŋ gbɛɛneŋ ka tenee ɔ siaman ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ ne gyae nɛ ya. Mena dɔɔ te ɔ yako ba wose man nombia nyiaa, “Debaŋ daale ne kɔŋ, keŋ maa bake nɔɔ wɔle see fa me balaŋ Iseraetena na Gyuda duuluŋ man balaŋ.

english_verse: It won't be like the agreement that I made with their ancestors, when I took them by the hand and led them out of Egypt. They broke their agreement with me, and I stopped caring about them!
translation_verse: Kei be gyae ke yɛɛ ŋgba nɔɔkebakesee keŋ daa na be naanaɔ be bake see, debaŋ keŋ mɔɔ mo me doŋ lese wɔ lee Igyipite tɛɛle man nɛ ya. Nawolo nyi keŋ be te di me nɔɔkebakesee kenaŋ dɔɔ kelii ɔto dɔɔ ya nɛ, te ma lese me sia yela wɔ.

english_verse: “But now I tell the people of Israel this is my new agreement: ‘The time will come when I, the Lord, will write my laws on their minds and hearts. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
translation_verse: Nɔɔkebakesee wɔle keŋ maa bake na me balaŋ Iseraetena yɛna nyiaa, ‘Maa mo me nombia ŋan do ba agyueŋse man, na maa ŋmarase ŋa do be konɔɔse man. Maŋ ne gyae la maa yɛɛ be Wurubuarɛ, na baŋ mɔ ke yɛɛ me balaŋ.’

english_verse: Not one of them will have to teach another to know me, their Lord.’ “All of them will know me, no matter who they are.
translation_verse: Ŋolo be gyae waa tekaa wola ɔ dɔɔ nombia bela, yaa ŋolo mɔ ke yako ɔ loŋto nyi ‘Maa wola neŋ Wurubuarɛ gbɛɛneŋ ya!’ Nawolo nyi be popou baa gyeŋ maŋ lee ba kemaasa dɔɔ kelii be kegyia dɔɔ.

english_verse: I will treat them with kindness, even though they are wicked. I will forget their sins.”
translation_verse: Maa mo be nombiakumɛɛ pou kyɛɛ wɔ, keŋ mɔɔ gyae maa tekaa tɔɔse abɔɔ ŋan bɔɔ yɛɛ tia maŋ nɛ bela ya.”

english_verse: When the Lord talks about a new agreement, he means that the first one is out of date. And anything that is old and useless will soon disappear.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ ke baake nɔɔkebakesee kei nyi nɔɔkebakesee wɔle nɛ, na ɔ na wolo baa nyi gyaŋgbate keŋ te yɛɛ bene. Te kpene kamasɛ keŋ ka de yɛɛ bene na, kɔɔ doo kolo man bela ya. Nawolo nyi be te nyiŋ kolo wɔle see ke nawɔɔ man.

english_verse: The first promise included rules for worship and a tent for worship here on earth.
translation_verse: Nɔɔkebakesee gyaŋgbate keŋ man nɛ Wurubuarɛ wola wɔ gbɛɛ keŋ man baa mo som e, na botɔɔ keŋ baa som e tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

english_verse: The first part of the tent was called the holy place, and a lampstand, a table, and the sacred loaves of bread were kept there.
translation_verse: Be baŋa ɔsom deni dinaa te ba moo kanyaŋ dinaa daale kpase ke man ala. Siamante keŋ man te ba moo kanea na tebulu keŋ dɔɔ bɛɛ mo bodobodo gyakaa fa Wurubuarɛ kedi nɛ see. Botɔɔ te bɛɛ baake nyi Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa siamante.

english_verse: Behind the curtain was the most holy place.
translation_verse: Wɔlete keŋ mɔ te bɛɛ baake nyi Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante.

english_verse: The gold altar for burning incense was in this holy place. The gold-covered sacred chest was also there, and inside it were three things. First, there was a gold jar filled with manna. Then there was Aaron's walking stick that sprouted. Finally, there were the flat stones with the Ten Commandments written on them.
translation_verse: Abɔɔ ŋan doo botɔɔ yɛna kedeesa boe keŋ bɔɔ mo kɔba yayam yɛɛ ke te bɛɛ too oliifi ke dɔɔ nɛ, na adakaa keŋ bɔɔ mo kɔba yayam mataa mataa ke pou kilisi nɛ. Adakaa kenaŋ seŋɛɛ la fa nɔɔkebakesee wɔle keŋ. Abɔɔ ŋan doo adakaa kenaŋ man yɛna, kɔba yayam nyefale keŋ weenɛɛ ŋan bɛɛ baake ŋa nyi maana doo ke man nɛ, na Aarɔn gbutu keŋ ba potee nɛ na boya patalapatala ala ŋan bɔɔ ŋmarase mmaraase ŋan Wurubuarɛ ba mo fa Mosesi nɛ gyakaa ŋe dɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: But this is how everything was when the priests went each day into the first part of the tent to do their duties.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ba see abɔɔ kɛŋa pou deni keŋ man taŋ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ saese baŋ na gyoo deni siamante keŋ man ke yɛɛ be saere tom wee kamasɛ.

english_verse: However, only the high priest could go into the second part of the tent, and he went in only once a year. Each time he carried blood to offer for his sins and for any sins that the people had committed without meaning to.
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ sae kegyia ŋon waageŋ te kaboena nyi waa gyoo Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man. Kulutoo dokoloŋ man na, dokoloŋ kooŋ te ɔ na gyoo ke man. Pɛte waa gyoo ke man mɔ na, kaboena nyi waa nyiŋ wonembu fatabo keŋ waa mo gyoraa ɔ wose na ɔ balaŋ baŋ pou lee be nombiakumɛɛ ŋan be ta gyem ya te bɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: All of this is the Holy Spirit's way of saying no one could enter the most holy place while the tent was still the place of worship.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon dɔŋ nombia kɛŋa dɔɔ ɔ na wola daa lee abɔɔ kɛŋa man nideli nyiaa, debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ kanyaŋ ɔsom deni dinaa kei nyiŋa ka seŋɛɛ nɛ, na gbɛɛ ta toro ta fa balaŋ yakaa nyibaŋ nyi baa gyoo Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man ya.

english_verse: These rules are merely about such things as eating and drinking and ceremonies for washing ourselves. And rules about physical things will last only until the time comes to change them for something better.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi bɔ ɔsom pou yɛɛ wosenaane man ɔsom ke. Te ba kpene kamasɛ gyakae kedi na kenyɔɔ na wose kefaafo mmaraase dɔɔ, ŋgba mena keŋ ba mmaraase na wolo nɛ. Kɛŋa doowɔ menɛɛ kelii debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be kaa wola wɔ gbɛɛ wɔle keŋ baa mo som e lee nɔɔkebakesee wɔle keŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: Then Christ went once for all into the most holy place and freed us from sin forever. He did this by offering his own blood instead of the blood of goats and bulls.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ ɔ ba gyoo Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man nɛ, na asoose na nunkyuese bia fatabo te ɔ moowɔ gyoo botɔɔ ya. Mɔna ŋon gbagba fatabo te ɔ moowɔ gyoo botɔɔ ke deesi karatetee dokoloŋ mo tɔ nombiakumɛɛ kom kekpaakekpaa. Lee mena dɔɔ, te yeli Wurubuarɛ ta mo de nombiakumɛɛ pou kyɛɛ daa kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: According to the Law of Moses, those people who become unclean are not fit to worship God. Yet they will be considered clean, if they are sprinkled with the blood of goats and bulls and with the ashes of a sacrificed calf.
translation_verse: Gyaŋgba gyaŋgba keŋ na, nyi akpaa ŋolo da mo ayimɛɛ tina ɔ wose nɛ, bɛɛ mo asoo na nunkyue baale fatabo, na nunkyue bu ŋon bɔɔ too e nɛ tɔŋ ŋmatee ɔtenate mo gberaa wa ayimɛɛ ŋan lee ɔ wose man.

english_verse: But Christ was sinless, and he offered himself as an eternal and spiritual sacrifice to God. This is why his blood is much more powerful and makes our consciences clear. Now we can serve the living God and no longer do things that lead to death.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa nunkyuese na asoose fatabo ne tale gberaa ayimɛɛ lee balaŋ wose man nɛ, kenaŋ na Kristo fatabo gyae ke tale yɛɛ kela mena na ke kyɛɛkee de dinɔɔ. Nawolo nyi na ayimɛɛ kamasɛ be doo ɔ man ya, te ɔ tɛe Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ doŋ dɔɔ mo ɔ wose deesi fa Wurubuarɛ lee de nombiakumɛɛ dɔɔ. Ɔ fatabo keŋ ne faafo na de nombiakumɛɛ lee de konɔɔse man, na dɛɛ tale som Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ nideli.

english_verse: In fact, making an agreement of this kind is like writing a will. This is because the one who makes the will must die before it is of any use.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ŋolo de yɛɛ ɔ yeŋ wɔle abɔɔ kekpala tɔne see nɛ, kaboena nyi ɔtenate waa yeŋ pɛna ŋolo ke di wa abɔɔ. Nawolo nyi walaŋ ta yeŋa ta ya na, bɔɔ ne di wa abɔɔ ya.

english_verse: In other words, a will doesn't go into effect as long as the one who made it is still alive.
translation_verse: Nyi ŋolo da yem na, pɛte ɔ yeŋ wɔle abɔɔ kekpala tɔne keŋ ne yɛɛ tom. Nyi akpaa walaŋ ŋon ɔ be yɛɛ ke nɛ ta yeŋa ta ya na, tɔne kenaŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ tom ya.

english_verse: Blood was also used to put the first agreement into effect.
translation_verse: Lee kei dɔɔ te Wurubuarɛ moo fatabo tɔ nɔɔkebakesee gyaŋgbate keŋ nɔɔ.

english_verse: Moses told the people all the Law said they must do. Then he used red wool and a hyssop plant to sprinkle the people and the book of the Law with the blood of bulls and goats and with water.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ te debaŋ keŋ Mosesi be yako balaŋ baŋ pou Wurubuarɛ mmaraase ŋan taŋ nɛ, ɔ moo nunkyuese bia na asoose fatabo mo kyakale na loŋ. Kenaŋ wɔle te ɔ moo wona ŋaale ŋgba kekuŋ nɛ te ɔ kpera daŋ daale tombii, te ɔ moo ŋa bom sɔɔ loŋ na fatabo keŋ man te ɔ moowɔ ŋmatee mmaraa tɔne keŋ na balaŋ baŋ pou mo gyoraa wɔ.

english_verse: Moses also sprinkled blood on the tent and on everything else used in worship.
translation_verse: Mena mɔ te Mosesi moo fatabo keŋ ŋmatee Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ, na ɔsom abɔɔ ŋan pou.

english_verse: The Law says that almost everything must be sprinkled with blood, and no sins can be forgiven unless blood is offered. Christ's Great Sacrifice
translation_verse: Ke yɛɛ ampaŋ nyi Mosesi mmaraase ŋan nawolo nyi, fatabo te bɛɛ mo gberaa kpene kamasɛ lese ka ayimɛɛ. Mena dɔɔ nyi akpaa fatabo ta lee ya na, kenaŋ na dukum ka mo kyɛɛ mɔ be kyaa ya.

english_verse: These things are only copies of what is in heaven, and so they had to be made holy by these ceremonies. But the real things in heaven must be made holy by something better.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi baa mo wonembia deesi, na baa mo gberaa abɔɔ ŋan ŋe kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ te ŋa seŋɛɛ fa adido wui ŋan nɛ. Mɔna adido wui ŋan gbagba dɔɔ, kaboena nyi baa mo kpene keŋ kɛɛ gyoo sibii kela wonembia fatabo nɛ deesi bo mo gyoraa ŋa.

english_verse: This is why Christ did not go into a tent made by humans and was only a copy of the real one. Instead, he went into heaven and is now there with God to help us.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi na ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ bɔɔ kasee adido wui keŋ yɛɛ nɛ tɔɔman te Kristo gyoowɔ ya, mɔna ɔ gyoe adido gbagba botɔɔ keŋ Wurubuarɛ kyaa nɛ. Te nɛnɛɛ ɔ seŋɛɛ de nawɔɔ man Wurubuarɛ siaman ɔ na sola e fa daa.

english_verse: Christ did not have to offer himself many times. He wasn't like a high priest who goes into the most holy place each year to offer the blood of an animal.
translation_verse: Kulutoo kamasɛ na, Gyudatena saese kegyia ŋon na mo wonembu fatabo gyu Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man ke deesi. Mɔna Kristo dɔɔ ŋon ta mo ɔ wose gyu botɔɔ ke deesi fa Wurubuarɛ kulutoo na kulutoo ya.

english_verse: If he had offered himself every year, he would have suffered many times since the creation of the world. But instead, near the end of time he offered himself once and for all, so he could be a sacrifice that does away with sin.
translation_verse: Nyi Kristo deŋ yɛɛwɔ mena nɛ, nafɔ ŋon naa diyem agbaatee agbaatee mo leenaŋ debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ tɛɛle kei kewalaŋ nɛ. Mɔna tɛɛle kei kee gyu kɔ ɔto nɛ, ɔ lese ɔ wose wola te ɔ moo ɔ wose deesi karatetee dokoloŋ na waa mo lese de nombiakumɛɛ.

english_verse: So Christ died only once to take away the sins of many people. But when he comes again, it will not be to take away sin. He will come to save everyone who is waiting for him.
translation_verse: Mena yeŋ dokoloŋ kenaŋ ke te Kristo mɔ yeŋawɔ mo ɔ wose fa, na waa nyiŋ lese balaŋ burum lee ba dukum man. Yesu waa bese kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ bela. Ɔ kɛɛ kɔŋ kei dɔɔ, na ɔ ne kɔŋ bo ɔ kaa lese balaŋ lee be nombiakumɛɛ man ya. Mɔna ɔ ne kɔŋ bo ɔ kaa lɛɛ balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ yɛɛ kakyeŋ be kyaa be daa na e nɛ nyee.

english_verse: The Law of Moses is like a shadow of the good things to come. This shadow isn't the good things themselves, because it cannot free people from sin by the sacrifices offered year after year.
translation_verse: Mosesi mmaraase ŋan seŋɛɛ bo fa abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋan dɔŋ wɔle kaa kɔŋ nɛ, ŋa te yɛɛ abɔɔ kpaakpaa ŋenaŋ gbagba ya. Lee kei dɔɔ kedeesase ŋan balaŋ ne deesi kulutoo kamasɛ ŋgba mena keŋ mmaraase ŋan ba wola wɔ nɛ, be gyae ke tale yela walaŋ gbɛɛneŋ ka tenee Wurubuarɛ siaman ya.

english_verse: If there were worshipers who already have their sins washed away and their consciences made clear, there would not be any need to go on offering sacrifices.
translation_verse: Nyi ba kedeesase ŋenaŋ deŋ talewɔ yela be gbɛɛneŋ deŋ teneewɔ Wurubuarɛ siaman nɛ, nafɔ beŋ wulaa tinaa kedeesase ŋenaŋ yela. Nyi ŋe deŋ talewɔ lɛɛ wɔ nɛ, nafɔ bɔɔ tekaa wɔlɛɛ nyi Wurubuarɛ waa kaa wɔŋ ba deŋele lee be nombiakumɛɛ ŋenaŋ dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: But the blood of bulls and goats cannot take away sins. It only reminds people of their sins from one year to the next.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi nunkyuese na asoose fatabo, be gyae ke tale faafo dukum lee deniwalaŋ wose man ya.

english_verse: Then Christ said, “And so, my God, I have come to do what you want, as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ, ‘Me Gbeŋgyoo maŋ yaa. Me kɔŋae me kaa yɛɛ n kegyaebii, ŋgba mena keŋ bɔɔ ŋmarase ma wose man nombia do n nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan man nɛ.’ ”

english_verse: The Law teaches that offerings and sacrifices must be made because of sin. But why did Christ mention these things and say that God did not want them?
translation_verse: Kristo taŋ wulaa yako kaalaŋ nyiaa, “Wurubuarɛ bɛɛ gyae kedeesa na abɔɔ ŋan bɛɛ mo sola e na wonembia katoo kedeesa na dukum kasola kedeesa ya, te ŋe bɛɛ gyoo ɔ sia mɔ ya.” Mɔna kɛŋa pou yɛɛ kpene keŋ Mosesi mmaraase ŋan na wolo nyi baa yɛɛ.

english_verse: Well, it was to do away with offerings and sacrifices and to replace them. This is what he meant by saying to God, “I have come to do what you want.”
translation_verse: Botɔɔ te Kristo besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Me Gbeŋgyoo maŋ yaa. Me kɔŋae me kaa yɛɛ n kegyaebii.” Kei nawolo baa nyi Wurubuarɛ te bɛɛ kedeesa gyaŋgbate keŋ, te ɔ moo Kristo wui keŋ ɔ ba mo ɔ wose deesi nɛ kaa see ke nawɔɔ man.

english_verse: So we are made holy because Christ obeyed God and offered himself once for all.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ kegyaebii keŋ Kristo be kɔŋ kaa yɛɛ mo ɔ wose deesi karatetee dokoloŋ kekpaakekpaa nɛ, keŋ lese na da ayimɛɛ desina daa see fa Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: The priests do their work each day, and they keep on offering sacrifices that can never take away sins.
translation_verse: Wee na wee na, Gyudatena saese baŋ gyakaa bee deesi kedeesa dokoloŋ kenaŋ agbaatee agbaatee. Mɔna ŋe bɛɛ tale lese dukum lee deniwalaŋ wose man ya.

english_verse: But Christ offered himself as a sacrifice that is good forever. Now he is sitting at God's right side,
translation_verse: Mɔ Kristo dɔɔ ŋon moo ɔ wose deesi fa Wurubuarɛ karatetee dokoloŋ kekpaakekpaa, na waa mo lese de nombiakumɛɛ. Kenaŋ wɔle na te ɔ ke kyaawɔ Wurubuarɛ dunoluŋ dɔɔ adido.

english_verse: The Holy Spirit also speaks of this by telling us that the Lord said,
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon gbagba mɔ ne di adansɛɛ lee mena nombia kɛŋa wose man, ŋgba mena keŋ bɔɔ ŋmarase Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see man nɛ nyiaa.

english_verse: “When the time comes, I will make an agreement with them. I will write my laws on their minds and hearts.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ kpa, “Nɔɔkebakesee keŋ maŋ ɛ Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ na me balaŋ be bake see yɛna nyiaa, Debaŋ daale de lii na, maa mo ma mmaraase ŋan do be konɔɔse na ba nyeeya man.”

english_verse: Then I will forget about their sins and no longer remember their evil deeds.”
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako nyiaa, “Mɔɔ gyae maa tɔɔse be nombiakumɛɛ na be nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan bɔɔ yɛɛ nɛ bela ya.”

english_verse: My friends, the blood of Jesus gives us courage to enter the most holy place
translation_verse: Me tebia, lee Yesu yeŋ keŋ dɔɔ de te nyiŋ gbɛɛ keŋ dɛɛ tale gyoo Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa tɔɔmante keŋ man yakaa.

english_verse: by a new way that leads to life! And this way takes us through the curtain that is Christ himself.
