english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Mena keŋ gyaŋgba baale ba beo mo ba wose nyi be yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔrawɔ Iseraetena man nɛ, mena mɔ te akɛrɛɛ wolala baa kyaa ɛ man. Baa mo nyansa wola nombia ŋan te yɛɛ anokoare ya. Baa ta wola balaŋ nombia ŋan gyae ke yela baa yo nɛ. Baa bɛɛ nyi bɔɔ gyeŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ ba yem lɛɛ daa gba nɛ ya. Mena dɔɔ be gyae ke kyare ya, kayeyɛɛ dinaa daale gyae ke kɔŋ be dɔɔ.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Balaŋ burum baa sila wɔ yɛɛ ba desɛŋ nombia ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ. Te be nombia ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ nɛ dɔɔ, balaŋ baa kolosi nombiakumɛɛ tia Kristo anokoare gbɛɛneŋ ŋan.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Lee sibii dɔɔ mena akɛrɛɛ wolala kɛwɔ baa mo akɛrɛɛ nombia beo ŋon, na baa mo nyansa gbɛɛ mo ŋon gyae kɔba. Mena dɔɔ leenaŋ beneŋ beneŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ yakowɔ see nyi waa wɔŋ ba deŋele, te waa taŋ wɔlɛɛ wɔ bo.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nyi debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ be kyaa adido be yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ nɛ, Wurubuarɛ te tina wɔ yela ya. Mɔna ɔ moo wɔ do kayeyɛɛ kekpaakekpaa man. Ɔ doo wɔ agbaraagbaraase man te ɔ moo wɔ ka do ditiŋtɛɛ man, na baa doo botɔɔ kelii ɔ nombia kedi wee keŋ.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nyi Wurubuarɛ buu Sodom na Gomoratena fɔɔ. Ɔ yela boalaŋ kpaa be popou bese tɔŋ. Ɔ yɛe mena na ka wola nyi nnɛ ne gyae la ke kɔŋ balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ ne nyii ɔ dei ya nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Lɔɔte kekyaa balaŋ kumɛɛ kɛwɔ man na ɔ kena be nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan bɛɛ yɛɛ, na be nɔɔwoya kumɛɛ ŋan bee kolosi nɛ takaa e nideli. Nawolo nyi ɔ yɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Nombia kɛŋa pou nawolo baa nyi, Wurubuarɛ gyeŋ mena keŋ waa lese ɔ balaŋ lee be kaale man. Te ɔ gyeŋ mena keŋ waa yɛɛ, na waa wɔŋ balaŋ kumɛɛ deŋele kelii wee keŋ waa di walaŋ kamasɛ nombia nɛ.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Kɛŋa pou wɔle na, balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ yɛɛ nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae te ŋɛɛ wɔlɛɛ wɔ te bɔɔ na mo Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ kolo ya nɛ, Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ ba deŋele nideli. Mena akɛrɛɛ wolala kɛwɔ dana konɔɔyuŋ te bɛɛ wola ba wose, te bɛɛ tale gyɔ konɔɔ kolosi nombiakumɛɛ tia baŋ be kyaa adido te be dana gyoorobiiri nɛ.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ gba koraŋ be dana doŋ kela akɛrɛɛ wolala kɛwɔ nɛ, ta tee balaŋ baŋ be dana gyoorobiiri adido nɛ yaa baa mo nombiakumɛɛ gyakaa be dɔɔ de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ siaman ya.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Mɔna mena balaŋ kɛwɔ baŋ be dana konɔɔyuŋ nɛ dɔɔ, nombia ŋan bɔɔ ne nyii ŋe man ya na mmusuo nombiikum kamasɛ keŋ be gyae na te bee kolosi lee ka wose man. Be dinɔɔ yɛɛ ŋgba ŋale man wonembia baŋ balaŋ na koe nɛ. Kpene kamasɛ keŋ de kɔŋ ba nyee man na, keŋ te bɛɛ yɛɛ. Mena dɔɔ baa yeŋ leki ŋgba ŋale man wonembia nɛ.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ waa naase wɔ diyem nideli ŋgba mena keŋ baŋ mɔ be naase baale diyem nɛ. Baŋ gyaŋ na nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ keyɛɛ balaŋ man yɛna gyoŋ kedi. Mena dɔɔ ɛ gyaŋee ɛ ne di ɛ nɔɔ te be kaa kyaa bom na ŋan na, be dana wɔ desɛŋ gba nyi baa yɛɛ be nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan ɛ man ya. Kei ne yeli bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ ɛ yele do ŋon desɛŋ.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Bɔɔ ne gyɔ sibii naa alo laŋ ya, te nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ yɛna be wui. Bɛɛ beo balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ dana doŋ ba kelɛɛdi man ya nɛ, te bee yeli balaŋ benaŋ ne yɛɛ dukum. Be dana sibii nideli. Mena abɔɔ kumɛɛ kɛŋa pou dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ te falaa wɔ.

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Be te tina Kristo gbɛɛ kpaakpaa keŋ yela gyu ka mo baŋ gbagba be gbɛɛ keŋ be yeli bɔɔ yoo nɛ. Be silana Beeyɔ bu Baalam nawɔɔ. Na Baalam kei yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ dekpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔre e, te ɔ be famenɛ na nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ lee kɔba keŋ waa nyiŋ lee ke man dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Nyi walaŋ da gyeŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ da nyeelɛɛre e nɛ te ɔ lese ɔ wose lee tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan ŋɛɛ wɔlɛɛ walaŋ nɛ keyɛɛ man, te ɔ bese gyu ɔ ne yɛɛ ŋa bela na ŋe gyae ke di doŋ ɔ dɔɔ. Dekɔŋ mena na ɔ dinɔɔ gyae ka bese wɔlɛɛ kela mena keŋ nafɔ ɔ doo pɛte ɔ be kaa lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Nyi nafɔ ɔtenate deŋ ta gyeŋ gbɛɛ keŋ waa mo na ɔ nombia ka tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman ya na, nafɔ dei fa e kela keŋ ɔ ba gyeŋ ke te ɔ ba besena ɔ wɔle tee Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan bɔɔ wola e nɛ.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Ba te gyɔ aduya ŋaale see nyiaa, “Babaa ne tɔe na ɔ ta bese ka mo ɔ tɔɔla di” te “N sɔ kekuirii na, ɔ na bese bo ka gyoo depate man.” Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ dinɔɔ nawolo nyi aduya kɛŋa yɛɛ ampaŋ.

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae nyi ɛ ke tɔɔse nombia ŋan Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra baŋ be yako see leenaŋ beneŋ keŋ nɛ. Na ɛ ka bese tɔɔse nombia ŋan de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ da nyeelɛɛre e nɛ be tɛɛ daa ɔ kpilala baŋ de kyaa ɛ man nɛ dɔɔ yako nyi yaa yɛɛ nɛ.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Nombii keŋ mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ nideli yɛna nyiaa, weeya ɔtoman nyiŋan pɛte Yesu ke kɔŋ na, balaŋ baale baa kɔŋ kaa yɛɛ nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae. Baa kulu ŋon gbɛɛ kamasɛ man lee ɛ kelɛɛdi dɔɔ.

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Akpaa be yako mena na be karae. Nawolo nyi ba te wolee nyi lee gyaŋgba gyaŋgba keŋ na, nombii yakaa te Wurubuarɛ kolosiwɔ te adido na ateta bɛɛwɔ lee. Wurubuarɛ yela tɛɛle leewɔ loŋ man kɔŋ, te loŋ kenaŋ dɔɔ te ɔ tɛɛwɔ yɛɛ tɛɛle kei.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Ba te wolee mɔ nyi loŋ kenaŋ te Wurubuarɛ yela ke kaa waalewɔ wɔlɛɛ gyaŋgbatena baŋ bɔɔ kyaa debaŋ kenaŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ nombii kenaŋ te ɔ moowɔ ɔ dana adido na tɛɛle keŋ dɔɔ ɛ kyaa nɛ. Ŋe doo ŋɛɛ daa debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa mo boalaŋ wɔlɛɛ ŋa nɛ. Ŋe doo menɛɛ kelii nombia kedi wee dinaa keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa wɔlɛɛ balaŋ baŋ pou be te nyii ɔ dei ya nɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't forget that for the Lord one day is the same as
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛ na wolee nombii dokoloŋ kei ya. Nombii kenaŋ yɛna nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ siaman na wee dokoloŋ yɛɛ ŋgba kulutooneŋ kakpoŋ (

english_verse: years is the same as one day.
translation_verse: ) mɔ yɛɛ ŋgba wee dokoloŋ nɛ.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu waa kɔŋ nɛ, waa kaa futaa daa bo ŋgba mena keŋ ŋmɛɛlate ne kɔŋ nɛ. Mena wee kenaŋ na adido gyae ka mo yeesa ŋaalaa. Boalaŋ gyae ke kpa kpene kamasɛ keŋ doo adido na ateta nɛ pou dugudugudugu.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Mɔna daa dɔɔ de kyaa dɛɛ daa adido wɔle, na tɛɛle wɔle keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa yɛɛ nɛ. Botɔɔ te balaŋ baŋ pou be gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ nɛ baa kyaa.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Ɛ tɔɔse nyi de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ konɔɔ keŋ ɔ be nyim nɛ, ke yɛɛ kpene keŋ ne fa deniwalaŋ gbɛɛ na waa nyiŋ nyiŋ nyeekelɛɛ pɛna ɔ wee keŋ kelii. Mena nombia ŋenaŋ ke, te de dɔɔ gyaagyi Pɔɔl mɔ moo nyansa keŋ Wurubuarɛ be fa e nɛ ŋmarase ɔ tɔna pou man yelee ŋon.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Mena ke te ɔ ŋmarasewɔ yako mena nombia kɛŋa ɔ tɔna pou man. Ɔ nombia ŋaale doo ɔ tɔna ŋenaŋ man keŋ ŋe man kenyii dana baŋ. Balaŋ baale baŋ bɔɔ gyeŋ nombia ya te bɔɔ seŋɛɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man keŋkeŋ ya nɛ, ne tulii ɔ nombia ŋenaŋ bo. Mena ke mɔ te bee tulii Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ akaŋ ŋan mɔ. Bɛɛ yɛɛ mena nɛ, na Wurubuarɛ kefaala yaa bɛɛ gyae baa fa ba wose nɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛ wulaa ɛ gyeŋ mena nombia kɛŋa. Mena dɔɔ ɛ doo ɛ wose dɔɔ nideli, na balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ ne di Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan dɔɔ ya nɛ, be nyiŋ mo ba akɛrɛɛ nombia ŋan wɔŋee ŋon lee ɛ daseŋae kpaakpaate keŋ man ya.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ yela de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ yɛɛ da nyeelɛɛre e nɛ, ka mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa yela ɛ ka gyeŋ e nideli. Ŋon te gyoorobiiri kaboena gyɛŋ kei na weeya pou kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ be kyaa leenaŋ kewalaŋ keŋ nɛ wose man nombia yaa mɛɛ ŋmarase mɛɛ fa ŋon. Ŋon yɛna walaŋ ŋon dɔɔ nyii ɔ nɔɔwoya te dɔɔ naa e. Daa gbagba naa e na de sia fonɛɛ te da moo de nyiŋmaase tina e. Ŋon yɛna Yesu Kristo, nombii keŋ kɛɛ fa nyeedoŋ kekpaa nɛ.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ lesena mena walaŋ kei wola daa te de naa e. Ŋon ne faa na nyeedoŋ keŋ ba lee Wurubuarɛ gbagba gyaŋ nɛ. Debaŋ kei man nɛ ɔ wose man nombii yaa dee di adansɛɛ yako ŋon nyiaa, ŋon yɛna walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne fa nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ. Nafɔ na ɔ kyae kya ŋon gyaŋ, mɔna nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ ɔ ta lese e wola daa.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon daa gbagba be naa e na de sia, te dɔɔ nyii ɔ nɔɔwoya nɛ wose man nombia yaa dɛɛ yako ŋon nɛ. Dɛɛ yako ŋon baa na ɛmɛɛ mɔ kenyiŋ kaa kpu na daa baŋ daa na de kya Wurubuarɛ na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo ŋon nɔɔ yɛɛ dokoloŋ nɛ, na de popou nɔɔ ke yɛɛ dokoloŋ.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Dɛɛ gyae nyi mena gyoŋ kei ke doo de man nideli, mena dɔɔ te dɛɛ ŋmarase ŋon mena nombia kɛŋa nɛ. Ɛ ta keŋmaŋee man

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Nɔɔwoya ŋan Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon ba mo fa daa te daa mɔ ne yako ŋon nɛ yɛna nyiaa, Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ ŋgba keŋmaŋee nɛ te ditiŋtɛɛ be doo ɔ man korakora ya.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ nyi akpaa de yako nyi nɔɔdokoloŋ doo daa na e man te de sɛɛ dɛɛ yɛɛ ditiŋtɛɛ man abɔɔ na, dee dii akɛrɛɛ bo te anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ be doo de man ya.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Mɔna nyi akpaa de kyaa Wurubuarɛ keŋmaŋee keŋ man ŋgba mena keŋ ŋon gbagba kyaa ke man nɛ, na nɔɔdokoloŋ doo daa na de tebia man. Kenaŋ na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo fatabo keŋ ne gberaa da ayimɛɛ kamasɛ lee da wose man.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Akpaa de yako nyi dukum be doo de man ya na dɛɛ beo da wose bo, te anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ be doo de man ya.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Akpaa de yako nyi da te yɛɛ ta dukum korakora ya na, de ta besena Wurubuarɛ yɛɛ dekarate. Kei nawolo baa nyi de bɛɛ lɛɛ ɔ nombia ŋan ɔ be yako daa nɛ di ya.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Me bia, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mɛɛ fa ŋon na ɛ be nyiŋ yɛɛ dukum ya. Te akpaa ŋolo de yɛɛ dukum na, de dana tereete ŋon ɔ seŋɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman ɔ ne doo teree fa daa. Ŋon yɛna Yesu Kristo ŋon ɔ gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman nɛ.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Akpaa nyi de nyii Wurubuarɛ dei na, kenaŋ na dɛɛ tale gyɔ de konɔɔ nyi da gyeŋ e.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ nyaŋ walaŋ ŋon n yako nyi “N gyeŋ e” mɔna n bee nyii ɔ dei ya na, n yɛɛ dekarate e te anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ be doo n man ya.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Te nyaŋ ŋon n ne nyii Wurubuarɛ dei na, Wurubuarɛ kegyae gbagba keŋ doo n man nideli. Kpene keŋ gyae ke yela dɛɛ gyeŋ nyi daa na e dana nɔɔdokoloŋ yɛna nyi,

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: nyaŋ ŋon n yako nyi ɛmɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ dana nɔɔdokoloŋ na, kaboena nyi nya kyaa ŋgba mena keŋ Yesu be kyaa nɛ. Wurubuarɛ kpa dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, na mmaraa wɔle yaa mɛɛ ŋmarase maa fa ŋon ya, mɔna mmaraa bene keŋ ɛ be nyii lee debaŋ keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu di nɛ. Mmaraa kei yɛna nombia ŋan ɛ betaŋ nyii nɛ.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Mɔna kei ta bese mmaraa wɔle keŋ mɛɛ ŋmarase mɛɛ fa ŋon. Yesu Kristo kekyaa man na, ɔ dinɔɔ wolawɔ nyi ke yɛɛ mmaraa wɔle ke. Ɛmɛɛ gbagba mɔ ɛ dinɔɔ na wolo nyi ke yɛɛ mmaraa wɔle ke. Nawolo nyi keŋmaŋee keŋ taŋ bɛɛ lee, te ka te yeli ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ mɔ ne ŋaalaa.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ ŋon n kpa n doo keŋmaŋee keŋ man te n sɛɛ n ne kɔla n dɔɔ na, n sɛɛ n doo ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ man baa.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Mɔna nyaŋ ŋon n ne gyae n dɔɔ na n doo keŋmaŋee keŋ man, te kolo mɔ be doo n man keŋ gyae ke yela n kegyɔ n nae ya.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ nyaŋ ŋon n ne kɔla n dɔɔ na, n doo ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ man te n dɔŋɛɛ ke man. N ba gyeŋ botɔɔ keŋ n ne gyu ya nawolo nyi ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ te tɔ n sia.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Me bia kpaakpaa, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, nawolo nyi lee Kristo yele man dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ ta mo ɛ nombiakumɛɛ kyɛɛ ŋon.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Kyaɔ, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, nawolo nyi ɛ gyeŋ walaŋ ŋon ɔ kyaa lee kewalaŋ keŋ nɛ. Tewulɛɛ, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, nawolo nyi ɛ te di walaŋkum ŋon dɔɔ. Me bia kpaakpaa, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, nawolo nyi ɛ te kɔŋ kaa gyeŋ de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Kyaɔ, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, nawolo nyi ɛ gyeŋ ŋon ɔ kyaa lee kewalaŋ keŋ nɛ. Tewulɛɛ, mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ nombia doo ɛ man te ɛ seŋɛɛ ŋe man nideli te ɛ te di walaŋkum ŋon dɔɔ. Ɛ na mo ɛ sia gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ abɔɔ dɔɔ ya

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Ɛ na mo ɛ sia gyakaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ nombia na ka abɔɔ kumɛɛ dɔɔ ya. Akpaa walaŋ da mo ɔ sia gyakaa tɛɛle kei abɔɔ dɔɔ na, nawolo baa nyi ɔ bɛɛ gyae de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon ya.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Tɛɛle kei na ŋa abɔɔ ŋan pou balaŋ na mo be loo gyakaa ŋe dɔɔ nɛ ne lem baa. Mɔna walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ nyii Wurubuarɛ dei te ɔ yɛɛ kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae na waa nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ. Kristo kɔlare ŋon

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Me bia kpaakpaa, debaŋ keŋ tɛɛle kei gyae kekɔŋ kɔ ɔto nɛ ta benaa. De taŋ taŋgbɛɛ yako ŋon nyi tɛɛle kei da benaa kɔ ɔto na, Kristo kɔlare ŋon waa kɔŋ. Te debokeiman nɛ dɛɛ naa nyi Kristo kɔlala burum kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ. Kei nawola la nyi debaŋ keŋ tɛɛle kei gyae kekɔŋ kɔ ɔto nɛ ta benaa.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Nafɔ mena balaŋ kɛwɔ kpuɛ na daa, te keŋ daa na wɔ nɔɔ te yɛɛ dokoloŋ dɔɔ ya te ba leewɔ de man. Daa na wɔ nɔɔ deŋ yɛɛ dokoloŋ na, nafɔ beŋ ta lee de man ya. Be ka lee de man nawolo nyi daa na be man walaŋ kamasɛ te yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ ya.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ gyeŋ anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ, nawolo nyi Kristo ta mo ɔ feliŋ ŋon do ɛ man.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Na keŋ ɛ ba gyeŋ anokoare keŋ dɔɔ te mɛɛ ŋmarase ŋon tɔne kei ya, mɔna keŋ ɛ gyeŋ anokoare keŋ dɔɔ. Te ɛ gyeŋ nyi dekara kamasɛ be doo anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ man ya.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Amɔte yɛna dekarate baa? Dekarate yɛna ŋon ɔ bɛɛ nyi na Yesu yɛna Kristo, walaŋ ŋon Wurubuarɛ be yako see nyi waa kaa lɛɛ da nyee ya nɛ. Ɔtenate yɛna Kristo kɔlare ŋon, nawolo nyi ɔ te bɛɛ de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo ŋon pou.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ ŋon n bɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon na n te bɛɛ de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon mɔ baa, te nyaŋ ŋon n lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon di na n lɛɛ de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon mɔ baa di.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ beo ŋon nɛ dɔɔ te mɛɛ ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa mee yelee ŋon, na ɛ ke nyiŋ doo ɛ wose dɔɔ.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon Kristo ba moo do ɛ man nɛ te dɔɔ ɛ man. Lee mena dɔɔ tekaboena nyi ŋolo waa wola ŋon kolo bela ya. Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ne gyae la waa wola ŋon kpene kamasɛ. Abɔɔ ŋan pou ɔ na wolo nɛ yɛɛ anokoare keŋ dekara be doo ŋe man ya. Mena dɔɔ ɛ yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ na Kristo ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ nawola ŋon nɛ.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Me bia kpaakpaa ɛ gyakaa yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ na e, na wee keŋ ɔ bese kɔŋ na dɛɛ tale gyɔ de konɔɔ ɔ siaman keŋ desɛŋ yaa gyakoloŋ be kyaŋ daa ya.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Ɛ gyeŋ nyi Kristo nombia tenɛɛ, lee mena dɔɔ walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne yɛɛ kpene keŋ dei Wurubuarɛ siaman na ɔtenate yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ kegyae kpaakpaa keŋ de kya Wurubuarɛ ne gyae daa, te ɔ ne baake daa nyi ɔ bia gbagba te ampaŋ de yɛɛ ɔ biawɔ. Kpene keŋ dɔɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ ba gyeŋ nyi de yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ biawɔ yɛna nyi, bɔɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ gbagba ya.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, nɛnɛɛ de yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ biawɔ, te dinɔɔ keŋ waa yela dee nyiŋ wee daale nɛ, ɔ ta lese ta ke wola daa ya. Mɔna da gyeŋ nyi wee keŋ waa kɔŋ nɛ dɛɛ yɛɛ ŋgba ŋon nɛ, nawolo nyi dɛɛ naa e na dɛɛ gyeŋ mena keŋ ɔ doo.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ loo gyakaa ɔ dɔɔ mena nɛ, ɔtenate waa wɔŋ ɔ wose lee dukum keyɛɛ man ŋgba Kristo nɛ.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ dukum na ɔ ta fom Wurubuarɛ mmaraa keŋ, nawolo nyi dukum keyɛɛ yɛna Wurubuarɛ mmaraa kafom.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ŋon na Kristo dana nɔɔdokoloŋ na, ɔ bee doo dukum keyɛɛ man bela ya. Kei nawolo nyi ŋon ɔ gyakaa ɔ ne yɛɛ dukum na, ɔ te naa ta Yesu Kristo ya te ɔ ba gyeŋ ɔ dinɔɔ mɔ ya.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ gyakaa ɔ ne yɛɛ dukum na ɔ yɛɛ ɔbɔnsam walaŋ e, nawolo nyi ɔbɔnsam yɛɛ dukumyɛɛre e leenaŋ kewalaŋ keŋ pou. Kpene keŋ dɔɔ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon be kɔŋ yɛna nyi, ɔ kɔŋae ɔ kaa wɔlɛɛ ɔbɔnsam tom.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e na, ɔ be doo dukum keyɛɛ man ya nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ dinɔɔ doo ɔ man. Te ɔ be gyae waa tale gyakaa dukum keyɛɛ dɔɔ ya, nawolo nyi ɔ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Nnɛ te dɛɛ mo gyeŋ baŋ be yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bia na baŋ be yɛɛ ɔbɔnsam wui. Nyaŋ ŋon n bɛɛ yɛɛ kpene keŋ dei ya yaa nyaŋ ŋon n bɛɛ gyae n dɔɔ ya na n te yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e ya. Ɛ gyae dɔŋa

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Nombii keŋ ɛ be nyii leenaŋ debaŋ keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di nɛ yɛna nyi “Dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa.”

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yɛɛ ŋgba balee ŋon bɛɛ baake e nyi Kani nɛ ya. Na Kani yɛɛ ɔbɔnsam walaŋ e te ɔ koo ɔ naabu. Woŋ dɔɔ te Kani koo ɔ naabu? Nawolo nyi ŋon Kani gbɛɛneŋ ba tenɛɛ Wurubuarɛ siaman ya, te ɔ naabu gbɛɛneŋ tenɛɛ.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ me naabia, nyi tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ ne kɔla ŋon na ɛ na yeli ke yɛɛ ŋon gyakoloŋ ya.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ nyi daa dɔɔ de ta lee yeŋ man kɔŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa man, nawolo nyi dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa dɔɔ. Walaŋ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ gyae ɔ dɔɔ ya na, ɔ sɛɛ ɔ doo yeŋ nyiŋmaa man.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Nyaŋ ŋon n ne kɔla n dɔɔ na n yɛɛ awudiini e Wurubuarɛ siaman, te ɛ gyeŋ mɔ nyi awudiini kamasɛ be dana nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ ya.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo ka mo ɔ nyee lɛɛ daa dɔɔ, te da gyeŋ mena keŋ kaboena nyi daa mɔ dɛɛ gyae de tebia. Mena dɔɔ kaboena nyi daa mɔ dɛɛ mo da nyeeya lɛɛ de tebia.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Nyi akpaa ŋolo dana abɔɔ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ te ɔ naa nyi te hia ɔ dɔɔ, te ɔ bɛɛ lese ɔ sia yela e na sena te ɔtenate waa tale yako nyi Wurubuarɛ kegyae doo ɔ man?

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: Me bia kpaakpaa, ɛ na fa dɛɛ mo nɔɔ yakaa gyae dɔŋa ya, mɔna ɛ yela dɛɛ yɛɛ deeli fa dɔŋa anokoare man.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Kei ne gyae la ke yela dɛɛ gyeŋ nyi de yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ dana anokoare keŋ nɛ wui. Mena dɔɔ akpaa de konɔɔse de bu daa fɔɔ koraŋ na, dɛɛ tale seŋ Wurubuarɛ siaman keŋ dɔɔ yee gyakoloŋ ya.

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ kela de konɔɔse te ɔ gyeŋ kpene kamasɛ man.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, akpaa de konɔɔse bee bu daa fɔɔ ya na, dɛɛ tale seŋ Wurubuarɛ siaman keŋ dɔɔ yee kolo ya.

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: Te da sola e kpene kamasɛ na dee nyiŋ ke, nawolo nyi dee nyii ɔ dei te dɛɛ yɛɛ kpene keŋ ɔ ne gyae.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Kei yɛna kpene keŋ ɔ ne gyae nyi dɛɛ yɛɛ. Dɛɛ lɛɛ ɔ bu Yesu Kristo di, na dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ be yako daa nɛ.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne nyii Wurubuarɛ dei na, ŋon na Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ yɛɛ dokoloŋ. Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ ba mo do de man nɛ, yele la da gyeŋawɔ nyi daa na Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ yɛɛ dokoloŋ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛ na lɛɛ walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ kpa Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon doo ɔ man nɛ di yakaa yakaa ya. Mɔna ɛ kɛɛse ɔ nombia ŋan ɔ na wolo nɛ kɛɛ nyi ŋa lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ? Nawolo nyi balaŋ burum dɔŋ bee dii akɛrɛɛ nyi be nombia ŋan bee kolosi nɛ lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Te walaŋ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ lɛɛ nombii kei do na waa yako ke mena ya na, kenaŋ na Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan ɔtenate kpa ɔ ne kolosi nɛ yɛɛ dekara ke, nawolo nyi ke ta lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ ya. Ɔtenate yɛɛ Kristo kɔlare ŋon walaŋ e. Be wulaa yako ŋon Kristo kɔlala kɛwɔ kekɔŋ nombia, te debokeiman man gba be wulaa be kyaa tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Me bia kpaakpaa, ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ biawɔ te ɛ te di akɛrɛɛtena kɛwɔ dɔɔ. Ba te tale beo ŋon ya, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ɔ doo ɛ man nɛ, ɔ kela Kristo kɔlare ŋon feliŋ keŋ doo tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Mena akɛrɛɛtena kɛwɔ dɔɔ be yɛɛ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋwɔ te tɛɛle kei dɔɔ agyueŋ te be dana, mena dɔɔ te tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ ne nyii wɔ.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Te daa dɔɔ de yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ biawɔ. Walaŋ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ nɛ ne nyii daa, te ŋon ɔ te yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ wui ya na ɔ bee nyii daa ya. Lee kei man te dɛɛ mo gyeŋ baŋ be nombia ŋan bɛɛ wolo nɛ ba lee Wurubuarɛ anokoarete ŋon gyaŋ, na baŋ be wui ba lee Wurubuarɛ kɔlare dekarate ŋon gyaŋ. Ɛ fa dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛ fa dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa nawolo nyi dɔŋa kegyae kei lee Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ. Ɛ man walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne gyae ɔ tebia na, ɔtenate yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e te ɔ gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ mɔ.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ bɛɛ gyae ɔ tebia ya na ɔtenate ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya. Nawolo nyi kegyae pou nyee yɛna Wurubuarɛ.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Nnɛ te Wurubuarɛ lesewɔ wola nyi ɔ ne gyae daa. Wurubuarɛ kpila ɔ bu dokoloŋ kooŋ ŋon ɔ dana nɛ kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ, na dɛɛ ta ɔ dɔɔ nyiŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Nnɛ yɛna kegyae gbagba. Te yɛɛ nyi daa taŋgbɛɛ la gyae Wurubuarɛ nombia ya, mɔna ŋon gyae na daa te ɔ kpila ɔ bu te ɔ kaa moo ɔ wose deesi fa de nombiakumɛɛ. Te Wurubuarɛ tɛɛwɔ ke dɔɔ mo de nombiakumɛɛ ŋenaŋ kyɛɛ daa.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, nyi nnɛ te Wurubuarɛ gyae daa na kaboena nyi daa mɔ dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa mena.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ŋolo na ŋolo te naa ta Wurubuarɛ na ɔ sia ya, mɔna akpaa de gyae dɔŋa na daa na Wurubuarɛ nɔɔ te yɛɛ dokoloŋ, nawolo nyi ɔ te yeli dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa ŋgba mena keŋ ɔ ne gyae nɛ.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Lee ɔ feliŋ ŋon ɔ ba mo do de man dɔɔ, da gyeŋ nyi daa na e dana nɔɔdokoloŋ.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Da te naa mɔ te dee di adansɛɛ nyi de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon kpila na ɔ bu Kristo ŋon nyi ɔ kaa lɛɛ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ pou nyee.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ lɛɛ do te ɔ gyuusu ɔ nɔɔ yako nyi Yesu yɛna Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon na, ɔtenate na Wurubuarɛ dana nɔɔdokoloŋ.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ kegyae keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae daa, mena dɔɔ de ta mo da wose lɔ kegyae kei dɔɔ. Kegyae pou nyee yɛna Wurubuarɛ mena dɔɔ nyaŋ ŋon n ne gyae Wurubuarɛ na n tebia na, ɛmɛɛ na Wurubuarɛ dana nɔɔdokoloŋ.

english_verse: We love because God loved us first.
translation_verse: Dɛɛ gyae Wurubuarɛ na de tebia nawolo nyi ŋon taŋgbɛɛ la gyae daa.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Akpaa n yako nyi “N ne gyae Wurubuarɛ” te n ne kɔla n dɔɔ na n yɛɛ dekarate e. Nawolo nyi nyaŋ ŋon n bɛɛ gyae n dɔɔ deniwalaŋ ŋon n ne naa e na n sia ya na, sena te n ke tale gyae Wurubuarɛ ŋon n bɛɛ naa e ya nɛ?

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Mmaraa keŋ Kristo ba mo fa daa yɛna nyi, nyaŋ ŋon n ne gyae Wurubuarɛ na kaboena nyi nya gyae n dɔɔ mɔ.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon waa lɛɛdi nyi Yesu yɛna Kristo ŋon nɛ yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e, te ŋolo ne gyae bu ɔ kya nɛ na ɔ ne gyae bu ŋon mɔ baa.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Akpaa dɛɛ gyae Wurubuarɛ te dee nyii ɔ dei na, kei nawola la nyi dɛɛ gyae Wurubuarɛ bia.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Akpaa de nyii Wurubuarɛ dei na, keŋ nawola la nyi dɛɛ gyae Wurubuarɛ te ɔ mmaraase ŋan mɔ be taŋ doŋ nyi dɔɔ tale di ŋe dɔɔ ya.

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ bu kamasɛ te di doŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ, te da ke lɛɛ Yesu Kristo di yele la te de dii doŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ.

english_verse: In fact, there are three who tell about it.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ abɔɔ atooro kɛŋa ne diina nombii kei adansɛɛ.

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon na loŋ keŋ na fatabo keŋ, te abɔɔ atooro kɛŋa pou ne sɛɛ dɔŋa.

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Deniwalaŋ de di nombii wose man adansɛɛ na dɛɛ lɛɛ ke do, mɔna Wurubuarɛ de di nombii wose man adansɛɛ na ka kela deniwalaŋ wui keŋ. Mena dɔɔ ŋan pou Wurubuarɛ be yako lee ɔ bu ŋon wose man nɛ kaboena nyi dɛɛ lɛɛ ŋa do.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon di nɛ, na ɔ gyeŋ ɔ konɔɔ man nyi adansɛɛ nombii keŋ yɛɛ anokoare. Te nyaŋ ŋon n bɛɛ lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ di ya na n ta besena e dekarate. Nawolo nyi n bɛɛ lɛɛ adansɛɛ keŋ Wurubuarɛ be dii lee ɔ bu ŋon wose man nɛ di ya.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Nombii keŋ Wurubuarɛ be yako yɛna nyi ɔ te fa daa nyeedoŋ kekpaa, te ɔ bu ŋon dɔɔ te dɛɛ ta na dee nyiŋ mena nyeedoŋ kei.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Lee mena dɔɔ walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ŋon na Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon dana nɔɔdokoloŋ nɛ, ɔ dana mena nyeedoŋ kei. Te walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ŋon na Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon be dana nɔɔdokoloŋ ya na, ɔ be dana mena nyeedoŋ kei ya. Nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ ŋmarase kɛŋa maa fa ɛmɛɛ baŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon di nɛ, na ɛ ke nyiŋ gyeŋ nyi ɛ dana nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Akpaa da gyeŋ nyi da sola e kolo ke gbɛɛ dɔɔ te ɔ ne yɛɛ fa daa na, kenaŋ na da gyeŋ nyi de nyiŋmaa te kaŋ ŋan dɔɔ sola e nɛ.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ nyi Wurubuarɛ bu kamasɛ bee doo dukum keyɛɛ man ya, nawolo nyi Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon ne gyee e mena dɔɔ ɔbɔnsam be gyae waa tale nyiŋ e ya.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Ɔbɔnsam ne di doŋ tɛɛle kei pou balaŋ dɔɔ, mɔna daa dɔɔ da gyeŋ nyi de yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ biawɔ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Da gyeŋ mɔ nyi Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon te kɔŋ kaa yela de ta gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ gbagba ŋon. Keŋ daa na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo dana nɔɔdokoloŋ dɔɔ, daa na Wurubuarɛ gbagba kei mɔ dana nɔɔdokoloŋ. Ŋon waageŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ gbagba ŋon ɔ ne fa deniwalaŋ nyeedoŋ kekpaa keŋ.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Me bia kpaakpaa, ɛ wɔŋ ɛ wose lee bɛɛneŋ ɔsom man.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Maŋ ɛ kegyia Gyɔn ne ŋmarasena tɔne kei mee yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa botɔɔ nɛ. Mɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia nideli lee me konɔɔ man. Mɔna na maageŋ ne gyae na ɛ nombia mena ya, baŋ pou ba gyeŋ anokoare keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ mɔ ne gyae ɛ nombia.

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: Anokoare keŋ doo de man nɛ dɔɔ te dɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia mena. Mena anokoare kei gyae ke doo de man kekpaa.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: De kɛɛ yɛɛ kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae te dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa mɔ nɛ, de kya Wurubuarɛ na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele daa na baa wii de waraŋase na baa fa daa wosefɛɛreŋ. Anokoare na kegyae

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Dana maŋ gyoŋ nideli ŋgba mɔɔ naa ɛ man baale ne sila anokoare keŋ, ŋgba mena keŋ de kya Wurubuarɛ ŋon ba wola daa nɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Kristotena, mɛɛ waase ŋon bo ɛ yela dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa. Kei te yɛɛ nyi mmaraa wɔle yaa mɛɛ ŋmarase mee yelee ŋon ya. De wulaa da gyeŋ mena mmaraa kei lee debaŋ keŋ dɔɔ lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ.

english_verse: Love means we do what God tells us. And from the beginning, he told you to love him.
translation_verse: Wurubuarɛ kegyae gbagba yɛna ŋgba dee di ɔ mmaraase dɔɔ. Wurubuarɛ mmaraa keŋ ɔ be fa daa lee kewalaŋ keŋ yɛna nyi dɛɛ gyae dɔŋa.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Akɛrɛɛtena burum te yaasee gyoo tɛɛle keŋ dɔɔ te be dɔŋɛɛ bɛɛ beo balaŋ. Be dɔŋɛɛ bɛɛ yako nyi Yesu Kristo ta bese deniwalaŋ kɔŋ tɛɛle kei dɔɔ ya. Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ ne yako mena nombia kɛŋa dinɔɔ na ɔ yɛɛ Kristo kɔlare dekarate ŋon walaŋ e.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ deke ɛ wose nideli, na kpene keŋ dɔɔ ɛ ne sila Wurubuarɛ nɛ ba lee ɛ nyiŋmaa man ya, na Wurubuarɛ kenyiŋ tɔ ŋon kom pou.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ bee sila nombia ŋan Kristo ba wolo nɛ ŋaageŋ ya te ɔ na mo ɔ wui ŋaale kpu nɛ, na ŋon na Wurubuarɛ be taŋ nɔɔdokoloŋ ya. Te walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne sila nombia ŋan Kristo ba wolo nɛ ŋaageŋ na, ɔtenate na de kya Wurubuarɛ na ɔ bu Yesu Kristo dana nɔɔdokoloŋ.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ lɛɛ e na ɔ kpuɛ na e ɔ nombiakumɛɛ keyɛɛ man.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Me dana nombia burum maa yako ŋon, mɔna me bɛɛ gyae maa ŋmarase ŋa yelee ŋon ya, nawolo nyi me loo doo nyi maa kɔŋ kaa naa ŋon na dɛɛ kyaa kolosi. Keŋ ne gyae la ke yela dee di gyoŋ nideli.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: Ɛ tebia Kristotena baŋ be kyaa kɛbo nɛ na do ŋon nɔɔ nideli.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Maŋ kegyia Gyɔn ŋon ne ŋmarasena tɔne kei mee yelee nyaŋ me gyoo kpaakpaa Gayose ŋon mɛɛ gyae neŋ lee me konɔɔ man nɛ.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: Me gyoo kpaakpaa, mɛɛ fane nyi kpene kamasɛ dɛɛ de fa neŋ, na n ke kyaa wosedoŋ man ŋgba mena keŋ n dɔŋɛɛ Kristo gbɛɛneŋ dɔɔ nideli nɛ.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ debaŋ keŋ de tebia Kristotena baale be kɔŋ kaa yako maŋ nyi n dana anokoare keŋ man nideli debaŋ kamasɛ nɛ. Te maŋ gbagba mɔ ma gyeŋ nyi n dɔŋɛɛ anokoare keŋ man nideli.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Kolo bɛɛ yɛɛ maŋ gyoŋ nideli ŋgba me nyii nyi me bia silana anokoare keŋ nɛ ya.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: Me gyoo kpaakpaa, n dana anokoare ŋgba mena keŋ n ne kɛɛ da loŋtona Kristotena dɔɔ na baŋ gba be yɛɛ ŋɔɔlawɔ nɛ.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Be man baale te yako daa Kristotena baŋ de kyaa kɛbo nɛ mena keŋ n ne gyae balaŋ. Be kɔŋ bee gyu na, yɛɛ kakyeŋ na n ka lese n konɔɔ man lɔ wɔ gbɛɛ, ŋgba mena keŋ Wurubuarɛ ne gyae nɛ.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Nawolo nyi lee Kristo yele man dɔɔ te be dɔŋɛɛ, te bɔɔ ne lɛɛ kolo lee baŋ ba te yɛɛ Kristotenawɔ ya nɛ gyaŋ ya.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ daa Kristotena te kaboena nyi dɛɛ tela balaŋ kɛwɔ dinɔɔ nideli, na daa na wɔ ke yɛɛ nɔɔdokoloŋ na dee nyiŋ yako anokoare nombia ŋan Wurubuarɛ ba lese wola nɛ fa balaŋ.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Ma te taŋgbɛɛ ŋmarase tɔne yelee ɛmɛɛ Kristotena baŋ ɛ kyaa botɔɔ nɛ, mɔna Dioterefese bɛɛ mo nombia ŋan mɔɔ ŋmarase yelee ŋon nɛ yɛɛ kolo ya. Nawolo nyi ɔ kegyaebii yɛna nyi ŋon ke yɛɛ ɛ siamante.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ akpaa me kɔŋ na maa lese nombia ŋan ɔ ne yɛɛ nɛ pou debɔɔ. Ɔ dɔŋ ɔ ne di akɛrɛɛ wɔlɛɛ da yele. Kɛŋa pou bɛɛ baa e ya, kenaŋ wɔle na ɔ ne bɛɛ de tebia Kristotena baŋ be dɔŋɛɛ bɛɛ yako Wurubuarɛ nombia nɛ kelɛɛ. Te ɔ ne tɔ baŋ bɛɛ gyae baa lɛɛ wɔ nɛ gbɛɛ, te ɔ ne gegi wɔ gba lee Kristotena baŋ man.

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: Me gyoo kpaakpaa, na kasee dukum keyɛɛ ya mɔna kasee deeli keyɛɛ. Nyaŋ ŋon n ne yɛɛ deeli na, n yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ bu e, te nyaŋ ŋon n ne yɛɛ dukum na n ba gyeŋ Wurubuarɛ ya.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: Me dana nombia burum maa yako neŋ, mɔna me bɛɛ gyae maa ŋmarase ŋa do tɔne man ya.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tɔne kei lee maŋ Gyuudi ŋon me yɛɛ Yesu Kristo tobaale e, te me kegyia yɛna Gyemisi nɛ gyaŋ. Mɛɛ ŋmarase ke mee yelee Kristotena baŋ pou de kya Wurubuarɛ ne gyae wɔ te ɔ be baake wɔ te Yesu Kristo ne kɛɛ be dɔɔ nɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Mɛɛ fane nyi Wurubuarɛ waa wii ɛ waraŋase na waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ, na waa yela balaŋ kegyae ke doo ɛ man nideli. Gyuudi kekolosi akɛrɛɛ wolala wose man nombia

english_verse: My dear friends, I really wanted to write you about God's saving power at work in our lives. But instead, I must write and ask you to defend the faith that God has once for all given to his people.
translation_verse: Me gyoona kpaakpaa, nafɔ me gyaewɔ nideli nyi maa ŋmarase ŋon lee nyeedoŋ keŋ daa na ŋon be nyim nɛ wose man. Mɔna me naawɔ nyi kaboena nyi maa ŋmarase sola ŋon nyi yaa yɛɛ kakyeŋ seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi keŋ man, na balaŋ kena nyi nombia ŋan dɔɔ yako ŋon nɛ yɛɛ ampaŋ. Wurubuarɛ ta mo mena nombia kɛŋa do ɔ balaŋ nyiŋmaa man karatetee dokoloŋ kekpaakekpaa.

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Nombiakumɛɛyɛɛra baale te nyiŋ gbɛɛ wɛɛlee kaa gyoo ɛ man. Be dɔŋɛɛ bee tulii Wurubuarɛ nyeedoŋ nombia ŋan ɔ ba mo boele daa nɛ, na baa nyiŋ gbɛɛ yɛɛ kewɔlɛɛ nombia. Ba te bɛɛ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dokoloŋ kooŋ ŋon, ŋon waageŋ yɛna de gyoo na de Gbeŋgyoo nɛ. Wurubuarɛ nombia aŋmaraseŋ see ŋan wulaa kolosiwɔ lee deŋele kewɔŋ keŋ doo daa na wɔ nɛ wose man.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ wulaa ɛ gyeŋ nombia kɛŋa man mɔna mɛɛ gyae maa tɔɔse ŋon nyiaa, de Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ lese ɔ balaŋ lee Igyipite tɛɛle man, mɔna wɔle wɔle na ɔ koe baŋ pou ba te lɛɛ e di ya nɛ.

english_verse: You also know about the angels who didn't do their work and left their proper places. God chained them with everlasting chains and is now keeping them in dark pits until the great day of judgment.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae maa tɔɔse ŋon bela nyiaa, debaŋ keŋ Wurubuarɛ kpilala baŋ be kyaa adido nɛ te tale kyaŋ be kegyiiri na be daseŋae keŋ Wurubuarɛ ba mo fa wɔ nɛ man nideli ya te bɔɔ lee ke wɔle nɛ, Wurubuarɛ doo wɔ agbaraagbaraase man kekpaakekpaa, nyi baa doo ditiŋtɛɛ keŋ te yɛɛ nsendee ya nɛ man. Botɔɔ te baa doo kelii wee keŋ Wurubuarɛ waa di be nombia nɛ.

english_verse: We should also be warned by what happened to the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah and the nearby towns. Their people became immoral and committed all sorts of sexual sins. Then God made an example of them and punished them with eternal fire.
translation_verse: Mena ke te Sodom na Gomora na donɔɔse ŋan pou be kilisi ŋa gyaŋee nɛ man balaŋ naa diyem boalaŋ man. Nawolo nyi ba moo ba wose do kafoŋ na nombia nkaraŋkaraŋ ŋan ŋe taŋ keyako ya nɛ keyɛɛ man. Wurubuarɛ moo kei baa fee daa kyɔɔla na dɛɛ gyeŋ nyi, baŋ pou baa yɛɛ mena nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa dinɔɔ nɛ, baa naa diyem nideli boalaŋ keŋ ke bɛɛ yem ya nɛ man.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Mɔna Wurubuarɛ kpilale kegyia ŋon bɛɛ baake e nyi Maekɛle nɛ gba te yɛɛ mena ya. Nawolo nyi debaŋ keŋ ŋon na ɔbɔnsam ne wɔŋee Mosesi woo dɔɔ koraŋ nɛ, ɔ te tale gyɔ ɔ konɔɔ yako nombiikum daale tia ɔbɔnsam ya, mɔna ɔ yako e bo nyi “De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ waa wɔŋ n deŋele.”

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Mena balaŋ benaŋ baa laako. Nawolo nyi be ta mo balee ŋon bɛɛ baake e nyi Kani nɛ gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ nawɔɔ, te kɔba dɔɔ be ta mo ba wose do gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ man ŋgba mena keŋ balee ŋon bɛɛ baake e nyi Baalam be yɛɛ nɛ. Be ta koro seŋ tia Wurubuarɛ ŋgba mena keŋ balee ŋon bɛɛ baake nyi Kora be yɛɛ nɛ. Mena dɔɔ baŋ mɔ baa yekee ŋgba Kora ŋonaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: Waa kɔŋ kaa di balaŋ pou nombia na waa bu balaŋ kumɛɛ baŋ fɔɔ lee be nombiakumɛɛ ŋan pou bɔɔ yɛɛ, na nombiakumɛɛ ŋan bɔɔ kolosi tia ŋon Wurubuarɛ nɛ dɔɔ.”

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Mɔna me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛ tɔɔse kpene keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo kpilala baŋ be yako see kaalaŋ nɛ.

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Mena balaŋ kɛwɔ yɛna balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ wɔlɛɛ balaŋ nsana nɛ. Baŋ gbagba kegyaebii te bɛɛ yɛɛ te Wurubuarɛ feliŋ be doo be man ya.

english_verse: Dear friends, keep building on the foundation of your most holy faith, as the Holy Spirit helps you to pray.
translation_verse: Mɔna me gyoona kpaakpaa, ɛmɛɛ dɔɔ ɛ mo Wurubuarɛ nombia kpaakpaa ŋan ɛ be lɛɛ di nɛ do dɔŋa kakyeŋ, na ɛ ke tale seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man. Ɛ fane lee Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon doŋ man.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Debaŋ keŋ ɛ kyaa ɛ ne daa wee keŋ de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo waa bese kɔŋ, na ɔ kaa wii de waraŋase na waa mo daa gyu de kaa kyaa ɔ gyaŋ kekpaakekpaa nɛ, ɛ mo Wurubuarɛ balaŋ kegyae keŋ kyaa na dɔŋa.

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Ɛ wɔŋ balaŋ baŋ bee gyu boalaŋ man lese na ɛ ke lɛɛ ba nyee. Balaŋ baale mɔ kyaa na, nombiakumɛɛ ŋan baŋ gbagba ne gyae nɛ te bɛɛ yɛɛ. Kaboena nyi yaa wii be waraŋase, mɔna ɛ kɛɛ ɛ wose dɔɔ nideli keŋ nyi bɔɔ mo be nombiakumɛɛ ŋan kyaŋee ŋon ya.

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: Ɛ yela dɛɛ ta de Gbeŋgyoo Yesu Kristo dɔɔ lese Wurubuarɛ yele, nawolo nyi ŋon waageŋ kooŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ na da nyeelɛɛre. Ŋon waageŋ kooŋ yɛna gyoo te ŋon waageŋ kooŋ danaana doŋ kpene kamasɛ dɔɔ leenaŋ gyaŋgba gyaŋgba keŋ, na gyɛŋ wee kei na weeya akaŋ ŋan pou kekpaakekpaa. Amɛn.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: Nombia ŋan doo tɔne kei man nɛ, Wurubuarɛ moona ŋa fa ɔ bu Yesu Kristo nyi waa lese ŋa wola ɔ balaŋ, na baa nyiŋ gyeŋ nombia ŋan gyae kekɔŋ weeya kɛŋa man nɛ. Keŋte Kristo kpila ɔ kpilale lee adido te ɔ kaa lese mena nombia kɛŋa wola maŋ ɔ tobaale Gyɔn.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Te maŋ Gyɔn mɔ ŋmarase nombia ŋan pou maŋ gbagba be naa na me sia nɛ see. Mee di adansɛɛ nyi nombia kɛŋa yɛɛ Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan Yesu Kristo ba lese wola maŋ nɛ.

english_verse: From John to the seven churches in Asia. I pray that you will be blessed with kindness and peace from God, who is and was and is coming. May you receive kindness and peace from the seven spirits before the throne of God.
translation_verse: Maŋ Gyɔn ne ŋmarase na tɔne kei mee yelee Kristotena akpiise nyetooro ŋan pou ŋe kyaa Esia tɛɛle man nɛ. Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa te ɔ wulaa ɔ kyaa lee gyaŋgba gyaŋgba keŋ te waa kyaa kekpaakekpaa nɛ, na ɔ feliŋ ŋon ɔ dana doŋse nyetooro te ɔ seŋɛɛ ŋon Wurubuarɛ gyooro gbeli keŋ siaman nɛ, baa mo be bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na baa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ.

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo mɔ waa mo ɔ bɛrɛɛ boele ŋon na waa fa ŋon wosefɛɛreŋ. Ŋon yɛna walaŋ ŋon ɔ ne di ɔ nombia dɔɔ, te ɔ ne di Wurubuarɛ wose man adansɛɛ anokoare gbɛɛ. Ŋon yɛna walaŋ gyaŋgbate ŋon ɔ be taŋgbɛɛ foŋ lee yeŋ man, te ŋon mɔ ne diina gyoori tɛɛle kei dɔɔ gyooneŋ pou dɔɔ. Ɔ ne gyae daa nideli mena dɔɔ te ɔ yeŋawɔ kyɛɛkee ɔ fatabo leki mo lɛɛ daa lee de nombiakumɛɛ pou man.

english_verse: Look! He is coming with the clouds. Everyone will see him, even the ones who stuck a sword through him. All people on earth will weep because of him. Yes, it will happen! Amen.
translation_verse: Ɛ kɛɛ, ɔ dɔŋ ŋɔma man ɔ ne kɔŋ! Walaŋ kamasɛ waa naa e na ɔ sia, te balaŋ baŋ gba bɔɔ sɔɔ e apia nɛ baa naa e. Te lee ŋon dɔɔ deise pou balaŋ baa kyaa walaŋsa man. Mena ne gyae la kekɔŋ. Amɛn.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ ŋon ɔ kyaa te ɔ wulaa ɔ kyaa lee gyaŋgba gyaŋgba, te waa kyaa kekpaakekpaa keŋ ŋon yɛna doŋ pou nyee nɛ kpa nyiaa, “Maŋ yɛna gyaŋgbate na ɔtomante.” Gyɔn naa Yesu na ɔ sia ŋgba dosɛɛ man nɛ

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Maŋ Gyɔn ŋon me yɛɛ ɛ dɔɔ Kristo baale e nɛ ne ŋmarase na tɔne kei. Lee keŋ me silana Kristo dɔɔ, daa na ŋon pou nyiŋa na konɔɔ te dɛɛ naa diyem keŋ balaŋ baŋ be doo ɔ gyoori keŋ man ne naa nɛ. Nawolo nyi keŋ mɔɔ kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan te mɔɔ di Yesu Kristo wose man adansɛɛ dɔɔ, te be fuŋa maŋ kelɔ tɛɛlebii keŋ loŋ be kilisi ke gyaŋee te bɛɛ baake ke nyi Patimose nɛ dɔɔ.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: De Gbeŋgyoo Wurubuarɛ ɔsom wee daale nɛ, Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon kaa gyoowɔ me man nideli te me nyii woya ŋaale me wɔle keŋkeŋ ŋgba kaberɛ te ba wolawɔ nɛ.

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: Me kɛɛ na kolo seŋɛɛ la nyeela nyetooro ŋan nsana nsana ŋgba deniwalaŋ nɛ. Ɔ doona kegba wurikyim tɔ ɔ nawɔɔ pou, te ɔ moo kɔba yayam abɔsɔɔ kpaŋ karase ɔ konɔɔ man.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: Ɔ nyee wolosɛɛ pareparepare ŋgba akaralɛɛ nɛ, te ɔ siabia mɔ ne ŋalakee ŋgba boalaŋ laakem nɛ.

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: Ɔ nawɔɔ ne ŋalakee ŋgba ba moo nyeele bo do boalaŋ man kyalase ke nɛ, te ɔ woya mɔ ne seree ŋgba boo wuu laa ne lam nɛ.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Na ɔ dana kyolobiise nyetooro ɔ dunoluŋ nyiŋmaa man, te yoosila keŋ ke yɛɛ sia na wɔle te kɛɛ bee nideli nɛ tosɛɛ ɔ nɔɔman. Na ɔ siagbɛɛ mɔ ne ŋalakee ŋgba weese ne gyɔɔ la kpalala nɛ.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Ma kena e nɛ, ma soo ma wose lɔ ɔ nawɔɔtɛɛ ŋgba ma yeŋae nɛ. Keŋte ɔ moo ɔ dunoluŋ nyiŋmaa gyakaa me dɔɔ te ɔ yako maŋ nyiaa, “Na yee ya. Maŋ yɛna gyaŋgbate na ɔtomante ŋon.

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: Maŋ yɛna walaŋ ŋon me kyaa nɛ. Kɛɛ, ma yeŋawɔ kaalaŋ mɔna nɛnɛɛ me kyaa kekpaakekpaa. Te me dana doŋ yeŋ na woyadɛɛ pou dɔɔ.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ŋmarase nombia ŋan n ne naa nɛ pou see. Ŋmarase ŋan pou ŋe kyaa debokeiman, na ŋan pou ŋe gyae kekɔŋ wɔle wɔle nɛ see.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ Gyɔn bela nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Efeso donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa. Nnɛ yaa maŋ walaŋ ŋon me dana kyolobiise nyetooro me dunoluŋ nyiŋmaa man, te me dɔŋɛɛ nyeela nyetooro ŋan bɔɔ mo kɔba yayam yɛɛ ŋa te bɛɛ mo kanease gyakaa ŋe dɔɔ nɛ nsana nsana ne yako.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, including your hard work and how you have endured. I know you won't put up with anyone who is evil. When some people pretended to be apostles, you tested them and found out they were liars.
translation_verse: ‘Ma gyeŋ ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa. Ɛ ne kyaŋ ɛ wose yɛɛ tom, te ɛ ne nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kayeyɛɛ man. Ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ bɛɛ mo ɛ wose do na balaŋ kumɛɛ ya. Ɛ ta gyoo balaŋ baŋ bɛɛ beo baake ba wose nyi be yɛɛ Kristo kpilalawɔ nɛ wose man kɛɛ, te ɛ naawɔ nyi be yɛɛ akɛrɛɛtenawɔ.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: Lee mena keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ maŋ di dɔɔ ɛ nyiŋa konɔɔ seŋ keŋkeŋ naa diyem, keŋ ɛ wose te yɔkɔse ŋon na ɛ ka lee me wɔle ya.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Mɔna nombii dokoloŋ keŋ mɔɔ naa lee ɛ wose man keŋ be dei ya yɛna nyiaa, balaŋ kegyae keŋ doo ɛ man lee kewalaŋ keŋ ɛ be lɛɛ Kristo di nɛ, ta lee ɛ man.

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Mɔna nombii dokoloŋ keŋ ɛ ne yɛɛ te ke dei me gyaŋ yɛna nyi, ɛ ne kɔla Nikolaitena nombia ayɛɛsa ŋgba mena keŋ maŋ mɔ ne kɔla ŋa nɛ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Smyrna: I am the first and the last. I died, but now I am alive! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Simaena donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa. ‘Nnɛ yaa maŋ walaŋ ŋon maŋ yɛna gyaŋgbate na ɔtomante, te mɔɔ yem te mɔɔ bese foŋ lee yeŋ man nɛ ne yako.

english_verse: I know how much you suffer and how poor you are, but you are rich. I also know the cruel things being said about you by people who claim to be God's people. But they are not really God's people. They are a group that belongs to Satan.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ nombia ŋan be yala ŋon na kayeyɛɛ keŋ ɛ na yeyɛɛ. Ma gyeŋ mɔ nyi ɛ yɛɛ ayematenawɔ, mɔna Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ na ɛ te yɛɛ ayematenawɔ ya. Ma gyeŋ nombiakumɛɛ ŋan balaŋ ne kolosi lee ɛ wose man. Mena balaŋ benaŋ ne baake ba wose nyi be yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ, mɔna ke yɛɛ dekara ke. N kɛɛ na be yɛɛ ɔbɔnsam balaŋwɔ.

english_verse: Don't worry about what you will suffer. The devil will throw some of you into jail, and you will be tested and made to suffer for ten days. But if you are faithful until you die, I will reward you with a glorious life.
translation_verse: Ɛ na yeli kayeyɛɛ keŋ gyae kaa kɔŋ ɛ dɔɔ nɛ ka do ŋon gyakoloŋ ya. Mɛɛ yako ŋon baa nyiaa, ɔbɔnsam waa yela baa kyaŋ ɛ man baale ketɔ deni na waa mo kɛɛse ŋon kɛɛ. Ɛ kena diyem menɛɛ weeya kufu. Nyi akpaa ke yɛɛ yeŋ ke koraŋ na, ɛ seŋ keŋkeŋ kelii ɔto. Akpaa ɛ yɛɛ mena na, maa mo nyeedoŋ kekpaa tɔ ŋon kom.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Pergamum: I am the one who has the sharp double-edged sword! Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ bela nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Pɛgamum donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa. ‘Nnɛ yaa maŋ walaŋ ŋon me dana yoosila sia na wɔle keŋ kɛɛ bee nideli nɛ ne yako.

english_verse: I know you live where Satan has his throne. But you have kept true to my name. Right there where Satan lives, my faithful witness Antipas was taken from you and put to death. Even then you did not give up your faith in me.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ ɛ dekyae. Ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ kyae botɔɔ keŋ ɔbɔnsam ne di gyoori nɛ. Debaŋ keŋ Antipase ne kolosi ma wose man nombia anokoare man fa balaŋ botɔɔ te bɔɔ ko e koraŋ nɛ, ɛ seŋawɔ keŋkeŋ ɛ kelɛɛdi man keŋ ɛ ta lee me wɔle.

english_verse: I do have a few things against you. Some of you are following the teaching of Balaam. Long ago he told Balak to teach the people of Israel to eat food that had been offered to idols and to be immoral.
translation_verse: Mɔna nombia bia ŋan mɔɔ naa lee ɛ wose man keŋ ŋɔɔ dei ya yɛna nyiaa, balaŋ baale doo ɛ man keŋ be silana Baalam kawola keŋ. Baalam ŋonaŋ wolana Balaki nyi waa beo Iseraetena na baa yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ. Keŋte ɔ beo wɔ yela be dii weenɛɛ ŋan bɔɔ mo deesi fa bɛɛneŋ nɛ, te ɔ besewɔ yela be yɛɛ kafoŋ nombia kpu.

english_verse: Now some of you are following the teaching of the Nicolaitans.
translation_verse: Mena ke mɔ te balaŋ baale doo ɛ man keŋ be silana Nikolaitena kawola keŋ.

english_verse: Turn back! If you don't, I will come quickly and fight against these people. And my words will cut like a sword.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ kyɛɛkee lee ɛ gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ man na ɛ ke kɔŋ Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ. Na mena ya nɛ be gyae ke di weeya ya maa kɔŋ ɛ gyaŋ, na maa mo yoosila keŋ doo me nɔɔman nɛ kaa yoo na mena balaŋ benaŋ.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. To everyone who wins the victory, I will give some of the hidden food. I will also give each one a white stone with a new name written on it. No one will know that name except the one who is given the stone. The Letter to Thyatira
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ dana deŋele anenyiiŋ dei nɛ, waa see deŋele na waa nyii kpene Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ne kolosi fa Kristotena baŋ nɛ. Ɔ kpa nyiaa, walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ sem keŋkeŋ te ɔ yoo di nombiakumɛɛ pou dɔɔ nɛ, maa fa ɔtenate weenɛɛ ŋan weesɛɛ te bɛɛ baake ŋa nyi Maana nɛ ŋaale waa di. Maa bese fa ɔtenate boe wolom keŋ bɔɔ ŋmarase yele wɔle daale gyakaa ke dɔɔ nɛ kpu. Ŋolo be gyae waa gyeŋ yele keŋ gyakaa boe kenaŋ dɔɔ kpu na walaŋ ŋon waa nyiŋ ke nɛ ya.’ ” Tɔne keŋ bɔɔ ŋmarase yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Tiatira donɔɔ man nɛ

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Thyatira: I am the Son of God! My eyes are like flames of fire, and my feet are like bronze. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ bela nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Tiatira donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa, ‘Nnɛ yaa maŋ Wurubuarɛ bu ŋon me sia ne ŋalakee ŋgba boalaŋ laakem nɛ, te me nawɔɔ mɔ ne ŋalakee ŋgba nyeele keŋ bɔɔ mo do boalaŋ man kyalase ke nɛ ne yako.

english_verse: I know everything about you, including your love, your faith, your service, and how you have endured. I know you are doing more now than you have ever done before.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa. Ma gyeŋ ɛ balaŋ kegyae na ɛ kelɛɛdi na yɔ ɔsom na ɛ kɛɛ kyaŋ ɛ wose seŋ keŋkeŋ kayeyɛɛ man. Ma gyeŋ nyi nɛnɛɛ dɔɔ, ɛ ne yɛɛ nombia kpaakpaa kela debaŋ keŋ ɛ be taŋgbɛɛ lɛɛ maŋ di nɛ.

english_verse: I gave her a chance to turn from her sins, but she did not want to stop doing these immoral things.
translation_verse: Ma te kɛɛ ɔ siaman kyare nyi nafɔ waa kyɛɛkee lee ɔ gbɛɛneŋ kumɛɛ ŋenaŋ man na waa kɔŋ Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ, mɔna ɔ bɛɛ gyae waa tina ɔ nombiakumɛɛ ŋenaŋ keyɛɛ yela ya.

english_verse: I will even kill her followers. Then all the churches will see that I know everyone's thoughts and feelings. I will treat each of you as you deserve.
translation_verse: Maa koe ɔ balaŋ baŋ pou be silana e nɛ. Me yɛɛ mena nɛ, Kristotena baŋ pou baa gyeŋ nyi maŋ yɛna walaŋ ŋon ɔ gyeŋ balaŋ konɔɔse na ba agyueŋse man nombia pou. Nombia ŋan walaŋ kamasɛ ne yɛɛ nɛ te maa kɛɛ na maa tɔ e kom.

english_verse: Some of you in Thyatira don't follow Jezebel's teaching. You don't know anything about what her followers call the “deep secrets of Satan.” So I won't burden you down with any other commands.
translation_verse: Nɛnɛɛ ɛmɛɛ balaŋ akaŋ baŋ ɛ kyaa Tiatira donɔɔ man te ɛ be bɛɛ ɛ te sila Gyesebɛli kawolakum keŋ ya, te ɛ be bɛɛ ɛ te kasee kpene keŋ baŋ be silana alo ŋonaŋ nɛ ne baake nyi ɔbɔnsam nombia aweeseŋ ŋan ya nɛ, mɔɔ gyae maa mo kasolɔ daale lɔ ɛ dɔɔ bela ya.

english_verse: But until I come, you must hold firmly to the teaching you have.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ kyaŋ nombia ŋan ɛ dana nɛ man keŋkeŋ kelii debaŋ keŋ maa bese kɔŋ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Sardis: I have the seven spirits of God and the seven stars. Listen to what I say. I know what you are doing. Everyone may think you are alive, but you are dead.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ bela nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Saadise donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa. Nnɛ yaa maŋ walaŋ ŋon me dana Wurubuarɛ feliŋse nyetooro, na kyolobiise nyetooro ŋan me nyiŋmaa man nɛ ne yako. ‘Ma gyeŋ ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa. Ɛ te lɛɛ yele nyi ɛ dana nyeedoŋ, mɔ n kɛɛ na ɛ ta yekee te ɛ dɔŋ.

english_verse: Wake up! You have only a little strength left, and it is almost gone. So try to become stronger. I have found that you are not completely obeying God.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ ɛ koro na ɛ ka do ɛ kelɛɛdi kyomii keŋ be kaa te kɛɛ gyae ke ka yeŋ nɛ doŋ. Nawolo nyi ma te naa nyi ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa bɛɛ tekaa gyoo me Wurubuarɛ sia ya.

english_verse: A few of you in Sardis have not dirtied your clothes with sin. You will walk with me in white clothes, because you are worthy.
translation_verse: Mɔna ɛ dana balaŋ kyomii baale Saadise donɔɔ man botɔɔ, keŋ baŋ te yɛɛ nombiakumɛɛ mo ayimɛɛ kpatee ba wose ya. Mena balaŋ benaŋ baa do kegbase wolomɛɛ pareparepare sila maŋ, nawolo nyi be kaboena nyi baa sila maŋ.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will wear white clothes. Their names will not be erased from the book of life, and I will tell my Father and his angels that they are my followers.
translation_verse: Walaŋ ŋon ɔ sem keŋkeŋ te ɔ yoo di nombiakumɛɛ pou dɔɔ nɛ, maa do ɔtenate kegba wolom ŋgba mena balaŋ benaŋ nɛ. Mɔɔ gyae maa lese ɔtenate yele lee nyeedoŋ tɔne keŋ man ya. Maa di ɔtenate wose man adansɛɛ fa me kya na ɔ kpilala baŋ pou nyi ɔ yɛɛ me walaŋ e.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Philadelphia: I am the one who is holy and true, and I have the keys that belonged to David. When I open a door, no one can close it. And when I close a door, no one can open it. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ bela nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Filadefia donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa. Nnɛ yaa maŋ walaŋ ŋon ayimɛɛ be doo ma wose man ya, te mee di anokoare nɛ ne yako. Maŋ danaana gyoo Defidi gyoorobiiri safowaa keŋ. Akpaa me kyaŋ ke tɔ na, ŋolo be tale toro ke ya. Te akpaa ma toro ke na, ŋolo mɔ be kyaa waa tale kyaŋ ke tɔ ya.

english_verse: I know everything you have done. And I have placed before you an open door no one can close. You were not very strong, but you obeyed my message and did not deny you are my followers.
translation_verse: ‘Kɛɛ, ma gyeŋ ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa pou. Ma gyeŋ nyi ɛ be dana doŋ nideli ya, mɔna ɛ dana me nombia ŋan man keŋkeŋ keŋ ɛ ta lee me wɔle ya. Mena dɔɔ me ta toro denanɔɔ see ŋon keŋ ŋolo be kyaa waa tale tɔ ke ya.

english_verse: Now you will see what I will do with those people who belong to Satan's group. They claim to be God's people, but they are liars. I will make them come and kneel down at your feet. Then they will know that I love you.
translation_verse: Mɛɛ gyae ɛ ka gyeŋ nyi mena ɔbɔnsam tewulɛɛ baŋ bɛɛ beo baake ba wose nyi be yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ, mɔna ba te yɛɛ Gyudatenawɔ ya nɛ, maa yela mena balaŋ benaŋ pou kaa buŋii ɛ nawɔɔtɛɛ, na be popou kena nyi mɛɛ gyae ɛ nombia nideli.

english_verse: You obeyed my message and endured. So I will protect you from the time of testing everyone in all the world must go through.
translation_verse: Lee mena keŋ ɛ be di me nombia dɔɔ te ɛ be nyiŋ konɔɔ seŋ keŋkeŋ ɛ kayeyɛɛ man dɔɔ, maa lese ŋon lee kayeyɛɛ dinaa keŋ gyae ke kɔŋ kaa kɛɛse tɛɛle kei dɔɔ balaŋ pou kɛɛ nɛ man.

english_verse: I am coming soon. So hold firmly to what you have, and no one will take away the crown you will be given as your reward.
translation_verse: Kɛɛ, be gyae kedi weeya ya, maa kɔŋ. Mena dɔɔ ɛ kyaŋ anokoare kawola keŋ ɛ gyeŋ nɛ man keŋkeŋ, na ŋolo be nyiŋ lɛo gyooro kotɔtɔɔ keŋ mɔɔ yako nyi maa fa ŋon nɛ lee ɛ nyiŋmaa man ya.

english_verse: Everyone who wins the victory will be made into a pillar in the temple of my God, and they will stay there forever. I will write on each of them the name of my God and the name of his city. It is the new Jerusalem my God will send down from heaven. I will also write on them my own new name.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ sem keŋkeŋ te ɔ yoo di ɔbɔnsam na nombiakumɛɛ pou dɔɔ nɛ, maa mo e yɛɛ ŋgba dekparadaŋ nɛ me kya Wurubuarɛ ɔsom deni dinaa keŋ man. Mena walaŋ ŋonaŋ be gyae waa tuu lee botɔɔ korakora ya. Maa ŋmarase me kya Wurubuarɛ yele, na me kya Wurubuarɛ donɔɔ Gyerusalɛm wɔle keŋ yele gyakaa ɔ dɔɔ. Mena Gyerusalɛm wɔle kei gyae ke tisi bo lee me kya Wurubuarɛ gyaŋ adido kɔŋ. Na maa bese ŋmarase maŋ gbagba mɔ yele wɔle gyakaa ɔtenate dɔɔ.

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Laodicea: I am the one called Amen! I am the faithful and true witness and the source of God's creation. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: Keŋte ɔ besewɔ yako maŋ bela nyiaa, “Ŋmarase nombia kɛŋa yelee Kristotena baŋ be kyaa Laodisia donɔɔ man nɛ be kegyia ŋon. Yako e nyiaa. Nnɛ yaa maŋ Yesu ŋon Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan pou be tɛɛ me dɔɔ kɔŋ mena, te mɛɛ mo me konɔɔ pou kolosi Wurubuarɛ nombia ŋan anokoare man, te maŋ yɛna abɔɔ ŋan pou Wurubuarɛ be yɛɛ nɛ nyee nɛ ne yako.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, and you are not cold or hot. I wish you were either one or the other.
translation_verse: Ma gyeŋ ɛ nombia ayɛɛsa pou nyi ɛ be laŋɛɛ ya, te ɛ be fɛɛ mɔ ya. Ma kegyaebii yɛna nyi nafɔ yaa laŋe yaa ɛ fɛɛ.

english_verse: But since you are lukewarm and neither cold nor hot, I will spit you out of my mouth.
translation_verse: Mɔna keŋ ɛ be laŋɛɛ ya, te ɛ be fɛɛ mɔ ya, te ɛ yɛɛ bo mɔlaa nɛ dɔɔ, mɛɛ gyae maa buusu ŋon lee me nɔɔman leki.

english_verse: You claim to be rich and successful and to have everything you need. But you don't know how bad off you really are. You are pitiful, poor, blind, and naked.
translation_verse: Ɛmɛɛ kpa ɛ te nyiŋ ɛ wose keŋ abɔɔ pou te dee fa ŋon, mena dɔɔ kolo bee hia ŋon bela ya. Mɔ n kɛɛ na ɛ dɔŋ kyekpakyekpakyekpa, te ɛ yɛɛ ayematenawɔ. Ɛ sia te yɛlɛɛ te ɛ dɔŋ diteŋteli, te ɛ nombia mɔ dana waraŋase.

english_verse: Buy your gold from me. It has been refined in a fire, and it will make you rich. Buy white clothes from me. Wear them and you can cover up your shameful nakedness. Buy medicine for your eyes, so you will be able to see.
translation_verse: Mena dɔɔ mɛɛ yako ŋon baa nyiaa, ɛ kɔŋ kaa lɛɛ kɔba yayam kpaakpaate keŋ bɔɔ mo ke do boalaŋ man kyalase ke nɛ me gyaŋ. Keŋ ne gyae la ke yela ɛ ke nyiŋ ɛ wose nideli. Ɛ kɔŋ kaa lɛɛ kegbase wolomɛɛ me gyaŋ na ɛ ka mo wuu ɛ wose diteŋteli na ɛ desɛŋ keŋ. Ɛ kɔŋ kaa lɛɛ sia tee me gyaŋ do ɛ sia, na ɛ ke nyiŋ naa nideli.

english_verse: Listen! I am standing and knocking at your door. If you hear my voice and open the door, I will come in and we will eat together.
translation_verse: Ɛ tei maŋ. Ma seŋɛɛ denanɔɔ man mɛɛ gyɔ disim keŋ. Nyi akpaa ŋolo de nyii ma woya te ɔ toro maŋ disim keŋ nɛ, maa gyoo ɔtenate gyaŋ na daa na e ka do nyiŋmaa di.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches.
translation_verse: Walaŋ kamasɛ ŋon ɔ dana deŋele anenyiiŋ dei nɛ, waa see deŋele na waa nyii kpene keŋ Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon ne kolosi fa Kristotena baŋ nɛ.”

english_verse: After this, I looked and saw a door that opened into heaven. Then the voice that had spoken to me at first and that sounded like a trumpet said, “Come up here! I will show you what must happen next.”
translation_verse: Kɛŋa pou wɔle nɛ, ma besewɔ kɛɛ na te me naa disim daale adido Wurubuarɛ man na ka toroɛ. Keŋte ma besewɔ nyii woya ŋan be kolosi na maŋ kaalaŋ ŋgba kaberɛ te ba wolawɔ nɛ ne yako maŋ nyiaa, “Gyeŋ kɔŋ adido kɛbo, na maa lese abɔɔ ŋan pou kaboena nyi ŋe dɛɛ kɔŋ kɛŋa wɔle nɛ wola neŋ.”

english_verse: Right then the Spirit took control of me, and there in heaven I saw a throne and someone sitting on it.
translation_verse: Karatetee dokoloŋ te Wurubuarɛ feliŋ ŋon kaa gyoowɔ me man, te ɔ yela me naa gyooro gbeli daale adido, na ŋolo kyaa ke dɔɔ.

english_verse: Flashes of lightning and roars of thunder came out from the throne in the center of the circle. Seven torches, which are the seven spirits of God, were burning in front of the throne.
translation_verse: Na ɔga keŋmaale na ɔga kefae na lee gyooro gbeli dinaa keŋ dedoi man. Te kanease nyetooro mɔ baŋɛɛ gyooro gbeli kenaŋ siaman ŋɛɛ kpaa. Kanease ŋenaŋ yɛna Wurubuarɛ feliŋse nyetooro ŋan.

english_verse: Also in front of the throne was something that looked like a glass sea, clear as crystal. Around the throne in the center were four living creatures covered front and back with eyes.
translation_verse: Keŋte me naa kolo gyooro gbeli keŋ siaman ŋgba ɛpo loŋ nɛ. Na ke yɛɛ geleŋgeleŋ te kɛɛ ŋalakee ŋgba diiku nɛ. Na wonise banaara baale baŋ be dana nyeedoŋ nɛ dɔŋɛɛ nsana nsana kilisi gyooro gbeli keŋ. Be dana sia be siaman na be wɔle pou.

english_verse: The first creature was like a lion, the second one was like a bull, the third one had the face of a human, and the fourth was like a flying eagle.
translation_verse: Woni gyaŋgbate ŋon yɛɛ ŋgba dinaate nɛ, te balate ŋon mɔ yɛɛ ŋgba nunkyue baale nɛ. Batoorote ŋon siagbɛɛ yɛɛ ŋgba deniwalaŋ nɛ, te banaarate ŋon mɔ yɛɛ ŋgba otoloku ŋon ɔ ne furufu feliŋ man nɛ.

english_verse: The living creatures kept praising, honoring, and thanking the one who sits on the throne and who lives forever and ever.
translation_verse: Wonise banaara baŋ ne kpee nɔɔneŋ kɛlɛɛ walaŋ ŋon ɔ kyaa gyooro gbeli keŋ dɔɔ kekpaakekpaa nɛ lese ɔ yele. Debaŋ kamasɛ keŋ be yɛɛ mena na,
